name: Zak Malamed
subject: Tonight’s vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
Just a moment ago...
#
Just a moment ago, Republicans in the House had their second chance to expel George Santos for defrauding our district.

But once again, they failed to hold him accountable for his lies, corruption, and dozens of federal crimes.

I cannot help but wonder what message this sends to the general public.

_What values do we hold dear if we allow a conman like George Santos to steal his supporters identities, tout a phony resume, relentlessly deceive voters and still remain in power?_

This is the central question of my campaign.

**The answer is that Congress is no place for people like Santos. We need to leave corrupt politicians like him in the past and embrace a new generation of leaders whose guiding principles are honesty, dignity, and public service.**

The people of New York’s Third District are looking to our leaders to answer for rising inflation, skyrocketing costs of living, and affordable health care.

Our allies in Israel and Ukraine are looking to us for support in their darkest hours.

And instead of addressing these real-world issues, the House is meeting to reprimand George Santos – and they cannot even get that done!

**New York deserves a new leader who focuses on advancing Democratic values in Congress so we can help those who need us the most.**

While I am deeply disappointed in tonight’s outcome, I am not surprised.

We need a change – and we need it now.

With gratitude,

Zak

[Support us today ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zak-for-congress-1?amount=25?amount=25&refcode=em20231101-el&refcode2=559_8507_HY7FKy&akid=559%2E8507%2EHY7FKy)

name: Adam
subject: Kevin McCarthy is petty, vindictive — and completely humiliated with nothing left to lose
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| With a campaign account flush with over $10 MILLION in cash and nowhere to spend it, McCarthy might just try to make good on his promise that I can never become California’s U.S. Senator.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4373%2E5257348%2EheQsbn)
Derek, Kevin McCarthy has nothing to lose.
Well, nothing _else_.
**With a campaign account flush with over $10 MILLION in cash and nowhere to spend it, McCarthy might just try to make good on his promise that I can _never become California’s U.S. Senator._**
Look, I know that McCarthy’s word means less than nothing.
But freed from the responsibilities of supporting frontline House Republicans as Speaker, he’s a loose cannon open to being petty and vindictive, not to mention with money to burn in a desperate act of retribution against one of his biggest political enemies — _yours truly._
_ABC News_ reported that McCarthy helped raise nearly **$650 million** for his Congressional Leadership Fund super PAC, and with just a few months until our U.S. Senate primary election, he could try to get back into Trump’s good graces by submarining my candidacy.
**We can’t let it happen.**
**[Can you make a contribution of $3 to help?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231101_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=4&akid=4373%2E5257348%2EheQsbn)**

body:
As Crooked Joe tries to remove President Trump’s name from the ballot...
| | Friend,
---
A TRIAL is currently taking place to try and REMOVE President Trump’s name from the BALLOT and hand the 2024 election to Crooked Joe Biden.
**That’s why President Trump is asking as _many voters as possible_ to pledge to cast their 2024 ballot for TRUMP.**
But, as we’ve reviewed the list of pledged ballots and checked our own database of Trump Supporters, we saw that you hadn’t pledged to cast your ballot yet.

body:
Don’t abandon House Democrats!
| **_⚠️ FINAL NOTICE ⚠️_
DEADLINE: EXPIRED
SIGNATURE STATUS: MISSING**
* * *
You were hand-selected as one of 500 top supporters to sign our card standing with House Democrats — **_yet your signature is nowhere to be found._** [**We’re giving you ONE last chance to sign or you’ll be moved to our NON-SUPPORTER list: Please add your name now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56323?t=6&akid=11610%2E878179%2EPAPQyn) | [Donate $3 to sign the card now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56323?t=7&akid=11610%2E878179%2EPAPQyn)
---
TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear House Democrats,

_Thank you for your incredible work for the American people!_**

The far-right Republican majority is a total DISASTER, even ousting their own Speaker and electing a new extremist.

Meanwhile, your caucus under Rep. Hakeem Jeffries’s leadership is unified and dedicated to saving abortion rights, voting rights, our democracy, and more.

Your strength makes me proud to be a Democrat — **and gives me hope that we can take down the GOP’s razor-thin majority next November!**

[**Fighting against the MAGA dark money machine won’t be easy, so I’m chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help flip the 5 seats we need to turn the House BIDEN-BLUE! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56323?t=8&akid=11610%2E878179%2EPAPQyn) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/56323?t=9&akid=11610%2E878179%2EPAPQyn)
---
**_X A THANKFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11610%2E878179%2EPAPQyn). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11610%2E878179%2EPAPQyn).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11610%2E878179%2EPAPQyn) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=11610%2E878179%2EPAPQyn). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11610%2E878179%2EPAPQyn)
---

body:
Congress in Chaos | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/amyfororegon/amy-ryan-coursers-nationwide-expedition-17357299?e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
| | [ ](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=37e8440198&e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
| Peter,
---
| During my previous run for Congress, your support as a donor meant so much to me. I’m excited to announce that I’m running again.

With Oregon redistricting, many of the counties I won in are now in CD-4, which will be a great fit with the previous victories and support in those counties.

I could not have achieved the milestones of my previous campaign without your generous donation. Your support made a huge difference and for that I am extremely thankful. I need your support now more than ever in the battle to save our nation from the deeply entrenched progressives.
---
| [JOIN MY FIGHT AGAIN »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=8b6d8525bc&e=36bbc8e2ca "JOIN MY FIGHT AGAIN »")
---
| In our short history as a country of patriots, who have embraced individual liberties and demanded to have a government that is by, for, and of the people – we’ve become leaders of the free world. With that recognition comes great responsibility, and this reminds me of the phrase, “Peace through strength.”

Today the endless addiction to conflict and weaponization of our government against its own people, has us frustrated over the endless political games and weakness of our current administration. This is not my America – nor is it the America of **We The People. **

**I love our nation and its people, and I believe America and its citizens are worth fighting for – and I’m excited to announce my candidacy to serve Oregon’s 4th Congressional District!**

I announced my candidacy recently [**in this video:**](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=0ce1e5a500&e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=cbf27efc25&e=36bbc8e2ca)
---
| _**As your Congresswoman, I will be Relentless in the fight for our great nation, and YOUR rights, voice and OUR Conservative values.**_
---
|
---
| | [SEND ME TO CONGRESS TO FIGHT FOR YOU »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=8195989990&e=36bbc8e2ca "SEND ME TO CONGRESS TO FIGHT FOR YOU »")
---
| With your support I promise to prioritize these 7 things: National security, fiscal accountability, ending the weaponization of our government, securing the integrity of our elections, a balanced budget, securing the American borders, and ensuring safe communities for all of us.

**I'm ready to be your voice but I can't do this alone.** I need you to join me in my battle all the way to DC. Please [sign up for my newsletter](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=5ee3fd4cd1&e=36bbc8e2ca), share my social media posts and get engaged!

**As your candidate and Congresswoman** , You will always know where I stand on the important issues, the policies, and world events. I will always listen to you: _The People_.

**I appreciate your prayers and[of course your contributions](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=ff04445326&e=36bbc8e2ca) are critical to my success in this battle of GOOD vs. EVIL.** We have a country to save! Donate now, and together we can drain The swamp in DC.

For America,
---
| [DONATE $40 »](https://amyfororegon.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d8661a60d2c62d2072b3f98cb&id=1e09c052a0&e=36bbc8e2ca "DONATE $40 »")

| **CHALLENGE FOR THE WEEK: Social Media Campaign Support Rally!**
---
| Friend, grassroots support **is key** to changing the status quo. By sharing my emails and social media posts, this will greatly help me in getting the word out to Oregonians.

I’m building my campaign’s social media presence and would be grateful for a “follow” from you on any of my accounts:

clean_body: Congress in Chaos | | | | | | Peter, | During my previous run for Congress, your support as a donor meant so much to me. I’m excited to announce that I’m running again. With Oregon redistricting, many of the counties I won in are now in CD-4, which will be a great fit with the previous victories and support in those counties. I could not have achieved the milestones of my previous campaign without your generous donation. Your support made a huge difference and for that I am extremely thankful. I need your support now more than ever in the battle to save our nation from the deeply entrenched progressives. | "JOIN MY FIGHT AGAIN »" | In our short history as a country of patriots, who have embraced individual liberties and demanded to have a government that is by, for, and of the people – we’ve become leaders of the free world. With that recognition comes great responsibility, and this reminds me of the phrase, “Peace through strength.” Today the endless addiction to conflict and weaponization of our government against its own people, has us frustrated over the endless political games and weakness of our current administration. This is not my America – nor is it the America of We The People. I love our nation and its people, and I believe America and its citizens are worth fighting for – and I’m excited to announce my candidacy to serve Oregon’s 4th Congressional District! I announced my candidacy recently | | | As your Congresswoman, I will be Relentless in the fight for our great nation, and YOUR rights, voice and OUR Conservative values. | | | "SEND ME TO CONGRESS TO FIGHT FOR YOU »" | With your support I promise to prioritize these 7 things: National security, fiscal accountability, ending the weaponization of our government, securing the integrity of our elections, a balanced budget, securing the American borders, and ensuring safe communities for all of us. I'm ready to be your voice but I can't do this alone. I need you to join me in my battle all the way to DC. Please , share my social media posts and get engaged! As your candidate and Congresswoman , You will always know where I stand on the important issues, the policies, and world events. I will always listen to you: The People. I appreciate your prayers and are critical to my success in this battle of GOOD vs. EVIL. We have a country to save! Donate now, and together we can drain The swamp in DC. For America, | "DONATE $40 »" | "DONATE $80 »" | "DONATE $100 »" | "DONATE $500 »" | "DONATE $1000 »" | "DONATE $3300 »" | "DONATE ANY AMOUNT »" | | Candidate for U.S. Congress, OR-4 Wife Mom Business Owner Past City Councilor Community Servant Patriot | | | | CHALLENGE FOR THE WEEK: Social Media Campaign Support Rally! | Friend, grassroots support is key to changing the status quo. By sharing my emails and social media posts, this will greatly help me in getting the word out to Oregonians. body:
Schweikert wants people on Ozempic?? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72635303/435932821/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20231101_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThhZDg5OTQtMWI3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BgQnrpANptsNfGBWWn_ocYQ-4O7H4OVNzNNIl4qCHRA=)
---
Their audacity knows no limits, team. Republican Rep. David Schweikert (AZ-01) suggested giving Ozempic, which is normally prescribed to type two diabetics and has NOT been approved as a weight-management medication, to “morbidly obese populations” that rely on government health programs and agencies like Medicare, Medicaid, Indian Health Service, and the VA. This is a disgustingly fatphobic low for David, who voted AGAINST the Inflation Reduction Act that reduced the deficit and lowered the cost of life-saving drugs for hundreds of thousands of Arizonans. [**That’s why we’re asking for a dollar today. Just one dollar to defeat David in Arizona’s 1st and win the majority in the House next November. Can we count on you to pitch in a dollar (or more!) today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72635304/435932822/635347067?amount=1&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20231101_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThhZDg5OTQtMWI3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BgQnrpANptsNfGBWWn_ocYQ-4O7H4OVNzNNIl4qCHRA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72635305/435932824/635347067?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20231101_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZThhZDg5OTQtMWI3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BgQnrpANptsNfGBWWn_ocYQ-4O7H4OVNzNNIl4qCHRA=)

Schweikert claims that Congress isn’t willing to do “the things that are difficult” (like cutting Social Security or Medicare spending) but he has no problem requiring everyday Americans to dangerously misuse medication.
It would’ve been really easy to vote for the legislation Democrats have continued to put forward that has lowered the cost of medications, like insulin, that Arizonans rely on.
It would be really easy for David to break away from the extremists in the House and work across the aisle on a bipartisan leadership solution.
[**David isn’t even willing to do the easy things to help Arizonans, but will use his platform and position to advocate for dangerous things that put Arizonans at risk. If everyone reading this far pitched in just a dollar today, we’d be able to get ahead on our strategy to defeat David and the extreme right next November. clean_body: Schweikert wants people on Ozempic?? | = Their audacity knows no limits, team. Republican Rep. David Schweikert (AZ-01) suggested giving Ozempic, which is normally prescribed to type two diabetics and has NOT been approved as a weight-management medication, to “morbidly obese populations” that rely on government health programs and agencies like Medicare, Medicaid, Indian Health Service, and the VA. This is a disgustingly fatphobic low for David, who voted AGAINST the Inflation Reduction Act that reduced the deficit and lowered the cost of life-saving drugs for hundreds of thousands of Arizonans. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Schweikert claims that Congress isn’t willing to do “the things that are difficult” (like cutting Social Security or Medicare spending) but he has no problem requiring everyday Americans to dangerously misuse medication. It would’ve been really easy to vote for the legislation Democrats have continued to put forward that has lowered the cost of medications, like insulin, that Arizonans rely on. It would be really easy for David to break away from the extremists in the House and work across the aisle on a bipartisan leadership solution. = Together we can put an end to this extremism. Thank you in advance for your contribution! — Arizona Democratic Party Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | Paid for by Arizona Democrats

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72635398/435937925/-192700460?refcode=ea.7b66d194-1e79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7b66d194-1e79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2I2NmQxOTQtMWU3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Fye57HlFmudH190xI1E1aD0lRnFXkN32dIw1DtBBhXk=) I’ll be quick, Peter. I just walked off the debate stage with Tate Reeves — it’s clear we have two very different visions for what Mississippi needs. **I believe that we need to expand Medicaid to 220,000 working Mississippians, clean up corruption, eliminate the grocery tax, and move our state forward.** **[And if you believe in that vision, I hope you’ll chip in $25 right now. This race is neck-and-neck, so any amount makes a major difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72635399/435937926/-192700460?amount=25&refcode=ea.7b66d194-1e79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7b66d194-1e79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2I2NmQxOTQtMWU3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Fye57HlFmudH190xI1E1aD0lRnFXkN32dIw1DtBBhXk=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72635400/435937927/-192700460?amount=25&refcode=ea.7b66d194-1e79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7b66d194-1e79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2I2NmQxOTQtMWU3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Fye57HlFmudH190xI1E1aD0lRnFXkN32dIw1DtBBhXk=)**
---
Look, Tate Reeves talked a lot about California and New York — but I’m running to be a governor for Caledonia and New Albany. We have enough problems going on in this state that we need to solve.
Folks are tired of Tate’s corruption. That’s why poll after poll shows this race virtually tied. We have a real shot at winning. You know it, I know it, and Tate knows it. That’s why he spent so much time tonight lying about my record.
But we aren’t taking anything for granted from now until November 7th. Tate still has a multi-million dollar advantage over us, so we aren’t taking our foot off the gas for a second.
That’s why my team is raising $50,000 before Election Day. This wasn’t a number pulled out of thin air — it’s exactly what we need to raise to fund our final voter outreach push.
**[Can I count on you to chip in $25, Peter? Your donation goes directly to knocking on doors, printing volunteer materials, and mobilizing voters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72635401/435937928/-192700460?amount=25&refcode=ea.7b66d194-1e79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.7b66d194-1e79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2I2NmQxOTQtMWU3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Fye57HlFmudH190xI1E1aD0lRnFXkN32dIw1DtBBhXk=)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Brandon Presley

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: We, the People, can unplug the war machine
body:
Who is better poised to enforce human rights in Israel than labor leaders in the United States?

# [We, the People, can unplug the war machine](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138508212&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NTA4MjEyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTg4OTUyNDcsImV4cCI6MTcwMTQ4NzI0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cuOQNqZD88azj8XZjavb6_UFpVhk0tReX4O-t345JhQ)

The world has watched in horror as a day of mass trauma for Isreal has escalated into an [outright genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/a66701f9-ec69-408d-918c-37845487334a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Palestinians living in Gaza. People around the world have taken to the streets [by the millions](https://substack.com/redirect/5ed22606-b377-415c-a96d-0054f6aeac2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a global movement unrivaled by any since we tried to stop the American invasion of Iraq 20 years ago.
Against this backdrop, Congress is racing to affirm its [support for human rights abuses](https://substack.com/redirect/aa652e0e-0113-42e3-a781-6a8f236b76bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) abroad, while perversely [condemning Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/7b50fbdd-799a-4f0b-895c-26f68c29f1cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for using their basic constitutional rights in defense of human rights. Policymakers today are ignorantly embracing [some of the worst parts](https://substack.com/redirect/02ed4d8e-1438-4851-8d50-5ab8ceca7956?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of our country's disappointing history.
Like every war, the battle to stop the genocide in Gaza presents a test of democracy. Will the will of the people reign supreme, or instead, that of the military-industrial complex?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d762b22e-a2e9-490f-9fda-c93d45397d69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The answer has revealed itself in every previous era--but this one might be different, if we prove bold enough to force an industrial reckoning. Three particular figures might hold the keys to holding Biden accountable to international human rights principles that [he & Netanyahu have seen fit to abandon](https://substack.com/redirect/a90e1687-c4fe-4922-b182-d8c43efe864a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### **Washington 's support for Israel denies Americans our unmet social needs**
Every war pits propaganda against insight and information. Many Americans, including nearly every Member of Congress, have been whipped into a war-hungry frenzy not only by attacks that shocked the Israeli military establishment, but also [sustained waves of disinformation](https://substack.com/redirect/c2bbd8d6-1559-4fa2-b7e0-9d0dc80b2f80?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in its wake, from sources including major news outlets and the President of the United States.
Meanwhile, others recall the [grotesque share](https://substack.com/redirect/0fe56c6c-80d9-47bb-bd19-784302e4224d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of our national budget and economy dedicated to weapons, and the accompanying starvation of so many social needs from housing to education.
Our contemporary crises did not invent themselves. For better or worse, our deepest challenges are rooted in the militarism that Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. [recognized](https://substack.com/redirect/3d015f1e-740c-4e55-b780-07d8be3a35d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as an evil enabling, and enabled by, its twins: racism and capitalism.
The U.S. military is the world's [largest institutional source of carbon pollution](https://substack.com/redirect/f06ca65d-83b2-4f07-9a7a-218a914b6038?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It drives the mounting global climate catastrophe (which it recognizes as a threat to national security) both indirectly ([through its mission](https://substack.com/redirect/21fc80c5-5ef8-46f3-8745-e4a135a11590?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to open the world's resources to commerce) and directly (by burning more fossil fuels than any other institution on Earth).
Militarism also infects domestic policing. For instance, [weapons & tactics](https://substack.com/redirect/150fc210-fbcd-4eb6-b83f-d3efcf1d1f52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) used in Palestine by the Israel Defense Force often find their way to U.S. streets. American police departments [routinely train](https://substack.com/redirect/59e33c3f-c00d-40cc-82cd-8cac8f3547e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with their Israeli counterparts, revealing the perverse principle of paramilitary occupation implicit in urban policing. In addition, many police officers are themselves veterans, bringing formal military training in armed occupation to civilian policing and generally peaceful American streets.
Finally, militarism sucks the blood out of the federal budget, [starving every other competing need](https://substack.com/redirect/06dab973-9e2a-4f83-b4d5-1eaaa935e513?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that has gone unmet as a result of Washington's bipartisan commitments. [Healthcare](https://substack.com/redirect/19541a63-fd21-4404-aa40-1aff5f65f96a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) looms as the most conspicuous, but any number of other critical arenas--from [housing](https://substack.com/redirect/3ddef6e3-2a8a-47b3-b684-0f7189d129f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to [hunger](https://substack.com/redirect/114f6272-449f-4dff-86ae-db8807757a07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--also demonstrate the point.
Record--and rising--levels of homelessness are driven directly by the federal government abandoning public housing a generation ago. Birth rates are [collapsing](https://substack.com/redirect/d9bda61d-7748-44ab-8d9f-66d2a0de50f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while suicide rates are [climbing](https://substack.com/redirect/7aaa12de-4ed1-4e32-83ac-9d29ffd874ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Would more people choose to stay alive, and bring new life into this world, if their basic needs were assured?
Our country's embarrassing educational performance also finds roots in the endless sponge of military spending that indirectly forces teachers to pay for school supplies out of their own pockets. Parents are hosting bake sales while [the Pentagon can't even keep track of its (expensive yet also obsolete) fighter planes](https://substack.com/redirect/0fe56c6c-80d9-47bb-bd19-784302e4224d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
If you've learned anything from this post, feel free to keep learning! Subscriptions are free, and paid subscriptions help expand my work.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..DWzq846XM7aCLDkKXYT4OjYxn1AEkFwaVtW55aB4f5w?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=138508212)
America mouths support for democracy and human rights, while abandoning both principles both here at home and around the world. If America cared about either of them, we'd at least have a right to healthcare, like [every country on Earth](https://substack.com/redirect/7afd75b0-59f4-4552-80e6-33e65bf2fe14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that calls itself a democracy.
### **A resurgent movement for peace**
Many insightful critics of U.S. foreign policy today feel powerless, limited to hushed conversations with friends, or perhaps outraged screeds on social media.
[Others have taken to the streets by the millions](https://substack.com/redirect/5ed22606-b377-415c-a96d-0054f6aeac2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to declare their dissent. But even their voices are muted within the halls of Congress--so much so, that congressional support for Israel (human rights be damned) remains [nearly unanimous](https://substack.com/redirect/1eaa9a3f-945c-4780-a452-c5d149f04906?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Coming together to show solidarity often offers connections, begets further grassroots opportunities, and can expose a movement's goals to the broader public. But we can't pretend that ephemeral protests have ever stopped a war.
While the war machine might seem inexorable to each of us, there is one body of people in the world poised to unplug it, if we discover the collective will to exercise our power on behalf of peace: We, the working people of the United States of America.
After decades of relentless predation by corporations, and their representatives wielding offices on behalf of them, their shareholders, and their executives, the working class in the United States has been decimated. Homelessness is surpassing record highs, and those of us lucky enough to have a roof over our head often find ourselves wondering how much longer we will remain underneath it.
To be fair, that's a privileged position relative to Gazans who wonder whether the roofs over their heads will be there the next day. But we who struggle to make ends meet in America are subject to a similar precarity, even if it is economic rather than military in nature.
Ultimately, it is that economic precarity of working people in the United States that largely impedes Americans from exercising collective action.
That, of course, is [very much by design](https://substack.com/redirect/6e403dc1-0f1a-463e-b163-056e52552424?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### **E pluribus unum: From many, one**
Historically, the organized labor movement helped buttress many intersectional movements seeking solidarity, including those seeking rights for the economic [precariat](https://substack.com/redirect/4c22a5f8-8278-4b7a-a04b-0116a18d312e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Organized labor has endured setbacks as labor participation in the United States has eroded, but 2023 is not only the year of an Israeli genocide on Gaza.
This is also a year of [historic](https://substack.com/redirect/00103d6c-cd24-4d22-8912-e74ce7453d98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) mobilizations by [organized](https://substack.com/redirect/bd9f0ca3-d2da-4b7c-b43d-a0573f97271a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) labor, the [likes](https://substack.com/redirect/58e69711-4ef2-4365-91ec-45d3dfa671af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of which have not been seen in generations.
Will unions act only to protect the narrow economic interests of their members vis-a-vis their respective employers, or will they remember what solidarity means, and come together in the defense of human rights principles that only they can enforce meaningfully today?
A year ago, I would have dismissed the possibility of organized labor declaring and supporting a general strike as unfathomable. But we are in a different time today.
Labor unions from Hollywood to the mountains of Appalachia have gone on strike seeking their rights, while rail workers connecting those coasts also sought the right to strike before [being denied by a president seemingly not interested in his own reelection](https://substack.com/redirect/81322841-f8ec-4e7a-be07-f8d412a10b45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
This year's particular strikes by actors and writers in Hollywood, and auto workers across the country, indicate high watermarks in recent labor mobilization. Together, they suggest an organizational capacity and political willingness for organized labor to mount resistance to capital of the sort it has not been able to in decades.
### **Three leaders who have fought Wall Street --and won**
The leadership of three particular labor visionaries stands out. To a greater degree than any of their colleagues in the movement, they have not only championed the rights of workers in their respective unions, but also mounted prolific challenges to capital and made historically significant impacts.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138508212&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NTA4MjEyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTg4OTUyNDcsImV4cCI6MTcwMTQ4NzI0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cuOQNqZD88azj8XZjavb6_UFpVhk0tReX4O-t345JhQ)
Over the past month, [Shawn Fain](https://substack.com/redirect/d9f31dbf-8cdf-44ae-8db9-cc22a312beaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at United Auto Workers UAW led [a series of "stand-up" strikes](https://substack.com/redirect/d40dafee-e8c4-40aa-a20d-ad099caa37ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the three major American auto manufacturers that successfully pitted them against each other and ultimately [forced each of them to offer unprecedented contracts](https://substack.com/redirect/d9af0d8a-af90-4280-b3d2-069309533595?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to their workers. Under Fain's leadership, UAW won raises, as well as a series of other concessions that workers had sought for years, such as better retirement benefits.
Under the last presidential administration, [Sara Nelson](https://substack.com/redirect/5940b155-aa96-44e0-8919-efcded1855f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the Association of Flight Attendants union proved [instrumental](https://substack.com/redirect/6821822e-12cd-40d6-8f8d-addf83577ab0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in ending a government shutdown. Democrats claimed credit despite [enabling](https://substack.com/redirect/15f5aa18-4494-47f8-8cf4-5ab60ea7e16f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a criminal president in Washington, while a network of mostly women ultimately did the work of forcing him to heel. At the time, Nelson showed [a stronger spine](https://substack.com/redirect/eab5a893-8d74-464e-94c1-b12d2fa31a60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) than the rest of the labor movement put together.
Finally, [Chris Smalls](https://substack.com/redirect/d5941523-8e0d-4926-9033-121d3881d116?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is the visionary grassroots organizer who established the [Amazon Labor Union](https://substack.com/redirect/037c3773-c970-4aac-9129-a52c01f27b7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) despite headwinds that prevented every previously established union from ever organizing an Amazon worksite. Under Smalls' leadership, the ALU has breathed new life into the labor movement far beyond Amazon, and helped inspire some of the recent energy in other unions, like UAW, that have been rediscovering their militant roots.
Fain & Nelson each mobilized their unions into their most active postures in decades, while Smalls created a new one where others had failed. The historic UAW strike succeeded in winning better contracts for workers, while the flight attendants forced the hand of a criminal president to end a government shutdown.
What else could striking workers make possible?
Corporate platforms routinely marginalize dissenting voices--but you can help work around those biases. Share this post with your friends.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138508212&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NTA4MjEyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTg4OTUyNDcsImV4cCI6MTcwMTQ4NzI0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cuOQNqZD88azj8XZjavb6_UFpVhk0tReX4O-t345JhQ)
Smalls, Nelson, and Fain have time and again proven themselves to be prolific fighters for working people. One hopes they might be fighters for human rights, as well.
Few figures are better poised than the three of them to lead the labor movement to a new era of solidarity. They are uniquely poised to invite other sectors of organized labor to walk off the job until Washington sees fit to finally respect international human rights by joining the rest of the world that has [repeatedly called for cease-fires](https://substack.com/redirect/2daf6516-bef3-437f-b7f9-9209cf24ad60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Gaza that Washington has effectively blocked.
### **A land of the free and home of the brave?**
250 years ago, Americans discovered our collective power and revolted from a far off empire, establishing what its founders dreamed would be a Republic dedicated to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Benjamin Franklin [warned](https://substack.com/redirect/d814876c-4736-48f1-8f6a-4b33e02805c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the risk of losing it, [as did a military war hero and U.S. president](https://substack.com/redirect/dea8f04a-747a-4b38-a736-534465924af6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) over a century later.
150 years after the war that established America's independence, our nation fought a pair of World Wars. The second stopped a genocide, and [culminated](https://substack.com/redirect/34a2effe-bc2e-4af5-9e36-4037c38ff2e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the emergence of an international human rights regime that Washington was once widely proud to have crafted.
At this moment in history, as another genocide unfolds under our noses with the full participation of the United States, and by proxy all of its citizens who pay tax dollars, what will we do?
What would Jesus do?
I don't say that either rhetorically or satirically. I cite his example as a Muslim who recognizes the profound power of that figure's prophecy. [The most quoted voice in the Quran](https://substack.com/redirect/b3560293-a608-4134-b711-d7e26d18fade?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Jesus preached peace at all costs.
So did his successors, Gandhi and MLK, who [warned](https://substack.com/redirect/94c673b6-df82-4410-b5c3-818fc55c79b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the intersecting evils of racism, militarism, and capitalism represented a spiritual poison in the veins of this country.
Only We, the people, can heal it.
But only if we discover our collective power.
Atomized as we are, we will need leadership. And few voices are better poised to demonstrate it than those from networks already established to champion solidarity.
Will that solidarity show itself now, when it is needed most?
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=138508212&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4NTA4MjEyLCJpYXQiOjE2OTg4OTUyNDcsImV4cCI6MTcwMTQ4NzI0NywiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.cuOQNqZD88azj8XZjavb6_UFpVhk0tReX4O-t345JhQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments)
Paid subscribers can access a series of musical labor anthems that I've collected. While I write primarily about law and politics, it is culture that ultimately drives them both--and few examples outshine these demonstrations of cultural resistance to the corruption of corporate capital...

Who is better poised to enforce human rights in Israel than labor leaders in the United States? | | | Nov 2| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | The world has watched in horror as a day of mass trauma for Isreal has escalated into an of Palestinians living in Gaza. People around the world have taken to the streets in a global movement unrivaled by any since we tried to stop the American invasion of Iraq 20 years ago. Against this backdrop, Congress is racing to affirm its abroad, while perversely for using their basic constitutional rights in defense of human rights. Policymakers today are ignorantly embracing of our country's disappointing history. Like every war, the battle to stop the genocide in Gaza presents a test of democracy. Will the will of the people reign supreme, or instead, that of the military-industrial complex? | | ---|---|--- The answer has revealed itself in every previous era--but this one might be different, if we prove bold enough to force an industrial reckoning. Three particular figures might hold the keys to holding Biden accountable to international human rights principles that . Washington 's support for Israel denies Americans our unmet social needs Every war pits propaganda against insight and information. Many Americans, including nearly every Member of Congress, have been whipped into a war-hungry frenzy not only by attacks that shocked the Israeli military establishment, but also in its wake, from sources including major news outlets and the President of the United States. Meanwhile, others recall the of our national budget and economy dedicated to weapons, and the accompanying starvation of so many social needs from housing to education. Our contemporary crises did not invent themselves. For better or worse, our deepest challenges are rooted in the militarism that Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. as an evil enabling, and enabled by, its twins: racism and capitalism. The U.S. military is the world's . It drives the mounting global climate catastrophe (which it recognizes as a threat to national security) both indirectly ( to open the world's resources to commerce) and directly (by burning more fossil fuels than any other institution on Earth). Militarism also infects domestic policing. For instance, used in Palestine by the Israel Defense Force often find their way to U.S. streets. American police departments with their Israeli counterparts, revealing the perverse principle of paramilitary occupation implicit in urban policing. In addition, many police officers are themselves veterans, bringing formal military training in armed occupation to civilian policing and generally peaceful American streets. Finally, militarism sucks the blood out of the federal budget, that has gone unmet as a result of Washington's bipartisan commitments. looms as the most conspicuous, but any number of other critical arenas--from to demonstrate the point. Record--and rising--levels of homelessness are driven directly by the federal government abandoning public housing a generation ago. Birth rates are , while suicide rates are . Would more people choose to stay alive, and bring new life into this world, if their basic needs were assured? Our country's embarrassing educational performance also finds roots in the endless sponge of military spending that indirectly forces teachers to pay for school supplies out of their own pockets. Parents are hosting bake sales while . If you've learned anything from this post, feel free to keep learning! Subscriptions are free, and paid subscriptions help expand my work. America mouths support for democracy and human rights, while abandoning both principles both here at home and around the world. If America cared about either of them, we'd at least have a right to healthcare, like that calls itself a democracy. A resurgent movement for peace Many insightful critics of U.S. foreign policy today feel powerless, limited to hushed conversations with friends, or perhaps outraged screeds on social media. to declare their dissent. But even their voices are muted within the halls of Congress--so much so, that congressional support for Israel (human rights be damned) remains . Coming together to show solidarity often offers connections, begets further grassroots opportunities, and can expose a movement's goals to the broader public. But we can't pretend that ephemeral protests have ever stopped a war. While the war machine might seem inexorable to each of us, there is one body of people in the world poised to unplug it, if we discover the collective will to exercise our power on behalf of peace: We, the working people of the United States of America. After decades of relentless predation by corporations, and their representatives wielding offices on behalf of them, their shareholders, and their executives, the working class in the United States has been decimated. Homelessness is surpassing record highs, and those of us lucky enough to have a roof over our head often find ourselves wondering how much longer we will remain underneath it. To be fair, that's a privileged position relative to Gazans who wonder whether the roofs over their heads will be there the next day. But we who struggle to make ends meet in America are subject to a similar precarity, even if it is economic rather than military in nature. Ultimately, it is that economic precarity of working people in the United States that largely impedes Americans from exercising collective action. That, of course, is . E pluribus unum: From many, one Historically, the organized labor movement helped buttress many intersectional movements seeking solidarity, including those seeking rights for the economic . Organized labor has endured setbacks as labor participation in the United States has eroded, but 2023 is not only the year of an Israeli genocide on Gaza. This is also a year of mobilizations by labor, the of which have not been seen in generations. Will unions act only to protect the narrow economic interests of their members vis-a-vis their respective employers, or will they remember what solidarity means, and come together in the defense of human rights principles that only they can enforce meaningfully today? A year ago, I would have dismissed the possibility of organized labor declaring and supporting a general strike as unfathomable. But we are in a different time today. Labor unions from Hollywood to the mountains of Appalachia have gone on strike seeking their rights, while rail workers connecting those coasts also sought the right to strike before . This year's particular strikes by actors and writers in Hollywood, and auto workers across the country, indicate high watermarks in recent labor mobilization. Together, they suggest an organizational capacity and political willingness for organized labor to mount resistance to capital of the sort it has not been able to in decades. Three leaders who have fought Wall Street --and won The leadership of three particular labor visionaries stands out. To a greater degree than any of their colleagues in the movement, they have not only championed the rights of workers in their respective unions, but also mounted prolific challenges to capital and made historically significant impacts. Over the past month, at United Auto Workers UAW led from the three major American auto manufacturers that successfully pitted them against each other and ultimately to their workers. Under Fain's leadership, UAW won raises, as well as a series of other concessions that workers had sought for years, such as better retirement benefits. Under the last presidential administration, from the Association of Flight Attendants union proved in ending a government shutdown. Democrats claimed credit despite a criminal president in Washington, while a network of mostly women ultimately did the work of forcing him to heel. At the time, Nelson showed than the rest of the labor movement put together. Finally, is the visionary grassroots organizer who established the despite headwinds that prevented every previously established union from ever organizing an Amazon worksite. Under Smalls' leadership, the ALU has breathed new life into the labor movement far beyond Amazon, and helped inspire some of the recent energy in other unions, like UAW, that have been rediscovering their militant roots. Fain & Nelson each mobilized their unions into their most active postures in decades, while Smalls created a new one where others had failed. The historic UAW strike succeeded in winning better contracts for workers, while the flight attendants forced the hand of a criminal president to end a government shutdown. What else could striking workers make possible? Corporate platforms routinely marginalize dissenting voices--but you can help work around those biases. Share this post with your friends. Smalls, Nelson, and Fain have time and again proven themselves to be prolific fighters for working people. One hopes they might be fighters for human rights, as well. Few figures are better poised than the three of them to lead the labor movement to a new era of solidarity. They are uniquely poised to invite other sectors of organized labor to walk off the job until Washington sees fit to finally respect international human rights by joining the rest of the world that has in Gaza that Washington has effectively blocked. A land of the free and home of the brave? 250 years ago, Americans discovered our collective power and revolted from a far off empire, establishing what its founders dreamed would be a Republic dedicated to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Benjamin Franklin of the risk of losing it, over a century later. 150 years after the war that established America's independence, our nation fought a pair of World Wars. The second stopped a genocide, and in the emergence of an international human rights regime that Washington was once widely proud to have crafted. At this moment in history, as another genocide unfolds under our noses with the full participation of the United States, and by proxy all of its citizens who pay tax dollars, what will we do? What would Jesus do? I don't say that either rhetorically or satirically. I cite his example as a Muslim who recognizes the profound power of that figure's prophecy. , Jesus preached peace at all costs. So did his successors, Gandhi and MLK, who the intersecting evils of racism, militarism, and capitalism represented a spiritual poison in the veins of this country. Only We, the people, can heal it. But only if we discover our collective power. Atomized as we are, we will need leadership. And few voices are better poised to demonstrate it than those from networks already established to champion solidarity. Will that solidarity show itself now, when it is needed most? Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.

We have so much work to accomplish, and I can't wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor.

**I set a goal of activating 5,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running.

God Bless,

Speaker Mike Johnson

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: it all comes down to this week
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Even as I write you, _Students for Life Action’s_ army of students are busy packing.

Not to go back home and see family. Not to head out with friends for a hike in the mountains or to catch a football game. [](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjjuje-duchtdja-y/)

**They’re packing for what each and every one of them understands could be the most important weekend of 2023.**

With the vote over Ohio’s _Issue 1_ abortion referendum coming down to the wire and Virginia Democrats having effectively chosen abortion as their one-and-only campaign issue in order to keep control of the Virgina Senate & block all pro-life legislation, **the stakes are higher than ever.**

_Every door our students knock on, every interstate overpass we expose pro-abortion radicalism, every text we send, every phone call we make, and every new pro-life voter we convert on campus matters_.

That’s why I’m counting on you for two things today, Pro-Life Friend.

**1)_Will you please keep our army of student activists in your prayers_?**
Please pray for their effectiveness, that God will give them the appropriate words to speak, and that He will keep them safe from pro-abortion radicals.
**2)** **[Will you please agree to your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action’s_ GOTV Deployment Fund](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjjuje-duchtdja-j/)?**
I know I’ve asked you for so much lately – maybe more than I ever have. Please understand that I don’t feel like I have a choice!
**Pro-Life Friend, the lives of little babies are hanging in the balance.**

You see, with pro-life battles raging across the country, the media elites, pollsters, and political “experts” are all waiting to see if the Abortion Lobby has the momentum heading into 2024.

And what happens in Ohio and Virginia next week will have HUGE ramifications nationwide!

If passed, Ohio’s abortion referendum would:

******* Enshrine abortion-on-demand in Ohio’s state constitution throughout all nine months of pregnancy;
******* Allow abortionists to commit abortions on pregnant minors without parents knowing anything about it; and
******* Allow surgeons to mutilate the bodies of minors with sex change surgeries and allow Planned Parenthood to dispense hormone treatment, that could sterilize them forever, to these same minors with zero parental involvement.
**[_DONATE TO _Students for Life Action’s_ GOTV DEPLOYMENT FUND_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjjuje-duchtdja-i/)**
And as one of the few states that has off-year elections this year, Virginia will be one of THE biggest tests to see who will have the momentum going into 2024 – either pro-lifers or the Abortion Lobby?

Virginia is a state President Biden won by 10%.

_But in 2021, Republicans took control of the Governor’s Mansion and the House of Delegates_.

Should pro-lifers take the State Senate in 2023, it could pave the way for major pro-life reforms – and send shivers down the spines of pro-abortion politicians nationwide!

**That's why it's critical that our students are on the ground in Ohio and Virginia making sure they reach every pro-life voter with the TRUTH.**

**[So, can I count on you to make your most generous contribution possible to _Students for Life Action’s_ critical GOTV Deployment Fund today](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjjuje-duchtdja-d/)?**

Your support could help us send jaws dropping across the country.

With time running out, we have to put the pedal to the metal.

There’s not a moment to waste!

We’re spending every dollar as soon as it’s given.

_What we accomplish over these next few days will be determined by what we can raise_.

That’s why I hope you will agree to give generously, Pro-Life Friend.
[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjjuje-duchtdja-h/)
Every dollar you can give will be put to immediate use.

_Thousands of pre-born babies are counting on us for their chance at life._

**[_So, please make your most prayerful donation to _Students for Life Action's_ GOTV Deployment Fund right away_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjjuje-duchtdja-k/).**

Our involvement will have a national impact by building a narrative that life is winning.

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

**[_DONATE TO _Students for Life Action’s_ GOTV DEPLOYMENT FUND_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjjuje-duchtdja-u/)**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sjjuje-026154D2-duchtdja-o) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-sjjuje-duchtdja-b/)
**

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Reminder: Dina Titus and Bidenomics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
Devastating for Nevada.
| | | |
---
# Dina Titus's Support of Bidenomics Hurts Nevadans
By Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
---
Since taking office, the Biden Administration has systematically damaged our economy by producing record-high prices that negatively impact Nevada families. It is becoming more and more difficult to afford to live in Nevada. Congresswoman Dina Titus publicly states that she is "Ridin' with Biden" and thus has fully supported his devastating policies.
Titus and the Biden Administration have pushed through gigantic spending plans, including the American Rescue Plan (aka the "New Green Deal"), infrastructure bills (more wasteful spending), and social welfare over-spending. Each of these programs comes with eye-popping costs. The government's increased borrowing to fund these initiatives results in rising debt for Nevadans. Such deficit spending creates inflation by increasing the money supply without a corresponding increase in the production of goods and services.
Titus and the Biden Administration have pushed for expanding social welfare programs. These unfunded measures also contribute to inflation. As the government takes money from hardworking Nevadans and gives it to able-body people who refuse to work, overall demand for goods and services rises, leading to price increases and reduced purchasing power for Nevadans.
Titus and the Biden Administration have pursued a harmful regulatory agenda that imposes significant business compliance costs. These increased expenses are passed onto consumers through higher prices, further fueling inflation.
It's not that difficult to understand; overspending creates inflation! Too many dollars chasing too few goods make prices go higher. While Titus and Biden are spending at historically high levels, they are also implementing policies to pay people not to work. When people don't work, they don't produce goods or services. Thus "too many dollars are chasing too few goods."
The solution is to stop the excessive spending by the government and stop paying able-bodied people not to work. As your Representative in Congress, one of my top priorities will be to reduce government spending and work towards a balanced budget. I have a degree in finance and an MBA. I know how the economy works, and I know how to balance a budget.
---
|
---
Questions and Answers
Volunteers with Mark's campaign are often asked, "How can I learn more about Mark?"
In answer to that question, here is a quick and easy way to get involved in selecting our Representative in Congress.
You are invited to a Zoom Town Hall meeting to see why people say Mark Robertson is the most qualified candidate to represent the people of Nevada's First Congressional District.
Saturday, December 2, 6:00 P.M.
Click here to reserve your spot: [https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/Mark_Meet](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NG59h7n3Wfb2blTIe2xk3cUsu3SmJlQXZGmzT6sS48Q2BIkADgQi02Ag0qDjSW6QTDkKpFmZNJ-Vo_7s-1N0i1IduolQEisiNL8yWf5891_oLtzmZ6LJsuwmUSuDe2yYRPwz5hu1TO3X-XQWjITzDR1Nqh9jVvU8vS4gP8auNIg=&c=GLAb6ltPLUd9uCgqpK-UEcGp-d4RNRHDfb2xi7asWaD4YexweFWEPA==&ch=T1LtuF0rKh0PWA3H5YFXJdBte1LLR0Z787QpGqjNJhc3i2GZhjz9ug==)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Friend, did you miss this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Democrats and the media had written us off.

|
---
| | |
Friend, thank you!

We just crushed our 1st End of Month goal!

And because of the overwhelming support of countless grassroots Conservatives, I have decided to extend our deadline for 24 hours.

**Together we sent the Democrats and their media allies a loud and clear message that we are ready to fight in 2024. **

But some patriots missed their chance to join us, so I wanted to give you 1 more chance to join this group of dedicated conservatives.

[**Chip in today to join the thousands of other conservative patriots who are ready to win in 2024.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zon9oopkjnf0nppi1db8osddg0qcsqejtjsdu91g_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjj60o31cph2bs "Chip in today to join the thousands of other conservative patriots who are ready to win in 2024.")
****DEADLINE EXTENDED FOR 24 HOURS****
---
| | | [CHIP IN TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z30d6cp4bm3fnp2as19p046ekiqgat3cdp7tden0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjj60o31cph2bs "Generic Button")
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdc03a4mojv8580if01ae1dt7qnjp5f9nu82s0p8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjj60o31cph2bs)
---
| | | [CHIP IN TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpdsth4l953b1u5uhafdvrcl4a4q5jspprge47to_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjj60o31cph2bs "Generic Button")
---
****DEADLINE EXTENDED FOR 24 HOURS****
---

Democrats and the media had written us off.

But together, Friend, we proved them wrong once again.

**_The outpouring of support you have shown me these last few days is enough to make this Louisiana boy blush. _**

I'm just getting started, and with your help I'll keep fighting for our shared conservative values.

So please, chip in now to join my team before our deadline expires at 11:59 PM.

_**I look forward to seeing your name on my roster. **_

God Bless,

Speaker Mike Johnson

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvlpr5ibo8dfs36002smth7mn8jqesfrbrpob838_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjj60o31cph2bs)
---

_P.S. The support you have shown me these last few days has humbled me. I am so honored to serve you as Speaker of the House, and to lead the fight for our shared conservative values. _

---

name: Jerry Evans
subject: Winds of Change
body:
Let's Bring Changes to the 11th District
| | |
---
|
---
| Friend,
As we all know from looking outside and trick-or-treating last night, the weather has begun to change here in Illinois. However, that is not the change I want to talk about today. What I'm referring to is the change that the people of this district are craving politically. From McHenry to Lemont and Belvidere to Batavia, our campaign has been all over the district to hear from you and the message we are hearing is the same: career politicians like Joe Biden and Bill Foster are hurting this district. Our mission is to put a stop to that!

---
|
---
| For too long, our district has gotten "more of the same". For the last decade, our elected officials have maintained the status quo and have not addressed the systemic issues that face our country and our district. This campaign is different. [With your support](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tsMe4NSir7hcMyuRU7wJu6x8X1Tk6St8xyDyA8Dldt6UX2Vtr7uYtTVGGeWsh-ecX9Zf_bLhF9tveZdddz2OpkuIaUfn5dZwQTfDxPq4IlwWqm9iLIrWyxrCwjfSP9dkIDm_t5pE6MekQTGdV15YjeammlTJIl2QVO6RvN7IGIBxrGSlPdsi7hpzXrg_oO5a42QfYoXzlmY=&c=FQDjTeZrklHV9mSF_ewbyvE_OL4IsJ0BlpvrhULdvRtLZAQRoX4TqA==&ch=kWv3kKzTlNEb1L3LpY7kcdO6eubL0Y6Sr4XJcH0Aww5xvxdjHeYCPg==) we can continue to solidify our lead in the primary and prepare for a battle in the general election.
Right now, this district and this state are looking for new conservative leadership and a new path forward. Our campaign is that new way forward. That is why I am asking you again for your support. A [donation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tsMe4NSir7hcMyuRU7wJu6x8X1Tk6St8xyDyA8Dldt6UX2Vtr7uYtTVGGeWsh-ecX9Zf_bLhF9tveZdddz2OpkuIaUfn5dZwQTfDxPq4IlwWqm9iLIrWyxrCwjfSP9dkIDm_t5pE6MekQTGdV15YjeammlTJIl2QVO6RvN7IGIBxrGSlPdsi7hpzXrg_oO5a42QfYoXzlmY=&c=FQDjTeZrklHV9mSF_ewbyvE_OL4IsJ0BlpvrhULdvRtLZAQRoX4TqA==&ch=kWv3kKzTlNEb1L3LpY7kcdO6eubL0Y6Sr4XJcH0Aww5xvxdjHeYCPg==) to our campaign brings us one step closer to defeating the status quo of Washington and bringing about a new wind of change for the people of the 11th District. [Join the movement](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tsMe4NSir7hcMyuRU7wJu6x8X1Tk6St8xyDyA8Dldt6UX2Vtr7uYtX2foEKog45Qg4m3bA-Tged4nLlnwwIw9s90S1diwwya__7eU7pPGXYCRyzu_yf_1Saj-op5A3PXssnE0ojO4tJvg0GSLkUJg_bfMCk-avco&c=FQDjTeZrklHV9mSF_ewbyvE_OL4IsJ0BlpvrhULdvRtLZAQRoX4TqA==&ch=kWv3kKzTlNEb1L3LpY7kcdO6eubL0Y6Sr4XJcH0Aww5xvxdjHeYCPg==) today!

For the cause,
Jerry Evans
P.S. We all know that campaigns are won by having a grand coalition committed to victory. That is why we are asking you to share this message with your friends and family to spread the word. A simple [donation of $30](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tsMe4NSir7hcMyuRU7wJu6x8X1Tk6St8xyDyA8Dldt6UX2Vtr7uYtTVGGeWsh-ecX9Zf_bLhF9tveZdddz2OpkuIaUfn5dZwQTfDxPq4IlwWqm9iLIrWyxrCwjfSP9dkIDm_t5pE6MekQTGdV15YjeammlTJIl2QVO6RvN7IGIBxrGSlPdsi7hpzXrg_oO5a42QfYoXzlmY=&c=FQDjTeZrklHV9mSF_ewbyvE_OL4IsJ0BlpvrhULdvRtLZAQRoX4TqA==&ch=kWv3kKzTlNEb1L3LpY7kcdO6eubL0Y6Sr4XJcH0Aww5xvxdjHeYCPg==) from your network can make all the difference in this race. Please help us continue the fight!
---
| | [Donate $30 to Jerry Today!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tsMe4NSir7hcMyuRU7wJu6x8X1Tk6St8xyDyA8Dldt6UX2Vtr7uYtTVGGeWsh-ecX9Zf_bLhF9tveZdddz2OpkuIaUfn5dZwQTfDxPq4IlwWqm9iLIrWyxrCwjfSP9dkIDm_t5pE6MekQTGdV15YjeammlTJIl2QVO6RvN7IGIBxrGSlPdsi7hpzXrg_oO5a42QfYoXzlmY=&c=FQDjTeZrklHV9mSF_ewbyvE_OL4IsJ0BlpvrhULdvRtLZAQRoX4TqA==&ch=kWv3kKzTlNEb1L3LpY7kcdO6eubL0Y6Sr4XJcH0Aww5xvxdjHeYCPg==)

subject: Democrats Fracture Over Israel, Bobby Knight Dies, and a New Beatles Song Arrives
body:
Real estate agents conspired to boost commissions for years and must pay $1.8 billion (and possibly triple that with anti-trust penalties) a jury ruled Tuesday in a class-action case that could transform how homes are sold.

| | | [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJydjrGOwjAQRL8m7ojWXjsJhYu7gg4aCkrLZ6-JwYlRYpD4eyykk664CmnKN2-GNO_6YeilBGBeByJByKIWIBCQK9hKxWUbgiOUCnvkCEPnGwnkY8lLe8lxLiOF9MwPWlqXJzbqoJzlFVaD66UCua12UATBehS8-2FJj6Xc1ga_GrGr-cdy2pu9jSnO54OdSJeQzW3JqwHccLURaI42FbMSeUNTBfNsXfSVITeSuxrOFn25XyklOzXi21Ow91Tq8V-i_VN7L5YPRl71WWnS)

# THURSDAY, NOVEMBER 2, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this date in 1920, Pittsburgh radio station KDKA made history with America's first election-night broadcast, telling its 1,000 listeners that Warren Harding had beaten James Cox. [Listen to it here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGStCAQBOCnwUxrGBQlIPgTsv3TCy2EcZdbFEvmduve_sqLL_qSDrr74zbffMppv__3G1ley-wDpxfNUrbYopr7JtqVCEk1ZKU2k0Gje2wedprGRUaj4zop4wGUJhhIm4H02OsITbIIqKQEBDP0w9jJEYyWejTaIwxKix4oJi5n91nSzg9a83d50dmFsjXZPpiPKtQ_gU6g87USV9mFpe70rpU9p3AlBbok0IWl5hJ8FujeRxvKzrSzQPd15OJjFehqYrqUg4Frg0CHIC9ACXTP-PStrNwuZ_Ex-MrddqjmtPF4p5xT1aPo4b75lH8L8p93_QQAAP__W4poQA). If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuszAQAOCnsbdEvjvbxIOHX4qYfrp2RAbOcK2BiLip-vZV1bHZv-l77fouSZFtfkkrx5r3Po1VHtwDnPCE1Fs9xcyMTJoj-HAJGLxFvUSikckmcgM4n12TmS44DAOEDMMFUEtEgwRg0ARnXXOGxgQPvgk-oXHklTU8Sd2P89suW104l6_9wcd53Fdd4lLr7a7on8JWYfuXKGy7NMv4X7b3H0MtK7pOt08pRe6-UdbMa5Lya_1HXRVdrdFHfG50fRrwHQAA__9GMVoR). ## Realtors Must Pay Home Sellers $1.8 Billion
Real estate agents conspired to boost commissions for years and [must pay $1.8 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPtCAYhH8Ndhh4UVgKii_fxc5trzSAqO8GZQPcmv33F7e-biaTPJk83-M0Wox4rHe7B1OXNFlf8RUmzilQEFPXzGYJAYJoguFS3zRo2UGzmdlrFeTNc5AgmHfKARO6t9p5pRz4Bg0wEJwzYLrvetVyxbTkUmlpgfVCko6FGWvK7SPhUbewxHd6hdz6tDfRbLU-CxH_CAwEhvM8W-_KEc5y7QSGKxIYcrCxplxoROtioEvKlNMbdRgjpuPTN1w36tO-YymYjkIfP_lNFzzmi0DEsFS7EvH1_z5Sxihn1nphm2zm53lhilSkY-tuMX7O1T9V_QYAAP__BCNpcg) (and possibly triple that with anti-trust penalties), a jury ruled Tuesday in a class-action case that could transform how homes are sold. At issue is a [long-standing policy by realtors](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OpDAQhJ_GZD2yGzDjgGASst30wpHXtAfP-WdlN4t4-xN36SWV1FdSVf36eH7YEEN-fdpEM_vytI7DDz2VAgTsn0O3zp4Iqe9oVtrcDRo9YLfN3o6j1OrLSWdoGv0gJ31H58l-3Y2_T12YUWKvlERpxmGcbmqSRis9GW1Rjr0Wg6Q1cKm3dwmZN_LxLD9Ub66kLs4b83cT_UPgInA5juOWWr48gQtl2JvAJZVMp8Clko3U2DIJXCyk0FrZa4D3Xk94FWpgPVMF3gguFv7BEPK6N64nNHAlXbFQMjSuu-O9EmxUCRocm2XgS1zZ4wqJbAZfKmwlUTky1auMrfB4qLf99L-7Oq_fR4gxND2JQb6SDfHvLv7vy38CAAD__-m0gjs) requiring sellers to pay a 5%-6% commission to their agent, which is split with the buyer's agent. Sellers who don't pay that fee are often barred from advertising their property on the main lists used to market homes. The lead lawyer for the homeowners has already [filed a bigger class-action suit](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFupDAQgOGnMZ2RPTbGLlxcQ7fXXonmYFgmMniFJ7vat4-SOv0v_dL37zbfkAuf9794UJatzrgIP2m2VoMGN_tuzRsRkOso25BighQ8dHuGEfF_jA7iSn5NaVk2wLgGb12wfowdZzDgrDVg0uCHsbejScGGMQUEM7igvKGVpV79R-VTdtrKuz7p6pd6dCXvIo-m3B8Fk4Jp4xPPhfo37rV-Fwqmk15NwVRQqIm-CIumJiikl3oc3BrXUxd8tU8WbZMxxkAc-l2O0l15fby4FG5hVN7cD-TyM5ZfGb4CAAD__9qRXaY) on the same anti-trust grounds against some of real estate's biggest companies, including Compass, Redfin, and Douglas Ellison.
## Democrats Split Over Israel-Gaza War
The Democratic Party is [fracturing over the Israel-Hamas war,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQAL9G6tDAISNTULxGnV-bUnMRh30ZJDRwsZK_zzh16i12Z99uyw05837_jxsFSWXBVfhJizEKFNhl7GNIREC2p2Ccv3rwboT-EdD6VV_NGMEaiIns6gDfR-NSvDpA6jmABmuMBu0v42UazKS9M27yDkFfrOtGTZGl1OGj8C4PSvm7PKkOa9n6HB4iR-vsvw7mDubzPIdUvnY624t3MG8UGTuYI21lrShNreUzR9WOzKLutFNF4bKrTEmUENamWBrlpPDAKurlUtwqUu5riMfJOXNzUzfq-4acfzvkzys_AQAA__9vs2WF) and several key House votes are approaching that threaten to split the party between the progressive wing and the mainstream. President Biden is receiving the harshest criticism of his tenure from Democrats critical of Israel and sympathetic to Palestinians. Arab-American support for the party has [plummeted from a majority to just 17% in a new Reuters poll.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFu7CAUBNCvwR0WXDA8CorXuNu0KS1sLrtEYCzAa-XvI6dOO1PM0Xw-loeLKe7PD5fR9lAWt_X4xoVzChTEIgdvAyKgGNByZf4ZMErC8LITgFOgjUahVx1WEQILmwG1SuMnlEO0wEBwzoCZSU565JoZxZU2ygGbhCKSoY-91PGrxL2_MKTv8sY6biUPyb56PxoR_wnMBObrusaKZ8fa7v5OSk2ewHw2ArOrbqUuY42b22k7j6PUTtfocacec9mq640e6cwZe6P3DI2tOkz0KCnRm0o5o4ITmIdq_XHFlGJTmkj2zC6mX1X_86OfAAAA__9--mfv) The fight is erupting into [angry name-calling between Democrats](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHO2yAURp8Gb1hwjTEMDFm8pVvV0SLmEhNhsIAE9e2rdP6n75POcnT-3Le7DTGk5y97omk-b3Zv4YMb5xQoTJsYnPGIgNOAhkutNGgpYDiM59pZBegnp3ahhEIvpFBqmgV7yAWHYIDBxDkDpmcxLyNfmJZcLlpaYPMkiWDoQstlfOWQ2oE-_s0fLOOezyGao7WrkulGYCWw9t7Hs6YvI7Biou9KYE3Yv3PlGFrYv9chXrReMTSK5X21Sh_YOmKiDs-8F9sqzYmGWixGetjTVtptIbDaQm83_trf_vdQjLt6iDFUuRDBnqcN8b9W-zHSvwAAAP__wuto7A). Rep. Andre Carlson called Rep. Josh Gottheimer a "punk" and "cowardly" over a resolution supporting Israel. Two other Democrats argued about which legislators "don't have a soul."
## Rangers Win World Series
The Texas Rangers have [won the World Series](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu3CAQRb8Gd7Myg42XwkUady9tyhWGwZ48DCtAS_bvo02d-l7pHJ1fX48vy5HT8dNetLaQH9Y1ftFDSkBA9ZgGvwYiJDXQKrW5GzR6wuFcx9lbdH5XJoT7cvdud9op6SkEZ-7KD7ziiErKEUczT_Nyk8totNSL0RbHWWkxjeS55XL7nTm1k0J85xeVm8vXENeztWcV6ofATeDWe7-5vdZnLq1-HgK3K-4Ct0S9CtyKTQeVCp0TfMDQc4keKhWmCo3-2ArNflMFn3sCz_bKye_WfVfgBIe9CGYIuUDgUhs0bpE-Syg2uZMrwcm15fIWuEV-kcBtKKt_do6Rq17ENB6X5fhPv_035t8AAAD__w5heNo) title for the first time in the franchise's 63-year history. Arizona Diamondbacks pitcher Zac Gallen took a no-hitter into the 7th inning, but then Rangers catcher Mitch Garver [knocked an RBI single](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FOwzAQQL_G3lrdnZ1zPHhgicRQBhbGyDSX1shJqvhoxd8jYGV70hue3ttpPOVSy3p5yYsknbcxn7XcZUQ80IHc6O2UZhESZyUhxz5SZE_2migEFuzn6R2YHHWZHIrzZ-idZ-_YlkRADhEIYue7cMQAkZFD5EzQOTYeZCq67cePrax6lbl-bXfZj-dtsTVdVW_NuCdDg6FBH0X1zxkaXvN6kb09r61MsjdDQ9Osnz-AAWMfAwDGQAwd9Gj3NN0epdbSOBgPlyWX-lvRf5-_AwAA___Mj1Or) through the infield to break the scoreless tie. Texas mopped up in the 9th with four more runs, and Arizona never scored. The Rangers [got the win in Phoenix](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uwyAUxfGnwRsWXD5sBoYubOna0SLhOqbCYAGJm7ev0rnz0ZF--n9dlouPKeb7p9_R9rUs_tbjExfOKVAQixyCXREBxYCWazMbMFrCsNlZa6MEiqvh3KgVUK2C6zBpjbMxEodogYHgnAEzSqpp5BMzmuvJaA9MCU0kwxB7qeN3iblvuKZXeWIdb2Ufkt16PxoRHwQcAXee54jtyO-RgNvTlYBrvdQXAbcQcDEQcGKejJLSvA-lpkAb1oiNviW0449vtPp8x9robfP7EUtutOL1EVOg_VGzr-WRw1BtOM6YUmx6IpLddx_TH6v_G-k3AAD__x5VZp8), and it capped off their perfect 11-0 postseason record in away games--the longest road winning streak in franchise history. Right-hander Nathan Eovaldi threw six scoreless innings for the Rangers and got the win.

name: Bob
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Friend,
Embracing winter in rural Michigan requires some preparation. Over the weekend, a few friends and I got together with the log splitter and toiled all day to rack six full cords of wood for the winter. After, all they asked for was a beer. It reminded me of the generosity of friends and how important it is to show gratitude.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Thank%20you-3.png]
CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Growing up in a lower-middle-class home, I wonder if my family could contribute financially to a political campaign. We were involved in our rural community, but we had bills to pay, we had to make ends meet, and giving to a politician was not a priority.
It's never lost on me the importance of our communication, your support, and our outreach. Too often, in dire need to raise funds, please forgive me if we're not extending enough gratitude.
There are many ways to support my campaign for US Congress, whether it's through a donation, volunteering, engagement on social media, or forwarding this page to your friends and family. [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
I appreciate it all.
I've been in this fight for over two years now. Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula have been out of reach for Democrats for far too long, and I knew starting this journey in 2021, we'd have a lot of work to do to regain our traction in rural Michigan.
With your help, we will finally turn the tide in Michigan's 1st District: to save Social Security, to expand Medicare, and to put American workers - not billionaires - back on the pedestal where they belong.
Friend, look, because I fundamentally believe in campaign finance reform, I don't accept corporate PACs, dark money, or have ultra-wealthy max-out donors. It's just us, you and me, a true grassroots effort. People-power.
I hate to ask again, but you can help me keep up our momentum by recruiting other supporters. You're welcome to forward my message to your friends and family. I would greatly appreciate it.
Here's the link to learn more about my candidacy [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] and to continue the giving, if you're able. I promise, every dollar is critical to our success.
Thank you, Friend for joining me in this fight. Anytime you need to borrow a log splitter, let me know, I know a guy.
Cheers,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPH
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
LEARN MORE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or send a check to:
"Friends of Dr. Bob"
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855
