clean_body: [] Friend, Embracing winter in rural Michigan requires some preparation. Over the weekend, a few friends and I got together with the log splitter and toiled all day to rack six full cords of wood for the winter. After, all they asked for was a beer. It reminded me of the generosity of friends and how important it is to show gratitude. [] CONTRIBUTE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] Growing up in a lower-middle-class home, I wonder if my family could contribute financially to a political campaign. We were involved in our rural community, but we had bills to pay, we had to make ends meet, and giving to a politician was not a priority. It's never lost on me the importance of our communication, your support, and our outreach. Too often, in dire need to raise funds, please forgive me if we're not extending enough gratitude. There are many ways to support my campaign for US Congress, whether it's through a donation, volunteering, engagement on social media, or forwarding this page to your friends and family. [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] I appreciate it all. I've been in this fight for over two years now. Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula have been out of reach for Democrats for far too long, and I knew starting this journey in 2021, we'd have a lot of work to do to regain our traction in rural Michigan. With your help, we will finally turn the tide in Michigan's 1st District: to save Social Security, to expand Medicare, and to put American workers - not billionaires - back on the pedestal where they belong. Friend, look, because I fundamentally believe in campaign finance reform, I don't accept corporate PACs, dark money, or have ultra-wealthy max-out donors. It's just us, you and me, a true grassroots effort. People-power. I hate to ask again, but you can help me keep up our momentum by recruiting other supporters. You're welcome to forward my message to your friends and family. I would greatly appreciate it. Here's the link to learn more about my candidacy [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] and to continue the giving, if you're able. I promise, every dollar is critical to our success. Thank you, Friend for joining me in this fight. Anytime you need to borrow a log splitter, let me know, I know a guy. Cheers, -Dr. Bob Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPH Candidate for US Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat, MI01 LEARN MORE [actblue.com/donate/about-bob] [] Or send a check to: "Friends of Dr. Bob" PO Box 936 Marquette, MI 49855

The Fed's Digital Dollar Is Here! **It is official**. The digital dollar, once a rumor, is now here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed were testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilot. Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo were among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to the New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data. How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less." Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41fd35a3b6914bd0b17a17eadaa7c506&_e=sGTX9xNZrTSthfSOCJDm44EHOE242bIbWyypDcXHgwiOjogbPptCgb0hwXQrcTtLx2haaYl7UmaDhDniJwwszMNTUmRGWAwWUpkwN95bUrOTICeh5N5g-UGhPlX-IepF1t0_kl6x0n8kPHUo5EqXxuWd1LwKPeW7jZcHSwkpGFM9FGKTAzwPSlP3EChcONWAHZtqGZsW7qITVZOI2YXTSA_HoDa17rYDlh3cXqvwq-dw9bnma9HRx9OZpHeZfnymjGJNeth5FQrl9jsp6kK-fgxhv69YDOQQjwz0zC0idNVH8-IOTfa63AcPO94OBFbnlByOTMk0ciEWeLVXDP6I7SOr4YW-0ohh_9ZeIE8Qawr-7OfnRgi_Ue328C7_GUB1). **Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41fd35a3b6914bd0b17a17eadaa7c506&_e=sGTX9xNZrTSthfSOCJDm44EHOE242bIbWyypDcXHgwiOjogbPptCgb0hwXQrcTtLx2haaYl7UmaDhDniJwwszMNTUmRGWAwWUpkwN95bUrOTICeh5N5g-UGhPlX-IepF1t0_kl6x0n8kPHUo5EqXxuWd1LwKPeW7jZcHSwkpGFM9FGKTAzwPSlP3EChcONWAHZtqGZsW7qITVZOI2YXTSA_HoDa17rYDlh3cXqvwq-fAhJDDcWsftAJFjBvlNn36Uqa45qKZB_W4WJDjzQEhxVzWltuPsK7qMhXzW0xQ58A7biC75V5WUYChhxfNT0E48oFm88-7sgtwDKoKY2vdm6k4e4GttSW_MFXluUpBPkfSXDJZAVDCWYb8TOeWGs8B) unless you obtain their approval first. Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today. **They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be experimented on. We are not in a["Financial Rat-Lab."](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41fd35a3b6914bd0b17a17eadaa7c506&_e=sGTX9xNZrTSthfSOCJDm44EHOE242bIbWyypDcXHgwiOjogbPptCgb0hwXQrcTtLx2haaYl7UmaDhDniJwwszMNTUmRGWAwWUpkwN95bUrOTICeh5N5g-UGhPlX-IepF1t0_kl6x0n8kPHUo5EqXxuWd1LwKPeW7jZcHSwkpGFM9FGKTAzwPSlP3EChcONWAHZtqGZsW7qITVZOI2YXTSA_HoDa17rYDlh3cXqvwq-dfr305H-iodZ0oHS6kIhOIkVMuOVbOUTnbK8P1KwWvk1chbXqb2Nu3LymgaTeTwCq5YoQXm0iobWnTgU-8epXZKTxWVjcKwNxx605mMKx9XhvMbPwI6ZMJnkepcjS9UAkdCAQm-23AwYANwg8O8k4E) Enough is Enough! You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it. Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, its role has completely expanded. Gold offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41fd35a3b6914bd0b17a17eadaa7c506&_e=sGTX9xNZrTSthfSOCJDm44EHOE242bIbWyypDcXHgwiOjogbPptCgb0hwXQrcTtLx2haaYl7UmaDhDniJwwszMNTUmRGWAwWUpkwN95bUrOTICeh5N5g-UGhPlX-IepF1t0_kl6x0n8kPHUo5EqXxuWd1LwKPeW7jZcHSwkpGFM9FGKTAzwPSlP3EChcONWAHZtqGZsW7qITVZOI2YXTSA_HoDa17rYDlh3cXqvwq-eDUOS7wtATT1EDwudSiR8-HIIGjcmAq4387_ImBh03EQg6RT6rKwgt2wRkJ1d627UOAKtoJtLiuucdh-6mlaTSLk-NxnUI-fIOVQlO31x62a1lKWyuJcOH84pEmAGWw3i2g1tQK07LPlpRbX0vj7of). The Fed's Digital Dollar Is Here! It is official. The digital dollar, once a rumor, is now here. name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: a special request for you
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

These wonderful people are never going to be the focal point of the media’s story.

But if the pro-life movement manages to **_STOP_** Ohio’s radical pro-abortion _Issue 1_ referendum and reclaim Virginia for the pro-life movement next Tuesday (November 7th), _our canvassers’ work – _all made possible by the generosity of good folks like you_ – will be a BIG PART of the reason why_.

Traveling non-stop across these states, canvassing, engaging with voters, having conversations, leading text messaging, phone banks, and media campaigns, and registering pro-life voters are all just some of the hard work they do.

Each and every one of them has bruised knuckles from knocking on doors, blisters from walking neighborhoods, and stories of interactions with angry pro-abortion radicals they’ve run into.

But they’re doing it all because saving lives is worth it, Pro-Life Friend. And they know what happens in Ohio and Virginia will have HUGE ramifications nationwide for 2024.

**[So, with time running out, can you please consider sending a PRO-LIFE CARE PACKAGE to one of our canvassers to encourage them as the battle for life heats up during this final week](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjyuity-duchtdja-y/)?**

Pro-Life Friend, it’s so crucial that we support our volunteer canvassers the best we can.

Putting in late nights of driving or making calls, having doors slammed in their face, and even being harassed and attacked by pro-abortion radicals are all things they deal with – _and they do it willingly._

If I could have it my way, I would just snap my fingers and have the Abortion Lobby drop the ball in every single election – _or, even better, just stand down and let the pro-life movement win every election._

That way our canvassers wouldn’t have to deal with all the stressful things election season brings . . .

But I’m not a magician. I don’t have any magical power – and the Abortion Lobby isn’t going down without a fight.

That’s why sending a PRO-LIFE CARE PACKAGE to one of our volunteer canvassers would mean the world to them!

A **[_one-time Care Package Gift of $100_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjyuity-duchtdja-j/)** can provide door-knocking materials like _Students for Life Action_ shirts, flyers, postcards, markers, and more!

A **[_one-time Care Package Gift of $65_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjyuity-duchtdja-i/)** can pay for a tank of gas for a canvasser’s day of driving to and from strategic locations across Ohio and Virginia _(although this may only cover a few trips at the rate gas prices are increasing under President Biden)._

And a **[_Care package Gift of just $25_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjyuity-duchtdja-d/)** will provide a canvasser a day’s worth of meals while they spend their time volunteering for us.

Or if you’d like to provide one canvasser with all the materials, gas, and meals they’ll need for the next week until election day on November 7th, **[_a generous PRO-LIFE CARE PACKAGE Gift of $470 would accomplish that_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjyuity-duchtdja-h/)!**

It’s clear the Abortion Lobby thinks they already have 2024 in the bag.

And they certainly don’t hide the fact that it’s the tainted millions they make from their bloody “business” that makes them so certain – _not to mention the $600+ million in tax-payer funding they rake in every year._

Things might look grim for the pro-life movement from a financial perspective, but I know something the Abortion Lobby doesn’t.

We have a secret weapon that has **_PROVEN_** to defeat the Abortion Lobby time and again – _and I want to share our secret weapon with you. . ._

It’s you, Pro-Life Friend.

It’s you and countless other pro-lifers – _like our dedicated canvassers_ – who, through their time, talent, and treasure, help _Students for Life Action_ continue to exceed the Abortion Lobby in support!

Just look at what we did with _Roe v. Wade._

**_It’s sitting on the ash heap of history now_.**

And we couldn’t have done it without the decades of hard work from our volunteers – _all of whom are supported by the generosity of good folks like you._

**[So, please help our volunteer canvassers by sending one a generous PRO-LIFE CARE PACKAGE of $470, $100, $65, or $25 that will encourage them to keep fighting](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjyuity-duchtdja-k/)!**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

P.S. – In the hearts of Ohio and Virginia, _Students for Life Action_ has been on the front lines, waging a battle to protect the sanctity of Life.

They’re doing what they do because they want to see abortion abolished in their lifetime – _and that starts with winning in Ohio and Virginia!_

**[So, can you please consider sending a generous PRO-LIFE CARE PACKAGE to one of our canvassers to encourage them as the battle for life heats up in the coming weeks](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sjyuity-duchtdja-u/)?**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-sjyuity-026154D2-duchtdja-o) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-sjyuity-duchtdja-b/)
**

**
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: My number one goal as your speaker
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWA4kS6iNV

Mike Johnson for Congress

I am bullish about the future of America, but we need to
stick together to win.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWA4kS6iNV

Fellow American,

We are stronger together, but we
must unite, and we must unite quickly.

My number one goal is to EXPAND
our majority in 2024, so we can keep power out of the hands of
Democrats who want to see America fail.

I am bullish about the future of
America, but we need to stick together to win.

My team tells me you are one of
the most dedicated conservative warriors in the country, which is
why I need your commitment to be on Team Johnson today.

EXPAND THE MAJORITY
We have so much work to
accomplish over the next 12 months, and I can't wait to move the
ball forward for the American people… but I need to know I
have your unwavering support as I defend our conservative values
and EXPAND the majority.

UNITE WITH MIKE
I know times are tough in Joe
Biden's America, but even a single dollar helps us on this
mission.

Thank YOU for being a dedicated
conservative and God bless.

Gratefully,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

MIKE JOHNSON
Mike is a dedicated
husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law
attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the
fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been
a priority to the people of Louisiana.

WILL YOU STAND WITH
MIKE?

PAID FOR
BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be experimented on. We are not in a Enough is Enough! We have suffered greatly. Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway. You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it. Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, its role has completely expanded. Gold offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. . There has never been a more urgent time to understand the role of gold and how to own it. Taking control back of both your privacy and your retirement wealth are key. Investing in gold and silver can help you sit back and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with protecting your retirement. The time spent missing out on great opportunities is over. Explore, 100% free, how gold inside your retirement account could significantly improve your future wealth. https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5fc1864d1f57c9823ba936f9ece138ab78af2d8e71220aee9e69cc3a6c77d63598ebcd339a6731a3ffcd39e9cd8ea7e980f160d73cd1c71d0f1ad3a2b9c4042b

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=5fc1864d1f57c9823ba936f9ece138ab78af2d8e71220aee9e69cc3a6c77d63598ebcd339a6731a3ffcd39e9cd8ea7e980f160d73cd1c71d0f1ad3a2b9c4042b

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWY9uq6iNH

In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWY9uq6iNH

Dear
Friend,

In the
annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been
attributed to a host of factors-material resources, manpower,
pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in
determining the victors and the vanquished.

However,
as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that
surpasses conventional wisdom-a truth of extraordinary
significance.

Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the
remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated
by the savior generals-visionary leaders displaying unparalleled
expertise.

Today,
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite
your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian
and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson, has authored a
groundbreaking eBook-Victory and the Savior Generals-a
captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional
leaders.

You can
secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Inside
its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the
defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity,
contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into
seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict,
rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment
with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is
your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most
influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate
even in the present day.

Claim
your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now
through this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals

Wishing
you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

Hoover
Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA
94305

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell the EPA to regulate bee-killing pesticides
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2092432?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **SIGN TO HELP SAVE BEES: Tell the EPA to regulate seeds treated with toxic pesticides that can kill pollinators! >>****[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2092433?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**[_**Add your name now!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2092433?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) Wild bees are being pushed toward extinction, Friend. And last year, **48% of honeybee colonies were decimated** , and neonic pesticides are a major contributor. If we don’t address this problem, pollinators, ecosystems, and the food system we rely on are all at risk. But the EPA doesn’t regulate seeds treated with neonic pesticides as they do other pesticides. Millions of acres are planted with neonic-coated seeds despite the devastating impacts to bees. [_**Friend, will you demand the EPA regulate seeds treated with toxic pesticides to help protect bees and other pollinators?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2092434?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2092435?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Here’s just a taste of the “insect apocalypse” that many scientists are warning about:**the American bumblebee population has CRASHED by 89%, and the Western bumblebee by 93%** over the past two decades. In the meantime, neonic pesticides have been making agriculture increasingly TOXIC to pollinators – _**nearly 50x over the past three decades.**_
People are impacted by neonic-treated seeds, too. Most of the seed coating remains in the soil where it can be washed off into drinking water sources. Exposure to neonics has been linked to birth defects of the heart and brain as well as hormone disruption. [_**We need 5,271 more signatures by 11:59pm tonight to hit our goal. Tell the EPA to help protect bees from toxic pesticides now!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2092436?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2092437?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy Director of Science,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, as migrant encounters rise, Biden keeps the same old border strategy. | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. Follow Roger on social media for updates, volunteer to support the cause, or reach out to him directly. By joining Team Williams, you will make a difference in your community. | A Note For You, From Roger My commitment to our great state and country is unwavering, and I am grateful to have my wife Patty, our two daughters, and YOU standing beside me on this journey. | Roger W. 10 N. # Biden's Silent War On Retirees [ACT NOW]
---
While Biden gladly used a tax loophole to avoid $500,000+ in payroll taxes.

He's thrown $80 billion at the IRS to build an army of 87,000 new auditors. and shake down millions of Americans struggling to save up for retirement.

This is not the first time "Fair Share" Biden has targeted retirees.

In 1983, he voted to slap a 50% tax on Social Security.

Then he voted to increase it to 85% in 1994.

And now he's determined to ram through Congress a $4.7 TRILLION tax hike.

That includes punishing taxes on retirement investments and even Medicare.

As you can see, "Middle Class" Joe has been waging a silent war on retirees for decades.

But in a move that went largely unnoticed.

clean_body: | Team, The progress we’ve made this year couldn’t be done without you, and we’re so proud of your continuous commitment to our fight for fair maps. Thanks to the strong enthusiasm surrounding fair maps movements like ours, we’ve witnessed victories that inspire us all: Wisconsin Supreme Court Judge Janet Protasiewicz standing tall amidst partisan attacks, a = Wins for voters in Allen v. Milligan and Moore v. Harper , ensuring that Black voters get the chance to vote under = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Now, we head into a chapter of democracy that matters more than ever. With upcoming elections in states like Virginia, we have an even bigger opportunity to make our movement heard. As we continue our fight into the months ahead, we must remember, as voters are on their way to the ballot box, why we do what we do and why we must continue to safeguard our democracy every chance we get. Thank you for your continued commitment to progress and the fair maps movement. We can’t do our work without you. \-- Ramona Morales Organizing Manager All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Nearly 30 students walked out of former Secretary of State Hillary
Clinton’s class at Columbia University Wednesday in protest of the
school’s response to pro-Palestinian protests, according to The New
York Times. Students at Columbia University held pro-Palestinian
rallies following the Hamas terrorist attacks on Israel, and over 300
faculty members signed a letter condemning antisemitic incidents on
campus.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: What is at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkkqurmhuj7op0l5ue4dp3frd7olvp1ioe4cu4h0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0o74cph2bs)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _“This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.”_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrvcv78fje1p92l7kp9qomnn80jqf11c2t9ku0i8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0o74cph2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq2s4hmsq6umt2sfss4niepsgli7nmoipd5gn5p8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0o74cph2bs)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today – please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo6e841u3agjr4f75fv8g35jp2m6m4hibgdq2t8o_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0o74cph2bs)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ot6au6nj26gjgjtrqdi8hlb8ssqc635lr1bfd0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0o74cph2bs)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. [**Stand with me today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp8825pqpjatjd08snsdi11nqh2gi2pbkhrnmde8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0o74cph2bs)

God bless,

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zta533c7r46sfq22uba27eur2otjkpfdrlt7q7ig_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0o74cph2bs)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs24fk2rpu9bcbohk1ve91fp74ehv713nq5u0ej8_)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: What is at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4ltc5pg7hkbmtuhkr85p7qmlett7nj429ec89lg_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0p77chh2bs)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _“This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.”_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvebucfle4q6vk5if75kcsp5v1g9nuf3cqj1rgs8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0p77chh2bs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5eaki829kshce91594vbu9kjv1k5pgrgsdmpd7g_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0p77chh2bs)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today – please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqek9fjl1foen1vrvjseqinj38g891aclsl9j5rg_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0p77chh2bs)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zainfd4hgsic9ctbskrcmnc1oa3s20vlf9ib5tpo_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0p77chh2bs)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. [**Stand with me today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf3ncrga4kvdb6rvv799kkq8kgh8j38hembhnv00_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0p77chh2bs)

God bless,

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvuo5eoau8gijohq3qaofqmoa6bi87u234m32s8g_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm0p77chh2bs)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4t1ee5j70jda721v8s2co9k1dl2gp1ff40191ro_)

name: 4Patriots
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672832%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s7MQHaMoOpdd7r%2bjtAwpOA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672833%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bYk2qQPAN%2fnZkouaMLTugg&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672834%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zjBmlw9pKUL%2fKYPOVdF73w&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672845%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W4X6OqfKhN7%2bV2gsL9zUQw&sysid=1)
---

# Biden's Silent War On Retirees [ACT NOW]
---
While Biden gladly used a tax loophole to avoid $500,000+ in payroll taxes.

He's thrown $80 billion at the IRS to build an army of 87,000 new auditors. and shake down millions of Americans struggling to save up for retirement.

This is not the first time "Fair Share" Biden has targeted retirees.

In 1983, he voted to slap a 50% tax on Social Security.

Then he voted to increase it to 85% in 1994.

And now he's determined to ram through Congress a $4.7 TRILLION tax hike.

That includes punishing taxes on retirement investments and even Medicare.

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: Sweeney Releases Statement on Democrat Gun Control Proposals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Sweeney Defends the Second Amendment and Article 2a Rights
| | |
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** **_November 2, 2023_** **Contact:** Rep. Joe Sweeney, (603) 327-7184 **Salem, NH -** Rep. Joe Sweeney, Chairman of Granite Solutions and a staunch defender of Second Amendment rights, reaffirmed his unwavering commitment to protecting the liberties of law-abiding gun owners in New Hampshire in response to recent statements made by Joyce Craig and Cinde Warmington regarding proposed gun control measures: "I firmly believe that our Second Amendment and Article 2a rights are fundamental to our freedom and security," said Rep. Joe Sweeney. "It's troubling to hear any proposals that could potentially restrict the rights of law-abiding citizens who responsibly exercise their Second Amendment rights. Granite Staters believe in a realistic approach that addresses the root causes of violence while respecting the rights of responsible gun owners. We must focus on improving mental health services, strengthening law enforcement efforts, and supporting our communities in a way that respects and reaffirms our constitutional freedoms." ###

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn45abta2uikng980evlf7i33pnh3qm6ongcn728_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgmcpb2cth2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb1li8cnu843v5m0u1plb50mrfacc9oid531ae00_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgmcpb2cth2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt2cd90a9i0jov38vjeapfcaq7tr056ctkkqtbgg_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgmcpb2cth2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgotud9bojb4sapmnuk2hfp02eec812dk6e4jr3o_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgmcpb2cth2bs)

The Left’s campaign of vilification and intimidation to try to control the Supreme Court is a saga with a number of shameful chapters dating back to the smearing of Robert Bork in 1987. Their game plan is simple: defeat originalist nominees to the Court by whatever illegitimate attacks can be conjured up.

Republicans publicly lambasted GOP Sen. Tommy Tuberville of Alabama after the senator objected to dozens of requests for votes on individual military officer promotions Wednesday night. Tuberville has said he does not oppose voting one-at-a-time to confirm officers affected by his hold but is against the standard procedure of approving them en masse by unanimous consent, maintaining his hold in protest []

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35839%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lvixd3yvXeY3neF%2fyrjT4w&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35830%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wJZ73uqtRQvM6IqWUsv8Ug&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35831%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7RdOGY7IA85UWdCkpoltKw&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35832%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Onoroav6j6rGNG7aNoy6cQ&sysid=1)

Major Airlines Sued For Allegedly Discriminating Through Their
Diversity Hiring Policies

America First Legal’s (AFL) Center for Legal Equality sued major
airlines for allegedly discriminating against applicants by hiring

Endorse Trump: REPORT

Republican elected officials in Florida are expected to flip their
endorsements from Gov. Ron DeSantis to former President Donald Trump
next week, NBC News reported Wednesday. After DeSantis received the
backing of 99 state legislators, allies of the former president have
orchestrated an effort in the state to switch them to Trump, two
sources familiar told NBC News.

name: LIBERAL LEGAL ALERT
subject: Trump DISQUALIFIED?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, Liberal lawyers are seeking to **disqualify **Donald Trump from the Presidential race because he dares to stand up to their far Left policies.

body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb1cf8subfoa8ed644bvogpgrku22enetml0d8gg_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm2ob2cjh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbq1cjg76tgu13j5ikvfc0brkojognp0pl3v1a20_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm2ob2cjh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8hs8dkoe83jpa5hqjgup3aeh92unnqu6c990k28_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm2ob2cjh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4odd20ale4sl9pcetss1l1i16nbkq7spqm05n6o_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm2ob2cjh2bs)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze3a22sg2iqpmq0fjmb6m3bmi1qi4mrtgu36dbl0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm2ob2c5h2bs). According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... name: Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Friend, you've stood by me so many times before
| | |
---
Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72645877/435970144/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4547-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmM5MDk5ZC04NDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J_cTlrDyJs1gLGslUrk1MWNtSyZiKEFx3i6dAVin0YM=)
Thank you for having my back when we fought for **health care coverage for 9/11 first responders** and **expanded benefits for veterans** exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need.
Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that **empowers survivors of sexual assault** in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York.
Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for **national paid family leave** for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the **Equal Rights Amendment** to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country.
**My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support.**
But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. **Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat.** I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors.
**[_Please, friend, you've stood by me so many times before, and I'm counting on you to have my back again. Will you chip in before midnight tonight to join me in this fight for progress and defend our Senate majority? Your support would mean so much to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72645878/435970145/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4547-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmM5MDk5ZC04NDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J_cTlrDyJs1gLGslUrk1MWNtSyZiKEFx3i6dAVin0YM=)**

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72645883/435970150/1575385346?refcode=jtk4547-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmM5MDk5ZC04NDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J_cTlrDyJs1gLGslUrk1MWNtSyZiKEFx3i6dAVin0YM=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: Friend, you've stood by me so many times before | | | Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington. = Thank you for having my back when we fought for health care coverage for 9/11 first responders and expanded benefits for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need. Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that empowers survivors of sexual assault in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members. Thank you for never giving up the fight to make gun trafficking a federal crime. After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York. Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for national paid family leave for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the Equal Rights Amendment to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country. My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support. But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat. I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I’d like to listen to what you have to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d46de8516c6410104b322db7ba89eab4ee3fdbd32ff1d8fee9a3833e1a870fa14992fe684adf94bf62fb32412344714b884fc514ea6a760c349d8922688925df583cd11aab86f677d2b97edd18a2930c

Friend,

At the next debate, I plan to once again take my case for the future of this country directly to you. Before that, I want to make sure I’ve heard from my team on what top issues have you most concerned.

I believe in service over self. As a leader, it is my responsibility to listen first to what you need. As Governor, I have always put the needs, jobs, and benefits of the people I serve over my own, and as President, I promise you I’ll do exactly the same.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c930355a69a8bf0e44cc5da9aba17d89101b682ac6737ad9ca8a52bd5597c9738c69253e76753a639bc8a7e3f17d6788d7d9c308d7ba3dd57221521e30d913b5
Today, I’m reaching out to ask if you’d mind taking a minute to respond to my official Listening Survey:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c930355a69a8bf0e44cc5da9aba17d89101b682ac6737ad9ca8a52bd5597c9738c69253e76753a639bc8a7e3f17d6788d7d9c308d7ba3dd57221521e30d913b5

Can I count on your response?

In Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c930355a69a8bf0e44cc5da9aba17d89101b682ac6737ad9ca8a52bd5597c9738c69253e76753a639bc8a7e3f17d6788d7d9c308d7ba3dd57221521e30d913b5

Ron DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c930355a69a8bf0e3b2b9968a09ec248cf7e43724a7d8fda523f4bbfc01b092b935e20ab8d50f1faaf7b5b3ad3bfcad160090456517fa2692b1e5286622c0056
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c930355a69a8bf0e0764676f22708a38b1a7c918b0e578f962ff3c6eba0d22e7402f23626e064b1e2762a0148a362dbe534305e3be22edc0c167eb313767455e
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c930355a69a8bf0e44cc5da9aba17d89101b682ac6737ad9ca8a52bd5597c9738c69253e76753a639bc8a7e3f17d6788d7d9c308d7ba3dd57221521e30d913b5

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c930355a69a8bf0e44cc5da9aba17d89101b682ac6737ad9ca8a52bd5597c9738c69253e76753a639bc8a7e3f17d6788d7d9c308d7ba3dd57221521e30d913b5

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

name: Doug White
subject: NEWS: Hate mail in the Inbox
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rural Americans United, not endorsed or approved by any candidate
body:
We've touched a nerve. Our messages are working!
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/11OkGF93G/c?w=ghmywgLD6D-s7K-f8PdLu9gM_KlxyLH-xfJysqKSHtU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzExT2tHRjkzRz9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | THIS NEWSLETTER CONTAINS STRONG, OBSCENE LANGUAGE THAT SOME READERS MAY FIND OFFENSIVE.
---
| | THIS NEWSLETTER CONTAINS STRONG, OBSCENE LANGUAGE THAT SOME READERS MAY FIND OFFENSIVE.
I OPENED ANOTHER LOATHSOME EMAIL this morning—this one from a maga-maniac who was foaming at the mouth after listening to one of Rural Americans United’s new radio ads.
As you may have heard, we just launched our $350,000, 14-month advertising campaign. From now through at least the end of next year, Central Washington will be flooded with 20,000 radio spots promoting traditional Democratic values. In an area that’s been smothered for years under a blanket of smarmy Republican propaganda, the ads are already inspiring enthusiasm, and more than that—hope. In the two weeks since the advertisements began running, 2,000 new subscribers have signed up for this newsletter; and hits on [RAU’s website](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/11OkGF93G/c?w=koEQEeaNimxDcM3JvVHTBbF-Vorh-uXLB98rfSdkgIA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnLyIsInIiOiI0OGMxZTNiOC0yZmFlLTQ0MmItOWU0Ny0wZWYyZWFkZmRiZWYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ) have more than tripled!
But if RAU’s campaign to emphasize Democratic ideals (like public education, healthcare access, restoring aging infrastructure, job creation, immigration reform, and support for unions and veterans) is inspiring hope in Central Washington, it is also bringing fear and fury to MAGA worshippers who oppose those values. Here is the RAU radio ad that so enraged the wingnut who sent this morning’s unhinged email:
Tired of not getting paid what you’re worth? Tired of rich corporate CEOs hogging America’s wealth and leaving crumbs on the table for workers? Tired of Republicans trying to take money away from your kids’ education to support rich private schools? Sick and tired of Republicans failing to take action on immigration reforms that would protect our economy and the immigrants that support it? Help Democrats make America fair again. Go to [www.ruralamericansunited.org](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/11OkGF93G/c?w=SjAyhgtplZBwP4CLM1kAKgqTh9H2eSwo4itl2AkX3Ew.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy5ydXJhbGFtZXJpY2Fuc3VuaXRlZC5vcmciLCJyIjoiNDhjMWUzYjgtMmZhZS00NDJiLTllNDctMGVmMmVhZGZkYmVmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) to learn more. Paid for by Rural Americans United, not endorsed or approved by any candidate.
The vicious message we received in reply is typical of the kind of over-the-top violent language and intimidation tactics Republicans have been using this political season in local election races across our region. It’s not enough to just tell you the email was particularly ugly; we present it uncensored; you’ve got to see it to believe it:
So your radio ad says that you guys would take care of immigration laws?!You dumb fuck liberal shit bags have already screwed that up look at your dumb fuck potato head puppet for a president that has the southern border wide fucking open! Maybe you should pull your head out of your loose drippy a****** and see the light of day and realize that Democrats are complete fuckstains that are destroying this country! Kiss my ball sack you worthless pieces of shit
This kind of violent language is not unique; it is standard operating procedure in the ever-escalating intimidation playbook being updated constantly by the head of the Republican crime family. It’s taking place nationally—remember Trump’s recent threat that U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Mark Milley should be [executed for treason](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/11OkGF93G/c?w=w9sacmG-SFkphC8ouDyZnsixAlRUkOTbVGMmyyIFh2g.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlYXRsYW50aWMuY29tL2lkZWFzL2FyY2hpdmUvMjAyMy8wOS90cnVtcC1taWxsZXktZXhlY3V0aW9uLWluY2l0ZW1lbnQtdmlvbGVuY2UvNjc1NDM1LyIsInIiOiI0OGMxZTNiOC0yZmFlLTQ0MmItOWU0Ny0wZWYyZWFkZmRiZWYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ); and death threats against Republican congresspersons who refused to vote for a MAGA sociopath as their speaker. And it has been happening all too frequently in Central Washington, particularly this year.
For example:

* According to the [Cascade Advocate](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/11OkGF93G/c?w=unRu96Gxky7VRJGJG6zD2XUdJurJM3mk5PdTjQCYeRI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubndwcm9ncmVzc2l2ZS5vcmcvd2VibG9nLzIwMjMvMDkvbWVtby10by13YXNoaW5ndG9uLXN0YXRlcy1yaWdodC13aW5nLWhhcmFzc21lbnQtaXMtbm90LWFjY291bnRhYmlsaXR5Lmh0bWwiLCJyIjoiNDhjMWUzYjgtMmZhZS00NDJiLTllNDctMGVmMmVhZGZkYmVmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0), Republican operatives used right-wing media to shower Yakima’s elected mayor with hundreds of threatening messages last month after she attempted to protect shoppers from harassment at a local Walmart. The intimidation against the mayor included doxing (revealing personal information about a person online) and sexual harassment. “In orchestrating this bombardment of an elected official’s personal mobile number with angrily-worded text messages, [Republicans] are seeking to intimidate an elected official so she doesn’t cross them in the future,” the Advocate wrote. “The goal is not to respectfully disagree (which can be done through official channels), it’s to make [the mayor] feel bad ... to inflict distress and emotional suffering.”

* A local nonpartisan city council member had one of her campaign signs stolen from her yard this month. A few days later, the sign appeared in her across-the-street neighbor’s yard—with FUCK YOU written on it in large letters. When the councilwoman asked the neighbors about the sign, they told her to “fuck off” because it was their “constitutional right.”

* After supporters and protesters demonstrated for and against family-friendly drag shows in the Tri-Cities this spring, the Emerald of Siam restaurant in Richland was [vandalized and the owners received death threats](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/11OkGF93G/c?w=1R-mR4QBgc-AMmr6Yu8yBHTUoCA41KGzhBfpCvIrlEc.).

* In August, incumbent Pasco City Councilman Irving Brown Sr., the only Black councilman in Pasco and the only Black candidate running for the council, had a campaign sign defaced with racist messages. It wasn’t the first time the issue of race has been raised recently, the [Tri-Cities Herald](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/11OkGF93G/c?w=eReiqeSq0J9ZUSmR4b2mX_ZIU2gNJzVOcukvGkYSnlc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudHJpLWNpdHloZXJhbGQuY29tL25ld3MvbG9jYWwvYXJ0aWNsZTI3ODY2MzUyOS5odG1sI3N0b3J5bGluaz1jcHkiLCJyIjoiNDhjMWUzYjgtMmZhZS00NDJiLTllNDctMGVmMmVhZGZkYmVmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) reported. Late last year, a local newspaper publisher voiced frustration that the city council had “given away” a retiring council member's seat to “an African American.”

Republicans have been adding pages to their anti-democratic playbook for years. Ronald Reagan made it OK to favor the wealthy over the working class, Trump made it OK to lie, cheat, steal, bully, intimidate and abuse power to force his agenda on others.
Nowhere is the tactics of MAGA more evident than in rural America. MAGA knows their ideology is not shared with the majority of the American people. So they have perfected a strategy to force it on us. They have only two tactics: disinformation and intimidation. Both are highly effective, and no place is more vulnerable than rural America. Rural Americans United is beginning to shine a light on those despicable MAGA tactics: by providing accurate, honest information to the people of Central Washington, and by refusing to be intimidated by MAGA threats of violence. We are committed to restoring a culture of respectful, civil discourse to the politics of our region, and we will never, ever resort to violent words or actions.
—Doug White Founder, Rural Americans United
