name: Diane Sare
subject: Friday Symposium: Nicholas of Cusa and Ending War
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=symposium_110323_nicholas_of_c&n=1)
---
Friend Join my guests Daniel Burke and Kynan Thistlewaite this _**Friday, November 3rd, at 8:00 pm**_ to discuss the questions of philosophy and poetry that were historically developed to put a higher conception of Mankind into practice, and achieve the goal of permanent peace. I encourage you to read the 1453 work [ De Pace Fidei](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=2FK9LC41lDtL6kGGxRiiM-t4vxAYjSqBrgp4q9mvuUlyynz5nguDLj0z0E0Ui-aLDAuYBpF_UGoGoUqxMiaBOw&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=symposium_110323_nicholas_of_c&n=2) (_On the Peace of the Faith_) written by the great Cardinal Nicholas of Cusa for Friday's discussion, and consider: _“There is a solution, a solution in principle. And the solution is: End this blasted imperialist system! And understand that we, as a people, must develop our spiritual culture; that is, the creative powers of mankind, to carry further the development of mankind, from some brutish character by a campfire a million years ago or so, into mankind as we desire that mankind should develop today. That’s the issue.”_ 2009 -- Lyndon H. LaRouche, Jr. _“The Word responded: “You will find to be everywhere presupposed not a faith that is other but a faith that is one and the same.”_ 1453 -- Nicholas of Cusa, _De Pace Fidei_ Do we as a nation have the strength of moral character, to acknowledge that there is only one wisdom, which because of our imperfections is perceived from slightly differing perspectives, which can be overcome only from a higher standpoint The families of Gaza are now suffering under a “text-book case of genocide,” as Craig Mokhiber, the director of the New York Office of the UN High Commissioner for Human Rights, declared in his October 31 resignation letter. What can give meaning to the lives of children, so violently ripped away? Doesn’t the answer lie in whether we who bear responsibility, take responsibility, to lift mankind out of that campfire brutishness of a million years ago? We will discuss building my campaign for US Senate from New York, in pursuit of that mission. Join us! clean_body: | | Friend Join my guests Daniel Burke and Kynan Thistlewaite this Friday, November 3rd, at 8:00 pm to discuss the questions of philosophy and poetry that were historically developed to put a higher conception of Mankind into practice, and achieve the goal of permanent peace. I encourage you to read the 1453 work (On the Peace of the Faith) written by the great Cardinal Nicholas of Cusa for Friday's discussion, and consider: “There is a solution, a solution in principle. And the solution is: End this blasted imperialist system! And understand that we, as a people, must develop our spiritual culture; that is, the creative powers of mankind, to carry further the development of mankind, from some brutish character by a campfire a million years ago or so, into mankind as we desire that mankind should develop today. That’s the issue.” 2009 -- Lyndon H. LaRouche, Jr. “The Word responded: “You will find to be everywhere presupposed not a faith that is other but a faith that is one and the same.” 1453 -- Nicholas of Cusa, De Pace Fidei Do we as a nation have the strength of moral character, to acknowledge that there is only one wisdom, which because of our imperfections is perceived from slightly differing perspectives, which can be overcome only from a higher standpoint The families of Gaza are now suffering under a “text-book case of genocide,” as Craig Mokhiber, the director of the New York Office of the UN High Commissioner for Human Rights, declared in his October 31 resignation letter. What can give meaning to the lives of children, so violently ripped away? Doesn’t the answer lie in whether we who bear responsibility, take responsibility, to lift mankind out of that campfire brutishness of a million years ago? We will discuss building my campaign for US Senate from New York, in pursuit of that mission. Join us! | "DONATE" \--Diane * | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Sare for Senate

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: What is at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35848%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QNEb%2fND0HIL2czJorv68dQ&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _“This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren.”_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law - I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world - _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35849%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2WjsiS%2f4apiZlPpyXCitQg&sysid=1)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35840%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hw%2fMrw3oUho75Q%2f9wV3qtA&sysid=1)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role - but we must act - and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today - please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35841%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bOqx8qdvan51ab%2fQvt9uaQ&sysid=1)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35842%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GCRL00kU%2bmShbhE4IaURrQ&sysid=1)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. [**Stand with me today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35843%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u%2f4ByuYpWj1AO1g7S9A4gg&sysid=1)

God bless,

[ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35844%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lZgkN47emQCpU5BOjTlKYg&sysid=1)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35955%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GQkU0itvGgVnyh8zfi4nKw&sysid=1)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

Your America News
---

name: Brooke Lierman
subject: Support our work →
body:
Last year wasn’t easy, so we must be prepared for anything coming our way by building our organization early and getting our message out to voters often.

| Peter,

After a dedicated two-year grassroots campaign, I felt humbled when Marylanders elected me to serve as Maryland’s Comptroller. It took a lot of work to get here - and so many people each doing and contributing what they could along the way.

Since becoming Comptroller, I’ve been working to support workers, families, retirees, and small businesses to build a better Maryland for all.

Even when there isn’t an impending election, campaigns continue operating, and we still have day-to-day work to pay for. Last year wasn’t easy, so we must be prepared for anything coming our way by building our organization early and getting our message out to voters often.

[_**Will you contribute $5 or more today to show your support for my campaign as we work together to improve the lives of all Marylanders?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72648992/435981076/-1178948366?refcode=BLU-BLMD-Welcome-3-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDYwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjExNjkyYi04ODc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FjKSoXDEcJ5jAbti0pacRNaZECSHSTTVpzP3dAwrkc=)

name: Mike Johnson
subject: The cornerstone of leadership
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR
BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWKrZ56ivN

Mike Johnson for Congress

I believe to my core that the most important things in
life are God, family, and pride in our country. These are the
values that guide me...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWKrZ56ivN

Fellow American,

The most important things in life
are faith, family, and freedom. That's not just a slogan, these
happen to be the foundations of our great country. That is why I
am fighting every day to preserve them.

Faith. Our nation began with the
bold declaration that all men are created equal by God, and that
our rights derive from Him and not the government. The founders
insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity
because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality
are indispensable supports" of our republic. Like so many
American households through the generations, in our house we
instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve
people.

Family. Stable, happy families
are the basis of any thriving society, and public policy should
always acknowledge this obvious truth. Strengthening the nuclear
family should be a top priority, and government should get out of
the way and respect parental rights. Kelly and I have been very
intentional about passing along the values of hard work, honor,
and sacrifice to our children, just as our parents passed them
along to us. For nearly two and a half centuries, this has been
the American way.

Freedom. It is a self-evident
truth that God endows all of us with inherent freedoms, such as
the natural and unalienable rights to life, liberty, conscience,
and the ability to pursue happiness, own property, build wealth
and defend ourselves and our families. The purpose of government
is to secure these rights, and the ideas we advance should always
aim to maintain and increase the liberty of the American people.
I've devoted my life and career to fighting for those fundamental
freedoms and traditional values, first in the courts as a
constitutional law attorney, and now in the Congress.

This is a simple truth: America
is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the
history of world - but we cannot maintain that status if we are
led by politicians who hate the very foundations that made us who
we are!

SUPPORT MIKE JOHNSON >

Right now in America, children
are being taught in many schools to be ashamed of their country
and themselves. The pledge is being taken out of school because
it mentions God. Free speech is being censored and silenced right
before our eyes. Democrats are fighting for the right to elective
abortion right up to the moment of birth. Unelected,
unaccountable bureaucrats are seeking control of almost every
aspect of our lives.

This is simply un-American, and
we must stop the madness.

We must elect more leaders who
make decisions based on American values with an emphasis on God,
family, and country. It's the only way to preserve the blessings
we have been given here.

Today, to continue to help lead
this critical fight, I need your financial support - to restore
our country and defend our values. Can you make a donation
immediately?

DONATE TO SAVE AMERICA >

Fellow American, we have a chance
to save our country from the radical Left that is aiming to
destroy it, but we're running out of time. I'm not sure what
version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down
this path. We simply must make a change before it's too late.

I made a promise when I was first
elected to do what is best for our country, and for Louisiana,
and I intend to keep that promise. It's why I have been a trusted
ally of President Donald Trump, who selected me for critical
positions and endorsed all of my campaigns. It's also why I was
elected by my colleagues to serve as Vice Chairman of the House
Republican Conference - one of seven elected leadership positions
for Republicans in the House - and to chair the Subcommittee on
the Constitution and Civil Liberties in the prestigious Judiciary
Committee.

We are working in Congress every
day to defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for
freedom, but we cannot do it alone.

If you are committed to keeping
the House from the radical Democrats who are self-serving and
want to turn America into a socialist country, then I need your
support today.

CHIP IN >

The path we're on currently will
lead us to destruction. But that outcome is not inevitable. We
still have the ability to turn this country around-- IF
conscientious conservatives across America will stand up RIGHT
NOW.

We MUST act, and we must do so
today.

Can you pitch in right now to
help save our country, Fellow American?

Thank you for all you do, and God
bless.

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

MIKE JOHNSON
Mike is a dedicated
husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law
attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the
fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been
a priority to the people of Louisiana.

WILL YOU STAND WITH
MIKE?

PAID FOR
BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: 🎧 NEW: Pastor Vince Torres on Faith, Family, & More
body:
Join the conversation - have you subscribed to No Doubt About It? | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=694445b7fc&e=567664f14c)
We're excited to share the latest episode of the No Doubt About It podcast with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti. In this episode, we're joined by special guest, **Pastor Vince Torres from Blaze Christian Fellowship in Santa Fe** , who also serves as the Chief of Staff for Republican State Senator Greg Baca.

➡ [**STREAM EPISODE NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2ad18823b7&e=567664f14c)
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=251f0a2c7a&e=567664f14c)

Pastor Vince Torres brings a rare combination of faith and political leadership to the table. In this episode, we dive into some critical topics that have to be addressed. Here's a glimpse of what we discuss:
* **The Battle for the American Family:** We explore how forces that seek to undermine traditional family values are affecting American families and what families can do to combat these challenges.

* **Rising Antisemitism:** In the wake of the barbaric attack by Hamas on Israel, we discuss the troubling trend of rising antisemitism and its implications here in New Mexico.

* **The Push for Child Gender Transition:** We delve into the concerning trend of pushing children into gender transition, even when they are not be ready for such a life-altering and damaging decision.

| [STREAM EPISODE 49 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=58d3ba9221&e=567664f14c)
---
We believe this episode will provide valuable insights and ignite important conversations.
We invite you to listen, like, and subscribe to the No Doubt About It podcast on your [favorite podcast platform](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=665a5f64a6&e=567664f14c) to stay updated with our latest discussions.

You can also support us by subscribing to our [YouTube channel](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=24c0e3b692&e=567664f14c) and visiting our website at [NoDoubtAboutItPodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1c983d5458&e=567664f14c).

On our website, you can purchase exclusive merchandise and make financial donations to help us continue delivering valuable content.
| [STREAM EPISODE 49 NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=22760d75f2&e=567664f14c)
---

Thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to sharing more thought-provoking conversations with you in the future.
Best regards,
Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b8c62c46cb&e=567664f14c)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zedh65trme6q3t20muq62kmpv6c1a4a14qgc7il0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74c1h2bs). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zal7rv4hhr6gkvckecnq61ipoqfevgndqekfl2b0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74c1h2bs) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zolnf86vphv12n68kdkj1fgv3rnb9v8eu750mhkg_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74c1h2bs) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Miami’s Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Do you want to see the next Presidential Debate in Miami? Chip in before 11:59 p.m. on Thursday.

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt9nahohj48g7d3b2955dqdlbil2kra69bb495k0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74cdh2bs)
Fellow American,

I want to see you in the crowd when I take center stage for the third presidential debate in Miami.

We're giving away (2) tickets to the debate in Miami - one for you and a guest. All you have to do is chip in any amount before midnight tomorrow! **[You could give $1 or $100. It doesn't matter as long as you chip in before 11:59 p.m. on Thursday, November 2nd.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr06n6eeoi8rr81mlafapc0rqfean0rom9ch2ju0_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74cdh2bs)**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2vileva55kd2cmketpjst50m2rg2nn12hkh2ta8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74cdh2bs)
During the first two debates, I made it clear where I stand on the issues. I have become the establishment's number one target - and I know they're gearing up to come for me again.

I am not going to let you down, Fellow American, and I hope you won't let me down either.

**Let's win this next debate with YOU by my side.**

Thanks,

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztddokii0lekalffvmhq5bu93pambngvt3vth3h8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74cdh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. In addition to two tickets (one for you and a guest), we'll provide airfare and accommodations for this historic debate. **[Chip in whatever you can!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjufk26h4h8cmhrnktmq4sapoqf13nde11g7he60_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74cdh2bs)**

| [** CHIP IN TO WIN -> **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze8cennq5hdst39tdk3cb6av6vmd13mrk6ik7r48_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74cdh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zct3mmqodqiuuocngdfdcmk4u46o6h631jea53ag_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74cdh2bs)

---

---|---|---

To enter by making a contribution, [use this form](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcb6rl5li2ao8oplc02gu5lmnirvrcvntr29e4ko_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74cdh2bs). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztisffj15uupl3i21p7c8r6qhfh1a66blkjsceig_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjgm9o74cdh2bs). Void where prohibited or otherwise restricted by law. The promotion begins on October 30, 2023 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on November 2, 2023 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time on November 2, 2023. One winner will receive the following prize: two (2) tickets to the third GOP Presidential Debate on November 8th travel and accommodations for the winner and a guest. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia, and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. body:
We are so close and with your help we will WIN on Tuesday.
To view this email as a web page, go [here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/vm2/0cf5dfb6f7d3fd953947229f28c3afba/40933/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933)

Friends, In just 5 days we finish this campaign, and we are leaving everything on the table. **We will not stop until we have earned the vote of every Kentuckian with our Fight for Kentucky Values.** As we wrap up this campaign, _**[I need each of you to pitch in just $5 to get us the last 5 days of this election.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/0cf5dfb6f7d3fd953947229f28c3afba/3fd164554394e9ebc3d6b838967d376c/40933)**___ **If you[give even $5](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/0cf5dfb6f7d3fd953947229f28c3afba/4ec7a3422016a82ac3d6b838967d376c/40933) we would have all of the resources we need to WIN on Election Day.** All eyes are on Kentucky. We have the momentum and with your support, _**[WE WILL WIN!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/0cf5dfb6f7d3fd953947229f28c3afba/59306961a165f0ffc3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_ _**[Donate $5 or more NOW for a BIG WIN in 5 days!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/0cf5dfb6f7d3fd953947229f28c3afba/fa6640c12c20a845c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_

Under Andy Beshear, crime in Louisville has soared, our kids have historic learning loss, and our Kentucky values are under attack. **Enough is enough.** **We must step up NOW.** _**[Donate $5, $10, $25, $50 or more TODAY for a BIG WIN!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/0cf5dfb6f7d3fd953947229f28c3afba/20fc80f9eb0ffaa0c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_ We must ensure EVERY Team Cameron voter turns out. This race is a DEAD HEAT and we must do everything to WIN on November 7th. _**[Rush my gift of $5, $10, $25, $50 or more NOW!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/0cf5dfb6f7d3fd953947229f28c3afba/ade825a344c7f530c3d6b838967d376c/40933)**_ **In just 5 days we will determine the future of our state, and the future of our country. I need your help to put us over the top!** For Kentucky,Daniel Cameron

name: Mike Lee

body:
| | | Hey Friend - it's Senator Mike Lee and I'm personally reaching out to you today.

In a moment I'm going to ask for you to make a small contribution to my efforts defending our conservative values in the Senate - but first, _**let me explain why this matters.**_

Our country is in the midst of _turmoil_. **Led by an inept Administration and Democrat majority in the Senate** - _our country is rapidly abandoning what once made our nation so prosperous._

_Unemployment is high, prices of just about everything have risen, there 's a crisis raging at our southern border, and our foreign policy has lost all sense of its identity_ at a moment when global stability is falling apart.

This is where I need your help. Everyday I'm fighting back, _**but I can 't do it alone.**_

Your support of **[just $3 or more](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=bb242820d92f47fc8b04183215537ae6&_e=ZP7cE6CU1CjotVSm3iqkAmAU1dtGoeGZmHn8eb9rCk9AX8lDrW2QaON7zQH2V3BWcYGXxLao5JlSD9kfoxf3jEx7kVMbO6qz4Dv-gGr34ve0Abtn-NwQqnkpNd_Gstd9njGP5FVx83EJSsq716xUIr5B2UbFY09KtE6Ianxq6BBbmDVC6LWzzwzEDLCAPbHlV1o_Yc-ipbVSxP18KRJL_4NqyaMvxTATScytMHeSdb77EBZfzVtR_gUoQLjBhE8l8sUX0uTwtK9_qZz3Mv1xrzKs--6PDAtsJ7bmPX0oZ6jRWrtr9MDQJ5q6Alx7TmEfR8ieKOn7DjO_4Cc5hbTYaw%3D%3D)** will immediately give me the boost to continue to protect our conservative values at a time when they're needed the most.

As a U.S. Senator I've always stood up for what's right and make no mistake, Friend - _**I 'm not backing down now.**_

Because as the Left continues to push our country further to the Left and foreign powers continue to try and undermine our way of life and attack our Allies - I will be the conservative standing in their way making sure the Constitution is followed.

Friend, I signed up for this fight and I believe with a Republican majority and conservative legislation - we can turn this around. _**But I can 't do it alone.**_

Unemployment is high, prices of just about everything have risen, there 's a crisis raging at our southern border, and our foreign policy has lost all sense of its identity at a moment when global stability is falling apart. This is where I need your help. Everyday I'm fighting back, but I can 't do it alone. Your support of will immediately give me the boost to continue to protect our conservative values at a time when they're needed the most. As a U.S. Senator I've always stood up for what's right and make no mistake, Friend - I 'm not backing down now. Because as the Left continues to push our country further to the Left and foreign powers continue to try and undermine our way of life and attack our Allies - I will be the conservative standing in their way making sure the Constitution is followed. name: Steve Kerrigan
subject: Melinda Barrett for Mayor of Haverhill

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
Melinda Barrett is a third-generation Haverhill resident who has seen the city change and grow. She’s a former small business owner with deep ties to the community. She’s a City Councilor who knows how to get things done.
Now, Melinda is running for Mayor and she needs your help. Melinda has served as City Councilor for 10 years and is Haverhill's first female City Council President. She's running to be Haverhill's first female Mayor, and Governor Maura Healey, Lt. Governor Kim Driscoll, Congresswoman Trahan and local elected leaders are right behind her. She needs your help, too.
Donate to support Melinda in the home stretch here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/melinda-barrett-election-committee-2] , or sign up [https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0848AFA82CAAFDC52-45680274-election] to help out on election day.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/melinda_e_barrett_president.jpg]
She’s running to build on the city’s progress, revitalize the community, and secure a more prosperous future for all residents.
Vote Melinda Barrett on Election Day, this Tuesday, November 7th . Haverhill residents can find your polling location by clicking here [http://wheredoivotema.com/] . You can learn more about Melinda by clicking here [https://www.melindabarrett.com/] .
Sincerely,

name: Tim Burchett
subject: I told you so… 🙄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
The Biden crime family strikes again.

| | | |
---
| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5cc8e8d4439d4900a3d732ce2187d85a&_e=mIFcrQfJahh1WudyDCD0MFhdV0fqhsRAaN9nwEdpMu6EuIpjdnvMyodFtkEZ1WqaeOBJnGgyce6LQ47EzeDHBoO_XAt0Ywq-DLAfT9mrK2nnybtcN7YLSq4bC4sp11oYJdAmz6qabaxL2wavvkGJKbTqePRjtKv7Fv645DZjoHFCFuGlPMYCtbP39frgspiXga2EbsLZNdp9_SlxcBEqTKPkdYtpytOj9koKkslHy5NFjAcBzU7fOUsE-gSUnX8YekjhFckB_QAgVhujeYCZi8sofbHQsCqTbL1hmKhwnDIquTyCU_DPJzfFaeAUCoBSMesjVHaATbUlBBibkx7oiA%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, Let’s cut to the chase: President Biden received [$40,000](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5cc8e8d4439d4900a3d732ce2187d85a&_e=mIFcrQfJahh1WudyDCD0MOq0mPWkpNUbq56Uov7T1aTCeesVKWzu9CKqoNDDa2xdQB0ZTW1ACBWMWXqLjIGqFPzwB2IuDo6wkE11rfawC88zzpfIZQ7zmK4PXow1GN-_vhTlS_3HWYRdjWiIe50CeNYmSolFwI99gUVY3FQ9qEr7o6xVX5PHswNaL_ZIC48qEWu582Dta54XcAxIaUiCFfwOq7h_dXcYW7xXOpTQ8lPc9vp3KEW8WaufvWc7xBAubQ6N7Msrc4M57OJbvhp4NqW1B3jNneTrcLWH8N0ZNUS4Wxrkjw5oDa_kCnLm1Rp_) in laundered China money from his brother back in 2017. That’s the word from the House Oversight Committee, and we’ve been hot on the Biden crime family trail for quite some time. All this comes from a subpoena of bank records, but there’s even more damning evidence in this tangled maze of cover-ups. Let’s break it down into bite-sized pieces:
* In 2017, Hunter Biden demanded a whopping $10 million [from a Chinese associate](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5cc8e8d4439d4900a3d732ce2187d85a&_e=mIFcrQfJahh1WudyDCD0MOqx6EQ6-Vc1zJcaymuYoftW27uZTmPT-DsTgeBFMMLqecb8vWbFY5aAGfxIJKy3G_227F-kQtSTsgyiD3wT1xV_mNKnvqb4WCDwxMg6MknXJh3395q79VxCSdPLCxKjB102TYSnpCMJG4E0nzxTCDB4LC-tk2bXRbtKOSq8azlM8vcH_z6v0UD0mn-lLw9cDehn01jQq_rFyGkUC1ITFuUxbqYnV1konEfOj-yrf5m1_6t-zhvVia6scuavhh8Iru2Rj3BpZSy3QhScPLwi50U%3D), claiming in a WhatsApp message that he was “sitting with his father” and that the Biden network would turn on him if he didn’t fork over the cash.
* Hunter [threatened](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5cc8e8d4439d4900a3d732ce2187d85a&_e=mIFcrQfJahh1WudyDCD0MOqtyqHSb49YAPwdv3qBubEui7-Z3caLslOoPykbNOJ5XMOtJ2n2xfDWbAFv9rrbHwskkswLeTYTp-qzMiTd5o7YvOk7RozJGO_gkgwcMqUq3X0eiyCNhWWVpLRoqv1ULu9ZL7mR19D2Qv239O61WUDHlg_uxUVg33b5WKm0iYkSGjfVJMHE8Y4j_CH_QN6vbYsquZI0hiMlGbQtaoM26i4kPI7UDO5cHdWT7t2t197H03wApFLHsFQSyJaXAzWiEdl8pbGo-JkUm-EM0LuqelJjnYg5ogA6pmqLWtuGFltlNvp08t1uE9o0j2SI5M7RH5rxnhqGQ-BND3ZItehzHKvP3iKw2I1TrpRm1yzBgLgJ) the associate, saying, “...I will make certain that between the man sitting next to me and every person he knows and my ability to forever hold a grudge that you will regret not following my direction."
* Bank records indicate the threats resulted in a $5 million wire to a**** joint venture established by Hunter Biden and the associate just days later. The same day, $400,000 was wired to a separate entity controlled and owned by Hunter Biden before he sent $150,000 to a company owned by James Biden and his wife, Sara, who then [cut a check to Joe for $40,000.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5cc8e8d4439d4900a3d732ce2187d85a&_e=mIFcrQfJahh1WudyDCD0MEJQDTl0NAKV_ZtdAwkBsij3UaPRlA81fwKIpLeGv_uVb2XkMh_EU7TPxSNYvJVfRUfjZb7rKz8hoJ_NUzgUxdCBHpxQM8yFseFYKOkJ-5Wg44BwWUMqu3799K8NFKBe9-NQzsJouf5QVCw1C3ACET4KxPNKUrnqnjzKTW11BKXfik8VnfG6mb9-_sY-bnQGj1-LtGDzNYWaxQx2TtrRgK25E2rradF_nT6sdm4Pdd_zQ5F8bGVJfnOK6GqrYG05s5fNduDXgC9rpHpWcV5Nkc4%3D)

There are so many dadgum issues here, but the heart of the problem is that Joe Biden makes us look like a bunch of fools. The Biden crime family raked in more than $24 million by selling old Joe as “the brand” to our enemies around the world. How does that make America look on the world stage? **[Enough is enough. Will you stand with me and my fellow Republicans as we fight to hold the Biden crime family accountable? Donate $5 today to show your support.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=5cc8e8d4439d4900a3d732ce2187d85a&_e=mIFcrQfJahh1WudyDCD0MFhdV0fqhsRAaN9nwEdpMu6EuIpjdnvMyodFtkEZ1WqaeOBJnGgyce6LQ47EzeDHBoO_XAt0Ywq-DLAfT9mrK2nnybtcN7YLSq4bC4sp11oYJdAmz6qabaxL2wavvkGJKbTqePRjtKv7Fv645DZjoHFqdlJ1p1jGG2VKtl2q4CAwuebEeMU657hd1vXTn39cLJWpMfeSJ6d4W2eCQMpj0b8b-6dwnfxFl6zUkgln0VkM6r7IWY3S6ds85JXnGCgOWlzHm16MKkyzEPQu0dfXT58lWamZ4GqgancvejITByHedzktRrMMPdLuZty1SYvxGA%3D%3D) ** I will continue to work with my colleagues to expose the truth about the Bidens, one wire transfer at a time. Their stories and cover-ups are unraveling like an old knit sweater, and I hope you’ll come along for the ride as we pursue justice under the law. Tim Burchett
---

name: Mattea Mrkusic, Evergreen
subject: GOP wants to cut funds for food, farmers, and climate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Why the 2023 Farm Bill matters to you
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13808%2E53494%2E1CVfMA)
---
| | Friend, Republicans _say_ they care about everyday Americans.

But right now, they are using the 2023 **Farm Bill** reauthorization process to cut essential funding from the bill—hurting everyone from farmers to low-income families to people who want to see urgent climate action.

That's because the Farm Bill goes way beyond providing much-needed support to farmers. It literally shapes our food supply—and can help _reshape_ it to make it more resilient under the threat of climate change.

**In other words, what's happening right now in Congress with the Farm Bill matters to all of us.**
---
[SEE HOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5053?t=4&akid=13808%2E53494%2E1CVfMA)
---
Republican-proposed cuts would **jeopardize food access for _millions_ of families across the country.** On top of that, it would **cut funding that is overwhelmingly popular with farmers** —resources to grow climate-resilient crops, support better agricultural practices, and ultimately lead to more sustainable food for all of us.

No person should go hungry because Congress failed to act. [The Farm Bill is an important food and climate bill, and it needs to be defended.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5053?t=5&akid=13808%2E53494%2E1CVfMA)
---
[READ NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5053?t=7&akid=13808%2E53494%2E1CVfMA)
---
Sincerely, Mattea Mrkusic
Policy Lead
Evergreen Action

clean_body: Why the 2023 Farm Bill matters to you | | | | | | | Friend, Republicans say they care about everyday Americans. But right now, they are using the 2023 Farm Bill reauthorization process to cut essential funding from the bill—hurting everyone from farmers to low-income families to people who want to see urgent climate action. That's because the Farm Bill goes way beyond providing much-needed support to farmers. It literally shapes our food supply—and can help reshape it to make it more resilient under the threat of climate change. In other words, what's happening right now in Congress with the Farm Bill matters to all of us. Republican-proposed cuts would jeopardize food access for millions of families across the country. On top of that, it would cut funding that is overwhelmingly popular with farmers —resources to grow climate-resilient crops, support better agricultural practices, and ultimately lead to more sustainable food for all of us. No person should go hungry because Congress failed to act. Sincerely, Mattea Mrkusic Policy Lead Evergreen Action | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

Peter, I’ll tell it to you straight:
Instead of looking out for hard-working families, I watched MAGA Republicans vote [**against**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72655370/436003911/893181056?source=20231102_em_pet_b1_raja_30_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjFiZTg3ZC05MDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJ5WTISmrZkAGprvVITACkWK_3HebbZwB5OGFTmleRI=&emci=3ca333c4-f178-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5f1be87d-9079-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) codifying abortion rights, [**against**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72655372/436003913/893181056?source=20231102_em_pet_b1_raja_30_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjFiZTg3ZC05MDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJ5WTISmrZkAGprvVITACkWK_3HebbZwB5OGFTmleRI=&emci=3ca333c4-f178-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5f1be87d-9079-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) affordable healthcare, and [**against**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72655374/436003915/893181056?source=20231102_em_pet_b1_raja_30_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjFiZTg3ZC05MDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJ5WTISmrZkAGprvVITACkWK_3HebbZwB5OGFTmleRI=&emci=3ca333c4-f178-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5f1be87d-9079-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897) gun safety.
I won’t stand for it — and neither should you.
[_**That’s why I just launched my very first Campaign Priorities Survey. I’m asking 10,000 of my best supporters to step up before midnight, share your priorities with me, and build an unbeatable foundation for victory. It would mean so much to me if you’d take 10 seconds to take my survey and share what matters most to you. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72655376/436003917/893181056?source=20231102_em_pet_b1_raja_30_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjFiZTg3ZC05MDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GJ5WTISmrZkAGprvVITACkWK_3HebbZwB5OGFTmleRI=&emci=3ca333c4-f178-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=5f1be87d-9079-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=21346897)

**“Dangerous.” ”Wrong.” “Inexperienced.”**
Liz Cheney, Mitt Romney, and more are **BASHING** our American First Speaker of the House because he isn’t bending the knee to their Uniparty Swamp Cabal.
They know that Speaker Johnson is an America First patriot that will put our country AHEAD of the corporate interests and dark money groups that they know and love.
We need an OUTPOURING of support for Speaker Johson before folks like Liz Cheney and Mitt Romney start lobbing political grenades at him to wipe our Speaker off the map.
**Here’s the reality: thousands of Republicans won’t open this message. Thousands will never step up to the plate.**
The grassroots folks that actually do support Speaker Johson right now are our real HEROES.
We need YOUR support right now before the Swamp retakes control of Washington.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Never More Important….
body:
Who can you trust in Washington?

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**I simply cannot overstate this ...**
The support we receive from committed conservatives and other concerned Americans has _never been more important than it is today!_
**Because right now we are carrying the largest and most important caseload in our 29-year history ...and making a major impact for the rule of law!**
**[And that's why I ask you to give us your active support today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65652&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65652&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Here's why we need your help now.

**_We are suing the Biden administration over its efforts to censor free speech and suppress opposition to its unconstitutional actions_ ... **<

Last week, we sued the U.S. Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI) for records concerning censorship of social media.

We have been in the forefront of uncovering the Biden administration's corrupt and power-hungry drive to "**_moderate content_** " on social media...that's liberal doublespeak for _censoring_ _and suppressing_ the free speech rights of American citizens who oppose their radical agenda.

[And we need your help now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65652&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580) to keep fighting in the courts to force the release of documents we can share with the American people to educate them about this fundamental threat to our First Amendment rights!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65652&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**_We are fighting to keep our elections honest ..._**

Just this year, we have settled our clean voter roll lawsuits against **Colorado** and **Pennsylvania** , after they began cleaning their voter rolls and agreed to provide us with voter roll data for the next six years (**Colorado**) and annual reports on their voter roll cleaning efforts for the next five years (**Pennsylvania**)!

We are also challenging a state law in **Illinois** that permits mail-in ballots to be counted up to two weeks after Election Day...which opens wide the door to voter fraud.

The challenges to honest elections are enormous... _and ongoing,_ [which is why your decision to join with Judicial Watch today is so critically needed!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65652&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65652&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**_We are investigating and prosecuting serious allegations and evidence of
_ _Biden family corruption_.**

We have sued the National Archives for **_thousands of documents_** that could shed further light on massive Biden family corruption, _including criminal connections with businesses controlled by the Chinese Communist Party_. The Dominant Media tries to bury this story... _but Judicial Watch is using the legal system and the courts to make sure they don 't succeed_.

And you can count on Judicial Watch to keep fighting to get to all the facts...and to accountability... _whatever happens in Congress_!

** _We keep fighting to expose all the facts about Covid and our government 's response to the pandemic_**.

_We will not let the Washington Establishment escape accountability for its actions_ ...that's why we filed multiple lawsuits against federal agencies for public records to shed light on the China origins of the pandemic, and on U.S. Government funding (by Anthony Fauci's agency) of "gain of function" research at China's controversial Wuhan Institute of Virology, which may have led directly to the spread of Covid.

Covid killed over 1 million Americans and cost us billions...and "we the people" deserve to know the facts about how and where the Covid-19 pandemic arose, and how much U.S. funding went to the pandemic's source.

[Your contribution today will help us keep fighting for our "right to know" on all these critically important fronts.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65652&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

_Thanks to contributions from our supporters_ , Judicial Watch does the work that the Dominant Media, Congress and the Department of Justice should be doing... _but won 't_!

**And as I said before, we are carrying** the largest and most important caseload in our history... _and your decision to give us your support is vital to our continued success_.

I hope I can count on you for a contribution today...and thank you in advance for your help!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8hnjfletq5cs4qsr31q5i6grfbjtbjvfggljqso_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjim8or2c9h2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmhb22imqcmlei4d29duomjat3h1g97imaithjrg_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjim8or2c9h2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4fn1qis4l6452dkgbavh8apbnecclrtni00mlo8_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjim8or2c9h2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd7pc55ies613b5n44tg0glogfk195agbhpo4a48_rp22sh2s8i66p70sjim8or2c9h2bs)

name: VoteVets
subject: Something happened in the Senate last night.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Significant cracks are forming in Tuberville’s blockade.
#
Derek,
Did you see what happened on the Senate floor last night?
Senators Ernst, Graham, and Sullivan (GOP Senators, all) tried to get 67 senior Military promotions approved by unanimous consent. Tuberville stopped them, personally. Every single one. It went on for hours.
After more than nine months and more than 360 stalled promotions — **after the Commandant of the U.S. Marine Corps suffered a heart attack while he was performing the #1 and #2 jobs in the Marine Corps** — significant cracks are forming in Tuberville’s blockade.
We can’t let this go. It is because of supporters like you that VoteVets has been able to make this a national conversation and ramp up the pressure on the GOP. We have raised the volume month after month with TV ads, digital ads, press conferences, demonstrations at the Capitol, meetings with Republican and Democratic Senators and White House officials. You got us here.
Now:
[**Help us keep up the pressure on the GOP. Chip in to VoteVets today. With your help we will end Tuberville’s blockade and get our senior leaders the promotions they have earned — that they deserve.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-nov23.4rDGn4&refcode=em231102-1-30&t=1&akid=18262%2E3013755%2Eyj5Ufg)**

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: BREAKING: Attack ads against Rashida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The attacks on Rep. Rashida Tlaib just got worse. Today, the Democratic
Majority for Israel PAC launched a six-figure buy of TV ads smearing her
across her district in the Detroit media market.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231102-rt.482RaF&refcode=em20231102-31643&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31643%2E1203867%2EwitV5k ]Can you rush a split donation right now to fight back?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231102-rt.482RaF&refcode=em20231102-31643&amount=3&t=1002&akid=31643%2E1203867%2EwitV5k ]Tweet from Josh Kraushaar: BREAKING: Democratic Majority for Israel
goes up with 6-figure ad buy in Detroit against Rep. Rashida Tlaib (D-MI)
over her hostility against Israel. Ad is titled "History and Humanity."

Rashida is being attacked by members of both parties with hateful
rhetoric, a resolution to formally censure her in Congress, and now TV ads
to try and turn her constituents against her — all because she believes in
protecting the human rights of ALL and issuing a ceasefire to prevent the
killing of more innocent people.

She is the ONLY Palestinian American in Congress. We cannot lose Rashida’s
critical voice and courage, especially in times like these. So, we're
setting an emergency goal to raise $5,000 for Rashida before midnight
tonight.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231102-rt.482RaF&refcode=em20231102-31643&amount=3&t=1003&akid=31643%2E1203867%2EwitV5k ]Justice Democrats stands with Rashida, and we will do everything in our
power to re-elect her next year. Will you split a donation of
$3 between us and Rashida’s campaign right now to help us
fight back against these attacks?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231102-rt.482RaF&refcode=em20231102-31643&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=31643%2E1203867%2EwitV5k ]Contribute $3

With your support, we will not stand by and let pro-Israel super PACs tear
down Rashida with these racist and Islamophobic attack ads. Together, we
can and must defend her seat with everything we’ve got.

In solidarity,

JusticeDemocrats.com

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1023&akid=31643%2E1203867%2EwitV5k ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1024&akid=31643%2E1203867%2EwitV5k ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231102-31643-footer&t=1025&refcode2=31643_1203867_witV5k&akid=31643%2E1203867%2EwitV5k

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=31643%2E1203867%2EwitV5k

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Reeves
subject: Only 5 more days! Plus exciting events
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
5 days until election day. Are you ready?
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100018b909d6669-66787114-08d3-4ed5-8b57-bb4a2e1edbf6-000000/zcX1mqT0IKfKQ37A5e-OsPLyiJg=346)
---
| Peter, We're **_five_** short days away from game day. That's right, **_only five days_** until election day, five days until the direction of the Commonwealth for the next four years is decided. If you truly believe in conservative principles like me and so many other Republicans out there, **_I 'm counting on you_** to cast your ballot. Not only that, all of Virginia, **_all of America is counting on you to show up and VOTE!_****__** Americans keep a close eye on Virginia politics; to quote Governor Youngkin, “So goes Virginia, so goes the nation!” I'm working with **Delegate Phillip Scott** , a **conservative champion** of issues like _school choice_ and _parental rights_ , to ensure a brighter future for Virginia. Please, join **Delegate Scott** and I the night before election day for a **_Rally for Virginia_**! Details can be found at the link below.
---
| https://www.philscottva.com/upcoming_events/?fbclid=IwAR27n2p4TEV6o6cOeAYK96VJe0u4ZTfbjN9Sr02N5bd2bR2T7oRpbBg3kp4**Monday, Nov. 6****7pm-8pm****American Legion Post 320****8456 Brock Road****Spotsylvania, VA 22553****FREE EVENT**
---
| After you have visited the polls to cast your ballot on Tuesday, November 7th, please** _join me in Culpeper County_** at Death Ridge Brewery with other Republican candidates to watch the election results roll in. There'll be plenty of food and a cash bar; **_the event is entirely FREE_** to attend so please join us in celebration of what I think will be a big night for Virginia's future!
---
| | |
---
| **Tuesday, Nov. 7th****6pm-10pm****Death Ridge Brewery****5393 Higher Ground Trail****Jeffersonton, VA 22724****FREE EVENT**
---
| As a youth sports coach, a former law enforcement officer, a small business owner, and a parent, I can't stand to just sit back and watch the direction this Commonwealth seems to be headed. **_Our children, our grandchildren are counting on us to make a difference NOW, not later._** Please, get out and vote. Bring friends, bring family. Just **_VOTE!_** Yours in service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator17th Senatorial District of VA(540) 645-8440
---

name: Leader Don Scott
subject: Protect Reproductive Rights in Virginia!
body:
Friend,
We are at a critical juncture in the fight for women's rights in Virginia. As you may have heard, Gov. Glenn Youngkin and his extreme MAGA Republican allies are pushing forward an extreme agenda [https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/politics-news/virginia-gov-youngkin-eyes-15-week-abortion-ban-consensus-voters-will-rcna101476] that rolls back the hard-fought rights of women across our state. Legislating an abortion ban here in Virginia is now a real possibility.
Virginia stands as the last state in the South without significant restrictions on abortion rights since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade last year. However, the upcoming election could change that if Republicans win the majority in both houses of the state legislature.
Your contribution to our campaign will fuel essential grassroots efforts and resources. Join us in the effort to regain Democratic control of the General Assembly, and protect the rights of Virginians to access reproductive healthcare.

Sam Bankman-Fried is in a tough spot. During yesterday's closing arguments, the prosecution meticulously presented a wealth of contemporaneous evidence that indicated Bankman-Fried's culpability in wire fraud and conspiracy charges at FTX.

In short, the prosecution argued that the defendant's actions were motivated by greed and that he effectively treated FTX customer deposits as his personal piggy bank, siphoning them through his trading company, Alameda Research.

Friend,

Speaker Mike Johnson here, and I am proud to announce the launch of our new membership program, the **Speaker's Circle!**

**And I am even more proud to offer you the chance to become a Founding Member!

[<<< Become a Speaker’s Circle Founding Member >>>](https://secure.winred.com/nrcc/johnson-speakers-circle/?recurring=true&amount=50&utm_campaign=20231102_WG-AUN2.103067_t1408185-573&ex_tid=20231102_WG-AUN2.103067_t1408185-573&utm_content=tv-au-20231102&xunv=tv-au-20231102 " <<< Become a

body:
Democrats are determined to protect our majority in the Virginia Senate, and we need to take back the House of Delegates. I’m committed to leading the charge. | | |

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
#
**Fracking is dangerous: >> [_We are asking 1,000 people to sign our petition to ban fracking!_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/126?t=1&akid=556%2E8507%2EIIXqm8)**
---

**FACT:** **Fracking is not safe!**

And yet, for years the oil and gas industry has widely promoted the lie that fracking does no harm.

**FACT:** **Fracking leads to water pollution, depleted groundwater, earthquakes, climate pollution, and direct impacts to our health.**

[_Right now, we are asking 1,000 people to sign their name and take a stand against fracking. We need 5 more people from PA – will you add your name today?_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/126?t=2&akid=556%2E8507%2EIIXqm8)

[Add my name: Ban fracking!](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/126?t=3&akid=556%2E8507%2EIIXqm8)

Fossil fuel companies have spent billions of dollars to convince the public that fracking poses no safety or environmental risks.

_But science proves the exact opposite._

In fact, children living near fracking wells are two to three times more likely to contract a form of childhood leukemia. And adults in those same neighborhoods have experienced higher levels of nosebleeds, headaches, and skin lesions.

[_So today we are calling on Congress to pass a bill to ban fracking for good: Will you add your name to join us? >>_](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/126?t=4&akid=556%2E8507%2EIIXqm8)

[Add my name: Ban fracking!](https://act.zakforcongress.com/go/126?t=5&akid=556%2E8507%2EIIXqm8)

Thank you,
Malamed HQ
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=556%2E8507%2EIIXqm8)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.zakforcongress.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.zakforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=556%2E8507%2EIIXqm8)

To give by check:
Zak for Congress
PO Box 220421
Great Neck, NY 11022
Email us: [info@e.zakforcongress.com](mailto:info@e.zakforcongress.com)
PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I refuse to co-parent with the government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn't envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4bfb3634df7f45d98129e73a7931a941&_e=LU9XKIuXmiOQHbXb6dVOjy33ywlQxgQ5TwyhpqwsGeul3t2LCxR1Z6XqD8YHwnRkNkOTisKO_hrhDWogMRR3egKQpHK1rTVwhtHhZf9JbjyRB8eWRxE4FVA-XddrPg640Cp7tifTnJ1zt37hvh0_lNIom1w3opVfpCretQppZlI2Sys52J5AxgFugH0GkooGAZwlsYr62V2tWUZ0dxsTAs25F40P2Q2VN03-86uVsY-9-Lk1x-UIxQupVxy5M_FLkbwkk0gfrwLiA-BhckLHsIKVGHM2ZBlL44_l6CC53wvSFMRif00cWxakO66kQAYBj16z3YnGoA-FcovaTwvbCfczQjf1hUzIe_FhFma5lQ5o_p00JL563k9rCyrK5in_ZxhRaZWBIP89tptg1KIzVQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _" This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren."_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law - I'm a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world - _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We 've been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4bfb3634df7f45d98129e73a7931a941&_e=LU9XKIuXmiOQHbXb6dVOjy33ywlQxgQ5TwyhpqwsGeul3t2LCxR1Z6XqD8YHwnRkNkOTisKO_hrhDWogMRR3egKQpHK1rTVwhtHhZf9JbjyRB8eWRxE4FVA-XddrPg640Cp7tifTnJ1zt37hvh0_lNIom1w3opVfpCretQppZlI2Sys52J5AxgFugH0GkooGAZwlsYr62V2tWUZ0dxsTAs25F40P2Q2VN03-86uVsY95IC2Y_p-YHzBZkb_wX6hw4hOVQ9DSm967I8HkEdwSQH5bm9fHiEdXx12ZDuj7xE_itqmcLdtoCEnMQk1O_scjgtiLGD20xHiYiI0ta53oMsEF_j_wdjmamC1x5-BLhvaQpXjiEFnJFmDQGL1NiTDq_CcBEGY4fbxGdvhvW1ohrQ%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4bfb3634df7f45d98129e73a7931a941&_e=LU9XKIuXmiOQHbXb6dVOjy33ywlQxgQ5TwyhpqwsGeul3t2LCxR1Z6XqD8YHwnRkNkOTisKO_hrhDWogMRR3egKQpHK1rTVwhtHhZf9JbjyRB8eWRxE4FVA-XddrPg640Cp7tifTnJ1zt37hvh0_lNIom1w3opVfpCretQppZlI2Sys52J5AxgFugH0GkooGAZwlsYr62V2tWUZ0dxsTAs25F40P2Q2VN03-86uVsY_0Fq4sTiTUMSnUJYnaFQFALUl3iXkDVuEDQv2bP2FgN_0hBdB3msnx5or36Vv2Glcy74jbfveiy3SRUUTd7qKhpRMOW8O57UfwBfJJxHX-21kro7JCMdnqFhqIpo9K29H9a1GIoS9zNwkcHiGGlD3l1P1Bq1IBeRQH53X0JzoIww%3D%3D)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you're getting to know me and I'm navigating this new role - but we must act - and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I 'm not sure what version of America we'll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I 'm asking you today - please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4bfb3634df7f45d98129e73a7931a941&_e=LU9XKIuXmiOQHbXb6dVOjy33ywlQxgQ5TwyhpqwsGeul3t2LCxR1Z6XqD8YHwnRkNkOTisKO_hrhDWogMRR3egKQpHK1rTVwhtHhZf9JbjyRB8eWRxE4FVA-XddrPg640Cp7tifTnJ1zt37hvh0_lNIom1w3opVfpCretQppZlI2Sys52J5AxgFugH0GkooGAZwlsYr62V2tWUZ0dxsTAs25F40P2Q2VN03-86uVsY8HwxsSjfeJhBnRq0Lb7VIkZ7pA9CqWZ2sGIjyBXQYWhVMl3_OzAHO-noxfUgrfjnw4J_cIIqfcMb82DMBDcASZ_RH6AsbfN3h-1ManUyOYXtnSVpVNwuBd9sie22mET_0LQUtx3iLVnF8uC1u6wyDDqyNarWj1ZzyTS1_HnMmk_w%3D%3D)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_**[** DONATE > **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4bfb3634df7f45d98129e73a7931a941&_e=LU9XKIuXmiOQHbXb6dVOjy33ywlQxgQ5TwyhpqwsGeul3t2LCxR1Z6XqD8YHwnRkNkOTisKO_hrhDWogMRR3egKQpHK1rTVwhtHhZf9JbjyRB8eWRxE4FVA-XddrPg640Cp7tifTnJ1zt37hvh0_lNIom1w3opVfpCretQppZlI2Sys52J5AxgFugH0GkooGAZwlsYr62V2tWUZ0dxsTAs25F40P2Q2VN03-86uVsY8v0d5cMr4ChnwSb6BiVmcHdNEKChJRsKVYMV2TvMdIF2tEjzcFaHJ1lHExtmAzLASatbOWUOMxwByGUpKlR111F9Dv-elaGsfUpAciwBVrcsPkAoEXTHVO6T5kqmIsGHYiMekDrObt4rNgyFu5cEqiOMt4r6D9MI3qlRg14LKp1g%3D%3D)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. clean_body: When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn't envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change. | Fellow American, When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: " This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren." There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn. Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--every day --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction. I believe that God is not done with America yet. I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America. I believe in the law - I'm a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law. I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world - but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us. Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you're getting to know me and I'm navigating this new role - but we must act - and quickly. We need a full course correction,otherwise, I 'm not sure what version of America we'll hand down to the next generation. -STEP FORWARD TODAY- I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House | MIKE JOHNSON * Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Looking for your response, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Could you take a minute and complete our November issue survey?
#

Peter, in the Marines we called this reconnaissance.
It’s important to know what matters to our supporters. It helps us run as effective a campaign as possible, and allows us to be responsive to the things that are important to you.
But in another sense entirely, it will help me be a better Senator. Like I’ve said a million times — I’m not running to be the same kind of Senator as Kyrsten Sinema. I’m not going to go to the Senate and forget about the people who sent me there.
With that in mind, I’ve got a small request from you today: [**Could you take a minute and complete our November issue survey?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/issues_survey_2023_nov/?source=em231102-1&refcode2=1398.734936.nAvDIQ&akid=1398%2E734936%2EnAvDIQ)

Thanks a lot for this. I mean it — things like this really help.
\- Ruben

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: The Palestinian people are not disposable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Trying to bully me won’t work, because this movement for a ceasefire is bigger than one person, and it’s growing every single day. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvMY8LMTL9B59_PRik70ZbGOqsTXp2dBVq-X9gE3wEgnOqo7lcilloRgjfmK-jV9taaAW22LQwepT-npzPfuJ38eadWC5Pzt_z9__e5a-8qzs-sUxS0vHWXT5Pdgc-kzCDUJZuxP6KQQseVfIebAxe_-ZhIvNBOSpWQHGc-ZqZASQJbifSa46CL20xAKN5ysoD/40y/Zn2GdeuHQFulGNl39M_LgA/h0/5tfC_WSeBBOvZd1RJSYLIeiwKCN4F-Q6CVjXSuJA2nw)
---
Friend, Last night, the House of Representatives voted to "table" Marjorie Taylor Greene’s bigoted, Islamophobic resolution censuring me for humanizing Palestinians and demanding a ceasefire. The resolution was defeated—but the attempts to silence me are not stopping. I am the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, and my perspective is needed here now more than ever. I’m not going to be silenced. **Trying to bully me won’t work, because this movement for a ceasefire is bigger than one person, and it’s growing every single day.** [**Donate now to push back against attempts to silence me and our movement to save lives.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6cB7bsPo1Hejz6R4JBnOajbAc_w1hp9CRa2Sh1vcM-YOo26WTeCoUmieEEgsCqDJmqHxISIJf2U9O8e6oyscnMbmHAE6ftagBNGhr17rCmsli_-imqJhaQ3Lc_-3FcGgMcH5wMa2ov5GY4ERSBssL11elS9YN2RzWZ3M7ppS1B64TKv2qqbjgW7OZm0IED7mu5K9lScWaGMlHPelby0b6j1x5ZgkQw-iBVWpcHJaFYjHSlUSsuQqxFtDrdS7e7iY_A4FwbqD_X8Y_LmnqmtcwEDZgYuhv-x_EXnLE7qRcM_W9V3bcFzWCgOZTglGe_jqpH80m_SpFCiLTGsI2JVL1L0-K0DRQJpH6DqfX7i9SyBiQBsIBDj47TXRvoWA7_5o56vJFXQxqbkcbwofD8RCm/40y/Zn2GdeuHQFulGNl39M_LgA/h1/g44JfTZUF1x8cqtuTl-aJLaYLRnS0i2t3TU8dXuLDTI) | [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6cB7bsPo1Hejz6R4JBnOajbAc_w1hp9CRa2Sh1vcM-YOo26WTeCoUmieEEgsCqDJmqHxISIJf2U9O8e6oyscnoMiMH8SB3aToKrECZU-vfaTB6d42Cd-O54dOn1r9sG9rKLqEyBFfGbL3qrF7jJdzotqNcz-FrYSUlFI58vMXx42k0_EaAYU5Tk3S25QFAk3MyfL6uZThI3t2MRcHTWqe0poFVlnIB3c25cAHOAtXfUtS5XaRZKtXsNrpN8-RXO0ZPb4zviGehE-hqQdkpuDfz0IpWMBK3wxf8iaG5cDEqi7Byt50h20OsFt4xgITwHq7kbcFCrUqlxqsaHNyt9TMWvC1_hQ-ZSmZvczDTFpWZ2pgzUi08gbVb74SBnXlbGqTs_NwWKiOPphcXulvN2Mw/40y/Zn2GdeuHQFulGNl39M_LgA/h2/SwXmzBwkQOyrv7_Ua_MOEzgzJHf1qhceJm7P9ueeOH8)
---
We will continue to call for a ceasefire, for the immediate delivery of humanitarian aid to Gaza, for the release of all hostages and those arbitrarily detained, and for every American to be brought home, including Zakaria, Laila, and Yousef in my district.
Some people inside and outside Congress are determined to lie and distort my words, so let me be clear: my criticism has always been of the Israeli government. It’s important to separate people and governments, and no government is beyond criticism.
The lie that any critique of the Israeli government is antisemitic sets a dangerous precedent, and it’s being used to silence diverse voices speaking up for human rights across our country.
Meanwhile, yesterday a Member of Congress used genocidal and dehumanizing language, questioning the existence of innocent Palestinian civilians.
I can’t believe I have to say this, but the Palestinian people are not disposable. We are human beings just like anyone else. My grandmother, my sity, like all Palestinians, just wants to live her life with freedom and the human dignity we all deserve.
Speaking up to save lives no matter their faith or ethnicity should not be controversial. The cries of Israeli and Palestinian children calling out for their parents sound no different to me.
I am grateful to be in this peace movement with people of all backgrounds, including countless Jewish Americans across this country standing up and saying not in our names.
[**Please chip in today to show your support for a ceasefire and to make clear that we will not be silenced.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z6cB7bsPo1Hejz6R4JBnOajbAc_w1hp9CRa2Sh1vcM-YOo26WTeCoUmieEEgsCqDJmqHxISIJf2U9O8e6oyscni2M619mXoEl6cXtVffEmVFbm4dXqhod32h7aF0fyfY1bhanRcyM_Bob5BxsByVPg7VUB-XfpFw9woTILaouI35zO9V-_MgVB3ZGt1omAxyuS6b18-ibapT0G8Vd5tacht-Z5ZwS4hbnDly89xbTlCEVFDRNrFQat7d2lCnAbQfcWdKX-XX2EUyw4F4QZTtpFS1h1X-m0Q_sHa7MAPRxsDyGEu8HiUQekROz--Z3HF6CQGKbUWtG4-1ORtgsq80qrzZhsUrIhUp0EDGNl15QFP3mmrNWvtr1x-yp1SzZHZefDZt_p7oP-voNM2fuJPrtv/40y/Zn2GdeuHQFulGNl39M_LgA/h3/jsw3qHedt4XL7qAEiQQR8OntvetF34intK-l3xN6Ir8)
