clean_body: Trying to bully me won’t work, because this movement for a ceasefire is bigger than one person, and it’s growing every single day. | | | Friend, Last night, the House of Representatives voted to "table" Marjorie Taylor Greene’s bigoted, Islamophobic resolution censuring me for humanizing Palestinians and demanding a ceasefire. The resolution was defeated—but the attempts to silence me are not stopping. I am the only Palestinian American serving in Congress, and my perspective is needed here now more than ever. I’m not going to be silenced. Trying to bully me won’t work, because this movement for a ceasefire is bigger than one person, and it’s growing every single day. | We will continue to call for a ceasefire, for the immediate delivery of humanitarian aid to Gaza, for the release of all hostages and those arbitrarily detained, and for every American to be brought home, including Zakaria, Laila, and Yousef in my district. Some people inside and outside Congress are determined to lie and distort my words, so let me be clear: my criticism has always been of the Israeli government. It’s important to separate people and governments, and no government is beyond criticism. The lie that any critique of the Israeli government is antisemitic sets a dangerous precedent, and it’s being used to silence diverse voices speaking up for human rights across our country. Meanwhile, yesterday a Member of Congress used genocidal and dehumanizing language, questioning the existence of innocent Palestinian civilians. I can’t believe I have to say this, but the Palestinian people are not disposable. We are human beings just like anyone else. My grandmother, my sity, like all Palestinians, just wants to live her life with freedom and the human dignity we all deserve. Speaking up to save lives no matter their faith or ethnicity should not be controversial. The cries of Israeli and Palestinian children calling out for their parents sound no different to me. I am grateful to be in this peace movement with people of all backgrounds, including countless Jewish Americans across this country standing up and saying not in our names. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Team, we’re kicking off the month of November with a couple of important campaign updates: First, we want to extend a MASSIVE thank you for your incredible support in October. Without you, we wouldn’t have met our online fundraising target, but we still have a tough road ahead of us. If we want to win this race, we’re going to need everyday folks like you to keep stepping up — month after month. Your enthusiasm and support are what power this grassroots movement to defeat Anthony D'Esposito and take back the House. Remember, D'Esposito isn't your run-of-the-mill Republican. He’s a _very_ well-funded MAGA politician who plays fast and loose with the truth and puts the far-right agenda ahead of the real issues. He claims to be a "moderate,” but time and time again, his votes have proven otherwise. Most recently, he supported MAGA Mike Johnson for House speaker — a guy who led the charge to overturn the 2020 election and wants to ban abortion in all 50 states. He talks about "law and order," but he voted to protect his buddy and criminal campaign donor, George Santos, from expulsion in Congress. And despite pretending to work for the people, he bends over backward time and again to please the MAGA GOP. In short, D'Esposito's got to go. **As we approach the one-year mark until Election Day, we're launching an URGENT FLASH POLL to confirm that our closest supporters still want to see Anthony D'Esposito held accountable at the ballot box.** You only have until midnight to answer this one simple question: | **Do you approve of Rep. clean_body: You don’t want to miss these. | Team, we’re kicking off the month of November with a couple of important campaign updates: First, we want to extend a MASSIVE thank you for your incredible support in October. Without you, we wouldn’t have met our online fundraising target, but we still have a tough road ahead of us. If we want to win this race, we’re going to need everyday folks like you to keep stepping up — month after month. Your enthusiasm and support are what power this grassroots movement to defeat Anthony D'Esposito and take back the House. Remember, D'Esposito isn't your run-of-the-mill Republican. He’s a very well-funded MAGA politician who plays fast and loose with the truth and puts the far-right agenda ahead of the real issues. He claims to be a "moderate,” but time and time again, his votes have proven otherwise. Most recently, he supported MAGA Mike Johnson for House speaker — a guy who led the charge to overturn the 2020 election and wants to ban abortion in all 50 states. He talks about "law and order," but he voted to protect his buddy and criminal campaign donor, George Santos, from expulsion in Congress. And despite pretending to work for the people, he bends over backward time and again to please the MAGA GOP. In short, D'Esposito's got to go. As we approach the one-year mark until Election Day, we're launching an URGENT FLASH POLL to confirm that our closest supporters still want to see Anthony D'Esposito held accountable at the ballot box. You only have until midnight to answer this one simple question: | Do you approve of Rep. Anthony D'Esposito and the rest of the House Republican Caucus? | We greatly appreciate your response, Team Thomas | Kevin Thomas is running to flip New York’s 4th Congressional District blue. body:

# Jon Spira-Savett
# Rabbi, Temple Beth Abraham (Nashua, NH)
---
---
|
---
In this episode of Navigating Uncertainty, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with Jon Spira-Savett, Rabbi of Temple Beth Abraham in Nashua, NH. Rabbi Jon shares his personal story of growing up in St. Paul, Minnesota and spending his summers in the Boston area. He also talks about education journey that took him to Harvard and then rabbinical school. After discussing his thoughts about the October 7th and its impact on the Jewish community, Rabbi Jon concludes with some sage advice for navigating uncertainty: do a good deed in times of uncertainty and be grateful to yourself for having compassion.
Please tune in via any of the links below, or if you'd prefer to watch the conversation, please visit mansharamani.substack.com for link to the video.
---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with Charles Miller, Co-Founder and Chief Executive Officer of Lynk Global, Matthew Bartlett, Co-Founder of Darby Field Advisors, Mary Steady, Director of Pupil Services at LinWood Public Schools, Mike Dennehy, Public and Political Affairs Consultant, Lori Van Dusen, Founder of LVW Advisors, Fahim Fazli, Actor and Hollywood Insider, Robert Reynolds, CEO of Putnam Investments, Dr. Benjamin Kilham, founder of the Kilham Bear Center, Ashlee Vance, Author of When the Heavens Went on Sale, Darrell Hartman, Author of The Battle of Ink & Ice, Jim Cantrell, Co-Founder of SpaceX and Founder of Phantom Space, Dean Carucci, CEO of the Portsmouth Regional Hospital, GOP Presidential Candidate Doug Burgum, Jack Heath, Host of Good Morning New Hampshire, John Formella, Attorney General of New Hampshire, Dean Kamen, Founder of DEKA Research, Donald Kreis, Consumer Advocate for the State of NH, Jeremy Hitchcock, Founder of Dyn and Executive Chairman of Minim, Phil Taub, Partner at NixonPeabody and Co-Founder of SWIM WITH A MISSION, Morgan Ortagus, Former Spokesperson for the State Department, David Jordan, Founder of Seven Hills Foundation, John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lTmrDnnEwwRnCsXULEVPrcE5dlUteGUDVSmj54Ous6iWqj-R-eevtQbZA067t4pCf4Tx5ZEMZEKWMqunj0p4X8mIzP3jxwMLu6ZxX9kO3kZl7upuZiM2Mdfvy0COzMw8hry-6K4D7B-Hp-yUVGLAGQ==&c=MlNYByzTPVMKKYBcp5llO4N0PQHdY31_MoQwr_NHS6hQ4Y222Jzb8w==&ch=AJf3UHA_o1dCqHsKt4v9wzCALfrEiJr5P1N5dasnnG2MtpJF1Q3QCg==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

To stay in touch with Dr. Mansharaman and to subscribe (for free) to his weekly newsletter, please visit [mansharamani.substack.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lTmrDnnEwwRnCsXULEVPrcE5dlUteGUDVSmj54Ous6iWqj-R-eevteVO7eMCrLkOS908oBaSbtEtb4Dhzbfk-Oc1ZL_sOxyQnt-l3aex8oi0et7nuL--B9cEtewNUJtF5DkWN6VBDKS5GQSKm79nztKdwHKwufnF&c=MlNYByzTPVMKKYBcp5llO4N0PQHdY31_MoQwr_NHS6hQ4Y222Jzb8w==&ch=AJf3UHA_o1dCqHsKt4v9wzCALfrEiJr5P1N5dasnnG2MtpJF1Q3QCg==)

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: BREAKING: Another Scandal in Lansing
body:
Days after steering a $1.5 million taxpayer funding, my opponent is given a $100,000 contract. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6543c3b67ccf97209c1ac763&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D65439686e25e3d0230eea5d4%26ss_email_id%3D6543c3b67ccf97209c1ac763%26ss_campaign_name%3DBREAKING%253A%2BAnother%2BScandal%2Bin%2BLansing%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2023-11-02T16%253A08%253A22Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65439686e25e3d0230eea5d4&l=en-US&s=8S9W6NRdllm5CR1zfKvbFRT5KfM%3D)
---
| BREAKING NEWS
---
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6543c3b67ccf97209c1ac763&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.detroitnews.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2Fpolitics%2F2023%2F11%2F01%2Fcurtis-hertel-michigan-congress-greater-flint-health-coalition-jim-ananich-gretchen-whitmer%2F71385198007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65439686e25e3d0230eea5d4&l=en-US&s=a-TZ0MMwHmeRArodcJtwvXtOtck%3D)
---
As Governor Gretchen Whitmer’s top lobbyist, my opponent, Curtis Hertel, Jr. steered a $1.5 million State contract to a special interest group, then resigned his government position and [was handed a $108,000 contract from that same organization.](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6543c3b67ccf97209c1ac763&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.detroitnews.com%2Fstory%2Fnews%2Fpolitics%2F2023%2F11%2F01%2Fcurtis-hertel-michigan-congress-greater-flint-health-coalition-jim-ananich-gretchen-whitmer%2F71385198007%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65439686e25e3d0230eea5d4&l=en-US&s=a-TZ0MMwHmeRArodcJtwvXtOtck%3D)
---
[_ _ DRAIN THE SWAMP _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6543c3b67ccf97209c1ac763&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2F108k&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_65439686e25e3d0230eea5d4&l=en-US&s=CDtapBJHp9kXEHXOTKBnAEXBGgc%3D)
---
|
---
| _On the left, Jim Ananich, who gave Curtis Hertel, Jr., right, a $108,000 contract days after receiving $1.5 million from the State of Michigan._
---
To make matters worse, the $1.5 million was awarded from the agency run by Hertel’s wife, the Michigan Department of Health and Human Services.And the organization’s CEO admitted to discussing the contract with Hertel while he was negotiating with the State for the $1.5 million grant.To recap...
* As Gov. Whitmer’s top lobbyist, Hertel steered a $1.5 million grant from the $31 billion budget controlled by his wife, while negotiating a $108,000 contract for himself.
* On Friday, June 30, 2023, the funding was announced and that same day, Hertel resigned his government position.
* On Monday, July 3, Hertel received a $108,000 a year contract from the group receiving the $1.5 million.

**I’m no stranger to tough races — I won two in neighboring Louisiana. I know what it’s like to face a host of smears as operatives on the other side panic that they could lose a race in the deep South. The reality is that Mississippi is hungry for change, and they know it.**
In 2019, when I won reelection in Louisiana, Tate won his first term in a nail-biter. Polling shows this year could be even closer, but close is not close enough. We can’t let this year be a repeat of the past. Brandon won the debate, now we need to help him finish strong and win this election.
**[I know Brandon has what it takes to win, especially with committed supporters like you, Peter. Can I count on you to chip in $25 to my friend Brandon right now? name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I refuse to co-parent with the government
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn't envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

|
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e52e539734f4216aa7defe7053a7e57&_e=GDVEZNxLHKoiQk7vKF1ffPH2OKCTV86IpH4kIGVE2lDLbe56ulCv8j0t7FbMiZxxRC6RwxzrQDkPDOJjBAlWNpQIGVZc7aBxx9ifcReyQhjxn56IQE9Hcv73qg5vnY0PxQd0WZSI2t_Z-YrnF0JIG7lSJEAJ67k90OIBRQ5QIcNc225Sj4I0yKJdf2ZCikkSISHJnoYzL3jlOvmNNFZpYthnqDjLVR7AOgz4A5CZ7Zp5vSETRfQJKzK39W7IncL2tcsDdt5bWxwC_wy4Nartvjkgb4pg0AmhlwjIVE5X6qHl-Soxb3JBl7YM1nAs9bbJ-pSSZHyNz2lrB9QFX3JWpvYk-azB5yHSq-247MITWtPkiwefSM2VzxGqv0yCHLoQPWa4KwUIBPv8rwKQEEmQ6g%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _" This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren."_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all--_every day_ --to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law - I'm a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world - _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We 've been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0e52e539734f4216aa7defe7053a7e57&_e=GDVEZNxLHKoiQk7vKF1ffPH2OKCTV86IpH4kIGVE2lDLbe56ulCv8j0t7FbMiZxxRC6RwxzrQDkPDOJjBAlWNpQIGVZc7aBxx9ifcReyQhjxn56IQE9Hcv73qg5vnY0PxQd0WZSI2t_Z-YrnF0JIG7lSJEAJ67k90OIBRQ5QIcNc225Sj4I0yKJdf2ZCikkSISHJnoYzL3jlOvmNNFZpYthnqDjLVR7AOgz4A5CZ7ZochSwcaPxo6iDTT0U0JCrXM6ByOMYecUdg2pmTi7pDmnoO3Djowg66yoswFjBecoSFDB5mWCZxmDoOdE74PJmYJGF2_YfFmaim4GGVTwyA1PUmj-6f2jOgmx_2KKrRxXYP6kc5J9RgQe9SGZoTF-6vIiM-O5Tjpw6ZPDN1BrvogQ%3D%3D)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
This might be your only warning.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/osCPSZUOEpGY53Fx_AcZzg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnJodyP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjExMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzExMDJXA3NwY0IKZUG5y0NluWc-FlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/osCPSZUOEpGY53Fx_AcZzg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnJodyP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjExMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzExMDJXA3NwY0IKZUG5y0NluWc-FlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/osCPSZUOEpGY53Fx_AcZzg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnJodyP0RlaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMDkmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QSUZTTjExMDEyM19STV9ST05fMjAyMzExMDJXA3NwY0IKZUG5y0NluWc-FlIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) on these survival food kits while you can.
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9T0buO3lndP24QOTpO46ag~~/AARclAA~/RgRnJodyP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmVBuctDZblnPhZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/c6S1h0wTQQCBj8DGDTxIJw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnJodyP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplQbnLQ2W5Zz4WUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Friend, can you read this right now?
body:
Before I take the stage...

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35951%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hh6LRZ0wIa6R7jEacxqATQ&sysid=1)
---

Friend, I have a favor to ask.

I’m in New Hampshire**TODAY** to host back-to-back events, meet with voters, and share my vision for our future.

**[But, before I take the stage for my first event of the day, I need your help, and here’s why.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35952%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dwECOC%2fCuSDJ2KxnFzzWaA&sysid=1 "But, before I take the
stage for my first event of the day, I need your help, and here’s why. ")**

_**With just 6 DAYS until the third debate and 74 DAYS until the first votes take place, the stakes of my race are higher than ever. **_

Our team is out in full force and our movement is growing by the day. Poll after poll is showing I’m the only one who can decisively defeat Biden and Harris, I’m polling in second nationally, and our momentum continues to surge.

But as we approach these critical milestones, it’s important that we have the resources to fuel my campaign, amplify my message, and make this New Hampshire swing the best possible.

**[That’s why I’m asking everyone who’s reading this to pitch in just $5 or more before my next town hall starts.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35953%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XBL4HLN2gb9%2bcg5lnU3NdA&sysid=1 "That’s why I’m asking
everyone who’s reading this to pitch in just $5 or more before my next town hall
starts.")

[Can you help with a donation of just $5 or more today to crush my goal?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35954%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gl6VqtWw%2fMcl5owOTpf%2bKg&sysid=1 "Can you help with a
donation of just $5 or more today to crush my goal?")**

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35965%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=br5D8QJLd3mdYUQm6pmsVw&sysid=1)
---

Our hard work in New Hampshire is paying off, and I know it will pay off again if we hit our goal today!

Just take a look at what we’ve already accomplished:

→ I’ve hosted nearly 60 standing-room only campaign stops in all 10 counties across the state.
→ I rolled out my New Hampshire leadership team.
→ I’ve met with thousands of proud Granite Staters.
**→ I’ve risen to SECOND in the latest New Hampshire polls.**

The bottom line is, grassroots supporters have already made a huge difference in New Hampshire and grassroots supporters, like you, will make an important difference again today.

**[Will you step up before my next event so we can fuel our campaign and build momentum ahead of our upcoming campaign milestones?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35966%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I3a%2bbyoMfu7YatODOjRS%2fg&sysid=1 "Will you step up before my
next event so we can fuel our campaign and build momentum ahead of our upcoming
campaign milestones?")**

_We can’t lose sight of what we must accomplish before votes take place in a few short months._

Will you chip in today?

---

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35967%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LDuBZO6cbZsaWx6%2f7%2fG3%2fg&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Merch")

---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35969%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7qndSypw3keVptppK7hcIg&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c35960%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2G64SQb%2fkoM8N%2bMRZfn8mw&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

# ****This Silent Evil Force Is Eating Away at Your Retirement** **
We are teetering on the brink of an economic meltdown that's threatening to devour your savings and retirement. Inflation has surged to terrifying levels not seen in 40 years and the effects have been devastating. **Over** **two-thirds of Americans are grappling with financial hardship.** **You see it and feel it every day.** Prices have spiraled out of control, our money buys less and less, yet our monthly bills keep escalating. **And what 's worse is that our income can't keep pace**. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20For=20Congress?=
subject: California School Employees Back Dave Min
body:
Expanding His Labor Coalition Further, Sen. Min Is The Only Candidate For CA-47 Backed By Teachers And School Workers | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8a102a9507bf/california-school-employees-back-dave-min-15664748?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** November 2, 2023
**Contact:**[press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**California School Employees Back Dave Min**
_Expanding His Labor Coalition Further, Sen. Min Is The Only Candidate For CA-47 Backed By Teachers And School Workers_
**IRVINE, CA —** Dave Min received another significant endorsement in his race for Congress in CA-47, announcing the backing of the powerful California School Employees Association. This endorsement continues to solidify the excitement around State Senator Dave Min’s campaign to succeed Katie Porter, as he has already received early backing from Congresswoman Porter, the [California Democratic Party](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=6bebfc7174&e=7017cc100e), the [Orange County Labor Federation](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=395e6fec33&e=7017cc100e), SEIU, CFT, and AFT. Min is the consensus candidate of Labor, as every single Orange County labor organization that has weighed in in this race has backed him.

**“Dave Min has had our back in the State Senate and we know he’ll fight for our values in Congress,”** said California School Employees Association President Adam Weinberger**. “We trust Senator Min to advocate for the needs of working families in Washington for years to come. We are proud to offer Dave Min our support.”**

CSEA is the largest school employees association in the country. They represent nearly 250,000 support staff across the state. Formed in 1927, CSEA has fought for the rights of working Californians for nearly a century, and represents the interests of custodians, security staff, food services, office and clerical work, school maintenance and operations, transportation, academic assistance and paraeducator services, library and media assistance, computer services and more. Min is endorsed by the statewide union which oversees 800 locals across California.

**Dave Min is the proud product of California’s public education system, and is the only candidate in this race to send his children to public school.**

After impressive fundraising hauls in the first three quarters of this year, Dave Min has consolidated support and has become the clear Democratic consensus candidate to succeed Katie Porter. In addition to the Democratic Party’s endorsement, he is also supported by Congresswoman Porter and a broad and diverse coalition of over 150 local, state, and federal leaders. He enjoys broad grassroots support, with over 1000 volunteers signed up to knock on doors for his campaign (many of whom have volunteered with Min’s prior campaigns), and is the candidate of Labor, with the official endorsement of the AFL-CIO’s Orange County Labor Federation, and early endorsements from Teachers, School Employees, Police Officers, SEIU, and many others. A full endorsement list is available [here](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=a9bc2bc514&e=7017cc100e). _###

California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---
| | **Our mailing address is:**
PO Box 5959, Irvine, CA 92616
---

| This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[_why did I get this?_](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/about?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=3be6862478) [unsubscribe from this list](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=3be6862478) [update subscription preferences](https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=3be6862478)
Dave Min For Senate * PO Box 5959 * Irvine, CA 92616-5959 * USA

---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Friend, allow me to introduce myself.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because,
Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots
supporters.

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a
firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and
sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I
received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to
protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and
biblical values.

JOIN MY TEAM

But most importantly, I am husband to my wife Kelly
and father to our four amazing children.

JOIN MY TEAM

I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to
work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.

We have so much work to accomplish, and I can't
wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor.

I set a goal of activating 5,000 grassroots donors
so I can hit the ground running.

Will you join my team today and help me fight for
our conservative values by expanding our Majority in 2024?

JOIN MY TEAM

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to our
conservative movement.

God Bless,

Speaker Mike Johnson

Paid for by the NRCC and
not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Who's taking the stage in less than a week?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4aa689fc1b8db216050669bbd5e72f508242a1cd6b7b64cdbea1d186fbecfd5fe98a56e919bd2148972d143e410c164e605a05a44ed6de642303a1ce509435292aea9d04fbd92725f806ca6543f220ba

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbc71b94b83cc873dec387737aafd1c1ec06e7e11fee6ce9a9b6b34e874463f0c39530f1b791a6879c58ceafa44f514aae7dd9f84b4971610dbf9a66809c9f32

Friend,

Taking the stage once again...

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbc71b94b83cc873dec387737aafd1c1ec06e7e11fee6ce9a9b6b34e874463f0c39530f1b791a6879c58ceafa44f514aae7dd9f84b4971610dbf9a66809c9f32

The third GOP debate is coming up on November 8th at 8 PM ET — and we will be sending over all the information you need to tune in next week.

But right now, we have one favor to ask of you.

We're looking for our strongest showing support of support before the Miami debate. Florida is DeSantis country, and we're ready to show the nation just how strong this campaign is.

Ron DeSantis is the only candidate who has the capability to:

✔︎ Stand up for your economic freedom

✔︎ Cut through the childish attacks

✔︎ Win

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbc71b94b83cc87383364675c26989d4bd2fb9710be03e7c7dac01e866d8b044536030fc70f02103c414d50ed8a388ac5bbf731e53aff08d3aed0c5a3d24e64a
Give a gift of support! Rush in $15 now!

We are just ONE WEEK OUT from another game-changing night, and the Governor needs to know you'll be with him every step of the way.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbc71b94b83cc873dec387737aafd1c1ec06e7e11fee6ce9a9b6b34e874463f0c39530f1b791a6879c58ceafa44f514aae7dd9f84b4971610dbf9a66809c9f32
Could you help us get ready for the big night?

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbc71b94b83cc87345772657ab8a866b2bb8891a25f23ab24987ad38b25cc34476edd5329af15ab29639bf4837a226f86361e0952aaff6171a02f3b639a88701

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbc71b94b83cc8734d5e2cae85f82984302c4b90e7566896e52921a478196e7693da9318a79f4eb42ff8b35693d9abe13667b441e3798829eeb31333ac770790
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbc71b94b83cc873a8f94e9e77c4237cb9bf22d5ba20b3a17c79835ac3ff0f84aa145113b53f58316ba802c785baaf6363c02cae29b29e32efc3ee299f7cf849
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbc71b94b83cc873dec387737aafd1c1ec06e7e11fee6ce9a9b6b34e874463f0c39530f1b791a6879c58ceafa44f514aae7dd9f84b4971610dbf9a66809c9f32

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=cbc71b94b83cc873dec387737aafd1c1ec06e7e11fee6ce9a9b6b34e874463f0c39530f1b791a6879c58ceafa44f514aae7dd9f84b4971610dbf9a66809c9f32

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: David Trone
subject: 🎓An exciting announcement – you won’t want to miss this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72663194/436032509/-1900534734?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2U1M2Q0Zi05Zjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QRyivPSvpwsqH32kzMAP0WzqY6C_4-vLLZ9kMr9yEMY=&emci=8da2318c-8879-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=53e53d4f-9f79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160) I am thrilled to share some exciting news with you, Peter. **The Maryland State Education Association, representing the interests of 75,000 dedicated educators, just recommended me as their candidate for US Senate.** This recommendation reflects the diverse, collective voice of educators from all across our state and I couldn’t be more excited to have them on Team Trone. [_**In celebration of MSEA’s recommendation, we’re releasing a new education-themed collection of tote bags, mugs, and t-shirts in our merch store! Check them out on our website here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72663195/436032510/-1900534734?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2U1M2Q0Zi05Zjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QRyivPSvpwsqH32kzMAP0WzqY6C_4-vLLZ9kMr9yEMY=&emci=8da2318c-8879-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=53e53d4f-9f79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25681160) Having the support of the largest professional employee association amplifies our shared commitment to **fostering strong, affordable, and quality education for every individual in Maryland.** I am proud to say that educators are now on Team Trone, and together, we will continue to champion the cause of education in our beloved state. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Sign on to my petition to demand that Tommy Tuberville stop using our military as political pawns
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m speaking out against Senator Tuberville's dangerous, mistaken charade.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1448%2E35263%2EkcWaLK)
Peter — Remember Tommy Tuberville? **Last night, Tommy Tuberville continued his months-long harmful and dangerous political stunt of blocking ALL military nominations and promotions from advancing in the Senate.** This is harming our troops, helping our adversaries, and it’s all being done for political gain. Let me be clear: this is just another step in the GOP’s ongoing efforts to control women’s bodies as Tuberville protests the Pentagon’s policy on reproductive health care. **It’s unacceptable.** Senator Tuberville may believe that stopping women servicemembers from controlling their own bodies is worth risking our national security and the well-being of our military families. But he is sorely mistaken. That’s why I’m speaking out against Senator Tuberville's dangerous, mistaken charade along with my Senate colleagues on both sides of the aisle and calling on him to end his blockade on military nominations and promotions — and I’m counting on you to join me. **[Sign on to my petition to demand that Tommy Tuberville stop using our military as political pawns and end his blockade.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2311_tuberville/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231102_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1448%2E35263%2EkcWaLK)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/2311_tuberville/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231102_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1448%2E35263%2EkcWaLK)
---
Thanks for speaking up on this issue.
— Tammy

name: Ted Cruz
subject: I don’t mean to alarm you, but this is a big deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, We’ve known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason. I’ll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don’t think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure. You know that Democrats HATE ME. I know that Democrats HATE ME. But I bet you didn’t know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you? When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he’s going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year’s election. **Texans know me; Americans know me.** It’s no secret what I stand for. But I’ll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they’ll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides. **We cannot – WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you’re still with me and Senate Republicans._If you are, I’m asking for you to send us _just_ $5 right now_.**
---
[**Chip in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
By the end of the day, we need 5,000 individuals to donate $5 or more to keep Texas Red and help us flip the Senate. **[Can I count on you right now?](http://trk.tedcruz._KrA)** For Freedom,

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The right to an abortion is on the ballot in Ohio right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Can you pitch in to help secure reproductive freedom?

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=128%2E4032634%2EcZ1vf1)
---
This coming Tuesday, we’ve got a big opportunity to advance reproductive freedom. Ohioans are voting on a ballot measure that would enshrine the right to an abortion in their state constitution. Early voting is already happening, and it’s crunch time before Election Day, so I’ll get right to it: [**Can you make a donation to Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights as they work to get out the vote? Every donation makes a difference in these powerfully important final days.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/966?t=8&akid=128%2E4032634%2EcZ1vf1) Time and time again, we’ve seen that when abortion rights are on the ballot, abortion rights win. We saw it in Kansas last year. We saw it in Michigan last year. And we can see it in Ohio this year — but these victories are only possible when we give these fights everything we’ve got, up until the very last second, to reach every possible voter. This is the work that we are called to do. Now that right-wing extremists on the Supreme Court have ripped away the federal right to an abortion, we have to protect our freedoms one state at a time — sometimes through legislation, and sometimes through referendums like the one on the ballot in Ohio. **I’m still furious that a handful of out-of-touch radicals have put us in this position and put women’s lives at risk. And I’m still determined to fight back.** [**If you are too, and if you can make a financial contribution at this time, please pitch in to support Ohioans United for Reproductive Rights and help get out the vote ahead of Tuesday’s election.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/966?t=9&akid=128%2E4032634%2EcZ1vf1) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth **P.S. Tell everyone you know in Ohio to vote yes on Issue 1. Person to person, we can win this.**

---
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/966?t=13&akid=128%2E4032634%2EcZ1vf1)
---

subject: Humbled to have your support.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zSJ2-Su0o8Ni7LeDh2MrPP4UMuwuVRNqveCSx_C8Tr_WxqvRITVpicMjAc_gyJEIM3DdDCQrY-1raRGt_p4TJHZtX6Y9dNqCn77JTlF1e1AN6NtqZpBzZshWA0CI5V_8gj7_JMSthMokk6ZtF7Oi9At0XtvWvNfCuF0cXyj7608lrtgmUIEXnP8zgVC2D3t86aqm78i3H1a85QQ1iorWsGJghQzUpSo2e6tIhWdB1mpHdHhYrGHvX9RS8I_KILAELKpP_HtQ3sqyaUgSwB4yJHhmMkhMWtlhnTZbTQCrkkR_c1ihUh6enlP2MyxGAXY7s2dxgXCXqqggq2rbgk7Iu5ZZg-Rkrf02avs52SglPL5A/40y/lMx8jD4PR0qdOm46cbtaoA/h0/Ggrm1QVsq2P4WjCUBXwZUZpmgGHzIJ5oDD69B3_zW80)
---
Peter,

I wanted to reach out personally to say THANK YOU for your support ahead of last month's fundraising deadline. I know you get dozens (if not hundreds!) of emails asking for money, and I want you to know what your investment has made possible:
* With your support, we elected the first meteorologist to Congress in over
50 years!
* We made history by giving Illinois its first openly LGBTQ federal representative in our state's history.
* And perhaps most importantly, you helped give Northwest and Central Illinois a trusted, local voice representing our interests in the capitol.

**Of course our work doesn't stop now.** Congress is back in session this week with a newly-elected Republican Speaker in Rep. Mike Johnson. In addition to putting his _extremely_ far-right agenda on full display, he's already playing partisan politics with our national budget.

**[With a new Speaker in power, another shutdown looming, and a host of urgent issues that need our focus, I want to hear from you about what we need to prioritize. Can you fill out our priorities survey to let me know what’s on your mind?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnb5mXbAXQGYpv80xQuOBBpcZU-3aF00ZLBcgU_vSgJNzOcuFtiOEHwykCE4nRKm88h2CYNXOLUSqjunwFiCzNFmLQCLnEIEeVyu5tUxd5nIrOQX1hHGIq1cz5xB6sD1WirlfUKRHtw_pXezyBT9BIqZoSZdvj1Y7jwDXVib3F0LTeaDQNiUWTjfFcn_W_Hwh6hXz6W9qIx98VeNElkHv93Sg7TDUO5TQAaAwqWBRTBxraO8BcpWwiRAXsaiee7O7ho4TSthih8GQ_HttZg9Gf0qB9CA0ZnN79fJB_bivkbgA/40y/lMx8jD4PR0qdOm46cbtaoA/h1/ynrRtLHeZJmhl9w08A386m1YijTprYQHY4eKD_kBga0)**
---
[ **Take The Survey** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnb5mXbAXQGYpv80xQuOBBpcZU-3aF00ZLBcgU_vSgJNzOcuFtiOEHwykCE4nRKm8-B3m_r66QLhFoBdkWiTB4P_wnuXS1FlwizYNo20T5i0FauDP5S_GxzhPyMEdTU7D4iXDKKoPkpvRUWYkNha1RKPEqR6jCCchcoke4eqMOcmGdFxTUHdcpDj9X61mbb_hiTieCdQtd_j7aqDqLrn2S8M4FR6ZnVZ3HeFCiVJGeeDv48rtE8yt7IQ8ROX1vZfzcLCP2sKp9IzpLzioOuCbvFqvFYWByGw4pc5Xqxqje31A/40y/lMx8jD4PR0qdOm46cbtaoA/h2/h2NxBpdiMMkE5TFe2nrnMy5mazrzWDXp61oilEtAtZU)

With thanks,

\- Eric

clean_body: | | Peter, I wanted to reach out personally to say THANK YOU for your support ahead of last month's fundraising deadline. I know you get dozens (if not hundreds!) of emails asking for money, and I want you to know what your investment has made possible: With your support, we elected the first meteorologist to Congress in over 50 years! We made history by giving Illinois its first openly LGBTQ federal representative in our state's history. And perhaps most importantly, you helped give Northwest and Central Illinois a trusted, local voice representing our interests in the capitol. Of course our work doesn't stop now. Congress is back in session this week with a newly-elected Republican Speaker in Rep. Mike Johnson. In addition to putting his extremely far-right agenda on full display, he's already playing partisan politics with our national budget. ** With thanks, \- Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . **Washington Democrats know Tester is in trouble.**

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ef4fe6cfcd14415a75daa8528afddd8&_e=J8uSZX0atFNUkeu0GyMeJWmWFIf8QAbA-3uFWQ52EzvTEhe_vcI4RuUH4C-zUUlMkej9CrQhbnenEcVKmsNWOS1PDC-NDid_bvgoLHhyVx3YeI3waRilricNnLyYcVsO3cuE2AMyOzizUj3alCqYH3njVqxrTs1oz5DU7AZuHCAJUc4cDJ0QrzG_cEghEvPhMZt4eTBfz5IyDNR-zRd6PTX0uSoP80X11IigMazaOt1OHeTarCe8isAk3Mkjs2amV9cK6_ipaHgxij_UCNlVk3sl3EcTTVvPbhG5Fftzi59BSX_KE-DkY_rRp5XKTtEA). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ef4fe6cfcd14415a75daa8528afddd8&_e=J8uSZX0atFNUkeu0GyMeJWmWFIf8QAbA-3uFWQ52EzvTEhe_vcI4RuUH4C-zUUlMkej9CrQhbnenEcVKmsNWOS1PDC-NDid_bvgoLHhyVx3YeI3waRilricNnLyYcVsO3cuE2AMyOzizUj3alCqYH1ZPWmGkgfO2M7EQuS9Qi2dNuM1h9h_xZeB4069WV1N6Ok5BynLd6S8Yk6Tz_EJYnurx7JweuE3vnQMms1EYgDl1NXa27Lz0S5hqEVlcveChwWxiKwa-HJZ5Jm6WR3UfVThdJFFZQiySUzujmwIvMLYxOBKujYUCPUh-OEc1vjEo) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7ef4fe6cfcd14415a75daa8528afddd8&_e=J8uSZX0atFNUkeu0GyMeJWmWFIf8QAbA-3uFWQ52EzvTEhe_vcI4RuUH4C-zUUlMkej9CrQhbnenEcVKmsNWOS1PDC-NDid_bvgoLHhyVx3YeI3waRilricNnLyYcVsO3cuE2AMyOzizUj3alCqYH8yzjnSKNn_Om-Eh9KbQyLm-CDljzl90lXLQJ2Yb5p3bxADrbjEeYXrrQMpkgldP05AGpQ6Y2GeQqUKmxIdXILgDnEDk80Mlu4uyBaBUHjKiG5aWbz_6RgJ_MaOnNIRM9ySvexSIL93vU4hc9H0xEXaQouMHVhfYJ-wcyNP0QFVS) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: What is at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
When Kelly and I dreamed of our future, we certainly didn’t envision co-parenting with the government. As parents and patriots, we must make a change.

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
|

|
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Fellow American,

When people ask Kelly and me why we keep going, and why we are still compelled to serve in public office, no matter how difficult the days, our answer is simple: _"This is for our children. For ALL of our children and grandchildren."_

There is a very real question right now whether they will be able to enjoy the same liberty, security, and opportunity that we have. **Freedom is imperiled today and there is a crisis at every turn.**

Kelly and I have four amazing kids, and we give our all— _every day_ —to try to ensure that we can pass along the blessings of liberty to Hannah, Abby, Jack, and Will, and everyone in the generation of Americans that follow us. I am certain that you share that same conviction.

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great - but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law - I'm a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world -_but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We've been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-abuaFBz2a9WDJA)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you're getting to know me and I'm navigating this new role - but we must act - and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I'm not sure what version of America we'll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I'm asking you today - please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_**[** DONATE > **](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. [**Stand with me today.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

God bless,

[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._1BlmyFdSdA)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| ** _MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-83eOZCGipbfKYgWyhwiA)

---

| PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
---

Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzA2LTBiYzEyMTJiZWM2YzRmNGZiN2Y0ZTIyMDYwMGJmNWRiIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/ZSweFPvYVtprZe8yr_I8rw) to unsubscribe.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Walsh?=
subject: 450 Republicans from across WA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Republicans in Washington State must start the effort now if we want to win close races for the foreseeable future. | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e153f6d405&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Last Friday, the Washington State Republican Party hosted it's **46th Annual Dinner**. It was a**jam-packed program** from our Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers, our gubernatorial candidates Semi Bird and Dave Reichert, with a special address from Utah Congressman Burgess Owens, and special award presentations for **great conservative activists like Glen Morgan**.

Not only was it a fun event, but it was an important one. **450 Republicans** gathering from across the state to build momentum and unity for local elections now, and statewide elections in 2024.

**Thank you** to everyone who was able to join us and help sponsor this annual event. For those who pledged support during the event's **'Raise The Paddle** ', and for those of you reading this now, we still have an **important task to complete. **

30 days ago we set a goal to **raise $26,000** to establish **200 conservative ballot box centers** across Washington for the 2024 statewide elections. We want to create more **accessibility** for conservatives to vote, we want to create more **trust** in the voting process, and we want to restore the community traditions and **excitement** of being able to vote in-person!

Thanks to supporters throughout the last month, and supporters at our 46th Annual Dinner,**we only have $12,400 left** to hit our goal! We're definitely on track to hit our goal before the end of the year - in fact we just sent $1,000 up to Whatcom county for more ballot boxes - **but we cannot let up.**

If you already pledged support for more conservative ballot box centers, or would like to support this effort, please click on the red button below and **fulfill your contribution today**!
---
| [Sponsor a conservative ballot box center today >>>>](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=aeff735062&e=6a281f566d "Sponsor a conservative ballot box center today >>>>")
---
| Each **secure ballot box can cost $150**. These conservative ballot box centers also come with a team of grassroots conservative volunteers ready to help. Additional tools to help people register to vote and track their ballots are available as well.

We are thankful for the dozens of **individuals who pledged $250** at our Annual Dinner to sponsor these centers - but we need to get across the finish line with all 200 centers before 2024.**If we want to win again** then we need to build the infrastructure as soon as possible!
---
| | [Sponsor a conservative ballot box center today >>>>](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ccb9f666b1&e=6a281f566d "Sponsor a conservative ballot box center today >>>>")
---
| **Ballot harvesting is legal in Washington State. **Democrats have already been doing it in the shadows to win elections for the last decade.

Republicans in Washington State must start the effort now if we want to win close races for the foreseeable future. We will do it as aggressively as possible. We will conduct our efforts legally and with integrity. And in doing so, **we will start winning again!**

Please support our efforts today to bring this important change to the way our Party operates campaigns. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party

P.S. Thank you again to everyone who joined us last Friday for a great evening!
[](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=011249b8b3&e=6a281f566d)
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/46th-annual-dinner-1341652?e=6a281f566d)
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved._
Your interest in the Washington State Republican Party, National Republican Committee or Washington state Republican Candidates

**Our mailing address is:**
Washington State Republican Party11811 NE 1st St Suite 306Bellevue, WA 98005
[Add us to your address book](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/vcard?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/profile?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=00fa788e83) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=00fa788e83).

---
|
---
| Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party. 11811 NE 1st St, Bellevue, WA 98005.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
[www.wsrp.org](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=cfe302082e&e=6a281f566d)

name: Response Not Found (VPP)
subject: You approve of MAGA Mike Johnson?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
surely this isn’t right

Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=14b2099db2174a9682affde54528958d&_e=1R9hZ12UFkrI9zzufgp4dIOQkwPvzukJ1UUVp9W-Jg9pow5ckARZQpom2MSgQQOv3Et5njIFrHpxMqaPSVK6o6zdHlqPhzkry7_teN3X-DcR7yxKmoyZeXlCLuT_zdu046q_VOB-r0NXnduCqo7jPot4iQG6-4J8odBcukJjtctAuvJ_Jf7HdNGeRIwpQOhTTwdQPf9aLQnzSvvwaXs6NoQlVhleMnTiApbsehjwB4Q4BMX6Do_OcJvIV2mA7uFhEUmAo4z-oEiB84wgFl1WDhzcYO7QSo6ne0AWsLX_QpnMX8Dr9wii4Z0z52XUjjuHYcVBuVHO2o6QM9KMbDGEjYk3db_kbgDVm3qqL9LCCr4lbNKLdyK08SO7MBtqUGGa)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=14b2099db2174a9682affde54528958d&_e=1R9hZ12UFkrI9zzufgp4dIOQkwPvzukJ1UUVp9W-Jg9pow5ckARZQpom2MSgQQOv3Et5njIFrHpxMqaPSVK6o6zdHlqPhzkry7_teN3X-DcR7yxKmoyZeXlCLuT_zdu046q_VOB-r0NXnduCqo7jPot4iQG6-4J8odBcukJjtctAuvJ_Jf7HdNGeRIwpQOhTTwdQPf9aLQnzSvvwaXs6NoQlVhleMnTiApbsehjwB4S_yWVSHoeSGl0elhdcS9XcwORKj79srXGcwGAUzs4ixRrNqH4sd5talu-P_HjZMKwC-YOglhtX8N6CY25078IC3oeXKtORCGVuOUrbQYWZrmZujOhcyP8n0W8-o2YLraLtAYf40kTMx_7pdCJuukhs)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=14b2099db2174a9682affde54528958d&_e=1R9hZ12UFkrI9zzufgp4dIOQkwPvzukJ1UUVp9W-Jg9pow5ckARZQpom2MSgQQOv3Et5njIFrHpxMqaPSVK6o6zdHlqPhzkry7_teN3X-DcR7yxKmoyZeXlCLuT_zdu046q_VOB-r0NXnduCqo7jPot4iQG6-4J8odBcukJjtctAuvJ_Jf7HdNGeRIwpQOhTTwdQPf9aLQnzSvvwaXs6NoQlVhleMnTiApbsehjwB4SZ6XPAg07ki0LxIGnUTlyU-yXtw7oc1kP6JqS_IW68uFmm-wFw0lOBud2ebcx68L0DmvVEsffYfmdnCJgYzkDqQvl4vAoD2XiFPwBcC_KZO12Z1OG3jEMf7a8rKp_maCqKiRY30URV4WYw2ANSgzZs)

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Get rid of the asinine Senate rule that allows one member to block votes by the other 99
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Get rid of the asinine Senate rule that allows one member to block votes by the other 99](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6a1c743-9e0b-44fc-89d4-904b8addc8fa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb102327-c14a-416d-9c82-430fcd33200f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | The US Senate has some stupid rules, but perhaps the most asinine of all is the one that allows ONE senator to block a vote, even if it's favored by the other 99. Senator Tommy Tuberville is currently [using it](https://default.salsalabs.org/T308e6272-47d4-4b59-b3a7-7e403edb716c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to block military promotions (because he opposes its abortion policies), but he's far from the only one to do it. It is simply asinine and profoundly anti-democratic that ONE senator can block a vote on something that is supported by an overwhelming majority. And it needs to stop NOW. [**Add your name, and tell the Senate to get rid of the asinine Senate rule that allows one member to block votes by the other 99 >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6bb52845-e8cc-43cb-aa76-6b90abc715ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde5c8cc0-a24b-4cf4-bae1-d7bb030a736b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action _[P. S. - if you no longer wish to receive updates, use the unsubscribe link below]_

|
---

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=addc7dff52f241e69e8fc8e98a7d7240&_e=ez92lLzm3qkhIxfZFfLN7E0KlOz6xKkGE58CHFDQ3bIY6JGyqKI7E22qYqnMdvykxJUT-WEfcWSeqWAzLSpiN4ll81Jt3Yq8TQLqhFRM8ki3Ii5mGNwrLZeKcRhXKjFp78J_kHZV8qTBHX6Vlm49b2NAN6o5mKSbkUDa3_X_xHyxxO4CKKsWRHwcWzCACERDZSa6fmYvp5JLWfVwTl_fKKC3VDcPqRXFHMu9t86WTub4PgCvl1soTeX34wEDDRCTrI8QJaw8LumIG3vJZLxC3CfJSdF0bRjRbQuMG_u660vYqtzPXZazMbCGVPNOhp84). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=addc7dff52f241e69e8fc8e98a7d7240&_e=ez92lLzm3qkhIxfZFfLN7E0KlOz6xKkGE58CHFDQ3bIY6JGyqKI7E22qYqnMdvykxJUT-WEfcWSeqWAzLSpiN4ll81Jt3Yq8TQLqhFRM8ki3Ii5mGNwrLZeKcRhXKjFp78J_kHZV8qTBHX6Vlm49b7vp6DaD9pGdAkKts37QUsXebEwKM5KPpz2Xp6xJEzifS8zz3LB3-upOgeefHx_gkMoe2Mrp0sKCzfkzU5B9R0Vw86THqDzvLh1ldcQe3XPKRgyjinxBa6oD3gQjMUilygcXJmi9NpKC1pHjgiTkOTFhodNnHEq9G-i2cVtlyM-T) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=addc7dff52f241e69e8fc8e98a7d7240&_e=ez92lLzm3qkhIxfZFfLN7E0KlOz6xKkGE58CHFDQ3bIY6JGyqKI7E22qYqnMdvykxJUT-WEfcWSeqWAzLSpiN4ll81Jt3Yq8TQLqhFRM8ki3Ii5mGNwrLZeKcRhXKjFp78J_kHZV8qTBHX6Vlm49b3i5OXFxUdgzh0Ofz8S6kema5wjVCGl7rI96qXlkSYtz_JafrviIw_Be3VueccYkMzwHb7YY0gqWZ6gwfbagTu21hQb1hq6oARGeDqsOG3fBdwBkJxUrVIl_XMSlOjR6V8a12FRh7oEzS7rr1JkKy2U02COLAHpNx358roZODUIm) on these survival food kits while you can.

You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. on these survival food kits while you can. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: Here’s what I said on Pod Save America →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
At the end of the day, Issue 1 is about the freedom to choose our own destiny.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72666435/436043944/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.02_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjMwZGM5NC1hNTc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FtIWH1_Dt7_Iz4WmiRh09RCMxI-g5T5jPR4jgoFSRg=) Hi Peter,

Last weekend I was on Pod Save America, and I wanted to take a moment to share with you what I said. I understand if you can’t read until the end, but before you go: [**I’m running in Ohio’s only toss-up race, and I won’t be able to win next November without your support. Can you chip in just $5 to help me stay in Congress where I’m fighting for Northeast Ohio?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72666436/436043945/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.02_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjMwZGM5NC1hNTc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FtIWH1_Dt7_Iz4WmiRh09RCMxI-g5T5jPR4jgoFSRg=)

I sat down with Pod Save America to talk about the stakes of Tuesday’s election. To put it simply, Peter: **We can’t afford to lose.**

Radical Republicans in Ohio are trying to mislead voters about Issue 1, but I’m here to tell you it’s very simple. **Issue 1 will codify in our state’s constitution the right for women to access abortion services in Ohio.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72666437/436043946/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.02_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjMwZGM5NC1hNTc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FtIWH1_Dt7_Iz4WmiRh09RCMxI-g5T5jPR4jgoFSRg=) There’s something else about Issue 1 I’ve been talking about with folks on the ground, **and that’s freedom. At the end of the day, Issue 1 is about the freedom to choose our own destiny.**

Whether I’m in Ohio knocking on doors to talk to voters about Issue 1, or in DC pushing back against the wave of MAGA extremism taking over the People’s House – **I promise I will always be fighting for your freedom to choose.**

**But here’s the harsh reality: No matter what happens next week, those same Radical Republicans that want to strip away our rights are going to set their sights on my seat.** I am never going to stop fighting for Northeast Ohio, no matter who I’m up against.

**[I can only keep doing this work with your support, Peter. So please, will you chip in $5 to my campaign today to help me win the most competitive race in Ohio and ensure I can keep standing up for reproductive freedom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72666438/436043947/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.02_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjMwZGM5NC1hNTc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FtIWH1_Dt7_Iz4WmiRh09RCMxI-g5T5jPR4jgoFSRg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72666439/436043948/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.02_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjMwZGM5NC1hNTc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FtIWH1_Dt7_Iz4WmiRh09RCMxI-g5T5jPR4jgoFSRg=) | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72666440/436043949/-1743337223?refcode=em_fr_2023.11.02_b1_es_all-nd&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjMwZGM5NC1hNTc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2FtIWH1_Dt7_Iz4WmiRh09RCMxI-g5T5jPR4jgoFSRg=)
