name: Yesli Vega
subject: FIVE Days To Go - WE NEED YOUR HELP!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF YESLI VEGA
body:
Every last door or phone call could make the difference between victory and defeat
| | |
---
|
---
| Dear Neighbor,

The results of the last four years are in.

* [Violent crime and homicides have gone through the roof](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017_8bMJ8pymFd-wpBSkM2ltFY0PTR5HNxG365XBU_mYLHXSCXNm4dhJ2Kip_J0PJ-oGBupAgFOn3WXKpVk8-E2-zRuxfT4aDQdGDZhiwgyoTmugmcIPpUHY3guEEjMhWuPgPUM6ksIIg2MgscvnAZpg5zUm-UfqLEvj0pUY5d6ltJjteJ_GskBE_Cg4wI8owa12oaYSOFyd9NnYfEKoH0nhG-cZ7tDGrfe_WiiesSyyw=&c=o8LfBesVplK5mzlaao7m8VpG0HU39h7N-Pjx-l1uc-n7yrIHa6iWXw==&ch=pOZJY1yHUIv3sor470jyT1Nx7IyVxAejODd5R1GNlJSbkGg_MtoswQ==)

* At the same time your taxes have gone through the roof

* Test scores and college preparedness for our students have plummeted

* And the special interest developers and data centers aren't only at the table you haven't been invited to - they've occupied the head seat

This can all change Tuesday.

But we need your help.

I don't want to wake up Wednesday morning with any regrets. And I know you don't either.

If you can volunteer your time, at any level to assist our campaign (and others that will make up a true citizen-first majority) then it could be the difference between victory and defeat.

[The Virginia House of Delegates was decided by a coin flip four years ago](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017_8bMJ8pymFd-wpBSkM2ltFY0PTR5HNxG365XBU_mYLHXSCXNm4dhLOzyO94Bi_8aBJXvpm8SsMOq4RM_LGIsDbRrpi4Gq2hhOBwPXaKMhmLogONtJvW9l386aUBpnroDuwTbJ6vwamESbAtlHY0hq2aA_jdBpfunL8quRaHnJfXTkyjyIWj1mF2kIpEzgiAJK2Q2C95_zc890r4lf9Cg4YvY_wRYvHNyASgj7KDJcYAWemBljY9iA8CJ-KlA6Z3Ue1cttQENd3g60UPJQMdgi0CyjESyzYXIfbcnrMhKCethssE4DPTIz25zRatxlyoezgO8kGIHFCiKGiKDcMKNg==&c=o8LfBesVplK5mzlaao7m8VpG0HU39h7N-Pjx-l1uc-n7yrIHa6iWXw==&ch=pOZJY1yHUIv3sor470jyT1Nx7IyVxAejODd5R1GNlJSbkGg_MtoswQ==).

Every ounce of effort could make the difference.

\--- If you can make phone calls for us to undecided voters

\--- If you can spare an hour or two (or more) to knock on doors of voters in your neighborhood

\--- Or if you can help us out on Election Day this Tuesday

...WE NEED YOU.

And the future of our county needs you more than ever.

We know exactly what will happen over the next four years if we maintain the status quo.

The last four years, but on steroids.

Your help could literally make the difference on Tuesday.

If you can volunteer your time making phone calls, knocking on doors, helping with our final postcard party, or on Election Day, please let us know through this form [www.yeslivega.com/volunteernow](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017_8bMJ8pymFd-wpBSkM2ltFY0PTR5HNxG365XBU_mYLHXSCXNm4dhLOzyO94Bi_85wPDjM4wxQ0tBsYwwHe35QwNIvNl6ZFY0-cecvj0y1pCA1YNmZ4ZC4nHASaixO8qyXLavJsdFIDCPvqVyo6NYv0Ao1z1RLFB&c=o8LfBesVplK5mzlaao7m8VpG0HU39h7N-Pjx-l1uc-n7yrIHa6iWXw==&ch=pOZJY1yHUIv3sor470jyT1Nx7IyVxAejODd5R1GNlJSbkGg_MtoswQ==) or by contacting my campaign manager, Palmer, directly at [Palmer@yeslivega.com](mailto:palmer@yeslivega.com).

Finally, our FINAL Super Saturday door knocking event will be this Saturday at 10am at the old Brentsville Courthouse Centre, 12229 Bristow Road. Bring the family, get some fresh air, and make a difference in the future of your local government as we make our finishing push for lower taxes, safer neighborhoods, increased educational achievement and a majority of the people, that actually listens to your wishes.
---
---
Our county is too important. Let's make sure we leave it all on the field. Thank you in advance for your help.
For Prince William,

clean_body: Every last door or phone call could make the difference between victory and defeat | | | | | Dear Neighbor, The results of the last four years are in. == At the same time your taxes have gone through the roof Test scores and college preparedness for our students have plummeted And the special interest developers and data centers aren't only at the table you haven't been invited to - they've occupied the head seat This can all change Tuesday. But we need your help. I don't want to wake up Wednesday morning with any regrets. And I know you don't either. If you can volunteer your time, at any level to assist our campaign (and others that will make up a true citizen-first majority) then it could be the difference between victory and defeat. ==. Every ounce of effort could make the difference. \--- If you can make phone calls for us to undecided voters \--- If you can spare an hour or two (or more) to knock on doors of voters in your neighborhood \--- Or if you can help us out on Election Day this Tuesday ...WE NEED YOU. And the future of our county needs you more than ever. We know exactly what will happen over the next four years if we maintain the status quo. The last four years, but on steroids. Your help could literally make the difference on Tuesday. If you can volunteer your time making phone calls, knocking on doors, helping with our final postcard party, or on Election Day, please let us know through this form == or by contacting my campaign manager, Palmer, directly at mailto:palmer@yeslivega.com. Finally, our FINAL Super Saturday door knocking event will be this Saturday at 10am at the old Brentsville Courthouse Centre, 12229 Bristow Road. Bring the family, get some fresh air, and make a difference in the future of your local government as we make our finishing push for lower taxes, safer neighborhoods, increased educational achievement and a majority of the people, that actually listens to your wishes. Our county is too important. Let's make sure we leave it all on the field. Thank you in advance for your help. For Prince William, Yesli Vega Prince William County Supervisor Coles District Servant P.S. In addition to knocking doors, making phone calls, and our Election Day efforts, we're also having one final postcard party tomorrow night at 6pm. |

Peter, thank you from the bottom of my heart.

**Thanks to your support in October, our campaign reached our end-of-month digital fundraising goal.**

As we enter the season of Thanksgiving, I am especially grateful for your continued support of our campaign to unseat far-right Rep. Mike Garcia.

It’s safe to say that a lot happened in our race in October. **I became the only Democrat in this race, Garcia lurched even farther right with his votes for extremist Speaker candidates, and polling shows that Garcia’s approval rating in CA-27 has plummeted.**

With nearly one year until Election Day, we are ramping up our organizing efforts to communicate with undecided voters in CA-27 about our campaign. It’s thanks to donations from supporters like you that power these efforts.

So I want to take a moment to thank you for your support. I don’t take it for granted, and I’m excited to continue our strong momentum as we look ahead to the last months of 2023 and beyond.

Thank you,

George

name: Wes Moore
subject: Meet the inaugural class of Maryland Serves
body:
Team,
A few days ago, I had the honor of taking the stage at University of Maryland College Park to introduce the inaugural class of Maryland Serves — the first-in-the nation public service year program for high school graduates.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90457/images/wp.png] Maryland launches nation’s first state-backed service year program
October 27, 2023
When I look at this inaugural cohort of Maryland Serves, I see courage, compassion, and vision.
I am SO grateful to the inaugural class for their willingness to raise their hands. These trailblazers are setting the trajectory to make Maryland the state that serves!
We’re showing that service won’t just make our present better — it will make our future better.
Service won’t just help address problems in our communities — it will strengthen the very foundation of our democracy.
Service won’t just help others — it will shape these young people into leaders for life.
Team, this is only the beginning. Maryland is paving the path for other states across the nation to deepen their commitments to service through programs just like ours. Together, we’re going to lead the way.
If you’re proud of our first-in-the-nation public service year option and ready to continue transforming Maryland into the state that serves, I am asking you to pitch in a donation of $5 or more to sustain our work. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231102-1?refcode=em20231102]
Donate Now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20231102-1?refcode=em20231102]
I can’t wait to see what this inaugural Maryland Serves cohort accomplishes in the months, years, and DECADES to come.
Let’s serve, let’s win, and let’s do it over and over again!
Elevate,
Wes Moore

---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

**And guess who made the list... our fearless leader and CEO of the New Pennsylvania Project, Kadida Kenner!** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72668121/436049788/-708856094?refcode=EM_F_231102fearless_N_HT_90DO_6_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMmZmY2E0LWE5NzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hKL5wqaKb7MdBY1h-_Qiq-Hr2gdt3JbdIsiMh8YxJ08=)**

And as co-chair of Why Courts Matter, she avidly educates others on diversifying courts throughout the Commonwealth.”_

We are making waves and the news. The work we do here at NPP is CRITICAL for the success of our state. We are registering voters, educating them on the importance of voting in every election, fighting for the future of the Commonwealth, and more.

name: Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
subject: One year to win:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The work we do this month could mean the margin of victory in the 2024 election.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73581c69-62a6-4f04-9ff3-406c86846017/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. It’s Ben Wikler — Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. This month, we mark 365 days out from Election Day 2024. I asked Blue Amp Action if I could share with you some thoughts on this critical inflection point. Right now, Republicans are making big moves in the Badger State to win in 2024 and impose their far-right, extremist ideology on Wisconsinites and the country. From hosting their first primary debate in Milwaukee to implementing a new GOP early vote program, they could win next November. We can’t let that happen, Peter . That’s why the WisDems and Blue Amp Action start this work early. **Every cycle since 2017, WisDems uses the one-year-out moment to knock doors, update our data, energize our volunteers statewide, and find the new voters we’ll need to win the following November.** We call this One Year to Win — a WisDems tradition. But Peter , it takes a lot of resources to make something like this successful and our grassroots funds are starting to run low. Our work over the next month could provide the margin of victory for 2024, which is what makes One Year To Win so important. _If we don't hit our fundraising goals, we'd have to significantly cut our capacity at this critical time and sacrifice that margin of victory._ [**That's why I'm asking you to make a $20.24 One Year to Win split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action. Your support will make a noticeable difference just one year out and could be the donation we need to knock that final set of doors and win in 2024 >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d2da62a-2142-4945-aa11-ecc719cba62a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96f0131f-76cd-4a6f-a4ce-2be9a6dc9d0c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Thank you, Peter. Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
The California Democratic Party’s Organizing Department is excited to highlight the stories of our staff members who are passionate about making a difference throughout our state.
From leading our organizing efforts to connecting with local community leaders, our organizing team is working in every corner of California to ensure we continue to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/72374C4E544D55334F7642576D577362737148414E486E555849674C78675761376C72445651494C53355450614D366567676D2F5844545A4F6274593759526F/editor_images/Team%20Forever%20Organizing%20%281920%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29%20%281920%20%C3%97%20350%20px%29%20%2810%29.png]
Youth Vote Interns
Arianna Lema I became an organizer after the pandemic, I saw my community needed help. I felt like the bridge that helped get resources to everyone from health organizations. I transitioned from health aspects to voter education/participation a little over a year ago. Organizing is extremely important to the area I grew up in, we need more visibility in politics. I need to help my community realize the voting power we have.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/664966394349624F6C41524867504439314D33496E536663696C576F7058656A4B537068754F4B6872444A44652F624A382B674F715A5A543435523431535730/editor_images/IMG_4792.jpg] Ensuring a strong Democratic bench in California begins with family conversations and engagement at home. I firmly believe that the foundation of political involvement lies within one's own household. It's vital to foster a culture of civic participation within the family unit. Together, we can create a ripple effect of change by collectively advocating for Democratic values.
Renna Hickey Inspired by the Central Valley’s organizing history, I learned that I wanted to work and study politics. I decided to be a Democrat because of the diversity and inclusiveness of my community and home.Gun control and reproductive freedom were issues that became a personal to me as extreme Republicans worked to roll back our most basic human rights. I strongly believe exercising our right to vote and protecting the democratic process is key to ensuring that the next generation is heard.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6558597032773673357A65724E54337272706A50384B576432756F4D5743364C743147717547466C5A576D4C71635869523338337442497570464D4C69796B31/editor_images/HOGG_Email_Recruitment_Centered_Textbank_fixed%20%285%29.png] Through my work to register voters, phone bank, and recruit volunteers, I hope to make a change in our community.
Jill Morton In 2020, I was a freshman in high school, and after seeing everything happening in the country, I knew we needed more Democrats elected. That year, I got involved with my congressman’s campaign as a volunteer, and then a year later, I became a campaign fellow and fell in love with organizing. I joined CADEM in June as a part of the summer internship program.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/664966394349624F6C41524867504439314D33496E536663696C576F7058656A4B537068754F4B6872444A44652F624A382B674F715A5A543435523431535730/editor_images/IMG_8656.jpg] The main topics and issues I am passionate about are LGBTQ+ rights, women’s rights, and lowering the cost of higher education. The ways that I help build the democratic bench in California are by registering students to vote in these battleground districts and phone banking into these areas.
Maryam Idowu Originally I was born in Abeokuta Nigeria, and moved to the US when I was little and grew up in Inglewood, Los Angeles. I now currently live in Madera, California. The way that I became an organizer for CADEM all started when I organized a BLM protest in Madera on the day of my graduation. From there I started working with the Madera Dem club and volunteered during different events and even went on to work for both local, and congressional campaigns like Esmeralda’s Soria and Adam Gray.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/664966394349624F6C41524867504439314D33496E536663696C576F7058656A4B537068754F4B6872444A44652F624A382B674F715A5A543435523431535730/editor_images/unnamed%20%282%29.jpg] I joined CADEM because as I got to work with many people in the party I realized that I have a powerful voice and If I continue to use it I can make change and the people I have met along the journey have helped me with making those changes. I want to continue doing that and what better way than to join hands and work together with people who are working hard to create a better thriving country for all.
Kalila Garcia I am originally from Oakland California, but right Now I live in Yolo County attending the University of California Davis. I became an organizer during the 2016 election. Being under 18 I wasn’t able to vote myself, so I began to do voter canvassing making sure that the students at my school, the people in my city were registered. I became a democrat because I saw it as accepting and supporting all Americans defending our rights to make our own choices about our bodies, to protect our planet for the future and to allow America’s diverse population to flourish.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/664966394349624F6C41524867504439314D33496E536663696C576F7058656A4B537068754F4B6872444A44652F624A382B674F715A5A543435523431535730/editor_images/Kalilla%20Garcia%20%282%29.jpg] I joined California Democrats because it is never too early to care for our future. We are a year out from the next election and every second counts. California has such a large sway over the federal policy that we have to act. With elections being won by a few hundred votes there is no room to believe our voice doesn't matter.
Zadie Waletzko I started organizing around the Black Lives Matter movement in 2020, by creating a student activist group that helped organize protests across the city. Our first event attracted over 1,000 attendees and since then, I have been inspired by the power of collective action.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6558597032773673357A65724E54337272706A50384B576432756F4D5743364C743147717547466C5A576D4C71635869523338337442497570464D4C69796B31/editor_images/HOGG_Email_Recruitment_Centered_Textbank_fixed%20%286%29.png] Throughout high school, I held progressive values about fighting wealth inequality, protecting abortion rights, and achieving racial equity. As I became more politically engaged in college, I found that these were values supported by the Democratic Party. As part of the first election I was able to vote in, I joined the Salud Carbajal for Congress Campaign to help register students to vote. Since that election, I have been a proud Democrat and am excited to now be part of the CADEM organizing team!
cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
Antelope Valley Day of Action
Team Forever Organizing was thrilled to see the outpouring of support and grassroots energy at our Antelope Valley Day of Action! With the help of over 80 attendees, CADEM organizers in Southern California are creating a movement for better Representation, working tirelessly to oust Republican Representative Mike Garcia.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/664966394349624F6C41524867504439314D33496E536663696C576F7058656A4B537068754F4B6872444A44652F624A382B674F715A5A543435523431535730/editor_images/20231014_095937_2.jpg]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/664966394349624F6C41524867504439314D33496E536663696C576F7058656A4B537068754F4B6872444A44652F624A382B674F715A5A543435523431535730/editor_images/20231014_104725%20%281%29.jpg]
Campus Activation cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
CADEM Organizers across California, along with dozens of incredible volunteers and partners, are activating the next generation of young Democrats on College campuses.
Together, we're loud and proud even in some of the most traditionally conservative regions of California, making sure that every young person and student is registered, educated, and mobilized to vote next year!
Phone banking in Cathedral City, California!
These wonderful activists are fired up at the Democratic Headquarters of the Desert!
Each Thursday, CADEM Organizer Ivan hosts live phone banking events to reach neighborhoods of voters in some of the most competitive Congressional districts in the entire state.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6558597032773673357A65724E54337272706A50384B576432756F4D5743364C743147717547466C5A576D4C71635869523338337442497570464D4C69796B31/editor_images/IMG_1019.jpg]
Canvass Kick-Off in Tulare!
CADEM Organizer Dave is hitting the ground running in Tulare County! With the help of these energized local activists, neighborhoods of Central Valley folks are receiving critical election information for the first time, empowering voters in battleground House races.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6558597032773673357A65724E54337272706A50384B576432756F4D5743364C743147717547466C5A576D4C71635869523338337442497570464D4C69796B31/editor_images/IMG_4733.jpeg]
Voter Registration at the Big Fresno Fair!
A movement is building in rural California, and the incredible volunteers at the Big Fresno Fair prove it!
In a former Republican stronghold, activists, organizers, and voters are ready for better Representation in Congress -- working harder than ever to register and inspire their neighbors!
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6558597032773673357A65724E54337272706A50384B576432756F4D5743364C743147717547466C5A576D4C71635869523338337442497570464D4C69796B31/editor_images/HOGG_Email_Recruitment_Centered_Textbank_fixed%20%289%29.png] cadem.org/takeaction [cadem.org/takeaction]
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/31552F746D717A554A774A61794E663179624862646D6E7477784C53537A667565646C7064744F38577833434355725847424769453063494D74366831437139/editor_images/Team%20Forever%20Organizing%20%281920%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29%20%281920%20%C3%97%20350%20px%29%20%288%29.png]
The California Democratic Party is a volunteer based organization! Our community activists are committed year-round to work with our organizing team to get out the vote and protect our democracy. CADEM is thrilled to highlight our local volunteers who continue to do their part in the Forever Organizing work.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/3654743555714139506C7A6133666D4C5A786C477548324942743141513139424D7372477341364E496A55612B79546863426573346C63465441536673736666/editor_images/Sue%20Chandler.jpg]
Sue Chandler
Chair, South Lake Tahoe Democratic Club
I am originally from White Plains, NY. I went to the University of Maine and taught high school science in Maine for six years. I then moved to Athens, Greece where I taught for six years at the American Community School. Afterward, I moved to Bangkok Thailand where I taught for 30 years at the International School Bangkok. In Bangkok I met the love of my life and gave birth to two beautiful young ladies. I retired seven years ago and now live permanently in South Lake Tahoe, CA.
I have always been interested in politics. In college I went to two anti-war protests in Washington, DC. While living overseas, it was difficult to put boots on the ground. I contributed financially but was frustrated by not being able to be more proactive.
Upon retirement I wanted to get involved in South Lake Tahoe. I was surprised to learn that there was no Democratic Club in South Lake Tahoe. I really wanted to work to try to vote out McClintock, and vote in Democrat Bob Derlet. I made some inquiries and discovered that there was a defunct club which I resurrected. We now have a mailing list of 450 folks and a paid membership of about 120 folks. We support local, state, and national candidates that share our democratic values. It has been a great way to connect with the local community advocating for equality and sustainability in our community.
As 2024 approaches our club will work to promote candidates, democratic values and get out the vote, especially for young voters and declined to state voters.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/6C424D39556B567A77346969325468792B41697A6C6A3144696C39324E674D7A496332436D76687A616A39754656587977696F5A3556573038386A4754765166/editor_images/Team%20Forever%20Organizing%20%281920%20%C3%97%201080%20px%29%20%281920%20%C3%97%20350%20px%29%20%287%29.png]
Looking for a way to get involved in mobilizing or registering voters in your community? We want you on Team Forever Organizing.
Whether you're interested in calling voters, knocking doors, hosting organizing actions with your Democratic club or group, or registering first time voters on College campuses, we're thrilled to be doing the good work with you.
Can we count on you to join us for an organizing action this month? Your efforts could mean the difference between winning and losing battleground Congressional districts this year.

name: Judicial Watch On the Air Report
subject: FARRELL: "Sick, Twisted Alliance" Between Big Tech & the Biden Administration
body:
Judicial Watch Director of Investigations & Research Chris Farrell appeared on "The Great America Show with Lou Dobbs" to discuss the Twitter Files, the mass migration crisis in Europe, and more!
| | | | |
---
|
---
---
|
---
| **FARRELL: "Sick, Twisted Alliance" Between Big Tech & the Biden Administration

[](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65655&L=30599&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1CMUFZNkhWeVZPVSZ0PTkyMHMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249b24rdGhlK2FpciZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=d0075ce481801eeab90e815d3d9f0810100375b504df890466eb947cbb1941cf)**
Judicial Watch Director of Investigations & Research Chris Farrell appeared on "The Great America Show with Lou Dobbs" to discuss the Twitter Files, the mass migration crisis in Europe, and more!

**Farrell on Obama Chef Death: What are They Hiding?

[](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65655&L=30543&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1DeEE5MjhKSEdnbyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1vbit0aGUrYWlyJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=5630d2594ec741ec03eca1028a05c5c1b37f7e9135a2083fc3ca37a42b53ff27)**
Judicial Watch Director of Investigations and Research Chris Farrell joins "Real America with Dan Ball" on OANN to discuss the death of the Obama family chef.

**Farrell: Israel’s Threat from Hezbollah & Iran

[](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=65655&L=30598&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1NaVJKeTJvWXhqbyZ0PTE3cyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1vbit0aGUrYWlyJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7140b9efbc3d57e6e4c3295843d07d464b326108ef413fb07b97835b0f030e71)**
Judicial Watch Director of Investigations and Research Chris Farrell joins Victory News to discuss the latest on the Israel-Hamas War, Hunter Biden's indictment, and more!
---

name: Wendy Davis
subject: you won't regret this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Hi, friend, it's Wendy Davis. I'm going to ask you to support my good friend Colin Allred's campaign to defeat Ted Cruz. But first, let me tell you why Colin is the steady leader we need in the Senate:
I first met Colin when he worked as the DFW Regional Voter Protection Director for my campaign in 2014.
Here's the thing about Colin : What you see is what you get – Colin is a community servant before all else. I knew from the day I hired him (almost 10 years ago!) that he would do everything in his power to make sure Texans have every opportunity to succeed.
That's why I was so proud to endorse him in 2018 when he decided to run for Congress and defied all odds to defeat a 22-year Republican incumbent.
And it's why I'm thrilled to support Colin again now. He can defeat Ted Cruz if we give him the resources he needs to reach voters across Texas. That's why I'm personally asking you to support him, too. Please, will you split a donation of $15, or any amount, between Colin and Serve America to help Colin send Ted Cruz packing once and for all? → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I'm sure I don't need to convince you how terrible Ted Cruz has been for Texans.
His attacks on our reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ rights, his outrageous book ban, his irresponsible trip to Cancun while a winter storm caused power outages across the state ... I could go on and on, but the long and short of it is this: We need a new senator, and Colin Allred is the real deal.
Experts agree Texas is winnable. FiveThirtyEight called it Democrats' best pickup opportunity in 2024, and CNN says Cruz is the most vulnerable Republican senator on the ballot. All we need is a powerful, Texas-sized grassroots movement made up of passionate supporters like you, friend.
So please, will you join me by splitting a donation of any amount between Colin's campaign and Serve America today? Colin needs to raise $25,190 by midnight, and I promised we'd help him get there. Every dollar gets us that much closer to defeating Ted Cruz → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I promise you won't regret this,
Wendy Davis
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

Our bodily autonomy is at stake |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72671131/436054064/39258959?sourceid=1052260&refcode=20231102_$1MiJo_v1s1&refcode2=WTEFEK03&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2JhMjU3My1hYjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xmapqrx0vtSnA8-H0FMHpg4530fgHO7nzjZKaWOQux0=) Peter,

**House Speaker Mike Johnson is an urgent threat to our bodily autonomy._Every day that he is speaker of the House is a day we are not safe._**

House Republicans are painting Rep. Johnson (LA-04) as a mild-mannered centrist, but his record tells the truth. He's an anti-abortion extremist who has repeatedly called for a national abortion ban. He even said the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ was a "joyous day."

**It will take all of us to stop MAGA Mike and his anti-equality, anti-democracy, and anti-choice agenda.** We need the pro-choice community to stand strong. This is a break-glass moment.

[**We need your support to take back the gavel from MAGA Mike and elect pro-choice champions _everywhere_. body:
Peter, we wanted to make sure you had the chance to respond to our urgent poll about the new GOP House Speaker.
---
**Mike Johnson, or "MAGA Mike," was elected Speaker of the House just a week ago and he's already a disaster** – on Monday, he jeopardized a major foreign aid package for Ukraine, Israel, and Taiwan!
Mike Johnson is anti-choice, anti-LGBTQ+ rights, and anti-democracy: He shouldn't have a place in our government. **But we need to hear from YOU, Peter.**
We still need 271 more responses to our live poll to reach statistical significance. **Please, take a moment now to add your voice and help us reach our goal by midnight:**
**Do you approve of the GOP's new Speaker?**

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My visit to Uvalde, TX (photos enclosed)
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Last month, I was honored to have the opportunity to visit Uvalde, TX for the first time
#

Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords.
Last month, I was honored to have the opportunity to visit Uvalde, TX for the first time—just days before we watched in horror as another heartbreaking mass shooting took place in Lewiston, Maine.
During my visit, I had the chance to meet with many of the families whose children died or survived the shooting at Robb Elementary School. It was an emotional day as we remembered all of the innocent victims who were senselessly killed that day—some of whom didn’t even get the chance to see their 10th birthdays.
The 19 students and 2 teachers who were killed in the devastating Robb Elementary shooting last May will never be forgotten. Their lives mattered. Their stories mattered. And in honor of them, we cannot rest until we see a future where every community in our nation is safe from the threat of gun violence.
Thank you for standing with me in the fight to end our nation’s gun violence crisis. Your support truly makes a difference.
\- Gabby Giffords
* * *
**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231102-1-30&t=1&akid=6826%2E3935704%2ETNDCa5)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=6826%2E3935704%2ETNDCa5) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Do you want to see the next Presidential Debate in Miami? Chip in before 11:59 p.m. on Thursday. | Fellow America, I want to see you in the crowd when I take center stage for the third presidential debate in Miami. We're giving away (2) tickets to the debate in Miami - one for you and a guest. All you have to do is chip in any amount before midnight tomorrow! During the first two debates, I made it clear where I stand on the issues. I have become the establishment's number one target - and I know they're gearing up to come for me again. I am not going to let you down, Fellow American, and I hope you won't let me down either. Let's win this next debate with YOU by my side. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. In addition to two tickets (one for you and a guest), we'll provide airfare and accommodations for this historic debate. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. | | Here’s the cold, hard truth, Peter: **We came up just short of our October fundraising goal.** Now, it wasn’t by a lot. But in a competitive race like ours, against a self-funded, multi-millionaire opponent, every dollar counts. It could be the difference between reaching out to one more voter, hosting one more community event, and ultimately, winning or losing this election. But I’m not here to dwell on the past or focus on the negative, Peter. **Instead, I’m here to ask if you can help us make November our strongest fundraising month yet.** I know the holidays are approaching and everyone’s life is about to become a bit more chaotic. **[So please, before all of the chaos hits, will you donate $25 to support my U.S. Senate campaign and help get our fundraising numbers back on track here in Maryland?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7451?t=9&amount=25&akid=630%2E52803%2EEC60-O)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/7451?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=630%2E52803%2EEC60-O)

name: Georgia House Democrats
subject: Putting GOP voter suppression on trial.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Peter,

Last Thursday, radical GOP group True the Vote went on trial for attempting to kick 250,000 Georgians off the voting rolls, offering a $1M bounty to people who challenged voter eligibility, and attempting to have Navy SEALS police polling places.

That’s how badly the GOP does not want eligible Georgians to vote. Luckily, Fair Fight is taking them to court for unlawful voter intimidation. The trial started last Thursday.

How did all this happen in the first place? With Senate Bill 202, a Republican-engineered bill that introduced massive changes into Georgia’s voting laws in 2021. Do you know how we prevent these things from happening in the future? By taking back our majority in the Georgia Assembly.

This is what we’re focused on as the Georgia House Democrats: supporting Democratic candidates and legislators. You can read more about our agenda here. [https://gahousedems.com/agenda/]

And if you have questions about it, call your legislator. [www.legis.ga.gov/members/house]

But in the meantime, every dollar you give moves us closer to taking back the House.

Donate here >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=110223_VoterChallenge_link] And help save every Georgian’s right to vote.

Let’s show the radical GOP we’re serious about preserving voting rights.

Give $25 Today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=110223_VoterChallenge_button1]

Onwards,

Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?

DONATE TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=110223_VoterChallenge_button2]

Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC

Georgia House Democratic Caucus
PO Box 18622
Atlanta, GA 31126
United States

It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I’m in need of a favor.

**Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win.**

You see, Jon Tester has successfully pulled the wool over voters’ eyes into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. "
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. clean_body: It’s not hard to recognize someone worth helping. I’ve identified Tim Sheehy as someone I think would be tremendous to work with and I need your help to get him to Washington. | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Senator Chuck Grassley reaching out because I’m in need of a favor. Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy is running against one of Chuck Schumer’s foot soldiers in the Senate who votes to deliver the Biden-Harris agenda of open borders and big government spending that fuels the fires of inflation. And Tim needs OUR HELP to win. You see, Jon Tester has successfully pulled the wool over voters’ eyes into sending him to Washington on their behalf since 2006. How, I don’t know. Because the reality is his views are not at all in line with the views of voters in Montana. His voting record would give him a real easy time being elected in Oregon, California, or Massachusetts. Let’s put an end to Democrats representing conservative states in the U.S. Senate. If you don’t want to read to the end of this note, please make sure you click this link to donate to help Navy Seal Tim Sheehy WIN and FLIP the Senate RED before you close out your browser. After 16 years of Jon Tester voting in lock step for a liberal agenda, we Republicans have a real shot at ousting him next November thanks to Navy SEAL veteran Tim Sheehy who is running this go around. We can’t afford another six years of votes for big government, deficit spending, raising taxes, open borders and climate extremism Tim is a very impressive candidate and I know he’d make a GREAT U.S. Senator. He needs our help, which is why I’m personally reaching out to ask you to get involved today. I’ll leave it up to you what you consider to be large, but please know that he’ll put your gift to the best possible use. Every dollar counts. Thank you, Sen. Chuck Grassley | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Joanna Weiss
subject: I am eternally grateful for this incredible grassroots team.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOANNA WEISS FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72675366/436058592/1436736915?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmZhYjM2ZGUtYWU3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fomXtebAai7jtOT6WMYzEY7r0q77T_qAZG8J4sZ7JYc=)
Dear Peter,

Thanks to your incredible support, I am thrilled to share that we reached our October end-of-month fundraising goal!

**From the bottom of my heart, thank you.**

From the start, it has been my mission to do things differently on this campaign. We are rejecting the big checks from corporate and special interests, and instead running a campaign powered by grassroots supporters -- _like you, Peter!_

It is the $1, $5, or $27 gifts that we rely on. In the last month alone, we have added hundreds of new grassroots supporters, and we are heading into these next critical months in our strongest position yet.

**Your support is sending a message that the future is bright here in Orange County.** We have a long road ahead of us, and I know we have what it takes to keep CA-47 blue and take back the House majority. But for right now, I want to express how eternally grateful I am for each and every one of you.

In unity,

Joanna

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariela=20Roca?=
subject: Volunteer Opportunities!
body:
| | | | | |
---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=1b7c851bf4&e=0a12281e0e)
|
---
# Join Our Team: Be a Volunteer
# for Our Campaign! 🙋🏻♀️
|
---
As we gear up for an exciting 2024 campaign, we are reaching out to our amazing supporters and community members to invite you to become a vital part of our team.
Below are a few immediate volunteer opportunities we need help with right away.
# Brunswick Veterans Day Parade - Saturday, November 5th! 🇺🇸
|
---
As an Air Force Veteran & Candidate for Congress, I am very excited to be able to participate and walk in the 2023 91st Annual Brunswick Veterans Day Parade!
We need as many volunteers as possible to help us walk in the parade this Saturday, November 5th.
Parade starts at 2:00 PM, but we will need to line up at the Brunswick High School no later than 12:30 PM.
If you are in the area, please consider signing-up to help us show huge Roca for Congress support!
Sign up below or reply back to this email if you can join us on Saturday. ⬇️
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=c824e37c65&e=0a12281e0e)
| [SIGN-UP HERE FOR PARADE](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=996ec8c92d&e=0a12281e0e)
---
# Postcard Writing & Envelope Stuffing - Thursday November, 8th 5-7 PM Frederick Location ✉️
|
---
We are getting ready to host our first in-person volunteer event!
We will be asking volunteers to help us handwrite the postcard below to voters across the district. We believe that a personal handwritten note is a nice touch that voters will appreciate.
| | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
We will also be stuffing envelopes with letters to send out!
We will be meeting next week Thursday November, 8th 5-7 PM at a location in Frederick.
Sign up below or reply back to this email if you can join us next week. ⬇️
| [SIGN-UP HERE FOR POSTCARDS AND ENVELOPE STUFFING](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=76348ef5a8&e=0a12281e0e)
---
# Sign-Up For Future
# Volunteer Opportunities ❤️
|
---
Volunteers like you are the lifeblood of our campaign. Your passion, energy, and commitment can make a significant difference in helping us reach our goals. Whether you're a seasoned campaigner or completely new to the political arena, there are numerous ways you can contribute.We need volunteers for various roles, including:
1. Canvassing: Knock on doors and engage with voters to share our candidate's message.
2. Phone Banking: Make calls to potential supporters and help build a strong network of grassroots advocates.
3. Event Coordination: Assist in planning and organizing campaign events and rallies.
4. Data Entry and Research: Help us maintain accurate voter databases and conduct research on key issues.
5. Social Media and Communications: Manage our online presence and create engaging content.

If you are unable to attend our upcoming events this week but still want to volunteer, please sign up below! Make sure to enter what you think you might be able to help with. Register as a volunteer below! ⬇️
| [VOLUNTEER SIGN-UP](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=490bb0dcbb&e=0a12281e0e)
---
# Donate Today 🙏🏼
|
---
As always, if you are unable to help our campaign by volunteering, fundraising is one of the biggest things we always need help with!
Postcards, envelopes, & everything else are an added cost, and we depend on the generous financial support of amazing supporters like you!
Donate below today! ⬇️
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=15c0f277a2&e=0a12281e0e)
| | | | [](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=825e674cc8&e=0a12281e0e)| [](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=a1b1a352dd&e=0a12281e0e)| [](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=397f2fbaf1&e=0a12281e0e)
---|---|---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=b2f78490eb&e=0a12281e0e)
| | | [](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=08da6e58b7&e=0a12281e0e)
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.
Our mailing address is:
Roca for Congress P.O. Box 1725 Frederick, MD 21702 USA
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=6dc2bd9aeb&e=0a12281e0e&c=49b9811656) or [unsubscribe](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=6dc2bd9aeb&e=0a12281e0e&c=49b9811656)

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Fwd: OLCV's 2023 Environmental Scorecard is here!
body:
| | | Dear Peter, I don’t know if you saw the news, but our 2023 Scorecard is OUT and we want to make sure your lawmakers know their scores! **[Will you help me out by messaging your lawmakers either thanking them for their good work in 2023 or urging them to be better in 2024?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72675710/436058976/-211177748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZDNlZjNhLWFmNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yc6yYXzqEVYQI1uiNs2-uFT75udM8C4-tYthw4ggAFM=&emci=48fd72f7-ad79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6bd3ef3a-af79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** I’m heading to the capitol next week for November Legislative Days as the state prepares for the 2024 short session in February. While I’m there, I’m so excited to hand deliver a physical copy of The Oregon League of Conservation 2023 Environmental Scorecard for the Oregon State Legislature––which you can check out online [www.olcvscorecard.org/2023](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72675713/436058978/-758766012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZDNlZjNhLWFmNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yc6yYXzqEVYQI1uiNs2-uFT75udM8C4-tYthw4ggAFM=&emci=48fd72f7-ad79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6bd3ef3a-af79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230). Thank you for all you do. It will make my hand delivery of the scorecard so much more powerful if your lawmakers hear from you about their scores. Thank you, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72675715/436058980/-966269750?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZDNlZjNhLWFmNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yc6yYXzqEVYQI1uiNs2-uFT75udM8C4-tYthw4ggAFM=&emci=48fd72f7-ad79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6bd3ef3a-af79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) It’s arrived: The **[2023 Environmental Scorecard for the Oregon Legislature is now available](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72675716/436058983/-758766012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZDNlZjNhLWFmNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yc6yYXzqEVYQI1uiNs2-uFT75udM8C4-tYthw4ggAFM=&emci=48fd72f7-ad79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6bd3ef3a-af79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)! ** Dear Peter, The 2023 Oregon State Legislative Session was rough, to say the least. Oregonians had to witness not just another Republican walkout, but the LONGEST Republican walkout in state history. The six-week stunt nearly shut down the state, and went against the will of Oregon voters (both Republican and Democrat) who overwhelmingly voted to stop walkouts. One thing was clear: Oregonians expect their elected officials to show up for work just like we do. And yet, they walked out again. Thankfully the leadership in the Senate and the House held strong. Speaker Dan Rayfield kept the House working hard and passing as many bills as possible so they were ready to go when and if the Republican senators returned. While Senate President Rob Wagner held strong in not giving in to Republican demands. In the end, enough Republican senators returned to pass the budget and the some 300+ bills that had piled up in their absence. Those bills included HB 3409 and HB 3630, a huge climate and energy package that created a $90 million budget and will allow Oregon to compete for billions of dollars of federal funding for climate change reduction and resilience. The package included all of our **Resilient, Efficient Buildings Priority** bills and the **Natural Climate Solutions Priority** bill. We passed a majority of our priorities including the **Toxic Free Kids Act Modernization** bill (HB 3043), **Toxic Free Cosmetics** (SB 546), **Legalizing Reusables** (SB 545), and a **Polystyrene Ban** (SB 543). **[Check out more of the major environmental bills that were voted on this year in the Scorecard!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72675717/436058984/-758766012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZDNlZjNhLWFmNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yc6yYXzqEVYQI1uiNs2-uFT75udM8C4-tYthw4ggAFM=&emci=48fd72f7-ad79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6bd3ef3a-af79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Unfortunately, as is the case every session, we also spent a huge amount of our energy and time fighting bad bills. We designated six bills as Major Threats and we were able to kill or improve all of them. Most notable was HB 3414––a housing bill that included unnecessary expansion of Urban Growth Boundaries (UGBs), threatening our land use system. That bill died on the floor of the Senate by _**one single vote**_. The Oregon we know and love is in large part due to our iconic land use laws which have prevented urban sprawl––both protecting our natural environment and agricultural land, and helping protect people from wildfires by having less development in potentially high fire risk areas. The housing crisis was not brought on by our strong land use laws, and we are not going to build more affordable housing by expanding UGBs. We’re grateful to the lawmakers who took a stand by voting no on this bill. In addition to killing a lot of bad bills, a lot of good bills unfortunately also died this session. One such bill was **100% Clean For Data Centers** (HB 2816) which aimed to close the loophole in the 100% Clean Energy for All bill passed in 2021. Data centers are a huge and quickly growing source of electricity in Oregon, and we will have to address their energy use if we are going to meet our clean energy goals and avert the worst effects of climate change. It was also a big disappointment to see **Right to Repair** (SB 542) and **Toxic Free Schools** (SB 426) die––both were OCN priorities that fell victim to the Republican walk out. For more on both good and bad bills that died, you can check out the **[Bill Graveyard section of the Scorecard](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72675721/436058986/38419628?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZDNlZjNhLWFmNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yc6yYXzqEVYQI1uiNs2-uFT75udM8C4-tYthw4ggAFM=&emci=48fd72f7-ad79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6bd3ef3a-af79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)**.

The Scorecard is one of our best tools for holding our elected leaders accountable. In it you can see how your state senator and state representative voted on the climate and environment, so you can hold them accountable as we head toward the next election. **[Please send an email to your lawmakers either thanking them for voting for the bills you care about or asking them to do better next year.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72675727/436058992/-211177748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZDNlZjNhLWFmNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yc6yYXzqEVYQI1uiNs2-uFT75udM8C4-tYthw4ggAFM=&emci=48fd72f7-ad79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6bd3ef3a-af79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** This grueling and tough session took its toll–only three senators and four representatives received a perfect 100% score. Six legislators were honored with awards. **[Click here to find out which lawmakers won awards for the 2023 Legislative session and who received a perfect score.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72675728/436058997/-1534251114?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZDNlZjNhLWFmNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yc6yYXzqEVYQI1uiNs2-uFT75udM8C4-tYthw4ggAFM=&emci=48fd72f7-ad79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6bd3ef3a-af79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** As we look back at the 2023 legislative session, we want to say a big thank you to YOU and your activism! You sent emails to your lawmakers, signed petitions, posted on social media, attended hearings, and showed up for our virtual Lobby Day. Now, take a look at the Scorecard and see how your hard work has paid off. Then, join us in holding our lawmakers accountable as we head into the 2024 short session and the next election! **[Email your legislators and either thank them for standing up for the environment in 2023, or ask them to do better in 2024.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72675729/436058998/-211177748?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZDNlZjNhLWFmNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yc6yYXzqEVYQI1uiNs2-uFT75udM8C4-tYthw4ggAFM=&emci=48fd72f7-ad79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6bd3ef3a-af79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Thank you, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director P.S. This year’s Scorecard cover photo (and the winner of our 2023 Environmental Photo Contest) is volunteers of the Pacific Crest Trail Association All Women Volunteer Crew, taken by Teri Smith. **[Click here to see it, and other photos from photo contest finalists included in the Scorecard](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72675730/436058999/-758766012?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiZDNlZjNhLWFmNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yc6yYXzqEVYQI1uiNs2-uFT75udM8C4-tYthw4ggAFM=&emci=48fd72f7-ad79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=6bd3ef3a-af79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)**. |

subject: Maryland Senate Candidate John Teichert Signs U.S. Term Limits Pledge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/074f3a0c9687/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6679126?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
**Maryland Senate Candidate John Teichert Signs U.S. Term Limits Pledge**
**BALTIMORE, Md.** – Maryland U.S. Senate candidate and retired Brigadier General John Teichert is marking the one year out from the 2024 election milestone with an important announcement: he has signed the U.S. Term Limits pledge.
| | | | | | | | | In signing the pledge, Teichert released the following statement:
**“Despite the unpopularity of Congress and the dysfunction that has become commonplace, Americans still vote to send politicians back to Washington every two or six years. That’s why I’m committed to voting in support of legislation that imposes term limits; because we need transformative change if we want to see leaders, not politicians, work on our behalf.”**
---
|
---
In response to Teichert’s pledge, Chairman of U.S. Term Limits Howard Rich released the following statement:
**"John's strong support of term limits shows that there are individuals who are willing to put self-interest aside to follow the will of the people. America needs a Congress that will be served by citizen legislators, not career politicians."**
Teichert is the first U.S. Senate candidate from the state of Maryland to sign the U.S. Term Limits pledge.
| [DONATE](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=eeb4e99a97&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

name: Team Becca
subject: Becca was featured in the New York Times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont

Did you see this article?

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I cannot even begin to thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It is no secret that my life has changed drastically in the last seven days. |
---
Peter - it is no secret that my life has changed drastically in the last seven days.

I am running on little sleep and late nights, but it is all worth it because I know we are working for a shared goal: to preserve freedom in this great country.

Among all the chaos, I have truly been blown away by the outpouring support from conservatives across the country, and **I want to take a moment to offer my sincere gratitude.**

**Thank you for the opportunity to serve.**

**_Thank you for the chance to lead._**

We are stronger as a team. I know we have a long road ahead of us, to get this country back on track, **but I am bullish about the future of America.**

Thank you for supporting me on this path.

God bless,
Speaker Mike Johnson

PS – Democrats are already coming at me with force. If we want to expand our majority in 2024 and get this country back on track, [**I need your help. Would you consider donating to the cause today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=27d0346168c34284a9b41484edfe2fa0&_e=hPbkVxGB7PduIOQpII33E_jH4C3ODYvTppjvNnEGI3wbZz_-XwWXn9NClgh8lscULAHN0vRWgs2hvSYFheenk4xBp-axah_dIE9UbN-bxXEt7qo9rJHrHbh5jbKtF0BBCuLWXZad2NreMvldiexYICyZlkuuXcLdFoGLL9ul6oUXdaNyjK4CvEjr3bUm0TE51Em7Z_dOOXztkt_qqfvHZbpB3aY7arD5KJRDoWVZh_8jOOte9m-ZA4LMhmDQZst4ZMLHTL6xLsFRz5ERrkx39d6-hEr1Ht-vskwLdaaNpCMT727Pz-mPChogXK1DyesIvnz3OQL-aDrm6ngdrrvnK0pDLnTiVgED_wYTLKMqjrSWRO-jVS6_Ok54xgIq1_JZCI2Pbig70Sv9UNXoVwYo4w%3D%3D)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Our military members deserve access to birth control
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_110223_MilitaryContraception_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_110223_MilitaryContraception_act]
Friend — After the Supreme Court’s conservative majority overturned Roe v. Wade , 40% of active duty servicewomen were left stationed in places with limited or no access to reproductive care.
This is unacceptable.
The men and women who bravely serve our country deserve the best care possible. Access to birth control for our service members and their families should be affordable, timely, and convenient.
That’s why I’m calling on the Department of Defense to cover Opill, an over-the-counter contraceptive, at no cost.
Getting a prescription for birth control can take time that active service members just don’t have. By making over-the-counter birth control an option, we can eliminate this barrier and improve the quality of life of our service members.
This is especially pressing as my Republican colleagues double down on attacking access to reproductive care for military members.
This spring, Senator Tuberville from Alabama began blocking military nominations in protest of a Department of Defense policy that expands access to reproductive care. I was the first person fighting against this, and have continued fighting it ever since. He’s putting our military readiness at risk.
The men and women in the military defend our rights, and we must defend theirs.
Every voice in this fight will make a difference. Will you join my call on the Department of Defense to cover over-the-counter birth control at no cost for service members, veterans, and their families? You can add your name here >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/x_102623_dodreprorights]

Thank you,
Michael

You can add your name here >> [] SIGN ON NOW [] SIGN ON NOW [] Thank you, Michael DONATE NOW [] DONATE MONTHLY [] DONATE NOW [] DONATE MONTHLY [] Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO CLICK HERE TO RECEIVE FEWER EMAILS FROM OUR CAMPAIGN [] By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

**I’m sure you’ve heard all the reasons Scott Perry is wrong for Central Pennsylvania** – he supported extremist Jim Jordan, opposes abortion rights, and hasn’t stepped up to help working families.

But here’s what I want to share with you today: **The reasons why I am the right choice for Central Pennsylvania.**

[**If you already know me and don’t need to hear more, I hope you’ll consider joining our grassroots movement by chipping in $5 to our campaign >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72678781/436061460/-1396543286?amount=5&refcode=BLFC_200231102_EMDF_T1_ONB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2EzYTliNjAtYjE3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XqCjq47z9BmtJijvv-KC2l-JwrbW2GIdyLfYGLC0EiY=) | [$15,000 LAUNCH DAY GOAL: CHIP IN $5 TO BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR OF BLAKE LYNCH’S CAMPAIGN TO FLIP PENNSYLVANIA’S 10TH DISTRICT »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72678782/436061467/-1396543286?amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=BLFC_200231102_EMDF_T1_ONB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkyODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2EzYTliNjAtYjE3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XqCjq47z9BmtJijvv-KC2l-JwrbW2GIdyLfYGLC0EiY=)

**If you don’t know me, I’ve spent my career providing solutions to help our community wherever there has been a need.**

_When asked to help assist in building a bridge between the community and our police officers they’re meant to serve,_ I joined the Harrisburg Bureau of Police as the Director of Community relations to bridge that gap.

_When I saw there was a lack of mentorship and resources for our kids in the community,_ I joined the same Boys & Girls Club that was there for me when I was growing up.

_When I saw our community experiencing food insecurity,_ I rolled up my sleeves and worked with our local food bank to make sure families did not go hungry.

_And now, as I’m seeing issues across my district_ – families struggling to make ends meet, folks who feel like Washington DC has left them behind – I’m stepping up to run for Congress.

**This won’t be an easy fight, Peter.** We’re up against mega-donors and corporate interests who will give their all – but I know a people-powered movement can take on anything and win!

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Fellow Conservative, allow me to introduce myself.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=daa2247007ac4a2085d23a94f7f5e067&_t=KKA5-0_hReYppYLaHjRgpjxmnGsRhT4lKs_ZDOm4PfRNp_TeC2bw6nOag_J8_L9VDmMQxODWOpFtbwYltgWWw1ci5sRUYzSBguj3MNCM6-M%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=daa2247007ac4a2085d23a94f7f5e067&_t=KKA5-0_hReYppYLaHjRgpjxmnGsRhT4lKs_ZDOm4PfRNp_TeC2bw6nOag_J8_L9VDmMQxODWOpFtbwYltgWWw1ci5sRUYzSBguj3MNCM6-M%3D)

|
Hi there Friend,

It's Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.

_**I wanted to reach out and introduce myself because, Friend, I hear you are one of our most dedicated grassroots supporters. **_

I was raised in Shreveport, LA. My father was a firefighter who taught me early the importance of service and sacrifice.

I attended Louisiana State University, where I received a degree in business and later my law degree.

As a constitutional lawyer, I worked tirelessly to protect religious freedom, the sanctity of human life, and biblical values.

---

I'm honored to serve as Speaker of the House and to work with you to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.

We have so much work to accomplish, and I can't wait to get started. But I need to ask you one favor.

**I set a goal of activating 20,000 grassroots donors so I can hit the ground running.

name: 4Patriots
subject: Important Food Shortage Notice
body:
The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis

**The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis** **This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent... And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn: **_" Food shortages are coming."_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee44699f8e1f46b9b0aaf47aff7882b2&_e=AxUgmXDN5q6dAbhpXjGENbpagrFtZnZEInt_QsRci1yacT1pwab5ofXSpPN_zthAgf5yP0J08dDPIM0ax1k9P-oi_n7w0PvGkEVQZaQjZtkEiSM39oZKgZN-abhF9GLOgr-DDc3FGzu6hXVYS3wBUevNXLWiobf_Zw6fkX3f7vMhINDcUBAFItbXg6u30pVjopiOAovNnVu-SdHymtIiGrI2sZDzciBkGj-G1WfiHdGn9iEgR6CdsAZ-PlJuqgH68Mb4GkhR9DIR5xcJyVEaZKMSj9depAMf9MokjwdkNIsuhGpiF8YKK0h-PmYZkQty). When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee44699f8e1f46b9b0aaf47aff7882b2&_e=AxUgmXDN5q6dAbhpXjGENbpagrFtZnZEInt_QsRci1yacT1pwab5ofXSpPN_zthAgf5yP0J08dDPIM0ax1k9P-oi_n7w0PvGkEVQZaQjZtkEiSM39oZKgZN-abhF9GLOgr-DDc3FGzu6hXVYS3wBUd-dCnuR1RTK6gowJsmSnMbHuwoyuV_Y2kl4C-1XsS290zegdLSv2R2SLHkTJ4NHcpic97iUTsmU89xgLdReOWmpWem7yZt9Z0YRzOZ1X7vYHTPB-C8N1ZxquoXqt10zPvASYQuW-QXobSnTMc2eIFlW0qHjUDRnQJEP_qGq3SCw) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. [**Stock up now**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ee44699f8e1f46b9b0aaf47aff7882b2&_e=AxUgmXDN5q6dAbhpXjGENbpagrFtZnZEInt_QsRci1yacT1pwab5ofXSpPN_zthAgf5yP0J08dDPIM0ax1k9P-oi_n7w0PvGkEVQZaQjZtkEiSM39oZKgZN-abhF9GLOgr-DDc3FGzu6hXVYS3wBURbdWbYIrI-Cb0_b8DD7BZZoCY1E_BQOI-m55208KFAN-66i4_OXG25PWeHgRPcZMaEdy3dTZXPhV4Hqb--scnUuAZdlrrGmMkAtE_lzokGl3bwVJNUYANATS064pstob_ryefmtp1y1QNu4HtafwJbxPBGBGy1TU-cQKS8yo6Yx) on these survival food kits while you can.
