Peter,

New polling out this month shows that the race in Montana is heating up.

What we’re doing is working. Despite having declared my candidacy just four months ago, I’m already virtually tied AGAINST 18-YEAR incumbent Democrat Jon Tester.

In just a moment I’m going to ask you to **[donate $5](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2c7131677d634f678c18f70dd37cd9bc&_e=apXC6MQI-hkM0XMi1dj3LakSFVtnjyfLqEpqPYQ1LSC6YVowsR0TWo53RG3wKktQrIW7Uwg3TSsNHW2U5-MXv5CZ1lMtQ-qKyriM4lXj92GVVskHWJUBCaTE7Hj89js4Py91LPGM7M_RAqawC-uCFvwaWN-wBzPCzH-IO4W9UqD_0KvUW9aMHPAcL-gqyHt4zE24n7Tl8OQzvLcKGFERkoz7qusErQ8vHcigNjUNvCUnWyR3l0w5uxKQpB1eBZi6MpNETOCeoMV8Io9m5ZpkzOzIBaZ51MJzJ3UsBFCDt2pYfp3p44_e8Ecc6pGLjLU1tMHjVK9V_PnBUNbm_NW6KSgvu_NUerapwLfNR4ACa7RB79gGI-0iaA0CUmKm5JBVPIuSIDhpUiV5T2EvLXCmmQ%3D%3D)** to my campaign. I don’t like asking for donations, but it’s necessary to defeat Jon Tester and flip the Senate. Unfortunately for us, October was one of the most challenging months of the campaign for raising money from grassroots supporters. Unfortunately, we fell short of hitting our fundraising goal last month, so [**I’m writing to see if you’ll help me out with a generous donation right now.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2c7131677d634f678c18f70dd37cd9bc&_e=apXC6MQI-hkM0XMi1dj3LakSFVtnjyfLqEpqPYQ1LSC6YVowsR0TWo53RG3wKktQrIW7Uwg3TSsNHW2U5-MXv5CZ1lMtQ-qKyriM4lXj92GVVskHWJUBCaTE7Hj89js4Py91LPGM7M_RAqawC-uCFvwaWN-wBzPCzH-IO4W9UqD_0KvUW9aMHPAcL-gqyHt4zE24n7Tl8OQzvLcKGFERkoz7qusErQ8vHcigNjUNvCU68sRVOOZC26ae0CU6KMpX2t6T258QFMmgM-oS50pgANPa0Mev2mYKyTRZ_HjEtlMF6HTFeUnnck1JBDp-JvH-WwJ3WBxaKUxciWWKXyzceC-UakCesP8ni7E1FBdYVKEOJN2XYwSynYwMSOGYPZemIt63SlTbvvU2BXBf_hA0cA%3D%3D)

[**CHIP IN $5**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2c7131677d634f678c18f70dd37cd9bc&_e=apXC6MQI-hkM0XMi1dj3LakSFVtnjyfLqEpqPYQ1LSC6YVowsR0TWo53RG3wKktQrIW7Uwg3TSsNHW2U5-MXv5CZ1lMtQ-qKyriM4lXj92GVVskHWJUBCaTE7Hj89js4Py91LPGM7M_RAqawC-uCFvwaWN-wBzPCzH-IO4W9UqD_0KvUW9aMHPAcL-gqyHt4zE24n7Tl8OQzvLcKGFERkoz7qusErQ8vHcigNjUNvCVikxcGiYRx6cNWiR8dwcZPI7wNeKLo2Z3eJwkGe0jzuYsTqGAwGPpj-75VxxX4N6V-YjviSdacxfG-SXoT-5lTzaRjYp_bxVbqdW4tpBBp3gPL2JKomDrwR9FWXSpRSu-99rx4riukX9iNANVEQSR1srQYGSgboiCx0V63Ljkg3Q%3D%3D)
I know that my opponent sees our campaign as a threat to his political survival - just look at a few of the things he’s writing in his fundraising emails to get liberal donors to underwrite his campaign:

“ _**His campaign is already outspending us on the airwaves, and with our razor-thin Senate majority on the line, it’s critical that we regain our momentum NOW.**_ ” **The part Tester leaves out is that Democrat-aligned SUPER PACs have already spent more than $1.5 million to drag ME through the mud.**

[**DONATE TODAY** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2c7131677d634f678c18f70dd37cd9bc&_e=apXC6MQI-hkM0XMi1dj3LakSFVtnjyfLqEpqPYQ1LSC6YVowsR0TWo53RG3wKktQrIW7Uwg3TSsNHW2U5-MXv5CZ1lMtQ-qKyriM4lXj92GVVskHWJUBCaTE7Hj89js4Py91LPGM7M_RAqawC-uCFvwaWN-wBzPCzH-IO4W9UqD_0KvUW9aMHPAcL-gqyHt4zE24n7Tl8OQzvLcKGFERkoz7qusErQ8vHcigNjUNvCX5fcLSS4CBrR8y_zye5UCmyHE-8xH1ZVZoBIJkRGjyCKJnoMS6WaFt52N4Bc9OFRu-86Di1uUFmVja9QN00JsuuZ4Rz6HC1WN49PedBt43U8DUz7ouPB5XHvddP0BSkpAYWNG8LS8dDlRRa6oqxU1R3cUIUjepBhHib5Mf-WRZ9A%3D%3D)

“ _**It’s no secret that this toss-up race is one of the GOP’s best chances to flip a Senate seat red, and it’ll come down to voter turnout.**_ ” **Tester seems to realize that my candidacy has put this race at the top of many - if not most - lists of seats to flip parties.**

**Tester knows he’s in trouble.**

**Washington Democrats know Tester is in trouble.**

Polling shows I can win this seat and help save our country. **[Will that be enough to get you involved with my race today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2c7131677d634f678c18f70dd37cd9bc&_e=apXC6MQI-hkM0XMi1dj3LakSFVtnjyfLqEpqPYQ1LSC6YVowsR0TWo53RG3wKktQrIW7Uwg3TSsNHW2U5-MXv5CZ1lMtQ-qKyriM4lXj92GVVskHWJUBCaTE7Hj89js4Py91LPGM7M_RAqawC-uCFvwaWN-wBzPCzH-IO4W9UqD_0KvUW9aMHPAcL-gqyHt4zE24n7Tl8OQzvLcKGFERkoz7qusErQ8vHcigNjUNvCW0Ux8qjR4HZYMghz37RSResbAdvaVZym2Ulf3KWwJEq0dwm8sg-lmtqky1jV43WqonZ7_cLTdlL1OccyPWFu4mb_E1-NnmzgekSIribwQkmhNgge5MJmjE_tuYHg87zEehCeKWit42IgTTn0FucHkUmZFXynDH0QVjTXVhiOrq0A%3D%3D)**

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

Friend,

We've got problems as a country. The candidates in this race need to be standing up to solve them. But as par usual, one Republican candidate in particular can't seem to get up on stage and face the American people to defend his record because it's full of broken promises.

Ron DeSantis has a pair. He fights. He wins. He never backs down, and he certainly never hides away in his basement and feels entitled.

We think Trump hiding away is a cry fore help, so we've teed up a little reminder. We're thinking this one will land. Help us show him what it looks like to have a pair...

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8c48d8c979f7dee290c76130d0cafe8bbddb0af1e00e01d87d20c82c7e31c28a240f2d05eb2d64bc49e835b04f1f5ef8a93f059db77d383ca84c52dc220360af

Order your pair today!

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8c48d8c979f7dee2baafb934ea043ec1b7be36ec3a81aabdd3f3552bbf20a635871cd2cca8760a66bbd1001a2ceb1213a6fe5a14fd41fd20b4f2d3b46bcc26b1
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8c48d8c979f7dee2a6bcc5cf5c06de5780e14561ca7f346b7db8ea25c2ac1845b899aacc91ebc228170d6addec1e3b5aabb307e281c0ac3ba0683eaaa60764f4
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8c48d8c979f7dee290c76130d0cafe8bbddb0af1e00e01d87d20c82c7e31c28a240f2d05eb2d64bc49e835b04f1f5ef8a93f059db77d383ca84c52dc220360af

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8c48d8c979f7dee290c76130d0cafe8bbddb0af1e00e01d87d20c82c7e31c28a240f2d05eb2d64bc49e835b04f1f5ef8a93f059db77d383ca84c52dc220360af

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: American Update
subject: Hundreds Of Americans Evacuate Gaza Through Egypt As Israel-Hamas Conflict Intensifies
body:
And Elite University Hosting Biden Center Took Money From School That Settled With US Gov’t Over Alleged Hezbollah Ties

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672939%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bMaMm7hI8nCRY8LK8qgNFg&sysid=1 Hundreds Of Americans Evacuate Gaza Through Egypt As Israel-Hamas Conflict Intensifies

Hundreds of Americans are evacuating the Gaza Strip through Egypt on Thursday as the conflict between Israel and Hamas deepens, according to multiple reports. Israel Defense Forces (IDF) has ramped up airstrikes and sent ground troops into the northern Gaza region in retaliation against Hamas, which has killed over 1,400 Israelis and kidnapped hundreds of civilians starting on Oct. 7.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672939%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bMaMm7hI8nCRY8LK8qgNFg&sysid=1

The University of Pennsylvania, which hosts the Penn Biden Center, took hundreds of thousands of dollars from the American University of Beirut (AUB) in 2022, roughly five years after AUB paid a settlement to the United States government in connection with its alleged ties to Hezbollah, a U.S.-designated terror organization.

Marine Corps Commandant Gen. Eric Smith is in stable condition at a hospital in Washington, D.C., after suffering an apparent heart attack, the Marine Corps confirmed late Wednesday.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c672931%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fsF5j2P%2bEjCsNLynfAwJIQ&sysid=1

name: Virginia House Democrats
subject: 3 reasons to make a contribution today to Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
**Friend - The high-stakes Virginia election is coming up fast — only 5 days away. So we wanted to quickly share three reasons why you should donate today — and how every dollar makes a difference in this fight.**
**Reason #1:** State legislative races are historically overlooked and underfunded, despite the fact that your state legislators have the MOST impact on your daily life.
**Reason #2:** National Republicans are _pouring_ money into Virginia to help Youngkin elect his right-wing allies in the House of Delegates. In fact, Ron DeSantis’s former donor cut Youngkin a $1 million check and Youngkin recently held a major donors retreat to woo millionaires to influence the outcome of this election.
**Reason #3:** When this chamber was last up for election, Republicans won control by **733** votes in the three tightest districts. As a result, Virginia House Republicans pushed legislation to ban abortion, cut taxes for Virginia’s wealthiest, take money from our public schools, and roll back common-sense efforts to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
**Now, we have a chance to take back the House of Delegates and deliver bold solutions to the challenges facing Virginians. But we can’t do it alone. Candidates rely on the support of dedicated Democrats like you to help them organize communities and get voters off the sidelines and into this fight for a better Virginia in the final stretch.**
[**If you’re with us can you split $5 or more between The Long Run and the Virginia House Democratic Caucus to help us win on November 7th? Every dollar will give our incredible candidates the push they need to continue this work >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.HpfcE0&refcode=em231102-1-t2&t=1&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between the Virginia House Democratic Caucus and The Long Run immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.nhtdqO&amount=5&refcode=em231102-1-t2&t=20&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.qxLCgi&refcode=em231102-1-t2&t=21&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.VvwwR5&refcode=em231102-1-t2&t=22&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.EL0O58&refcode=em231102-1-t2&t=23&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.ob4oOr&refcode=em231102-1-t2&t=24&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-vadems-split.HpfcE0&refcode=em231102-1-t2&t=25&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ)
Only a handful of seats will determine control of the House of Delegates this year – the stakes are sky-high, but with you on our side, we can take back the House in just 5 days.
Thank you,
Team Virginia House Democrats

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=26&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=27&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=28&refcode2=4973_196590_lvG4MQ&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4973%2E196590%2ElvG4MQ)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Friend,- The January 6 Committee released a report yesterday that implicates none other than Jim Jordan as a central figure in overturning our democracy in 2020.
**Jordan was a principal mastermind of the unconstitutional and un-American effort to thwart the will of the people and keep Trump in power.** While this news isn’t surprising, his actions should still shock and infuriate you. He has no business in our government!

|

| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjo5OTk1NzY5Njg5MTk3OTYxNSxcInJcIjoxMDM3NTg1OTAzMDI0ODg1NDB9IiwicyI6IjBmMWY0YmI3ZjllZDBjZDQifQ)

The committee's report called Jordan "a significant player in President Trump's efforts” to stay in power after losing the election, detailing how Jordan participated in post-election meetings with Rudy Giuliani and others to discuss ways to challenge the election, including baseless claims of “fraud.”
Multiple persons involved in planning the Capitol insurrection and the illegal efforts to overturn the election results have already been brought to justice, including some convicted for seditious conspiracy, a very serious charge akin to domestic terrorism. This report makes painfully clear that Jim Jordan played a central role in the events of January 6, and as such he was “engaged in insurrection or rebellion” against the United States. He should be barred from holding public office, as Section 3 of the 14th Amendment to the Constitution demands. I am calling on Congress to expel Jim Jordan—** _[and ask that you join me in this campaign to make sure that the voters give insurrectionist Jim Jordan the verdict he so deserves next November:](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjo5OTk1NzY5Njg5NjE3MzkyMCxcInJcIjoxMDM3NTg1OTAzMDI0ODg1NDB9IiwicyI6IjUzZTBhNGQyMTQ3NzA3NmYifQ)_** **__****_

Elite University Hosting Biden Center Took Money From School That
Settled With US Gov’t Over Alleged Hezbollah Ties

The University of Pennsylvania, which hosts the Penn Biden Center,
took hundreds of thousands of dollars from the American University of
Beirut (AUB) in 2022, roughly five years after AUB paid a settlement
to the United States government in connection with its alleged ties to
Hezbollah, a U.S.-designated terror organization.

We thought it was important to explain just how critical these messages are to ensuring we reelect Joe Biden in 2024. | | |
---
Peter -- We have sent a number of fundraising emails lately -- especially at the end of October. And because we still need your help, we thought it was important to explain just how critical these messages are to ensuring we reelect Joe Biden in 2024. Here we go: As you read this, Republican candidates for president and their allied outside spending groups are spending millions and millions of dollars in swing states across the country attacking President Biden with negative ad after negative ad. If you live in one of those states, you've no doubt seen them -- and their frequency. Obviously, we have to fight back if we’re going to win this race. What you may not know is that the overwhelming majority of the donations to the president's reelection come from lots and lots of people chipping in smaller amounts of money. **And there is no greater source of those donations than emails like this.** So when you see us on the air defending the president; when you see our organizing efforts in communities like yours; when you see our poll numbers rise nationally and in swing states, please know it's the response to emails like this one that make it possible. **We simply couldn't do it without these messages.** **[Please use this link to contribute $25 to President Biden's reelection campaign today. clean_body: We thought it was important to explain just how critical these messages are to ensuring we reelect Joe Biden in 2024. | | | Peter -- We have sent a number of fundraising emails lately -- especially at the end of October. And because we still need your help, we thought it was important to explain just how critical these messages are to ensuring we reelect Joe Biden in 2024. Here we go: As you read this, Republican candidates for president and their allied outside spending groups are spending millions and millions of dollars in swing states across the country attacking President Biden with negative ad after negative ad. If you live in one of those states, you've no doubt seen them -- and their frequency. Obviously, we have to fight back if we’re going to win this race. What you may not know is that the overwhelming majority of the donations to the president's reelection come from lots and lots of people chipping in smaller amounts of money. And there is no greater source of those donations than emails like this. So when you see us on the air defending the president; when you see our organizing efforts in communities like yours; when you see our poll numbers rise nationally and in swing states, please know it's the response to emails like this one that make it possible. We simply couldn't do it without these messages. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | We don't expect you to give to every email we send. But with the attacks ramping up against President Biden, we're hoping you will give to this one. Thank you, \-- Team Joe | |

Peter, first off, I want to say thank you for supporting our fundraising efforts in October. I know that so much is claiming our attention at every moment: world conflicts, turmoil in national politics, not to mention our everyday lives. In the midst of all of it, I continually ask you to fight for North Carolina with me. And Peter, I’m so grateful that this grassroots team always steps up because you know how important it is to our state’s future. With Republicans’ latest gerrymandered maps drawn, candidates can now launch their campaigns for 2024, and in just over a year, North Carolinians will return to the polls. **The stakes are higher than we can imagine. name: Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.)
subject: November check-in
body:
| | | Peter,
---
As we start a new month, I just wanted to take a moment to check in with you.

We met our October goal, and it’s entirely due to the generosity of patriots like you.

I am so incredibly grateful for all of your support.

With your help, we’ll defend and expand our House majority and get to work setting America back up for success after the disastrous Biden Administration.

I can’t wait to see all we accomplish from now until election day. Together, I know we can win.

In service,

---
| | Col. Mike WaltzSpecial Forces Green Beret
U.S. Congressman (R-FL)

subject: Most Expensive Place in America
body:
Democrat policies are making things worse. | | | | | [](https://vote4margarita.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=daff3f9d4e72dc7794c68a0d7&id=d3ad3141a0&e=1f98559b5d)
---

Friend -
_For too many Californians, the American Dream is out of reach._
[**San Diego was just named the most expensive place to live in the entire nation**](https://vote4margarita.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=daff3f9d4e72dc7794c68a0d7&id=b7d1e9170d&e=1f98559b5d) , with six more California cities in the top 10.
Failures of leadership from our state and federal government have contributed to rising prices and a cost of living that is no longer sustainable for working families.

Whether it’s out-of-control spending that fuels inflation, attacks on American energy production, or disastrous housing policies, Democrats have betrayed working families. Under Joe Biden, _everything is more expensive_ \- **I am running for Congress to ensure that future generations can experience the American Dream, just like I did.**
Friend, insider politicians like Mark Levin are part of the problem - he’s been a rubber stamp for Biden’s spending-binge and America Last agenda. To flip this seat and deliver relief for California families, I need your help - [_**if you are able, please consider pitching in $10, $25, or $50 today.**_](https://vote4margarita.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=daff3f9d4e72dc7794c68a0d7&id=e2009f7584&e=1f98559b5d)
| [DONATE TODAY](https://vote4margarita.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=daff3f9d4e72dc7794c68a0d7&id=19e89b52f3&e=1f98559b5d)
---
Thank you for placing your trust in me to fight for the future of California and our nation.
-Margarita Wilkinson

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Black women deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
I applaud the FDA’s new proposed rule.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72687570/436071277/-234467806?refcode=EM_F_231102FDA_N_SH_90DO_8_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2FiODM1MS1iODc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mwDwITMgqE5ZUWv6SFrfstMrz7k0TZd4OEs4xXbyS1o=) Peter, we just had a big win, and I wanted to fill you in.

This past March, Representative Pressley and I sent a letter to the United States Food and Drug Administration Commissioner, asking them to conduct a thorough and transparent investigation to determine whether publicly available chemical hair straightening products contain carcinogens that lead to a higher risk of uterine cancer.

A study by _The National Institutes of Health_ found that out of 33,497 women aged 35 to 74 who used hair straightening products more than four times in the previous year, **they were more than twice as likely to develop uterine cancer than nonusers.**

Black women use these products more, putting them at higher risk for cancer. It’s abhorrent that Black women and other consumers have to worry about standard cosmetic products threatening their health. So we jumped into action.

**And they listened.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72687571/436071278/-234467806?refcode=EM_F_231102FDA_N_SH_90DO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2FiODM1MS1iODc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mwDwITMgqE5ZUWv6SFrfstMrz7k0TZd4OEs4xXbyS1o=)** The FDA’s proposed rule would ban formaldehyde and chemicals that release formaldehyde, such as methylene glycol, as an ingredient in hair smoothing or straightening products.

On behalf of women across the country, especially Black women, I applaud the FDA’s new proposed rule. Americans deserve to know that basic everyday products like hair straighteners are safe. I look forward to working with my colleagues and the Administration to implement this proposed rule.

**Consumers, especially Black women, deserve BETTER. Even with all of the chaos in the House, I am still getting work done on behalf of the American people, and I will not stop fighting for our futures.[Will you join me by pitching in $5 or more today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72687572/436071279/-234467806?refcode=EM_F_231102FDA_N_SH_90DO_8_G_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2FiODM1MS1iODc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mwDwITMgqE5ZUWv6SFrfstMrz7k0TZd4OEs4xXbyS1o=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72687573/436071280/-234467806?refcode=EM_F_231102FDA_N_SH_90DO_8_G_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2FiODM1MS1iODc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mwDwITMgqE5ZUWv6SFrfstMrz7k0TZd4OEs4xXbyS1o=)**

|

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72687542/436071247/-1166922630?refcode=AU_TNDP_FR_GEN_GEN_NO_20231102_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGFiODM1MS1iODc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3o55sB7tVfXAwH2i63Li9cPH5-MYGgXx6oOe8ArS7bg=) Ensuring that voters have strong Democratic candidates to vote for in every race is a pretty tall task, Peter. And it’s the job of the state party to make sure we’re equipping Democrats in every community with the tools they need to be effective legislators. Peter, I’m excited to finally share this with you: **Today we’re launching our Run Tennessee Fund, which will support our six week candidate recruitment training this fall and next spring to ensure that every candidate, from the bottom to the top of the ticket, has what they need to run and****WIN. ** [**If we can raise an additional $20,000, we can support 11 more candidates across the state. name: Sean Feucht
subject: Absolutely Despicable
body:
According to Salon, we're worse than Hamas| | |
---
Dear Friend,
---
Last month, Hamas terrorists launched a sneak attack on Israel, murdering hundreds in cold blood and taking many more hostage. As of writing this, dozens of children are still being held hostage by Hamas terrorists. Despite this, Salon.com chose to publish an article so despicable it defies comprehension.

Titled, "MAGA and Christian nationalism: Bigger threat to America than
Hamas could ever be," it disgustingly mocks conservatives and Christians, while the death of a Hamas commander killed hiding in an area densely populated with civilians is mourned.
---
---
This kind of story is sadly not surprising, because the mainstream media hates us. They hate our Christianity, hate our beliefs, and will fight to demonize our values at every corner. It is more important than ever that we pray for our leaders, especially the new Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson, as his bold faith has made him a target of the left's anger. We must stand tall in the face of this hostility!
---
[**SUPPORT LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=41ed35dd2c7944c7b9a8a7160166aa8b&_e=qtsQifXGNOmmUG1BtuyVAVCmYnK5pLo2aiTx2NRtva_wVvq6JhcoqMK-VR8Ps20Vo3J2RVdNJlRodYkziXpUIrZl-chxVJF6OhJG8Fe1hrv3rqPhGfQTAaaV75JxASI120pMjlyANPn_y8vF5Cadlfp_58swX7Pbq_AtGmgd3hfaB4G5bZQ3jQpt4QPUCmeoXZsSrAFQ-DDRxQ4RFjKR7Ydc2tTpPjlwIDOStt1TwzwLIAguM9k8LSuCONrKA_iW0VFGutyuZKhoBO8docKNsHW9voHIWtudm9Cjuv95DQYz6SQBF_z0FiJgl0W5I3RB)

Till All Hear,
---
---
Sean

body:
We’re already working to ensure Democrats win in key Senate races across the country.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72687755/436072048/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTc3MGQwNi1iOTc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g9Y7zZ34Dl-EYLdPIAsYCzH-rUoLP0uGVzFG7b9zBws=&emci=eb487b4e-ae79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=15770d06-b979-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)

| | We're just TWO days away from the Race to Save the Senate, where I'll complete 67 laps on a track – one for every year of my life – to raise money to help save our Democratic Senate Majority. There are many tough races across the country we need to win to keep the Democratic Senate Majority in 2024 – **including defending our incredible incumbents in Montana, Ohio, Nevada, Wisconsin, and Pennsylvania.** Your grassroots power can help save the Senate by sponsoring a lap, a mile, or the whole race. Our candidates are putting in the time and hard work to get across the finish line, and we need to make sure they have all the resources they need. **_BREAKING NEWS:_ The Supreme Court heard a case that could END Social Security! **
Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. **And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.**
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — _that's 1 in every 5 Americans!_
Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. **But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. **
These extremists have already made it clear that they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.**We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us:**
**Should the Supreme Court Protect Social Security?**

clean_body: they could END Social Security?! | | | BREAKING NEWS: The Supreme Court heard a case that could END Social Security! Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation. Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — that's 1 in every 5 Americans! Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. These extremists have already made it clear that they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us: Should the Supreme Court Protect Social Security? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
I don’t want to take too much of your time — but I do want to say thank you.
This has been a people-powered campaign from the beginning. I know how critical your grassroots support is, and I never take it for granted.
The holiday season can make this a tough fundraising quarter, so we really needed a strong showing this October. Thanks to the generosity of folks like you, we exceeded our monthly goal.
We’re going to hit the ground running in 2024 — building a volunteer network, reaching out to voters, and spreading our message. We’ll have the momentum we need to unseat my opponent and turn AZ-06 blue.
Thank you so much, Peter.
Let’s build a better Arizona.
Kirsten

body:
3-term U.S. Senator Jack Danforth: Supporting Hawley was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life”
#
Peter — Josh Hawley’s support base started crumbling after his actions on January 6th. So before we ask you to **[add a donation of any amount toward our campaign to defeat him,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38845?refcode=em20231102-4114&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4114%2E614464%2EJHgrvv) please let us explain what happened:**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38845?refcode=em20231102-4114&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4114%2E614464%2EJHgrvv)**
**FIRST —** In 2018, Josh Hawley’s mentor — Missouri GOP icon, three-term U.S. Senator Jack Danforth — recruited him to run for U.S. Senate. Danforth even cleared the crowded field of Republican challengers in Hawley’s primary.
**THEN —** On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world that he’s a coward and a fraud by raising his fist then running for his life at the U.S. Capitol.
**NOW —** Danforth and a handful of Hawley’s other mentors + mega-donors are refusing to support his 2024 re-election campaign. **Danforth even said supporting Hawley was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”**
Meanwhile, Hawley’s approval rating is plummeting among Missouri voters and national GOP insiders are bailing him out while he struggles to fundraise.
**Republicans and Democrats across Missouri agree: Our state deserves better than a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley representing us in the U.S. Senate — and we’re ready to vote him out in 2024.**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38845?refcode=em20231102-4114&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4114%2E614464%2EJHgrvv)**
Now here’s why we need your help, Peter. Every dollar we raise gives us an opportunity to put Lucas and his message in front of Missouri voters between now and Election Day. And if we’re going to win this thing, we have to start off strong.
**So we’re asking:[Can you chip in $10 or just whatever you can today so we can put our message in front of Missouri voters and continue to hold Josh Hawley accountable for betraying the American people?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/38845?refcode=em20231102-4114&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4114%2E614464%2EJHgrvv)**

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: An update from DC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2311-q4-wn?refcode=231102-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2311-q4-wn?refcode=231102-email]Hi Peter – I wanted to make sure you were up-to-date on what’s going on in DC.
Republicans may have chosen a Speaker, but we still haven’t funded our government with a shutdown looming in fifteen days.
As the majority party, the GOP could fund the government if they tried to pass a continuing resolution that provides aid for Ukraine and Israel, funds social services, and allows the IRS to crack down on tax cheats.
But the GOP would rather hold that aid hostage and tie it to defunding the IRS. They want to withhold important funds for one of our closest allies because they want their wealthy friends to be able to avoid paying their taxes.
This is a gross political game that House Republicans are playing, but it’s nothing they haven’t shown us before. I remain committed to funding our government, providing assistance to our allies, and funding Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security. I remain committed to ensuring that billionaires pay their fair share in taxes.
I’ll continue fighting to fund our government in its entirety here in Washington, and I’ll continue to keep you updated along the way.
Thanks for standing with me,
Wiley

Peter,

New polling out this month shows that the race in Montana is heating up.

What we’re doing is working. Despite having declared my candidacy just four months ago, I’m already virtually tied AGAINST 18-YEAR incumbent Democrat Jon Tester.

In just a moment I’m going to ask you to **[donate $5](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=da948232080b40358fba6e2d012941e9&_e=Gpbnl5-QuHyODU9IkZZ0Zu2j_RIO8igMV7hw9BobCSf3SZ7NKe00s7Ix3w6HV2myoc6qEBkJQewsgjeOv64ETVBJ6IVn6N_zbIJ9EkNCXBccw_t0li3XPquesjTVPKfyyQVb6_KIm5x5JEgU4n6wkexE4yId0-3EELhRT4YLplNahmsauWdiJiWPSKODlSp60rRrzU9aI5JlYTIa-KpwWOqJV6g7xiYmMRVj-xpTSo-5DilKj3jtWUQU-GYngUKmG-P-Bf1OabnGJW9TG3fy6w6uedTl_tNqciXuJ_k1rnYJY51avBQheyBPsKLAVEjpI-bTb6Op-ME-clihQx7X5-iyZVVe00cthbYnPmnQ1ZtvgCOXScXYIKf5P3QLeVqVdBNKKpagLVtEGzE3cl0k9w%3D%3D)** to my campaign. I don’t like asking for donations, but it’s necessary to defeat Jon Tester and flip the Senate. Unfortunately for us, October was one of the most challenging months of the campaign for raising money from grassroots supporters. Unfortunately, we fell short of hitting our fundraising goal last month, so [**I’m writing to see if you’ll help me out with a generous donation right now.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=da948232080b40358fba6e2d012941e9&_e=Gpbnl5-QuHyODU9IkZZ0Zu2j_RIO8igMV7hw9BobCSf3SZ7NKe00s7Ix3w6HV2myoc6qEBkJQewsgjeOv64ETVBJ6IVn6N_zbIJ9EkNCXBccw_t0li3XPquesjTVPKfyyQVb6_KIm5x5JEgU4n6wkexE4yId0-3EELhRT4YLplNahmsauWdiJiWPSKODlSp60rRrzU9aI5JlYTIa-KpwWOqJV6g7xiYmMRVj-xpTSo-5DilKj3jtWUQU-GYngUKmwGVVVsT6LvRII4GrWV1vfM48T8P_5j9l2WaaMLYUXjzU4zYSN3OqZ8T0Z0xTh2_HMcbRxVSrJu0O7I_fmE7XKhq4lsmY3u5ZlTPZHyqgPx32MmRiEorGgAdbZWr8Jg8Z1Ex_34d0O6uQ6FOyQ_0O3Q%3D%3D)

[**CHIP IN $5**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=da948232080b40358fba6e2d012941e9&_e=Gpbnl5-QuHyODU9IkZZ0Zu2j_RIO8igMV7hw9BobCSf3SZ7NKe00s7Ix3w6HV2myoc6qEBkJQewsgjeOv64ETVBJ6IVn6N_zbIJ9EkNCXBccw_t0li3XPquesjTVPKfyyQVb6_KIm5x5JEgU4n6wkexE4yId0-3EELhRT4YLplNahmsauWdiJiWPSKODlSp60rRrzU9aI5JlYTIa-KpwWOqJV6g7xiYmMRVj-xpTSo-5DilKj3jtWUQU-GYngUKmGEIkQo3cjgaefG7nSqblb2DA4X3vnVzFCNXylMvLRqBlLyTJ9Am4E-dr96p9qY_kMsmLkCSTb4mW33kGoH3_BwM1l2Kk6g2uL9JzswzgZsLSo_zY4WCGF3FPA-jxUyL0qysRADuoWGSyERXxL59wMQ%3D%3D)
I know that my opponent sees our campaign as a threat to his political survival - just look at a few of the things he’s writing in his fundraising emails to get liberal donors to underwrite his campaign:

“ _**His campaign is already outspending us on the airwaves, and with our razor-thin Senate majority on the line, it’s critical that we regain our momentum NOW.**_ ” **The part Tester leaves out is that Democrat-aligned SUPER PACs have already spent more than $1.5 million to drag ME through the mud.**

[**DONATE TODAY** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=da948232080b40358fba6e2d012941e9&_e=Gpbnl5-QuHyODU9IkZZ0Zu2j_RIO8igMV7hw9BobCSf3SZ7NKe00s7Ix3w6HV2myoc6qEBkJQewsgjeOv64ETVBJ6IVn6N_zbIJ9EkNCXBccw_t0li3XPquesjTVPKfyyQVb6_KIm5x5JEgU4n6wkexE4yId0-3EELhRT4YLplNahmsauWdiJiWPSKODlSp60rRrzU9aI5JlYTIa-KpwWOqJV6g7xiYmMRVj-xpTSo-5DilKj3jtWUQU-GYngUKm7Z_KgJbROsbDDp6WvUERUEVq_b0RkSYxzN37SvuRJ2xsWhesSMuTy1gZ42AlLcYEQnAj_v2Z8mxCLanj3ZxDZVHaE3X4TAgwaNeoEE4zamYc8MzjObthjyD5nbjsVzpYis6w-Y0dq68LLrWagjNq9Q%3D%3D)

“ _**It’s no secret that this toss-up race is one of the GOP’s best chances to flip a Senate seat red, and it’ll come down to voter turnout.**_ ” **Tester seems to realize that my candidacy has put this race at the top of many - if not most - lists of seats to flip parties.**

**Tester knows he’s in trouble.**

**Washington Democrats know Tester is in trouble.**

Polling shows I can win this seat and help save our country. **[Will that be enough to get you involved with my race today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=da948232080b40358fba6e2d012941e9&_e=Gpbnl5-QuHyODU9IkZZ0Zu2j_RIO8igMV7hw9BobCSf3SZ7NKe00s7Ix3w6HV2myoc6qEBkJQewsgjeOv64ETVBJ6IVn6N_zbIJ9EkNCXBccw_t0li3XPquesjTVPKfyyQVb6_KIm5x5JEgU4n6wkexE4yId0-3EELhRT4YLplNahmsauWdiJiWPSKODlSp60rRrzU9aI5JlYTIa-KpwWOqJV6g7xiYmMRVj-xpTSo-5DilKj3jtWUQU-GYngUKmK8bvC_N18s89dI1ckAX5tb1ibQG5NH8gkxNy3_1AYNTUxLStDbtBiLBsHgML5QOyTXdDH9RJuAGUf_aA4tq_IJQJc5eooFitJVfku4lVfOm5g-hQ1ZpMuWhhJdroFx5PSDFghlbrdXWGi1bobzVewQ%3D%3D)**

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

* * *

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=da948232080b40358fba6e2d012941e9&_e=Gpbnl5-QuHyODU9IkZZ0ZlwY26aijKVE3U7vpI2hXwanP-4NHhE705pcIYoaqqKPhb-BnQLreSEK9UQqnyPE9xJ3N8NxT2NMJ1O8e-juhptmWX4Y1CM4w7qVCBjp3DQkfZamw3CnlaSQxbVGDXWr1-AnXugggeLUN4muzQdaFdvqpdOGSuIEqGpu--8XZXmKMsydBYTiJBZst_4-Rwl4dg%3D%3D) [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=da948232080b40358fba6e2d012941e9&_e=Gpbnl5-QuHyODU9IkZZ0ZnIvLsQIXA_Ktc11ssh_07yDHs6f_gTEKoWvHv7bFsK7Zu3Q2sTucSvTdZukLx6XXt5aSM9p8cAvd4bc6HG40X3cjocxKZeorhraKdPvIy7IyASwJ10-fo58-mbV1BhiI5Bem3HzfoHGJbZ-enoafaVLKWsefYtSpSqLskuMy0SiM94tCo7zYG6Ottfi-2QS4w%3D%3D) [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=da948232080b40358fba6e2d012941e9&_e=Gpbnl5-QuHyODU9IkZZ0ZlzqBui3FyYnyCd-aiGtSR3LgNrq9UQ6azNJgODx-e86SfpZz6461_XtP0n4rOmidYMOAISurSw-RKnGdUvXfzSvLCtzXJxVl9wqTtoCypHSJwpE7Lz_sbpZar8YV0JkcbUCCdc2jTyPh-c_oeKAngkc9vFQukjI77Pv3-J-iOL8E92Lp_IL6FoesFQAIcAkvcUGJQRixVh7rjr4zgALkwo%3D)

name: Piper Perabo
subject: Reminder: Get Out The Vote Rally for Christine Clarke tonight at 7 pm ET
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I hope you can join me, Christine and Jane Fonda tonight at 7pm to learn more about her campaign.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72688611/436074858/-453105098?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231102-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyZTQ5M2Q0LWJhNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Qmq_46XF1UiNC8V8fdj99enXBP-rSmkM8frjc8k9MH4=)
---
Hi!

Piper Perabo here!

I just wanted to make sure you saw Christine’s message from earlier this week about tonight’s Get Out The Vote Rally for Christine Clarke’s campaign for New Jersey State Senate.

New Jersey is near & dear to my heart, and I think it’s long past due that we elect candidates like Christine to the State Senate.

People use the term “Climate Champion” a lot these days, but when it comes to Christine, I can’t think of a better way to describe her. Climate progress isn’t just another blurb on her campaign website, it’s at the core of her campaign and the reason she decided to run for office in the first place.

I hope you can join me, Christine and Jane Fonda tonight at 7pm to learn more about her campaign and how you can help make sure we elect someone who will make climate progress a top priority when she’s elected on November 7.

Sign up here: [_**New Jersey Virtual Rally**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72688612/436074859/-453105098?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231102-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyZTQ5M2Q0LWJhNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Qmq_46XF1UiNC8V8fdj99enXBP-rSmkM8frjc8k9MH4=)
* * *
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72688613/436074860/-453105098?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231102-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyZTQ5M2Q0LWJhNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Qmq_46XF1UiNC8V8fdj99enXBP-rSmkM8frjc8k9MH4=)
Hello friends in activism!

As someone who declared a run for state office because of climate change, I can’t tell you how overjoyed I am that Jane Fonda not only created the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to elect climate activists to government seats, but chose my campaign to support! [_**In a hurry? Click here to sign up for our virtual rally on Thursday at 7pm ET or make a contribution.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72688614/436074861/-453105098?refcode=BLU-JANE-20231102-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgyZTQ5M2Q0LWJhNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Qmq_46XF1UiNC8V8fdj99enXBP-rSmkM8frjc8k9MH4=)

When I ran for office for the first time in a district that pundits had written off as having ‘no chance’ at a fair outcome, I knew my platform at that time was a point of advocacy. For years, I had been a volunteer who marched, spoke out, testified, and later organized, coordinated and led free public forums about climate change. I knew if I ran for office, I could make the local press pay attention to the myriad impacts of climate change on our daily lives. We discussed everything from more intense storms, to longer warmer seasons creating harmful algal blooms in reservoirs, to food prices and nutritional impacts, to flooding and the prospect of uninsurable properties, and more. We helped normalize climate talk in campaigns out here.

Fast forward to now: we have a new competitive district and my opponent, the newly named Senate GOP leader, has an odious record on climate work. He votes no on everything ‘climate,’ and has a very well-deserved “F” from Climate Cabinet. We are currently winning in early voting and need to keep the momentum going!

Let’s talk about it: Join Jane Fonda, Piper Perabo and me this Thursday, November 2 at 7 p.m. ET during our Virtual Rally. We’ll discuss why this election is so pivotal to meeting our long-term goals. Join us! (And by the way, I literally squealed when I found out about this. Fangirling hard.)

clean_body: I hope you can join me, Christine and Jane Fonda tonight at 7pm to learn more about her campaign. | = Hi! Piper Perabo here! I just wanted to make sure you saw Christine’s message from earlier this week about tonight’s Get Out The Vote Rally for Christine Clarke’s campaign for New Jersey State Senate. New Jersey is near & dear to my heart, and I think it’s long past due that we elect candidates like Christine to the State Senate. People use the term “Climate Champion” a lot these days, but when it comes to Christine, I can’t think of a better way to describe her. Climate progress isn’t just another blurb on her campaign website, it’s at the core of her campaign and the reason she decided to run for office in the first place. I hope you can join me, Christine and Jane Fonda tonight at 7pm to learn more about her campaign and how you can help make sure we elect someone who will make climate progress a top priority when she’s elected on November 7. Sign up here: = = Hello friends in activism! As someone who declared a run for state office because of climate change, I can’t tell you how overjoyed I am that Jane Fonda not only created the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to elect climate activists to government seats, but chose my campaign to support! = When I ran for office for the first time in a district that pundits had written off as having ‘no chance’ at a fair outcome, I knew my platform at that time was a point of advocacy. For years, I had been a volunteer who marched, spoke out, testified, and later organized, coordinated and led free public forums about climate change. I knew if I ran for office, I could make the local press pay attention to the myriad impacts of climate change on our daily lives. We discussed everything from more intense storms, to longer warmer seasons creating harmful algal blooms in reservoirs, to food prices and nutritional impacts, to flooding and the prospect of uninsurable properties, and more. We helped normalize climate talk in campaigns out here. Fast forward to now: we have a new competitive district and my opponent, the newly named Senate GOP leader, has an odious record on climate work. He votes no on everything ‘climate,’ and has a very well-deserved “F” from Climate Cabinet. We are currently winning in early voting and need to keep the momentum going! Let’s talk about it: Join Jane Fonda, Piper Perabo and me this Thursday, November 2 at 7 p.m. ET during our Virtual Rally. We’ll discuss why this election is so pivotal to meeting our long-term goals. Join us! (And by the way, I literally squealed when I found out about this. Fangirling hard.) | = Jane Fonda is a hero to climate activists like me. Her work raising awareness and action around the country is heartening and gives so many of us the hope that we are heard, we are working together and our ambitions are being met with action everywhere, not just in our localities. We climate candidates NEED the kind of support the Jane Fonda Climate PAC brings to our races, and we are so grateful for you being part of the journey for a better future for our families. Let’s win together! | = I hope to see you there! In solidarity and gratitude, Christine Clarke | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. The GOP only needs to win **six** more state legislatures to call a Constitutional Convention and make this happen. And because BOTH CHAMBERS of the Virginia General Assembly are up for grabs on November 7, _Republicans have the opportunity to drop that number to five_.

**That's why EMILYs List is laser-focused on electing Democratic pro-choice women at the state level — but we need your help. If Republicans succeed, the consequences for women, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and so many others could be catastrophic. And that's exactly why we have to step up this cycle, Peter — not just for the big-ticket races, but also for our fearless candidates in places like Virginia, who can stop this anti-choice power grab at the state and local level.

We've already made incredible progress on this front: last year, we flipped _four_ state chambers from red to blue and secured _two_ new Democratic trifectas, controlling the state House, Senate, and governorship in Michigan and Minnesota. We can repeat this success in 2024 if we do what we did last cycle: invest in key races _now_.

**We can't let the GOP get their hands on our Constitution. Donate now to help Democratic pro-choice women STOP this GOP scheme to ban abortion:**

That's why EMILYs List is laser-focused on electing Democratic pro-choice women at the state level — but we need your help. Can you donate today to help women win in Virginia and beyond? If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If Republicans succeed, the consequences for women, people of color, the LGBTQ+ community, and so many others could be catastrophic. | | Next Tuesday, Georgians will cast the final ballots in the 2023 municipal elections that will determine local policies all across the state.

These are critical elections, and we need to ensure that strong Democrats are turning out to vote. **That’s why we’re launching our GOTV push one day earlier than normal!

We have two requests for you:**

**First of all:** [**_Sign up for one phonebanking shift to reach voters across Georgia to make sure they have a plan to vote._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72688641/436075029/-1560350688?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjUxMGUwZi1iYjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qG-eQgPKvI8UA3dxGLKaZAFdglWwzfzZvLbG9yHZPvU=&emci=3f59ec86-ba79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=a2510e0f-bb79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

**Then:** [**_Pitch in $5 to help us fund our voter outreach and protection teams. We need to ensure our field team and voter protection team have everything they need to ensure Georgia voters are getting the information they need._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72688643/436075043/710125701?refcode=20231102.1_GAEU_11B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjUxMGUwZi1iYjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qG-eQgPKvI8UA3dxGLKaZAFdglWwzfzZvLbG9yHZPvU=)

We’re pushing hard over the next five days, and we could really use your help.

Will you step up and help us out in these final days?

– GA Dems

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=01bbff4aad004d918da8e7621e513147&_e=3yDEkzAY4WjUIOVOmHL2ncyXntkm6h80w2hUE17vJhexTUoC_BszGuDgerDOZ3xEblz4dWHZ5IgZDzXCRHt7rvgMdkUNMKT5t_g04PeFpRjw2B6s-KmR-WxMa5LW9h7aAKNHnEpreQxbTNLt9vYTC-hK1NGd0KE53krqctIj7t_J4a8vVQ3zLtOU0dI5XBXDbhteXjMatCFJm3een4kSy4CWfqNiuMB0V06bkTe_PIH8t4x-Qecr1hPOoLzw8KaCwFB3LZnMYI9S2T3mxnH-YIKepzvjFp2qVyMZEoQ4wHynX6oN9ouD-BALs_ynh0DFEVckScEVTrhe-pX-xRrksuBSyqfB-j4PWtywdvhJEoDy6MvwzKLMkgSdrI9DZvrUW8SxSGrW8wVNlerpqfO62g%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=01bbff4aad004d918da8e7621e513147&_e=3yDEkzAY4WjUIOVOmHL2ncyXntkm6h80w2hUE17vJhexTUoC_BszGuDgerDOZ3xEblz4dWHZ5IgZDzXCRHt7rvgMdkUNMKT5t_g04PeFpRjw2B6s-KmR-WxMa5LW9h7aAKNHnEpreQxbTNLt9vYTC-hK1NGd0KE53krqctIj7t_J4a8vVQ3zLtOU0dI5XBXDbhteXjMatCFJm3een4kSy4CWfqNiuMB0V06bkTe_PIH8t4x-Qecr1hPOoLzw8KaCN7fU049uvIU6SoAGM7EMuTxeNHAU2PR7LfJxQqEbNRaVNJcnCVfZAN6nT_RQ-8w1A-E9Uun3pkTIBwoohhnpAjqG3Z9u1XqNWr7jybiDPwZKQAhyNycWQBDa9iPELqmxCBb0ros0awngudMJzzePjw%3D%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=01bbff4aad004d918da8e7621e513147&_e=3yDEkzAY4WjUIOVOmHL2ncyXntkm6h80w2hUE17vJhexTUoC_BszGuDgerDOZ3xEblz4dWHZ5IgZDzXCRHt7rvgMdkUNMKT5t_g04PeFpRjw2B6s-KmR-WxMa5LW9h7aAKNHnEpreQxbTNLt9vYTC-hK1NGd0KE53krqctIj7t_J4a8vVQ3zLtOU0dI5XBXDbhteXjMatCFJm3een4kSy4CWfqNiuMB0V06bkTe_PIH8t4x-Qecr1hPOoLzw8KaCmorWJdnJs-qBUkouqSWREDygTP8n3B-Go0z9Uzl-vV_TU27Yz4tWNwtPh2Z56CyO50xdt32UuzNib9pLw9yQnE6hewTCHTZ7otTtHWiOnDaYHoE1E8OwaPzI0s3aulowTJQmBr7BrEOsLiGP3igtrA%3D%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. body:
# [#]I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your support this past month. Having you on the team has meant the world to me — truly.

Early investments and grassroots support allow me to continue fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions. Let’s keep this momentum going so I can hold my seat in 2024 — we’re only just beginning!

Grateful to have you by my side,

Josh

P.S. If you want to help us get November off to a strong start, consider chipping in today by clicking here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2311?amount=]

I hope you’ll read my message below and [**make a contribution to the Arizona Democratic Party before the week is over.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72690174/436080548/635347067?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231102_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjgxYzRhMDEtYzA3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bg2rv9UXXqlXQItquAfpmX7h80TrK4xZnTplHlUG2yU=) Now, more than ever, we need unified leadership and gun safety champions at every level of government fighting for common sense measures that will help save lives. Last year’s gun safety majority in Congress was able to make generational progress by passing the most expansive federal gun safety bill in the last 30 years. The progress we’ve made is outstanding, but you and I both know that we still have so much more work to do. We have to pass commonsense gun safety legislation, and we need leaders who will stand up to the gun lobby and their fundraising machine to save lives from gun violence. [**If we can flip even one more seat in Arizona blue, we’ll have a chance to bring back our House gun safety majority next November. clean_body: | = = Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords. I hope you’ll read my message below and = Now, more than ever, we need unified leadership and gun safety champions at every level of government fighting for common sense measures that will help save lives. Last year’s gun safety majority in Congress was able to make generational progress by passing the most expansive federal gun safety bill in the last 30 years. The progress we’ve made is outstanding, but you and I both know that we still have so much more work to do. We have to pass commonsense gun safety legislation, and we need leaders who will stand up to the gun lobby and their fundraising machine to save lives from gun violence. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = So much is on the line next November, and while it may feel far away, Election Day 2024 will be here before we know it. The work we do in the days, weeks, and months ahead will make the difference. Your support now is how we win back a gun safety majority in the House and protect our gun safety majority in the Senate. Thank you for your time, friend. Gabby Giffords Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | Paid for by Arizona Democrats

name: Abortion Alert @ HER Time
subject: Less than a week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72690604/436081487/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231102_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGU3YzZmZTAtYzA3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5qrNs22L7Yt2QKBIW54dy-CJnTMpDgS3mi0plcm2l2U=)
---
Peter, Abortion is on the ballot next week in Virginia. Republican Governor Glenn Youngkin tried — and failed — to ban abortion after 15 weeks in the state, but couldn’t get it through a Democratic-controlled Senate. Now, he’s vowed to try again if Republicans take back the state legislature in just a few weeks. Republicans are going all out to win in Virginia, even initiating a cyber attack against Susanna Gibson meant to shame and humiliate her by publicizing intimate details of her private life — not at all dissimilar from what happened to Katie. The 2023 elections promise to be a bellwether for 2024, and show whether reproductive rights still hold the political weight needed to flip elections for Democrats. We’re hoping to prove to Republicans and the rest of the country that we have what it takes to win big next year. Now, he’s vowed to try again if Republicans take back the state legislature in just a few weeks. Republicans are going all out to win in Virginia, even initiating a cyber attack against Susanna Gibson meant to shame and humiliate her by publicizing intimate details of her private life — not at all dissimilar from what happened to Katie. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Stopping for a moment to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It is no secret that my life has changed drastically in the last seven days. |
---
Fellow American - it is no secret that my life has changed drastically in the last seven days.

I am running on little sleep and late nights, but it is all worth it because I know we are working for a shared goal: to preserve freedom in this great country.

Among all the chaos, I have truly been blown away by the outpouring support from conservatives across the country, and **I want to take a moment to offer my sincere gratitude.**

**Thank you for the opportunity to serve.**

**_Thank you for the chance to lead._**

We are stronger as a team. I know we have a long road ahead of us, to get this country back on track, **but I am bullish about the future of America.**

Thank you for supporting me on this path.

God bless,
Speaker Mike Johnson

PS – Democrats are already coming at me with force. If we want to expand our majority in 2024 and get this country back on track, [**I need your help. Would you consider donating to the cause today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=de325be58fc74ada92d6189c816e7b4c&_e=Y0vPA1YukgKvScpZWEra3lJof-YKZsePVssFMx-yHnxpMUj6VQ0OnlUIFx-EdHG-a67_QVndUFRhL13tTBmH7Fz3nFgS-cMvrbEwqhJmqJqDGOovYtGrTu9BeR3Ihz1ty3z4lpemNvWMytMlyKznumqDDn8Qxw2TDnq9eFWsM8XImWALWECcBquaQqd7M6vG4X48OBWhDcdRwJWLOAMqyzjrO3eGgJ9q0YH-Afc9cvhiMPZgTr66RakZA5Yd8o1dBzYP3QXznHVuofg312c-Shuu8YETEctYyX96BZbrUPbmp-6rmri-6a-0ZgHvOZd_8KiRaRTfo6VLspbyklDBD9cXZL4BGmlRG4FahgtgnzaYQclFKPWHvzgAOWx0qB83rXIoqAtVKNYaCQkvCcI25A%3D%3D)

name: John Padora
subject: Dia de los Muertos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a6420d0756cd4769a12f49b5c44d12d6&_e=icLqBCwOARXT1_D56U8fCPvlQPE-yzKw0qXqtl5NpuAQFV62gjyq9aCPepA3ltq_SaGyWupl9jtzD9svjjYda59Fx-TUTLZj3jn4pkSkaib68_zaZ8DYIq2-zF2V7lDXCIEGPtMpzEkPsYCnUKqkDOQU8Be3rmyNS8Wb3PwqxKOuJgcMS2kLuxgBnLW8mQs-44zyZJGnvx1KwAiL4JNhgnWgXNl7fopjVDo-tcmTpn87cnmINe0TLKvuIIhbzCBZqZrse26WvG3QJpUZGeJqqgDkvFL20jrsJR6rnLUiAd1jBgcRI2O2jaHNYZeYBqtXScDPXrgREbohwjfbU5zAZhggzg32NMFfRYFS6o-667nnl8aDEcNykVhjOtd5IMww923GBBCyniPGihppI7Vs1w%3D%3D) Folks, It's Dia de los Muertos, and I wanted to take a moment to celebrate this beautiful tradition. Colorado's connection to Hispanic heritage runs deep, and this year, communities throughout Colorado have planned events in honor to honor this celebration - I hope you’re able to participate! Dia de los Muertos, the Day of the Dead, is a time to honor and remember our loved ones who have passed on. It's a celebration of their lives, a reflection on the impact they've had, and a reminder that their spirits live on in our hearts and memories. This tradition teaches us the value of unity and community. And as times have become even more challenging and frightening in the past month, it's crucial that we come together, support one another, and build a stronger, more inclusive future for folks in the Fourth District. That’s the kind of campaign I’m running and it’s the kind of representative I intend to be. So I hope you’ll join me in celebrating Dia de los Muertos and celebrating the unity that makes this campaign so powerful. Thank you for being a part of this journey. Sincerely, John Padora **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. [**Join me.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a6420d0756cd4769a12f49b5c44d12d6&_e=icLqBCwOARXT1_D56U8fCEE3vEhdolRseC-Xg1KQ0bShph0aF2Lnik2ml4MQtY41BIh88jJY3VYqMLew8YovAPbR6hBrmp14g_BHwGf6K4UJrvwX0IEzAGN0owE-y5FSxmqqwP_-KH40GcM1EYzGsvVTIwoAJB9nNICrRn7u4_jDbaDikp5kzv9ZQ-G8ptw49Ui-mi3Km9KX4tQZAvF5QA%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=a6420d0756cd4769a12f49b5c44d12d6&_e=icLqBCwOARXT1_D56U8fCPvlQPE-yzKw0qXqtl5NpuAQFV62gjyq9aCPepA3ltq_SaGyWupl9jtzD9svjjYda59Fx-TUTLZj3jn4pkSkaib68_zaZ8DYIq2-zF2V7lDXCIEGPtMpzEkPsYCnUKqkDOQU8Be3rmyNS8Wb3PwqxKOuJgcMS2kLuxgBnLW8mQs-44zyZJGnvx1KwAiL4JNhgnWgXNl7fopjVDo-tcmTpn83M-mypAkQQJRIDDWWQFxwj0hU6kyVWDNm_uVYKZQu-Ed1XKFxMx2iZcftIp2iGM3ur0Gn7-Vo2BNwS8VxrlrTF-fKhY_KbIcCLsak_Bo_uoLjAk-JfniIllyMyLx9u44gKprvNDiLha4VFFUSB7GIZwY3eqoDdR8BDUvQMRhbH6W0livvlJTztBR8tEBXJm0%3D) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
As Crooked Joe tries to remove President Trump’s name from the ballot... | | | Patriot,

---
A TRIAL is currently taking place to try and REMOVE President Trump’s name from the BALLOT and hand the 2024 election to Crooked Joe Biden.
---
**That’s why President Trump is asking as**** _many voters as possible_****to** _**pledge**_**to cast their 2024 ballot for TRUMP.**

---
_But, as we’ve reviewed the list of pledged ballots and checked our own database of Trump Supporters, we saw that you hadn’t pledged to cast your ballot yet.
_
---

name: Rep. Bryan Steil
subject: Another ad attacking me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC
body:
National Democrats are attacking me for supporting Mike Johnson...
| [](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=b21f66ec8fdb4de3b615c25b373ae882&_e=5Ke_oZ_aWMUYC3QaVq_ridntr4sRvhVtuuR_bI7Xdb86CwFnWXuwzF0UdRdqF0fSdyD8Ze1S3JEh1T1HbisY9BXEInJoAUgqwALZeHXEA38-2Cvb2rZpHFxym3SGl8eymuvpA6LIDrwl7BYNVY43mnasxKQ7TWXWrhZbsoq2PayEP8GyaT8OA5iH0JURwB5wjmm9rWWlO-xBMHbwnPnldu4F787My7Jg_L8BNsQlFqRYDW50C4Rk3Q0WBS97XEdJ-aCLUnhRKPLx_I-xEpt8QVUjXJwIDRbzaoPx_vs6C5Ug8G1x3OihAMhyCHYaKqW2w9MgmvFSIIpmHwZhIrszBl-5sjaWDEpjSB8hzjk8pnmPHcaS6UYRgeV1u0ELd6lSTkqLAr7hv02in3EryW-zXxChw8Y5qB9sDRtrZ1-Fy0--uQXIZEB9wJKG6SmqMViKFLYVpsN1OYG0gDxsFmHGhX1XiPFIk7s6y6o4ajDB_-Y%3D)
---
Friend,
---
Mike Johnson is a principled conservative. He’s committed to defending American liberty, reducing out-of-control spending, and securing the border.
---
I was proud to support him for Speaker of the House.
---
House Republicans are united behind Speaker Johnson and eager to begin enacting policies that will help hard-working Americans.
---
But Democrats fear a unified Republican Conference standing behind a principled conservative. They know our ideas are popular with the American people.
---
That’s why they’re attacking me for supporting Speaker Johnson.
---
Dark money groups have already spent $1.2 million in attack ads against me this year. Now, they’re spending thousands of dollars attacking me for supporting Speaker Johnson.
---
[](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=b21f66ec8fdb4de3b615c25b373ae882&_e=5Ke_oZ_aWMUYC3QaVq_ridntr4sRvhVtuuR_bI7Xdb86CwFnWXuwzF0UdRdqF0fSdyD8Ze1S3JEh1T1HbisY9BXEInJoAUgqwALZeHXEA38-2Cvb2rZpHFxym3SGl8eymuvpA6LIDrwl7BYNVY43mnasxKQ7TWXWrhZbsoq2PayEP8GyaT8OA5iH0JURwB5wjmm9rWWlO-xBMHbwnPnldu4F787My7Jg_L8BNsQlFqRYDW50C4Rk3Q0WBS97XEdJ-aCLUnhRKPLx_I-xEpt8QVUjXJwIDRbzaoPx_vs6C5Ug8G1x3OihAMhyCHYaKqW2w9MgmvFSIIpmHwZhIrszBqxPMiytfnGnpFoB03neiPEoxU_5_9UStTRFvYllM53YItvItwfVaODZxk-ELAfumLIw-6585CbZhV9R4w5G8ZVwVani80Ct2u4xP1ODQu4IPtamd1MpV3n1tUYAOYljIB9E-Q6xhBPr9kFjUsGGcas%3D)
---
Mike Johnson is not an extremist. He’s a principled conservative who attends church and believes in limited government.
---
But this is what National Democrats consider “extreme.”
---
House Republicans currently have a 4-seat majority. It’s one of the smallest majorities in American history.
---
If we want to keep our majority in 2024, we must win Wisconsin’s First Congressional District.
---
I need your help to fight back.
---
**[So please contribute to help me push back against the recent attacks against me coming from National Democrats.](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=b21f66ec8fdb4de3b615c25b373ae882&_e=5Ke_oZ_aWMUYC3QaVq_ridntr4sRvhVtuuR_bI7Xdb86CwFnWXuwzF0UdRdqF0fSdyD8Ze1S3JEh1T1HbisY9BXEInJoAUgqwALZeHXEA38-2Cvb2rZpHFxym3SGl8eymuvpA6LIDrwl7BYNVY43mnasxKQ7TWXWrhZbsoq2PayEP8GyaT8OA5iH0JURwB5wjmm9rWWlO-xBMHbwnPnldu4F787My7Jg_L8BNsQlFqRYDW50C4Rk3Q0WBS97XEdJ-aCLUnhRKPLx_I-xEpt8QVUjXJwIDRbzaoPx_vs6C5Ug8G1x3OihAMhyCHYaKqW2w9MgmvFSIIpmHwZhIrszBjNcmI-l-Eteb1N5PMMb0U71eo5tUyhgCB2JVbF2C5TKFAFRo_nWgx_Sxus92osZ0CwyOeLQJmP9_hkCjxApQw9oXEMXhevwuxk7j6UMbkurPaUFbUcEt5-dUjeGhW-znOBJtRKW35KZgCDXB9GiQgY%3D)**

clean_body: National Democrats are attacking me for supporting Mike Johnson... | Friend, Mike Johnson is a principled conservative. He’s committed to defending American liberty, reducing out-of-control spending, and securing the border. I was proud to support him for Speaker of the House. House Republicans are united behind Speaker Johnson and eager to begin enacting policies that will help hard-working Americans. But Democrats fear a unified Republican Conference standing behind a principled conservative. They know our ideas are popular with the American people. That’s why they’re attacking me for supporting Speaker Johnson. Dark money groups have already spent $1.2 million in attack ads against me this year. Now, they’re spending thousands of dollars attacking me for supporting Speaker Johnson. Mike Johnson is not an extremist. He’s a principled conservative who attends church and believes in limited government. But this is what National Democrats consider “extreme.” House Republicans currently have a 4-seat majority. It’s one of the smallest majorities in American history. If we want to keep our majority in 2024, we must win Wisconsin’s First Congressional District. I need your help to fight back. Thank you, Rep. Bryan Steil PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN INC 1818 MILTON AVE. #1448 JANESVILLE, WI 53545
