clean_body: | | | | | Hi Peter, Next week on Tuesday, November 7th, the general election will be held! For our supporters who may still be deciding who to vote for, we wanted to feature some of the candidates who have our endorsement! Freedom Virginia is proud to endorse these Senate candidates: | | | Incumbent Senator Monty Mason is running for re-election in the 24th district. Senator Mason has made it clear that he will continue to fight for investments in education, common sense gun reform, and expansion to healthcare access when he is re-elected. Former Delegate Lashrecse Aird is running for Senate in the 13th district. As Delegate Lashrecse fought for legislation like Breonna’s Law, and in the Senate she plans to continue her work in education, healthcare, and housing. Clint Jenkins is running for Senate in the 17th district. Clint served in the House of Delegates from 2020 to 2023, and will continue to advocate for the right to choose and affordable healthcare when he is elected to the Senate. Russet Perry is running for Senate in the 31st district. In the Senate, Russet is determined to protect women’s rights, expand access to healthcare, and guarantee the criminal justice system treats all parties equally and with fairness. Danica Roem is running for Senate in the 30th district. Since 2018 in the House of Delegates, Danica has served as a Delegate since 2018 and will continue to improve the education system, the transportation system, and the healthcare system in the Senate. Current Senator Aaron Rouse is running to represent the 22nd Senate district. Aaron plans to continue the work he began with economic advancement, affordable healthcare, and improvements to public education when he is re-elected to the Senate. Schuyler VanValkenburg is running for Senate in the 16th district. Schuyler has served as a Delegate since 2018, and when he is elected to the Senate, he will continue to fight for Virginia public schools, access to healthcare, and worker protections. Joel Griffin is an entrepreneur, investor, and restaurateur with 20 years of experience in government contracting. With his background as a community leader and business owner, Joel is well-prepared to make an immediate impact for workers and employers across Virginia. | | For a full list of our endorsed candidates you can visit our website at | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc. Freedom Virginia PO Box 10102 Norfolk, VA 23513 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2fb126a47cfe47b5bf6b138054c736c0&_e=04A1tm7AcX70eIqXH7h4gQfPHEKkaizxGbhYEwb2QqQTWyuL7_RLhRt42HpoOqSMF07VegBVnZoRYL1FiM7fiE9JFJu9bVLYqSW78dXO4kwOaE0aO6T5zd1FuukSXsA5AXc94uv0LJzmnjzQOsiK70idDZkfKvagoggRBZdZHfDpSuqeBvq6ezUNQ_K3mZEPnWoKiVER6YiU994Zh-Rxuar6Ecq0tDfF9rZVvGIheoOYZr3j85dlupofJn1CY7TPO9lvydZLjFoVeQ2hkaX7DjicoxFyV-VLemh6NIqC_mwo76NPBzR0XvisKuMdZkJyns6_giZ-dBtoIL__mXAMuDEysWUimtbf87FKD3aTqGpGLjN9CNCzj6CpKx928GHHvbVO6_N4k1pojqU372yGow%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2fb126a47cfe47b5bf6b138054c736c0&_e=04A1tm7AcX70eIqXH7h4gQfPHEKkaizxGbhYEwb2QqQTWyuL7_RLhRt42HpoOqSMF07VegBVnZoRYL1FiM7fiE9JFJu9bVLYqSW78dXO4kwOaE0aO6T5zd1FuukSXsA5AXc94uv0LJzmnjzQOsiK70idDZkfKvagoggRBZdZHfDpSuqeBvq6ezUNQ_K3mZEPnWoKiVER6YiU994Zh-Rxuar6Ecq0tDfF9rZVvGIheoOYZr3j85dlupofJn1CY7TPKzRhhk9NoWcClccxQkqsDEgcEfucpTuiooPty2DdK2b6yqDVoMLYEUoRWrbSJ5D41ZQQl_tL2s8OWyKUHcQO4N-3fi0pc3dJAQOa01IGLx1PMNmf2ImZYD78E5Y7z4P2OtHKoVjtxucY3krME9cNbg%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

name: LoseCruzPAC.com
subject: “Unwoke”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOSE CRUZ PAC
body:
# [](https://act.losecruzpac.com/go/128?t=1&akid=131%2E623276%2EjQodnW)
A couple of months ago, we told you Ted Cruz started a podcast. (we know 🙄) Whether it’s tweeting aimlessly all day or making the rounds on conservative media, Ted is always finding new ways to **avoid his responsibilities as a U.S. senator** that don’t involve hiding in an expensive podcast studio or jetting off to Cancun.
**Enter Ted's new book:** _Unwoke_. And by the looks of it, Ted is really proud of himself.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231102?refcode=em20231102&amount=5&refcode2=131_623276_jQodnW&akid=131%2E623276%2EjQodnW)
When our team found out about this book, this was our reaction:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231102?refcode=em20231102&amount=5&refcode2=131_623276_jQodnW&akid=131%2E623276%2EjQodnW)
Before we explain more about Ted’s book, **[can you chip in $5 today to help us take Ted down next November?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231102?refcode=em20231102&amount=5&refcode2=131_623276_jQodnW&akid=131%2E623276%2EjQodnW)**
While the book’s release date has been timed to coincide with Election Day next week, we haven’t read it (and don’t plan to) but we can draw a few conclusions:
* Given all of the things we’ve heard on his podcast (in addition to all of his horrendous political takes as a Senator for the past decade), we expect this book to be much of the same.
* It’s abundantly clear to us Ted will do _**literally anything and everything except his actual job.**_
* Ted’s more interested in promoting his brand, rather than representing the people of Texas.

**Texans deserve better.** That’s why we’re hard at work every day — building a grassroots movement from the ground up that can Lose Cruz in 2024.
If Ted Cruz wants to spend his days writing and recording sh*tty books and podcasts, there’s nothing wrong with that! In fact, we’d like to help him out and send him into early retirement. But to do this, we’ll need your support if we’re going to be successful.
**[So what do you say? If you want to elect a senator who will actually do their job, will you pitch in $5 or whatever makes sense for you today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-lc-20231102?refcode=em20231102&amount=5&refcode2=131_623276_jQodnW&akid=131%2E623276%2EjQodnW)**

clean_body: A couple of months ago, we told you Ted Cruz started a podcast. (we know 🙄) Whether it’s tweeting aimlessly all day or making the rounds on conservative media, Ted is always finding new ways to avoid his responsibilities as a U.S. senator that don’t involve hiding in an expensive podcast studio or jetting off to Cancun. Enter Ted's new book: Unwoke. And by the looks of it, Ted is really proud of himself. When our team found out about this book, this was our reaction: Before we explain more about Ted’s book, While the book’s release date has been timed to coincide with Election Day next week, we haven’t read it (and don’t plan to) but we can draw a few conclusions: Given all of the things we’ve heard on his podcast (in addition to all of his horrendous political takes as a Senator for the past decade), we expect this book to be much of the same. It’s abundantly clear to us Ted will do literally anything and everything except his actual job. Ted’s more interested in promoting his brand, rather than representing the people of Texas. name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: David McCormick doesn’t know Pennsylvania like Bob does
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1045%2E552475%2EpiHOh2)
Peter --
Pennsylvania is Bob’s home, and it always will be.
It’s where he was born, where he grew up, and where he and Terese raised their family.
It’s also where he started a career in public service that has always been about fighting for Pennsylvania families.
**To put it plainly: Mitch McConnell and David McCormick just don't know Pennsylvania like Bob.**
They probably don’t know who William Maclay is, and I know they can’t name all 67 counties of Pennsylvania in minutes and offer a fact about each and every one. You better bet Bob Casey can.
They don’t share stories with their team about how a trip for them to the grocery store in Scranton doesn’t just involve folks saying “hello” and going on with their day -- they’re sharing stories about what they’re buying and about their family. The same stories Bob is carrying with him on the Amtrak to Washington.
**That’s why, as a lifelong Pennsylvanian, this race is personal to Bob Casey.**
Pennsylvanians deserve a Senator who will fight for their bottom line, not a self-funding mega-millionaire who has a record of selling out workers in order to get rich.
But the reality is national Republicans are about to flood our state with millions to flip this seat and defeat Bob.
**[If we’re going to stop them, it’s going to take all of us working together to have Bob’s back. So please, if you can, chip in $5 or $10 today to re-elect Bob Casey and keep our Senate seat blue. Anything you can donate now will go a long way.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231102-1?refcode=em20231102&refcode2=1045_552475_piHOh2&akid=1045%2E552475%2EpiHOh2)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231102-1?refcode=em20231102&refcode2=1045_552475_piHOh2&akid=1045%2E552475%2EpiHOh2)**
Bob has been standing up for Pennsylvania my whole career, and he’s not slowing down.
For Pennsylvania,
Tiernan, Campaign Manager
Bob Casey for Senate

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: 9 orcas were recently KILLED
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2094123?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **BREAKING NEWS: 10 orcas were recently caught by trawl nets and only ONE survived. Sign the petition NOW to demand the NOAA protect threatened orcas by stopping corporate overfishing!** You read that right Friend — **9 out of 10 orcas were KILLED** after being trapped in fishery equipment this year. Although these orcas were not from the endangered Southern Resident orca pods, **it is a _CRITICAL_ call for the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration to REIN IN corporate overfishing once and for all!** The risk of orcas being entangled in fishing equipment has been a major threat to their survival. While trawl fisheries are catching fish en masse, this increases the danger of other precious marine life, such as orca whales, being caught as bycatch. **And NOAA has not taken the necessary steps to ensure that this tragedy does not happen again!** **Corporate overfishing is killing orcas as well as decimating Chinook salmon populations — a primary food source for Southern Resident orcas and essential for Tribal communities’ fish economy.[_If we do not hold NOAA accountable for these horrific orca deaths, we could risk losing more orcas to corporate greed. Act now to demand NOAA end corporate overfishing >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2094124?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2094125?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Chinook salmon populations have been declining as well as the population of Sothern Resident orcas — and corporate overfishing is one of the causes of these declines. The Pacific Northwest has lost **159 Chinook salmon populations** (_almost half of the historic salmon runs!_) — leaving these iconic whales **MALNOURISHED and STARVING TO DEATH and the surrounding Tribal communities under-resourced.**
Orcas and nearby residents already face so many threats to their livelihood like _climate change, ocean acidification, and increased shipping traffic and pollution._ **If there is any hope of restoring the fragile population of this beloved animal, we need to first replenish salmon, their primary food source.[_Will you sign the petition to STOP overfishing to help save orcas from extinction and replenish Chinook salmon for all who rely on it? >>_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2094126?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2094127?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for taking action,
Friends of the Earth**
|

ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My faith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Blue South PAC (www
body:
|
---
Dear Peter,

I was recently visiting with my 95-year old father (his name is Ed, and he lives in sunny Boca Raton, so he is known as BocaEddy) and he reminded me about a photo that — well I just had to share it with you.

Here you go. Me at 13, in all my “glory” at my Bar Mitzvah:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72691643/436084985/478391260?refcode=23-OB-1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4OTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZGQyZTU4LWMzNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ohvj95BQ4lJIKfnIKCmYR4sfjgCnM-gl_7zuD5kqh90=)
I’ll admit, it’s easy to chuckle at this photo — the classic 1970s bow tie, the braces, the yarmulke, the looks — but it is also an opportunity to tell you a little about how I approach my faith.

Throughout my career in public service, I’ve thought a lot about the Jewish tradition of “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the world. And over the last few years, there has been a lot that was broken, and a lot to fix. It’s been my cause.

**Before I go any further, and while I still have your attention, I have to ask —** [_will you click this link and pitch in a few dollars to split between Blue South my campaign?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72691645/436084987/478391260?refcode=23-OB-1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4OTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZGQyZTU4LWMzNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ohvj95BQ4lJIKfnIKCmYR4sfjgCnM-gl_7zuD5kqh90=)

If you are not ready yet or need more convincing, please read on. I have lots to share and more to say. I think you’ll like it.

I want to take you back to 1973. Our family moved around a lot because my father was in the “schmata” business. He started as a traveling salesman, and later worked as a regional manager for a men’s clothing company.

We moved from Massachusetts where I was born, lived a few years in Arizona, and ended up in the Bay Area. It was there where my dad got out of the clothing business and bought a lumber yard, where I worked during the summers. There’s nothing like hauling sheets of plywood and roofing, and shoveling concrete to make you want to go to graduate school.

This photo was taken when my family was a member of Temple Isaiah in Lafayette, California, a reform synagogue we joined after moving to the Bay Area. And it came after months of practicing for my Bar Mitzvah. I even taped my practice sessions on our tape recorder (I have a copy of that tape somewhere, believe it or not, voice cracking and all.)

While the Hebrew language skills I quickly acquired were just as quickly lost, the lessons that my faith taught me endure and guide me to this day.

**In fact, my favorite passage comes from Micah: What is required of us, but to do justice, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with thy God.**

These principles have guided my work in Congress. They have led me to pursue criminal justice reform, to make housing the homeless a key priority, to attack discrimination, and to ensure the rule of law is applied equally. They have also guided my path as I held accountable and stood up to the most unscrupulous man to ever occupy the Oval Office.

And they guide me in the fight we face today: repairing and rebuilding our democracy so that we leave it better for my children and yours.

That’s why I put everything I have into my work in Congress and for the cause of our democracy. It’s the first thing I think about when I wake up in the morning, and I don’t rest until I’ve done all I can for the day.

[_If these priorities resonate with you, I’m asking for your help to continue that work by chipping in $25 to split between Blue South and my campaign._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72691646/436084990/478391260?refcode=23-OB-1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4OTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZGQyZTU4LWMzNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ohvj95BQ4lJIKfnIKCmYR4sfjgCnM-gl_7zuD5kqh90=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below._ | [Split $25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72691647/436084991/478391260?refcode=23-OB-1&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4OTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZGQyZTU4LWMzNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ohvj95BQ4lJIKfnIKCmYR4sfjgCnM-gl_7zuD5kqh90=)
---
[Split $50](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72691648/436084992/478391260?refcode=23-OB-1&amount=50&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4OTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZGQyZTU4LWMzNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ohvj95BQ4lJIKfnIKCmYR4sfjgCnM-gl_7zuD5kqh90=)
[Split $100](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72691649/436084993/478391260?refcode=23-OB-1&amount=100&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4OTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZGQyZTU4LWMzNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ohvj95BQ4lJIKfnIKCmYR4sfjgCnM-gl_7zuD5kqh90=)
[Split $250](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72691650/436084994/478391260?refcode=23-OB-1&amount=250&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4OTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZGQyZTU4LWMzNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ohvj95BQ4lJIKfnIKCmYR4sfjgCnM-gl_7zuD5kqh90=)
[Other Amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72691651/436084995/478391260?refcode=23-OB-1&amount=500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4OTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZGQyZTU4LWMzNzktZWUxMS1iMDA0LTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ohvj95BQ4lJIKfnIKCmYR4sfjgCnM-gl_7zuD5kqh90=)

Hopefully, this photo helped brighten your day and gave you a bit more insight into why I have dedicated my life to this cause.

Shalom.

Adam

\******Blue South PAC******

Hi Peter,

My name is Matt Cartwright, and I'm a representative for Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District.

I've spent my entire career sticking up for working people, but I'm not a career politician. Before coming to Congress, I worked as a trial attorney fighting for working folks in Scranton. But in 2012, I knew I could do more good serving the hardworking people of Northeastern Pennsylvania in Congress.

Throughout my time in the House, I've introduced more legislation cosponsored by both Democrats and Republicans than any other House Democrat – including dozens of pieces of legislation aimed at helping seniors, military families, veterans, students, workers, consumers, the middle class, and the environment. That's why the Center for Effective Lawmaking named me one of the most effective members of the U.S. House of Representatives.

I'm proud of the work I've done for Northeastern Pennsylvanians, but I know there's much more that needs to be accomplished. People are facing hard times, and we need leaders to put people first, not the special interests or the well-connected. That's why I'm running for re-election, and I have another tough fight ahead of me.

I'm one of five Democrats who won a House seat in a district Donald Trump carried in 2020. **Last year, Republicans spent millions to try and defeat me, but thanks to grassroots support, we were able to win one of the closest races in the country by just 2.4%.**

But now, election experts are already calling our race a "toss-up." The National Republican Congressional Committee named my seat a top target, and dark money groups have already launched false TV ads attacking me.

If we're going to retake the House majority, we need to keep Pennsylvania's 8th District blue – but we have a long and tough road ahead of us. I can't win again without your support.

**[Will you join me in the fight for working families? Join our team now and help me defend this seat and retake the House majority in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72691674/436085190/-1165235865?ms=em23_231102_ws1_wlsi_gq_oolp_1_mc_ettx&refcode=em23_231102_ws1_wlsi_gq_oolp_1_mc_ettx&source=em23_231102_ws1_wlsi_gq_oolp_1_mc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231102_ws1_wlsi_gq_oolp_1_mc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=RFgkBRoVYzFt4DRj4SG2Y+wMsLHwonIbauN52cfOxIEbdLnbN/mtORP8DM3ACbtdkq6qAUNQHI9tX8hvQDvUuc9BC9/imMVYwzoN0OaXzmY7NddTSfqB+UBSqmAn+3hc0kxu0axkJdoodS2uKbJHKXC1NKPHLjzuy20H1N9OVng=&refcode2=217ca67d-c379-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTdjYTY3ZC1jMzc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ibhvi_n8NTjJoy-xdRou70HIRupmAIrQkrttj3fW9mk=&emci=4a54de52-fc78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=217ca67d-c379-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=23311593)** | [JOIN TEAM CARTWRIGHT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72691675/436085191/-1165235865?ms=em23_231102_ws1_wlsi_gq_oolp_1_mc_ettx&refcode=em23_231102_ws1_wlsi_gq_oolp_1_mc_ettx&source=em23_231102_ws1_wlsi_gq_oolp_1_mc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231102_ws1_wlsi_gq_oolp_1_mc_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=RFgkBRoVYzFt4DRj4SG2Y+wMsLHwonIbauN52cfOxIEbdLnbN/mtORP8DM3ACbtdkq6qAUNQHI9tX8hvQDvUuc9BC9/imMVYwzoN0OaXzmY7NddTSfqB+UBSqmAn+3hc0kxu0axkJdoodS2uKbJHKXC1NKPHLjzuy20H1N9OVng=&refcode2=217ca67d-c379-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTdjYTY3ZC1jMzc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ibhvi_n8NTjJoy-xdRou70HIRupmAIrQkrttj3fW9mk=&emci=4a54de52-fc78-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=217ca67d-c379-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=23311593)

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Humbled and inspired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
we defied all expectations
| | |
---
_**Humbled and inspired.**_
Friend, those are the best words to describe the whirlwind of emotions I’m feeling in the months after launching my Senate campaign.
I can't describe how moving it's been to watch Democrats from every corner of America chip in to help us defeat Sen. Rick Scott and pave the way for a brighter future in Florida. Because of your support and belief in this team, we defied all expectations and actually **outraised** Rick Scott last quarter _(even though he gave six-figures to his own campaign)._
The energy on the ground here in Florida is truly electric. People all across our state are fired up to defeat Rick Scott next fall. **But don't just take it from me: Polling data shows that this race is statistically tied!**
I __ know we can win — and experts from _CNN_ are already saying Florida is one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024. But the truth is, we’re up against an opponent who can spend millions of dollars of his own fortune to defeat us.
**Last time around, Rick Scott only won by 10,033 votes — but he outspent the Democrat running by a massive $50 MILLION. We can't let that happen again, friend. [That’s why I’m humbly asking: Please, will you chip in $5 to help me defeat Rick Scott and flip Florida blue? The future of our Senate majority and our country is on the line here, and I'm really counting on you to step up.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72691707/436085231/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk248-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWY3Y2E2N2QtYzM3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kRp00u71c8fqb7uLoHoVlgetkGGqGV3XRKHr5GE1-Ic=)**

Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. clean_body: we defied all expectations | | | Humbled and inspired. Friend, those are the best words to describe the whirlwind of emotions I’m feeling in the months after launching my Senate campaign. I can't describe how moving it's been to watch Democrats from every corner of America chip in to help us defeat Sen. Rick Scott and pave the way for a brighter future in Florida. Because of your support and belief in this team, we defied all expectations and actually outraised Rick Scott last quarter (even though he gave six-figures to his own campaign). The energy on the ground here in Florida is truly electric. People all across our state are fired up to defeat Rick Scott next fall. But don't just take it from me: Polling data shows that this race is statistically tied! I know we can win — and experts from CNN are already saying Florida is one of the top 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024. But the truth is, we’re up against an opponent who can spend millions of dollars of his own fortune to defeat us. Last time around, Rick Scott only won by 10,033 votes — but he outspent the Democrat running by a massive $50 MILLION. We can't let that happen again, friend. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With immense gratitude for you and all that you do, Debbie = | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: My two cents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| After two impeachments, an insurrection, and four indictments (and counting) for the ex-president and leading Republican candidate Donald Trump, my takeaway is this:
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4374%2E5257348%2EJg0IRE)
Derek,
As we head into the final four-month sprint to California’s March 5 primary election, I wanted to write a quick note on the state of our country and this U.S. Senate race.
After two impeachments, an insurrection, and four indictments (and counting) for the ex-president and leading Republican candidate Donald Trump, my takeaway is this:
You can have the best-written Constitution in the world — and I believe we do.
You can have the best-written laws meant to constrain the worst impulses of human nature — and maybe we do.
But at the end of the day, none of it will be enough if people don’t give meaning to their oath of office.
If that oath isn’t informed by ideas of right and wrong. If people are unwilling to accept the truth or even that there’s something called _fact_.
None of it will be enough. **None of it.**
In one of our two parties, there is an ethos that would make a public servant like Anthony Fauci into a villain and a villain like George Santos into a public servant.
But here’s the good news. As Democrats, we have an opportunity next year to change the course of our country. It requires us to do what we have always done so well.
To organize.
To fight.
To win.
We can win this Senate race. We can take back the House of Representatives. And we can re-elect Joe Biden and create an economy that works for all of us.
**We have four months to build up our ground game for March 5. I know we can get it done — but I'll need your help to do it.**
**[Will you join me in the fight for our democracy, Derek? Chip in $10 now to help us build the largest grassroots campaign in California history >>](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=nov2023_abs_em.YlhPGK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231102_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4374%2E5257348%2EJg0IRE)**

name: Working Families Party
subject: A tired play from billionaire Jeffrey Yass
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | **A last-minute flood of billionaire money has just hit the Philadelphia City Council race, Peter.** Jeffrey Yass, a GOP megadonor and Pennsylvania’s richest man, has just rushed a whopping $300,000 into a super PAC to sink WFP’s Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke1 — our two progressive candidates running to take both __ minority party seats from Philadelphia’s GOP. **That’s a _ton_ of money to spend this late in the race Peter, and it’s enough to buy both seats for Republicans if we don’t fight back the best way we know how.** Organizers and volunteers are already on the ground in Philadelphia getting out the vote via canvassing, texting, calls, and more. [**Can we count on you to help us reach even more voters in Philadelphia before Election Day on Tuesday? Split a contribution of $10 or any amount between Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke’s campaigns now.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU8aBqvsuTWu-mfRvWatUo2-lnDUjLrPUH5BrtrWq29DWrM9oddyD5_wRaELJ9YUr7hmuUeDCRhul0tT-r0KZYNhp_EpECJrckFfRcAOIQ20OsYtAFvzmRioNYXOOvad7m8PgqnJBOlRep-bGDr9MNHv3zWWT3FVNFwPxiRcNn8pl6vyV0DquuTJPMhU7qzlO1eyAxz6IMKJp66lBb0VZBQpXEmlTPGUugu-6yXEbdfHFB-NrvduEIKLtpAkleZ1xnHr-aHuCteTYPniuRWpCrl29l2TDks9P7d-AKT2rraM5A-bnzJCMs-HCC9R3B7btBVzUUZNWabs6SyYhIG-hAjFzEZiemMzpawVizbsYnjAadH0Uao2Orx6UB-Xadmw1wAzJF2_T-EI-efSR3bKqSOg/40y/h87H-FyWRemXek8LRZ2i2Q/h0/3l8lR7JUbCdmQTS6gByzv4qC4UBAS_5ifDRBEX8o4-g) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU8aBqvsuTWu-mfRvWatUo2-lnDUjLrPUH5BrtrWq29DWrM9oddyD5_wRaELJ9YUr7l15ifWOgVsGDARU2xmYXg_EV_QVIMNEILGfIVAAE4lAXGhiimNXIUrBuTue6-38ngp-AdkRvSun71UIXMseCtt-4W_BZlVQd0X5A6d49DV2yQcu3W7XGOKPK4D9_DbfqDC4JWOhKoW_83FYTj6odaolB_9_Avh2sM7nZFbNDakDU7eUY3ijns6FY_6bNYpmICUQBQtbmDNRYSXwCM4vNN9Se-B8dRDuTAEC2EGjgmLmD4TU52L5lotIAzY1yZX3Csxuciyrv-hH2JA09OU7LcnFJgoXKRlf3Ru6xi1NnD-7MGuR0XHAIc7UdDWok6zLUl_ElfEL4ZuJ2U5TD4Z-iRA/40y/h87H-FyWRemXek8LRZ2i2Q/h1/3YPdPu8aIAeaEYvwPsNwddMjLfKXa4pAldEVVGTLDvw)** Swamping progressive battlefronts with hundreds of thousands, and sometimes even _millions_ of dollars, isn’t new for Jeffrey Yass. **In fact, he’s made it his personal mission.** Just last spring, when progressives were hoping to rack up another big-city win in Philadelphia’s mayoral primary after scoring a major upset in Chicago, Yass spent over _$1 million_ on ads smearing public school champion Helen Gym, who ended up finishing third.2 And in the past month, he’s poured millions into groups funding anti-abortion candidates across the country — including over $2 million to GOP Governor Glenn Youngkin, who aims for Virginia to be the blueprint for how to pass abortion bans in states around the country.3 **Now, he’s trying to sway the Philadelphia City Council race because he’s afraid.** He’s afraid of us and what we can win together with a Republican-free council in one of the largest cities in the country. Kendra and Nic’s vision for a city with fully-funded public schools, safe neighborhoods, affordable housing, and real opportunity for all is our _dream_ — but Yass’, and other rich magnates’ _nightmare_. And they’re going to do everything they can to kill our momentum. **But we know we have the people on our side. And with your support we can launch a massive voter outreach campaign to counteract these attacks and win on Tuesday.** [**Will you chip in $10 now to help us fight back against Republican attacks against Kendra and Nicolas and the billionaires bankrolling them?**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYU8aBqvsuTWu-mfRvWatUo2-lnDUjLrPUH5BrtrWq29DWrM9oddyD5_wRaELJ9YUr7Fs1Yq6wJfxIzgr0TfUPi9Lo5FK4-hYfIblUzdzZfch0hpAzU8B63YmLly5Ru4WUCFywmZnJP6m8mZx6G2Wcsb8SDfVsTs4wwfK949wQBowrFYSCSWVa3leJXk6hn28LjKRoSKKz9oBh4Wl9uFtMrRDdheh3PW2ETjP9_dhjEbDcvmyT7fZyH9YDal01aL0PvjvTrCqNha0spquAcHjz-C1klRumuLbBZxM0R6BHRqsOvD0_Lc8SnXnoOc8cvXwFYBLQZT7q9a618wiYpMVCT_oGshqC6XSo64cULcusNE0ZU5nAVWYv0sr5R1vXsralY1uRLaPtUxyP3_rl6yDcgWg/40y/h87H-FyWRemXek8LRZ2i2Q/h2/oxWBZ3hHk9kCGyiZng2OhcGh6NkCtgex9wb6BfkiNJA) Thank you for your support in these crucial final days, Working Families Party Source:

clean_body: | | | A last-minute flood of billionaire money has just hit the Philadelphia City Council race, Peter. Jeffrey Yass, a GOP megadonor and Pennsylvania’s richest man, has just rushed a whopping $300,000 into a super PAC to sink WFP’s Kendra Brooks and Nicolas O’Rourke1 — our two progressive candidates running to take both minority party seats from Philadelphia’s GOP. That’s a ton of money to spend this late in the race Peter, and it’s enough to buy both seats for Republicans if we don’t fight back the best way we know how. Organizers and volunteers are already on the ground in Philadelphia getting out the vote via canvassing, texting, calls, and more. Swamping progressive battlefronts with hundreds of thousands, and sometimes even millions of dollars, isn’t new for Jeffrey Yass. In fact, he’s made it his personal mission. Just last spring, when progressives were hoping to rack up another big-city win in Philadelphia’s mayoral primary after scoring a major upset in Chicago, Yass spent over $1 million on ads smearing public school champion Helen Gym, who ended up finishing third.2 And in the past month, he’s poured millions into groups funding anti-abortion candidates across the country — including over $2 million to GOP Governor Glenn Youngkin, who aims for Virginia to be the blueprint for how to pass abortion bans in states around the country.3 Now, he’s trying to sway the Philadelphia City Council race because he’s afraid. He’s afraid of us and what we can win together with a Republican-free council in one of the largest cities in the country. Kendra and Nic’s vision for a city with fully-funded public schools, safe neighborhoods, affordable housing, and real opportunity for all is our dream — but Yass’, and other rich magnates’ nightmare. And they’re going to do everything they can to kill our momentum. But we know we have the people on our side. And with your support we can launch a massive voter outreach campaign to counteract these attacks and win on Tuesday. Thank you for your support in these crucial final days, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The Philadelphia Inquirer, Oct. 31, 2023. 2\. , The Intercept, May 16, 2023. 3\. , Rolling Stone, Oct. 23, 2023. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . [**__Peter, I’m reaching out to talk to you about everything extremist Governor Ron Desantis is doing to my home state, but first I need to ask for your help to hit my End of Week deadline. Please, chip in $27 now to help me keep up the fight against DeSantis and his GOP mega donors >>__**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/hvTq3qPqDcpD4wEnh3p1FA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnJpYhP0TUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTEwMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9kZXNhbnRpc2Zhc2Npc21fZW4tcnMmYW1vdW50PTI3JmNkbWM9MlhkQUdQTDQzR0oxd1ZEWnJaR3ZuQmo1RFhEJnJlZmNvZGUyPTJYZEFHUEw0M0dKMXdWRFpyWkd2bkJqNURYRCZyZWZjb2RlY2RtYz0yWGRBR1BMNDNHSjF3VkRaclpHdm5CajVEWERXA3NwY0IKZUQhEURlCzfEqFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAGk~) Ron DeSantis is a fascist. He is abusing his power to advance his own personal political ambitions and hurting Floridians every day he remains in power.

Here are just SOME of the atrocious things he has done this past year:
* Banned books about Black and brown history from our public schools
* Banned gender-affirming care for trans youth
* Replaced public university leaders with his extreme MAGA lapdog friends and gave them TWICE the salary to destroy our schools
* Proposed a permitless carry bill that would allow Floridians to carry concealed firearms without a permit OR training
* Tried to revoke the liquor license of an event venue in my district because they hosted a drag show
* Rejected an African American Studies course from the AP curriculum and then “celebrated” Black History Month at his mansion
* Gathered personal medical data on transgender university students and educators

If you disagree with Gov. Ron DeSantis, he’ll abuse his power to close down your business, take over your school, remove your classes, and unconstitutionally fire you.

**Our differences make our state a stronger, more just place. They bring us together, and help us fully understand what Ron DeSantis really is — a fascist. We’ve got a fight ahead, but _community_ will always triumph over hate.** [**_That’s why I need you with me, Peter. We have no choice but to use our collective power to make sure DeSantis and his extremist MAGA cronies know we won’t back down. I need 375 Democrats to stand with me today to ensure we can hit our End of Week deadline and keep up the fight against fascism. Thank you, thank you, thank you!

Thanks to the generosity of folks like you, we were able to reach our October fundraising goal! With a nearly $10,000 budget gap, I wasn’t sure we could do it, but this grassroots team never fails to amaze me.

**I can’t thank you enough for stepping up to the plate to support this campaign.**

We have an incredibly tough road ahead, but if this grassroots team continues to step up to the plate in the way you’ve done every single month, I know we’ll have what it takes to win.

I’m endlessly grateful for your support,

_Andrea_

clean_body: Response to the trial intended to REMOVE my name from the BALLOT. Response to the trial intended to REMOVE my name from the BALLOT. | | | | | Friend, I've recorded a statement in response to the trial aimed at REMOVING my name from the ballot in 2024. | Ultimately, this battle isn't about me. This is about whether YOUR right to vote still has any meaning in America. If Democrat Secretaries of State can decide who gets to appear on the ballot - and simply REMOVE the leading opponent to their boss in the White House - then we will no longer be living in a Free Republic. The 2024 election truly is our final chance to save our country - and America needs you to take a stand now more than ever before. Of course, if you 're doing poorly right now due to the very sinister person in the White House who is trying to turn our Republic into a dictatorship, then please don't feel pressured to donate. I trust you will take a stand in other ways to save America from ruin. | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. body:
NEWS: California Restaurant Association, San Diego Chapter Endorses Former Mayor Kevin Faulconer For Supervisor | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/06cec7f99e45/4wptopnlk1-12656903?e=784f78234b)
---
| |
---
| |
# FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
NOVEMBER 2, 2023

CONTACT: press@kevinfaulconer.com

**California Restaurant Association, San Diego Chapter Endorses Former Mayor Kevin Faulconer For Supervisor**
SAN DIEGO, CA -- Former San Diego Mayor Kevin Faulconer, candidate for San Diego County Supervisor, announced the endorsement of the California Restaurant Association, San Diego chapter. The latest endorsement comes on the heels of a growing campaign effort focused on delivering results for people across San Diego county.
The California Restaurant Association is the uniting force behind the restaurant industry throughout California and San Diego. They bring together our communities, impact legislation, cultivate relationships to help foster growth and provide valuable resources to help sustain small businesses.
**“We believe Kevin Faulconer has what it takes to bring commonsense solutions to the Board of Supervisors in San Diego County,” said Chris Duggan, Director of Local Government Affairs: San Diego, Imperial, Riverside and San Bernardino Counties. “During the pandemic, Mayor Faulconer took immediate action to support the restaurant industry by providing relief, and helping to keep our doors open. Without his help, support and advocacy, the restaurant industry would have seen a catastrophic decline in the region. We trust Kevin will continue to advocate for common sense solutions to help our local restaurants thrive as they continue to recover from the pandemic.”**
**“I’m excited to receive the backing of the California Restaurant Association, San Diego chapter.” said Former San Diego Mayor Kevin Faulconer. “Small businesses are the heart of our communities; I recognized that as Mayor and will continue to do so as Supervisor. We need to inject common sense into policy, something that has been lacking at the county level. That’s why I’m running for Supervisor, to bring back some common sense and help our restaurant community thrive again.”**
As the Mayor of San Diego, Faulconer worked diligently across the aisle to keep San Diego businesses open and operational during the pandemic. In the early start of the pandemic, he signed an executive order that allowed restaurants to serve patrons outside, following social distancing recommendations, without the need to purchase permits that take a considerable amount of time and resources. In addition to making it easier to operate during turbulent times, [Faulconer led the City of San Diego in establishing a pandemic relief fund](https://kevinfaulconer.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c8e1915e5d9cc8e4a2f64f766&id=f3591c8c9f&e=784f78234b) which provided more than 2,000 local San Diego businesses with grants, saving nearly 10,000 jobs, where half of the recipients were operating in underserved communities.
###

Date: September 18, 2023
Subject: Tommy Tuberville persists_
Folks —
Tommy Tuberville, a Senator from Alabama, has single-handedly blocked hundreds of military appointments for months. **And if you’re wondering why, it’s because he’s protesting abortion-related travel policies for servicemembers.**
Right now, military personnel who are stationed in states where abortion is banned (like Alabama) may be reimbursed for travel expenses to receive abortions in other states.
Apparently, Tommy Tuberville does not like giving servicemembers the right to make decisions about their health care — and as a result, he’s using partisan tactics to block military nominations.
This is an affront to our national security, but Tuberville is still not budging.
Tuberville persists in blocking promotions — and his GOP colleagues remain quiet about his political publicity stunt impacting millions of our military personnel nationwide.
**[I’ve had enough — I’m calling on Tommy Tuberville to stop using military promotions as a political bargaining chip. Vivek Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** | Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: This is your last chance to enter to win a chance to be in Miami for the next Presidential Debate! | | Tonight’s your last chance to win. Fellow American, I’ll be in Miami next week to take the stage for the third time. Once again, I will be giving two tickets to one member of our movement – plus travel and accommodations to Miami for you and a guest. I am counting on you to help me stand up against the Establishment. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: | Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. name: David Guttenberg
subject: Join us Monday for a GIS Mapping Webinar
body:
| | |
---
Dear Friend, Are you ready to unlock the untapped potential of Alaska's future? [Build Alaska’s Future](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72692390/436087631/-1512324198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTQ3N2FjNy1jNjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTzzbWnyPYebC3jblt7LhWCgKagKtRKaU2Fa4XKQ4e0=&emci=fede9fcc-8b79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2a477ac7-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399) (BAF) is excited to introduce a new interactive GIS map that will revolutionize the way we access federal funding data and envision transformative infrastructure projects across our great state. **Introducing the First GIS Map of Alaska: Igniting Data-Driven Decision-Making** This groundbreaking tool is the first of its kind, providing unparalleled access to federal spending data and offering unprecedented insights into proposed infrastructure projects everywhere in Alaska. This GIS map will empower citizens, academics, and policymakers alike, enabling them to interpret federal spending data, make informed decisions, and steer our state towards a prosperous future. **Your Opportunity to Shape Alaska's Infrastructure Development** From highway upgrades to high-speed broadband, airports to waterworks, every Alaskan deserves to be in the know about what's happening in their own backyard. Now, you have the opportunity to engage directly with infrastructure development, interpret the available data, and have a say in the allocation of funding. **We invite you to participate in our webinar on _ _ Monday, November 6****th** **to discover how to harness the full potential of this innovative resource**. Register for the webinar [here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72692391/436087632/1198355120?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTQ3N2FjNy1jNjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTzzbWnyPYebC3jblt7LhWCgKagKtRKaU2Fa4XKQ4e0=&emci=fede9fcc-8b79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2a477ac7-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399). **Join Our Webinar and Unleash Alaska's True Potential** During the webinar, you will learn firsthand from our team how to navigate the interactive GIS map effectively, uncover hidden funding opportunities, and gain insights into proposed projects that will shape our state's future. Together, we can amplify Alaskans' voices, foster sustainable economic growth, and support the realization of infrastructure projects that will benefit our communities for generations to come. **Mark Your Calendar:** Date: Monday, November 6thTime: 4:00pm AKST Registration: [https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZUkduyvqjwoEte7qTzTo_H_0abBTQfpW1Oo](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72692392/436087633/1198355120?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTQ3N2FjNy1jNjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTzzbWnyPYebC3jblt7LhWCgKagKtRKaU2Fa4XKQ4e0=&emci=fede9fcc-8b79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2a477ac7-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399) Alaskans hold the key to Alaska's future, and it's time to unlock its full potential. Let's ensure our voices are heard and make a lasting impact on the development of our state. Don't miss out on this extraordinary opportunity to be at the forefront of change. We look forward to seeing you at the webinar, where together we'll pave the way for a brighter, more prosperous Alaska. To register for the webinar and secure your spot, please click [here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72692393/436087634/1198355120?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTQ3N2FjNy1jNjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTzzbWnyPYebC3jblt7LhWCgKagKtRKaU2Fa4XKQ4e0=&emci=fede9fcc-8b79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2a477ac7-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399). Sincerely, David GuttenbergBuild Alaska's Future Founding Steering Committee DirectorFairbanks North Star Borough Assembly Member
---
|
---
_[Build Alaska’s Future](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72692394/436087635/-1512324198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTQ3N2FjNy1jNjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTzzbWnyPYebC3jblt7LhWCgKagKtRKaU2Fa4XKQ4e0=&emci=fede9fcc-8b79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2a477ac7-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399) is a nonprofit mapping the path to a stronger Alaska. We are committed to engaging and educating Alaskans on the billions of dollars flowing to the state. Our mission is to provide comprehensive information about these historic, once-in-a-generation funding opportunities, to share and promote the stories of Alaska communities, and to secure a prosperous, collaborative economic future for our state. More than just a map, BAF is a movement seeking to connect communities from Nome to Homer to maximize our grassroots resources and ensure that the future doesn’t pass Alaska by. [Get involved with our initiatives today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72692395/436087636/755459924?hosted_button_id=WRTETZ8LLHYYC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTQ3N2FjNy1jNjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wTzzbWnyPYebC3jblt7LhWCgKagKtRKaU2Fa4XKQ4e0=&emci=fede9fcc-8b79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=2a477ac7-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399) _

body:
There’s no time to waste. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72692495/436088306/17860314?refcode=ea.0718c4fa-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0718c4fa-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDcxOGM0ZmEtYzY3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rggdXRqus2Ng9XsHeDcXoIVFAL5emuYVywAmVk0MxbY=)

[Peter, Election Day in Mississippi is only five days away, and we have a BIG goal: Raise $50,000 by then to keep our GOTV program going strong. Can you pitch in just $5 to help Brandon in his battle against Tate Reeves?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72692496/436088307/-192700460?amount=5&refcode=ea.0718c4fa-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.0718c4fa-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDcxOGM0ZmEtYzY3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=rggdXRqus2Ng9XsHeDcXoIVFAL5emuYVywAmVk0MxbY=) **Why should you contribute today? Here are a few good reasons:**
* The polls indicate Brandon is neck and neck with Tate Reeves, and experts say this is one of the tightest governor races of 2023. Your $5 can make a difference in a race that might be decided by just a few votes.

* Your $5 will support activities like knocking on doors, distributing flyers, sending texts and emails, and making last-minute campaign stops across the state.

| | With early voting taking place across the country, I wanted to take a moment to send you a short note expressing my sincerest gratitude. Election season is always an all-hands-on-deck effort, and I could not be more grateful that you’ve chosen to put your energy towards ensuring every person has a voice in our democracy. Your presence on this team means you’re someone who recognizes the importance of the task in front of us. Who knows that success in the months and years ahead goes beyond just one candidate or one election — that at its core, this fight is about all of us joining together to empower voters and protect the freedom to vote. **So thank you for helping to strengthen this team. It means the world to me and everyone here at Fair Fight Action.** With your support, we’ve re-launched **[PeachVote.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72692561/436088494/-1461336477?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20231102_e_eomty_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTQxY2MxOS1jNzc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K1e2Qcxerl_1G6xek9paKKdBTlKALUZph9xKhHNvY2s=&emci=56963e88-b479-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=8141cc19-c779-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277) **— a one-stop shop for voters in Georgia — so that even with anti-voter legislation like SB 202 on the books, and even with the Secretary of State not working to fill knowledge gaps in the election landscape, Georgians can still find relevant and accessible information on how to vote by mail, early in person, or on Election Day. And this year, for the first time, PeachVote.com will offer a Spanish-language lookup tool for early voting and vote-by-mail ballot return hours and locations. **Together, we’re making a difference to protect the freedom to vote, here in Georgia and beyond.** Onward, Cianti Stewart-Reid

Just 6 days out from the election, Danica Roem is gearing up for a fight | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72692574/436088511/-1905489798?sourceid=1052259&refcode=20231102_DanicaRoemSplit&refcode2=WTEFHK01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE3YzRmYS1jNjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IArYV2io9RUuv82br_CJXLK6amDHYeIjKCgX3jgm_Aw=&emci=9925f27c-e678-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=f917c4fa-c679-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

| | Peter, the Virginia elections are just _six days away_ , and pro-choice champion Danica Roem needs your support in her critical state Senate race.

You may remember Danica from 2017, when she unseated the self-described "chief homophobe" of Virginia to become the first openly transgender state legislator in U.S. history. Since then, she has passed 41 of her bills into law — all with bipartisan support.

Now she's running for a newly-redrawn district in the Virginia state Senate against Bill Woolf, a pro-Trump, anti-LGBTQ+, anti-choice Republican who cares more about stripping away our rights than making his community a better and safer place to live. This is **one of seven toss-up seats** in Virginia, meaning this race could decide which party will control the Senate for the next four years. (For reference, right now the Democratic majority in the state Senate is the _only thing_ stopping Gov. Glenn Youngkin from banning abortion in the state outright.)

**[You know what that means: Danica's race could determine abortion access for the entire state of Virginia — and therefore the entire South. At this critical juncture, every dollar helps. Donate now to split a donation between Danica Roem's campaign and EMILYs List:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72692575/436088512/-753721103?sourceid=1052259&refcode=20231102_DanicaRoemSplit&refcode2=WTEFHK01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE3YzRmYS1jNjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IArYV2io9RUuv82br_CJXLK6amDHYeIjKCgX3jgm_Aw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72692576/436088513/-753721103?expresslane=true&amount=15&sourceid=1052259&refcode=20231102_DanicaRoemSplit&refcode2=WTEFHK01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE3YzRmYS1jNjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IArYV2io9RUuv82br_CJXLK6amDHYeIjKCgX3jgm_Aw=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/72692577/436088514/-753721103?expresslane=true&amount=35&sourceid=1052259&refcode=20231102_DanicaRoemSplit&refcode2=WTEFHK01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOTE3YzRmYS1jNjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IArYV2io9RUuv82br_CJXLK6amDHYeIjKCgX3jgm_Aw=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: 5 Days! Join Vice President Kamala Harris in Getting Out The Vote!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/84ddaecccdf6/5-days-join-vice-president-kamala-harris-in-getting-out-the-vote?e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| |
---
| | Hello everyone, We are just 5 DAYS away from critical elections up and down the ballot across the country. We wanted to share some more ways that you and your networks can support our efforts in getting out the vote. Please take a few minutes to RSVP for an event below and to share these opportunities with people in your network.
Sincerely, Brencia
---
|
---
| |
# GET OUT THE VOTE WITH KAMALA HARRIS AND MAXWELL FROST
---
| Join us for a phone bank with special guests Kamala Harris & Rep. Maxwell Frost to help us get out the vote ahead of November 7!
---
|
---
| This November, voters will determine the future of issues we care about in races across the country. We need to ensure that Republicans aren't setting the agenda on reproductive and voting rights, gun violence prevention, climate change, health care and so much more. Please join us in making calls this Friday into critical target races across the country. Click the button below to RSVP.
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=2c4b5a2a07&e=d6c5c7d7ec "RSVP HERE")
---
| |
# **OHIO BALLOT MEASURE**
---
| Join us in calling voters in Ohio to get out the vote in favor of a ballot measure that will protect abortion access in the state. By voting YES on Issue One, we can prevent a total abortion ban from taking effect and protect Ohioans’ freedom to make health care decisions for ourselves and our families, without interference from politicians.
---
|
---
| Can we count on you to call voters in Ohio to protect reproductive rights? Please RSVP using the button below.
---
| [RSVP HERE]( "RSVP HERE")
---
| |
# PENNSYLVANIA SUPREME COURT RACES
---
|
---
| Can we count on you to call voters in Ohio to protect reproductive rights? **Please RSVP using the button below.**
---
| [RSVP HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8e3fec46ea&e=d6c5c7d7ec "RSVP HERE")
---
| |
# **PARTNER PHONE BANK WITH VICE PRESIDENT KAMALA HARRIS**
---
|
---
| Heading into the final weekend before Election Day it’s all hands on deck to get out the vote and save reproductive freedom. Red Wine & Blue is joining forces with Sisters Lead Sisters Vote and Win with Black Women to welcome Vice President Kamala Harris to our sisterhood. Sisters United and Red Wine & Blue will raise our voices and rally our volunteers to make sure everyone knows to votes, with special focus on Issue 1 in Ohio, Virginia’s State Assembly and Pennsylvania's supreme court race. **Please RSVP using the button below.**
---
| [RSVP HERE]( "RSVP HERE")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4e1b9f31fb&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=209a190984&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | [](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=4a01def334&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=5efb4206c2) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=5efb4206c2).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: ATTACKED
body:
\------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
---
| | Just dropping you a quick note amid all the madness...

I'm sure you've caught a glimpse of the wild accusations being hurled my way.

Who's behind them?

On one flank, the left labels me a "Nazi," with over-the-top photoshopped images like this:

But wait, there's more!

The establishment Republicans, in their infinite wisdom, are trying to cast me as some radical leftie hell-bent on axing police funding. All because I had the audacity to want more transparency in our spending?

Give me a break:

But all of this is encouraging!

They're coming at me with all they've got, and that only tells me one thing: I'm over the target, and they're scrambling.

Look, I've always had the police's back, and anyone who suggests otherwise is playing a cheap game. The guy running against me is even diving into the lies and slander!

But here's the deal: with people like you backing me, they don't stand a chance.

Because Idaho deserves better, and I'm just getting started.

Keep the faith, and let's make them regret ever picking this fight.

Stay frosty,

Brian

**P.S.**

Oh, and get this: they've already thrown over $50k just to kick me and a few true conservatives down. Word on the street? They're planning to dump a colossal six-figure sum to drag my name through the mud. Someone said today they've got "more money than God." But unlike them, I don't cozy up to corporate overlords or bend the knee to big business PACs.

If you're ready to go toe-to-toe with these jokers, [_**click here to help fund the real fight**_](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=0faba1741a&e=dea908e0fe "fund the fight").

**P.P.S.**

If you have questions about this stuff or _ANYTHING at all_ , hit reply and let me know.

**P.P.P.S.**

This meme sums things up perfectly:

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

2) Want to get off this list? [Unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=df56809238).

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

4) **Want to support the fight against the establishment hacks, phony conservatives, and progressive shills who want to turn Idaho into a progressive dumpster fire? >>> [Click here to contribute](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=e839e4d170&e=dea908e0fe "get in the fight")**

But unlike them, I don't cozy up to corporate overlords or bend the knee to big business PACs. If you're ready to go toe-to-toe with these jokers, "fund the fight". P.P.S. If you have questions about this stuff or ANYTHING at all , hit reply and let me know. P.P.P.S. ## 7 Signs Of The Times
---
There is so much talk about **End Times Biblical Prophecy** with all that is happening in our world, _and rightfully so_. **I am convinced that the BEST commentary on the Bible is the Bible itself.** Last night at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3212973.1045.1.1fb777c3955bf68abfc298a0153d08ea), I walked our Church through the Bible and identified the **7 Signs Of The Times**. Here you can learn what the 7 Signs are: [https://youtube.com/live/TuNK8YzJBRY?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3212973.1046.1.415ff0c3c699aaac5182a6866ed40439)
---
| | [ Watch: 7 Signs Of The End Times ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3212973.1047.1.3c4e1134a19915117779a9522711c807)
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3212973.1048.1.143b9df76d08cc0798db1a089b195c9d)
---
Recently at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3212973.1049.1.935ecd1a2135002f19973b6d8591c690) Tulsa & OKC, I committed the entire sermon to explaining **End Times Biblical Prophecy** and where we are on the timeline.
I addressed **Ezekiel 38** from an in-depth perspective along with the **Israel/Hamas War** that we are witnessing.
This message I know will benefit you and help you understand what the Bible says _MUST_ take place in the **Last Days**..
Watch it here: [The End Times EXPLANIED](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3212973.1050.1.1334ea9c2c56f37bc2af5a60224d50da)
| | [ Watch: Ezekiel 38 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3212973.1051.1.df80b069d5e98c710e44e7b5e359ed61)
---
|
---
---
## New Building Updates
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3212973.1052.1.6f465489785318ec6979d27a525104bf)
---
It has been a little over a month since we moved to our new facility and the progress has been GREAT!
**Here are the upcoming projects to look for:**
**Auditorium**
-TV's to be added throughout the auditorium for the purpose of lyrics & Bible verses
-More lighting in auditorium
**Lobby**
-New ceiling & flooring
**Restrooms**
-The men of Sheridan know what needs to be removed and replaced...
**Kids & Youth**
-Both nursery's will be complete and youth room will be updated with new carpet and layout
These are the updates that we plan to complete here in the near future.
We are doing this entire renovation on a cash basis.
Thank you for your generosity that has accomplished so much and please consider continuing to partner with us so we can get the job done!
You can give at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=3212973.1053.1.1bb8549fd79a7fbacfe3c118f7318e6e)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

# ****This Silent Evil Force Is Eating Away at Your Retirement** **
We are teetering on the brink of an economic meltdown that's threatening to devour your savings and retirement. Inflation has surged to terrifying levels not seen in 40 years and the effects have been devastating. **Over** **two-thirds of Americans are grappling with financial hardship.** **You see it and feel it every day.** Prices have spiraled out of control, our money buys less and less, yet our monthly bills keep escalating. **And what 's worse is that our income can't keep pace**. We have to tap into our savings and retirement which inflation has eroded. _[Request your free guide now to inflation-proof your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings. ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1u6yAUhJ8G77DM4c8sWOTeyl20yr7LE4MTIjAOUFl5-8pR1e3Mp_kG0xbD8rRE_yMAt-AqASD8RAAeX3sq3_f08U7Pnyf6UOckjxL-E4D23Pwf-TvS-4QhHql-65zlixtE5y1TZjSKaQbdzY4oLlyA8KOUZhZcCS4V08uFc-7RyC5YGIAzNgAwoRnv1SiNE9wwhBGlUkQML0-PyZcwI6ttx1JyTv2cUxftrbWtvo5NBKa49RijvwZcZ3_N0R0UgSmsS8QW8krD2nzxtdGCzVd66Om97ASmrli37SHGUJUmYri-vHNOPwEAAP__AVtdYg)_ Now, with central bankers indicating more interest rate hikes in 2023 and 2024, **our traditional investments in stocks and bonds are in jeopardy of plummeting even further.** **It 's so bad that renowned investors are jumping ship.** _Paul Tudor Jones_ , the renowned billionaire hedge-fund manager who accurately predicted the 1987 stock market crash, predicts a 12% stock market decline. _Jeremy Grantham_ , the chief investment strategist who predicted the dotcom crash in 2001, the Global Financial Crisis in 2008, and the tech bubble in 2021, predicts a recession lasting well into 2024 and "an accompanying decline in stock prices." Even _Warren Buffet_ has sold off $33b of his stocks, piling up cash in advance of the predicted recession. **Whether you 're aged 45, 55, near retirement, or in retirement, doing nothing to _[protect your wealth](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8js1u6yAUhJ8G77DM4c8sWOTeyl20yr7LE4MTIjAOUFl5-8pR1e3Mp_kG0xbD8rRE_yMAt-AqASD8RAAeX3sq3_f08U7Pnyf6UOckjxL-E4D23Pwf-TvS-4QhHql-65zlixtE5y1TZjSKaQbdzY4oLlyA8KOUZhZcCS4V08uFc-7RyC5YGIAzNgAwoRnv1SiNE9wwhBGlUkQML0-PyZcwI6ttx1JyTv2cUxftrbWtvo5NBKa49RijvwZcZ3_N0R0UgSmsS8QW8krD2nzxtdGCzVd66Om97ASmrli37SHGUJUmYri-vHNOPwEAAP__AVtdYg)_ is not an option.** It's a fool's gambit. _[Protect what you have now.
