name: Elaine Luria
subject: This email is long, but time is running short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defend Democracy PAC
body:
|
---

| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72693270/436091113/-1005305932?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_231102_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U5_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MThiYjQyYS1jYjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6f9AnyGsm2k-KcHLaZkBNAGNwGMOXdDwuM9o-qKbHws=) Folks, this is the longest email I’ll ever send you. However, it’s important, so I hope you’ll stick around to read it through. I’ve been truly blown away by the enthusiasm and generosity of this grassroots team. Together, we’ve disbursed over $300,000 to Virginia Democrats in battleground races – helping to balance out massive spending from Gov. Youngkin. [**(If you haven’t yet chipped in during these crucial final days, you can pitch in here.)**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72693271/436091114/-1005305932?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_231102_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U5_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MThiYjQyYS1jYjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6f9AnyGsm2k-KcHLaZkBNAGNwGMOXdDwuM9o-qKbHws=) As the clock winds down, I want to share more about our last-minute strategy to elect a Democratic majority and keep Virginia out of the hands of the GOP. **Defend Democracy** It’s our responsibility to ensure that democracy endures in the Commonwealth. That’s why I founded Defend Democracy PAC – to stop Republicans from subverting democracy for political gain. Our mission from the beginning has been to elect responsible leaders who will stand up for the truth, expand voting access, and encourage greater participation in our democracy. **Moreover, Defend Democracy PAC is making sure voters get the accurate information and support they need to participate in this all-important election.** **Protect Freedom & Choice in Virginia** It’s difficult to convey the severity of the threat to abortion rights in Virginia if Democrats fall short on Tuesday. Put simply, Gov. Youngkin could have the majorities he needs to ban abortion by January. And safe, legal abortion isn’t the only freedom on the chopping block. At the first opportunity, Republicans will enact a host of voter suppression laws to restrict participation in our democracy to a select few, chip away at the rights of workers to organize, and dismantle our public education system. **Protecting freedom starts with defending our slim State Senate majority. If we can do that and flip the House of Delegates on Tuesday, we’ll be in the best possible position to take on Gov. Youngkin.** **Support Battleground Democrats** Virginia’s future hangs in a precarious balance. Every vote cast, every door knocked, and every dollar contributed over the next few days will have consequences for years to come. [**So please, I’m asking for your urgent donation to tip the scales in Democrats’ favor. Will you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can right away?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72693272/436091115/-1005305932?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_231102_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U5_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MThiYjQyYS1jYjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6f9AnyGsm2k-KcHLaZkBNAGNwGMOXdDwuM9o-qKbHws=) | | | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72693273/436091116/-1005305932?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_231102_FR_LongestEmail_A0_na_U5_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MThiYjQyYS1jYjc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6f9AnyGsm2k-KcHLaZkBNAGNwGMOXdDwuM9o-qKbHws=)

clean_body: | | | = Folks, this is the longest email I’ll ever send you. However, it’s important, so I hope you’ll stick around to read it through. I’ve been truly blown away by the enthusiasm and generosity of this grassroots team. Together, we’ve disbursed over $300,000 to Virginia Democrats in battleground races – helping to balance out massive spending from Gov. Youngkin. = As the clock winds down, I want to share more about our last-minute strategy to elect a Democratic majority and keep Virginia out of the hands of the GOP. Defend Democracy It’s our responsibility to ensure that democracy endures in the Commonwealth. That’s why I founded Defend Democracy PAC – to stop Republicans from subverting democracy for political gain. Our mission from the beginning has been to elect responsible leaders who will stand up for the truth, expand voting access, and encourage greater participation in our democracy. Moreover, Defend Democracy PAC is making sure voters get the accurate information and support they need to participate in this all-important election. Protect Freedom & Choice in Virginia It’s difficult to convey the severity of the threat to abortion rights in Virginia if Democrats fall short on Tuesday. Put simply, Gov. Youngkin could have the majorities he needs to ban abortion by January. And safe, legal abortion isn’t the only freedom on the chopping block. At the first opportunity, Republicans will enact a host of voter suppression laws to restrict participation in our democracy to a select few, chip away at the rights of workers to organize, and dismantle our public education system. Protecting freedom starts with defending our slim State Senate majority. If we can do that and flip the House of Delegates on Tuesday, we’ll be in the best possible position to take on Gov. Youngkin. Support Battleground Democrats Virginia’s future hangs in a precarious balance. Every vote cast, every door knocked, and every dollar contributed over the next few days will have consequences for years to come. = | | | = | | = | | = Appreciatively, Elaine Luria | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Defend Democracy PAC Defend Democracy PAC PO Box 66191 Virginia Beach, VA 23466

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72693702/436092419/-1369586090?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.02_B1_EOMTY_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVjMWE4ZTAtY2I3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QXnqHJ06ypGlp_pmx0GOV6OAEwmMg5Kx5TvMXgH0m8E=&emci=487cddca-bd79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=45c1a8e0-cb79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=14781535) | Peter, I just got off of a call with my team where they delivered some great news: **we didn't just reach our goal for October, we blew it out of the water.** I can't thank you enough. The support you've shown our campaign, dedication to flipping SC-01, and retaking the House Majority hasn't gone unnoticed. As it turns out, it's been noticed by folks across the country – including Nancy Mace. [**I'll tell you why but first, can I ask you to help us keep this campaign rocking and rolling by chipping in $20 or more?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72693703/436092422/983305604?amount=20&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.02_B1_EOMTY_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVjMWE4ZTAtY2I3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QXnqHJ06ypGlp_pmx0GOV6OAEwmMg5Kx5TvMXgH0m8E=) [CHIP IN >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72693704/436092425/983305604?amount=20&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.02_B1_EOMTY_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVjMWE4ZTAtY2I3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QXnqHJ06ypGlp_pmx0GOV6OAEwmMg5Kx5TvMXgH0m8E=) It's obvious that Nancy Mace has seen the large grassroots movement we're building. In fact, she's not even hiding that she's worried she'll lose. Take a look at what Nancy texted her supporters the other day, Peter... [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72693705/436092426/-1846418929?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.02_B1_EOMTY_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVjMWE4ZTAtY2I3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QXnqHJ06ypGlp_pmx0GOV6OAEwmMg5Kx5TvMXgH0m8E=) I really wish this was a joke, but it's not! Nancy Mace reached out to South Carolinians and said she was "getting desperate," and that she didn't "know what to do" – _all over being behind on a fundraising goal._ As much of a chuckle as this might give you, what this tells us is that our campaign is working. **We're putting Nancy Mace on notice that the Palmetto State is ready for a leader who will pursue solutions instead of the spotlight.** Your support for our campaign is working, and we can't slow down now – especially as Nancy's radical pick for Speaker begins to implement his far-right agenda. [**So, I'm asking you to chip in as much as you can to keep up the pressure on Nacy Mace's campaign, flip this battleground seat blue, and retake our House Majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72693706/436092427/983305604?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.11.02_B1_EOMTY_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDVjMWE4ZTAtY2I3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QXnqHJ06ypGlp_pmx0GOV6OAEwmMg5Kx5TvMXgH0m8E=) clean_body: | Peter, I just got off of a call with my team where they delivered some great news: we didn't just reach our goal for October, we blew it out of the water. I can't thank you enough. The support you've shown our campaign, dedication to flipping SC-01, and retaking the House Majority hasn't gone unnoticed. As it turns out, it's been noticed by folks across the country – including Nancy Mace. = = It's obvious that Nancy Mace has seen the large grassroots movement we're building. In fact, she's not even hiding that she's worried she'll lose. Take a look at what Nancy texted her supporters the other day, Peter... = I really wish this was a joke, but it's not! Nancy Mace reached out to South Carolinians and said she was "getting desperate," and that she didn't "know what to do" – all over being behind on a fundraising goal. As much of a chuckle as this might give you, what this tells us is that our campaign is working. We're putting Nancy Mace on notice that the Palmetto State is ready for a leader who will pursue solutions instead of the spotlight. Your support for our campaign is working, and we can't slow down now – especially as Nancy's radical pick for Speaker begins to implement his far-right agenda. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = All my thanks, Michael B. name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Crushed it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

I hope this message finds you well. I wanted to share some exciting news with you. I just got off the phone with my finance team, and **we crushed our $50,000** end-of-month goal!

Our momentum is building, and I am so incredibly grateful for your unwavering support, not only for me but for the vision I hold dear — **a vision of a Texas where everyone can thrive.**

Each fundraising deadline we meet is a testament to our collective strength. We stand together in this endeavor, and together, **we can carve out a place in history by creating change for all Texans.**

I want to express my deepest gratitude for your continued support, and I eagerly look forward to continuing on this path with you, my fearless grassroots team.

Onward,

Brian | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72693802/436092812/1642379951?refcode=em23_231102_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231102_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=e4d37727-cc79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTRkMzc3MjctY2M3OS1lZTExLWIwMDQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=25mtFOjwa-3zFt8SmgHjnTyuHy5k556-m-V9LfPoibQ=)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: My goal is to “Lose Better”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=770%2E135344%2ETWszr3)

Hey there --
If you’ve followed any of our three campaigns, you've heard me say that a key objective for us is to "lose better." That means doing just a little bit better in the heavier Republican-leaning areas of Michigan -- losing with 44% of the vote in Holly Township rather than 39% or losing with 30% of the vote in Conway Township rather than 26%. My last election was a perfect example: We won our race by 5% -- our biggest-ever win margin -- and it was driven, in part, by our “losing better” performance in the most conservative areas of the district.
That's what we have to do to win this Senate race. Joe Biden got 43% of the vote in Bay County in 2020: can we do a little better in 2024? He got 36% of the vote in Delta County: can we do a little better in 2024?
For example, in Livingston County, a county I currently represent, Joe Biden won 37.91% of the vote in 2020. I won 40.06% of the vote in 2022. Those small margins of overperformance -- three percent here, four percent there -- in the places all across the state where we can do just a little bit better, is how we get across the finish line next November.
I am the only Democrat left in the House who has won in a district that went for Romney in 2012, Trump in 2016 and Trump again in 2020. That's because I campaign everywhere and take no vote for granted.
This is what we have to do to win this Senate race. Since we kicked off our race in February, I have traveled to 25 counties across the state, attended hundreds of events, and met thousands of Michiganders -- talking to people directly about the issues that really matter to them and their families and going to places early in the campaign that are not thought to be traditional Democratic strongholds.
**That’s why I say: Lose better.**
But a campaign like this requires all-hands-on-deck. We have just over a year to reach as many voters as possible to keep Michigan blue, but it’s going to take all of us working together. That’s why I would love to earn your support today. [**Will you consider making your first online contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Michigan?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231102-1-30&t=2&akid=770%2E135344%2ETWszr3)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-nov23.3eWQbG&refcode=em231102-1-30&t=21&akid=770%2E135344%2ETWszr3)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-nov23.F34f-I&refcode=em231102-1-30&t=22&akid=770%2E135344%2ETWszr3)**
---
****

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-nov23.3rl2W8&refcode=em231102-1-30&t=24&akid=770%2E135344%2ETWszr3)**

****
Thank you,
Elissa

name: =?utf-8?B?UmFxdWVsIFRlcsOhbg==?=
subject: What can be accomplished together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110223_accomplishedtogether&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110223_accomplishedtogether&amount=10]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110223_accomplishedtogether&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110223_accomplishedtogether&amount=10]
When workers stick together and fight, we win. Unions are key to ensuring workers get the fair wages and benefits they deserve, and in Congress, I will fight to make sure our union siblings have the support they need.
When I started as a community organizer nearly two decades ago with Mi Familia Vota, a SEIU civic participation program, I learned just how vital unions were to working families and our well-being. That’s why we’re so honored to have been endorsed by local labor unions like the UFCW Local 99, the Communications Workers of America Arizona State Council, and the Arizona Education Association. But we need you on our team as well. If you support strong unions, fair wages, and good benefits, will you join our campaign with a contribution of $10 or more today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110223_accomplishedtogether&amount=10]
The United Auto Workers have reached tentative agreements with Ford, GM, and Stellantis that would result in well-deserved gains for their workers. This a huge win not just for autoworkers but for workers across industries and across our nation. It shows what working people can accomplish when we stand together.
I congratulate the United Auto Workers for winning this fight. It’s a win for all of us. Especially in Arizona, as we fight against the big Kroger/Albertsons corporate merger that would hurt grocery store workers, consumers, and so many of our community.
As your next Congresswoman, I will fight to ensure our working families receive the dignity and respect they deserve. Donate $10 to our campaign today to help us get there >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110223_accomplishedtogether&amount=10]
In solidarity,
Raquel Terán

For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_110223_accomplishedtogether]

name: Joe Kent
subject: “unfair” to call Hezbollah terrorists?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
Townhall published a bombshell report on Marie Perez: she defended the terrorist group Hezbollah in her blog.
She wrote it was "unfair to say Hezbollah is an entirely terrorist group."
I know firsthand that Hezbollah is a terrorist group: I fought against them in Iraq. It is appalling that Marie Perez would argue Hezbollah is not a terrorist organization.
Please donate today to help send a veteran who will ban funding for terrorists to Washington: [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/AkbSmqUcN6892gmOk37639uYLg/fn6WgEG8892u0PvhAJue0uhA).
Perez is dangerous because she is siding with the very same Hezbollah terrorists who are attacking our troops in Iraq and Syria - the same troops she voted to leave in the crosshairs of Hezbollah.
Washington's Third District needs a representative who has the experience necessary to protect our national security. Marie Perez is ignorant of the threat that terrorist groups like Hezbollah pose.
Please donate to ensure I defeat my radical opponent at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/AkbSmqUcN6892gmOk37639uYLg/fn6WgEG8892u0PvhAJue0uhA). You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
Marie Perez is a radical who has tried to claim that Hezbollah, a group that kidnapped and murdered Americans, is not actually a terrorist organization.
You can help get a conservative Republican into Congress by donating today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/AkbSmqUcN6892gmOk37639uYLg/fn6WgEG8892u0PvhAJue0uhA).
Will you please help me meet our goal so we can send a Special Forces veteran to Congress?
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
PS - If you're appalled at Marie's defense of terrorism, support my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/AkbSmqUcN6892gmOk37639uYLg/fn6WgEG8892u0PvhAJue0uhA).
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

name: Andy Beshear
subject: We CAN keep moving Kentucky forward.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Because of supporters like you, this campaign is just one week away from securing another four years of growth and progress for our Commonwealth. Peter,

First, I want to say thank you. Because of supporters like you, this campaign is just one week away from securing another four years of growth and progress for our Commonwealth.

Everyone who has donated money, knocked on doors, delivered yard signs, purchased merch, attended our events, or done anything to help us spread the word have made this possible.

I truly couldn't be here without you.

Since I took office, our economy has been on fire – we secured the lowest unemployment rate in Kentucky history, helped create 48,000 new jobs, and recorded Kentucky's two best years of economic development ever.

And with your help, we're going to continue moving Kentucky forward. I'm committed to bringing people together, overcoming politics, and doing what's best for Kentucky families.

We've come this far, and now is not the time to let up. So, if you are able, [**please consider chipping in to my campaign today to help us secure the future of Kentucky name: Team Kennedy
subject: Signature needed – Security for RFK, Jr to secure democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
There is no precedent for denying Secret Service protection for a presidential candidate — until now.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=1)
---
Hi Peter, For democracy to function, the public must know that elections, and not violence, will decide who takes public office. That is why the United States has granted Secret Service protection to all major Presidential candidates, up to a year prior to an election. But there is no precedent for denying an application for protection. Every candidate who has ever asked for protection has received it. Last Wednesday, for the second time this election season, an intruder entered Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s home in Los Angeles. He had written hundreds of emails to the campaign, which were included in his application for Secret Service protection, one of which made mention of a "bullet in [Mr. Kennedy's] brain." A month earlier, a man had shown up at one of Mr. Kennedy's campaign events carrying loaded weapons and posing as a U.S. Marshal. [](https://security.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=2) | [](https://security.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=3 "Sign the Petition") [Sign the Petition](https://security.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=3)
---
In both cases, Mr. Kennedy's private security detail apprehended the individuals and turned them over to the police. **But the incidents demonstrate the necessity for Secret Service protection for Mr. Kennedy. Withholding protection puts him and members of the public who attend campaign events at risk.**
Furthermore, it would be incredibly destabilizing for our nation if another Kennedy came to harm in the course of Presidential politics.
You can't have a functioning democracy when candidates aren't safe. **Whether or not you support the campaign,**[**please sign the petition**](https://security.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=4)**urging the White House to grant Mr. Kennedy Secret Service protection.**
Some people suspect that the Biden administration is denying Secret Service protection in order to drain the campaign of funds (private security is extremely expensive). You can help with that too, by contributing to the campaign. [Your donation](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=5) will help keep Bobby safe.
Thank you for your support of RFK, Jr.'s safety.
Team Kennedy
[https://www.kennedy24.com/](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=6)
[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=7) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=8) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=9) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_service_petition_non_d3&n=10)

body:

I’m so thankful, y’all. I know our fundraising push over the last week has meant a lot of emails in your inbox. I know those emails might get a little repetitive. So I hope _you_ know that your attention and commitment really do mean so much to all of us. Grassroots supporters like you are helping to build this movement from the ground up. Truly, everything I do on the campaign trail — from meeting with voters to holding rallies — is only possible because of generous donors. I know that you’re putting your faith in me. I’m putting mine in you, too. I know that we are strong enough to move Tennessee forward together. Thank you a thousand times. Gloria [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72694042/436093691/209297649?refcode=ea.687586b0-cd79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.687586b0-cd79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODc1ODZiMC1jZDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSyF6N5qntWqbiXLuV2Z7-CrM-D3wT-o-NTpkXdTiBk=) **_[P.S. | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

[There’s a movement afoot for change — join us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72694045/436093694/-849459103?refcode=ea.687586b0-cd79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.687586b0-cd79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODc1ODZiMC1jZDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSyF6N5qntWqbiXLuV2Z7-CrM-D3wT-o-NTpkXdTiBk=&emci=daa906b5-c079-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=687586b0-cd79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=46764483) | [**DONATE TODAY**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72694046/436093695/209297649?amount=25&refcode=ea.687586b0-cd79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ms=ea.687586b0-cd79-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODc1ODZiMC1jZDc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LSyF6N5qntWqbiXLuV2Z7-CrM-D3wT-o-NTpkXdTiBk=)

clean_body: Thank you. | I’m so thankful, y’all. I know our fundraising push over the last week has meant a lot of emails in your inbox. I know those emails might get a little repetitive. So I hope you know that your attention and commitment really do mean so much to all of us. Grassroots supporters like you are helping to build this movement from the ground up. Truly, everything I do on the campaign trail — from meeting with voters to holding rallies — is only possible because of generous donors. I know that you’re putting your faith in me. I’m putting mine in you, too. I know that we are strong enough to move Tennessee forward together. Thank you a thousand times. Gloria = = | = If you’ve already contributed, thank you so much! It can take our records time to update, but we have your donation. | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Team Pramila
subject: Three things to say:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We can’t power this campaign without you.
#
Peter,
Our team moved mountains to reach our October end of month goal — and we did it!
We have three things to say: **thank you, thank you, thank you.**
With your support, dedication, and faith in this movement, we were able to ensure that our campaign can continue working at full power in November.
Your support, no matter the amount, allows us to keep pace with our plans and ensure that our fight continues 24/7 - 365 days a year.
Peter, we can’t power this campaign without you. [**Can we count on you to make a donation of any amount to help us keep up our momentum from October and start November off in the strongest possible way?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46949?refcode=em20231102-3118&t=1&akid=3118%2E420207%2EhWV398)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/46949?refcode=em20231102-3118&t=20&akid=3118%2E420207%2EhWV398)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila

name: The President
subject: Wow, you’re telling me for the first time?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO
body:
| [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=05a8a3cd1d5c49059270b96004211c63&_e=MmjfTckVge1i2BH4RYg5E6PTAlbcpO3L63X_LOrIOG7i6QlgwApr4Vv44bSa7KpyiWT_0_c8eS5D0zcnRLnVvNo2mGtaZsiEaDs562xevMneE3w8P206-KQrpfAPyc65H2XUrKygJYp7gGm74oeZI0_xC1ZvVSL_XU53gJtpP1HEY5Sm2hUmTqO-k6WwX0yn55lOMNmSFdlBP-OuGCVvEYwVYlGq6oObwRYShlgYPd30PIfeTIIVpjtuqqwkkZoxcmmlDe-nR75XWDA0hdKxdhv3Ic1paKYB4ixACEvydCNuDCVJlgpoONuspLpXFXeJ)
---
**FROM THE DESK OF THE PRESIDENT**
Friend,

We missed our deadline. The 2024 RED WAVE is in grave danger. It's incredible how far we've come, but when they told me we missed our deadline, WOW, I was shocked.

It's no secret that we need a majority in the next election -- there are 34 seats up for grabs, and every single one is a MUST-WIN if we're going to WIN and Take Back America.

We're almost a year away from the most critical election of our entire lives -- and if we don't win -- this country's in SERIOUS TROUBLE.

I didn't want to be the one to tell you -- but this is bad. [**I need your help as soon as possible.**](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=05a8a3cd1d5c49059270b96004211c63&_e=MmjfTckVge1i2BH4RYg5E6PTAlbcpO3L63X_LOrIOG7i6QlgwApr4Vv44bSa7KpyiWT_0_c8eS5D0zcnRLnVvNo2mGtaZsiEaDs562xevMneE3w8P206-KQrpfAPyc65KA3DY2IpxQiekiwfsjXGUZ2GCRWXDykOACmfjeCvd4IFtDvTNY-AZLvHspltTap_P8dypU0vo7TPrvYw7FDaqVbUZVC_7tAPhN4-0kRpzL9N9YIDWRpck2oXxlmUnlx3ZhUyPzO0oDTl6NfGarmFEcjh6tgwiNP47OtdPIlsVsEaT5nwkpXsBK2RYPXeHH20)

**This is the last time I 'll be reaching out to you about this -- I'm heading to a meeting soon to discuss the next steps -- and I want to tell everyone YOU were the first person to step up. **

clean_body: | FROM THE DESK OF THE PRESIDENT Friend, We missed our deadline. The 2024 RED WAVE is in grave danger. It's incredible how far we've come, but when they told me we missed our deadline, WOW, I was shocked. It's no secret that we need a majority in the next election -- there are 34 seats up for grabs, and every single one is a MUST-WIN if we're going to WIN and Take Back America. We're almost a year away from the most critical election of our entire lives -- and if we don't win -- this country's in SERIOUS TROUBLE. I didn't want to be the one to tell you -- but this is bad. This is the last time I 'll be reaching out to you about this -- I'm heading to a meeting soon to discuss the next steps -- and I want to tell everyone YOU were the first person to step up. Since this deadline was so HUGE, and we missed it BIGLY, I 'm personally offering you a 25X Impact on your contribution. | Everything and ANYTHING helps. We're fighting for our freedoms, and many are already willing to give it up. I'm counting on you. Best, The President of the GOP Senate Victory PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Have you met my colleague Kat?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, I’m honored to serve alongside Kat Cammack. She delivers results for the people of Florida’s 3rd district day in and day out. We have a message for Democrats who constantly attack us: _we’re sick and tired of being put into a box because we a conservative women._ According to their book, all women should be Democrats. Well, we disagree. But while they throw shade at us, and plan to defeat us in 2024, we are fighting for safer streets, a secure border, an end to out-of-control spending, and for less government! We are here to WORK, no games. Two proud conservative women, fighting for YOU. We are reaching out today because the constant attacks are becoming unbearable... Democrats are targeting us in 2024, and they’re determined to silence us because we threaten their narrative. We need your help to keep FLORIDA RED. **[Can you split a donation between two conservative women that are defending our Florida Freedoms?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=97ea79c6f60c4fd8b8ddad8cd4d2ada0&_e=rJVHE_Qu_6MCQ3Q33rQMRytTaqKFbNUx19osTwm9FUveJaz96b2A3TEaa2OBmhnal8KX2kdFJhrEzzcDICsaDn3HBRu0yAKQr-eGg-K94PhIW3O_7A2JAF-c30oCLJpt6V8dRx-dfbkM0Fts0aUh6PL7LdoJRNk70ApmeO4E92g6ho0gRYLG_ehRq7ggZm6PH0SrmV8MYSYW3H7dwPspXfPuKjfm5PrrcsfZWv9xOzAydlMZSRPtX3htTL0l74ZK0JEEraUvyr15ZvUhdeknUDMYaQ80ZlrP5z2vSZ4a_3nZoR41q3k-hJ7ASCJv-DrDB3KBcDQccFlwsi4OJ2ctXwGxmm1cjFOMQqyWZDfJZ3M%3D)**

subject: This isn’t a one-person job

Fellow conservative, We've known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason. I'll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don't think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure. You know that Democrats HATE ME. I know that Democrats HATE ME. But I bet you didn't know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you? When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he's going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year's election. **Texans know me; Americans know me.** It's no secret what I stand for. But I'll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they'll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides. **We cannot - WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you're still with me and Senate Republicans. _If you are, I 'm asking for you to send us _just_ $5 right now_.**
---
[**Chip in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5266e612a5d84bf3b4400817d5aa4512&_e=nQA2vagJXENpLZjnmUuPNg3YTl-cKulguOOd16XXfzppkfww-W9BZMkoeP6gYljpaOklcUhBtGB_4-ptjf-YTAEVfP7G4tdugZzbJefncuOlyqVwsMgBfsRiLan2PQLDC8HDqESsxyIu0mvgTrTjCabPXMCiO5dKPH27JJlUlk2Zz6udcHeFM5okU752ZClhZcW2l62CUUxBpP3y-_4vYBSP8GrU5wJ21sM-NqH9k3CkP_vyfwT21M7yJ573QhMZY4lUJ80nWxSuoJApJdLQM3X7nt1BbQvogVGK1eOAXimf1-to-QDYiHxFZELdegCct-2A3AMT0D49ZG7GauFaP7m_OrQdJeq3L4FQhKFKOi3VXz1abyXP0YcHwtFBGj35d_1aK21l676wm97mcXXLYFHg1rhCi7aRTozRSIx3HJIqLjMLVyToBZ-kqFHdZ4Wd5M4J0N_dG2bK7mOurLmC3FB1moBFuJKLWZKr4fnCH1fjLv7OwPsWjH_Rzq8tFiBYwr_2thq1myugdF51OZmvNIKWYhsArB8TEfyfkqYlzy6Mj7LfHn6TMZ_RBO1w4WJus2-39Gki3ktKTkCOosxNNQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: You know me. And you know that I wouldn’t be asking for your help unless there were a sincere need. | | | Fellow conservative, We've known one another for a long time, so you know by now that when I ask for favors there is a reason. I'll be straight with you: my campaign needs your immediate financial support. A lot of folks around the country don't think that my seat is at risk, but the truth is that no one knows that for sure. You know that Democrats HATE ME. I know that Democrats HATE ME. But I bet you didn't know that they hate me to the tune of $52,000 per day, did you? When my opponent announced his fundraising numbers for the third quarter earlier this month, it shocked me. From July 1st to September 30th, he raised more than $4.7 million from the liberal coasts that he's going to use to smear my good name ahead of next year's election. Texans know me; Americans know me. It's no secret what I stand for. But I'll tell you this: if Democrats are allowed to vastly outspend us on the airwaves, there is no telling what kind of twisted lies they'll try to spin to make my supporters flip sides. We cannot - WE WILL not allow them to win. I need to know you're still with me and Senate Republicans. If you are, I 'm asking for you to send us just $5 right now. By the end of the day, we need 5,000 individuals to donate $5 or more to keep Texas Red and help us flip the Senate. For Freedom, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I am overwhelmed by your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
It is no secret that my life has changed drastically in the last seven days. |
---
Fellow American - it is no secret that my life has changed drastically in the last seven days.

I am running on little sleep and late nights, but it is all worth it because I know we are working for a shared goal: to preserve freedom in this great country.

Among all the chaos, I have truly been blown away by the outpouring support from conservatives across the country, and **I want to take a moment to offer my sincere gratitude.**

**Thank you for the opportunity to serve.**

**_Thank you for the chance to lead._**

We are stronger as a team. I know we have a long road ahead of us, to get this country back on track, **but I am bullish about the future of America.**

Thank you for supporting me on this path.

God bless,
Speaker Mike Johnson

PS – Democrats are already coming at me with force. If we want to expand our majority in 2024 and get this country back on track, [**I need your help. Would you consider donating to the cause today?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=90058427de6445658f72736f4ae422ac&_e=lmgSqUxXwzATEatx2ypUQgQR4J5PwFNqoImdmXzSvqvZWf-c04otjzlQkhhtJg0ew-14NBXs5-6yKPqc39TIo-qEj9ab7M6Si5mlhLKHr3Mg2cUMffr0kP6jSXuN_ebA76EgwhxKjxdlB3Yk-vAEkbu_ziP9WhAwKCnQQrYOUuTSvXbzsXsWex_sjlL2uKIQvwuDnEOg0mHwQ36IpFbWZcO4Cy46B467_2_zBV8XI9pKIwYfIkMvhPRcHbZIiaFxA1STnMbl7tPMv7rG_efke8-4OAHdtrDvYv_O-LyUleRfCYPGtmWgfTsIeHxf8AgvN5qzBLeNod2nUtFumxdbFz0cab3LM7GzDeo6LWDmggur97jLyPhKrhg7LT_zOgPMVyqoObzNKVD3q3LyUfw63A%3D%3D)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Friend, my first message to grassroots conservatives
body:
I’m humbled.

[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kM1uqzAQhZ9m2AWNx8TGCy9ubuSuummUqF0axg5WTaBAWvH2VdK02_n5zqfj-zGnuFrQOyDqEs9ABPIfEF0XefLH4_O0bvb96-Zpe6LzbUn_gWhZx_B3-YCUofcp36Z6X7CtyIvYFsEKZWqjFNZYdFbUslFbo1EwcpRGV8TbJkRGDIG1LpIlJCkEEkkUwpSemyiUQd_ElmWNUOE9qIxTCEuXLu9hYp_yWrZDX2TbLcs438UckBu4KS_XNofr_PPVDj2QeygDuU8gd345SPXxdqARpLuXIPdh2HVVFpdisjx-pZzTrDRUeP6lfAcAAP__c2NfaQ) | [Unsubscribe](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kLturDAQhp9m3C2yx6yBwsXZg5wq5a7S-rpYMRdho4i3j5aQtP_MfPPp1-OSYtglNDdAHKLLgAj8HyBuhT_0_f6-7pd-_Li8XR_4fA3xPyCWffF_myek8qOO6ZU2PXGyRs2CJV4y0bWdELSlZJC1EQ1nKNxVW8N9MMi0tuHqRaCN5h2JEilyxigip4x1lXYmMNFRbYJ1vKVQ0-NRFVbvyxCnT786HdNe2XkkSQ6lLPkQU4BqdqaaNpv8ln-u7DwCqlMZUOXNZLvGpcR5yoBqm87EeODqaIT3fr4NdWITWaVbvmJKMYsGavr8RX4HAAD__1hGZns)

| Friend, it is the honor of a lifetime to serve as the 56th Speaker of the House. I’m humbled that my Republican colleagues in the House united behind me as the next Republican Speaker, and I owe everyone who voted for them a debt of gratitude. It’s a debt I intend to repay by being the best servant leader I can be. The Speaker’s gavel is a solemn responsibility, especially in a time like this when the course of history will be set by our actions over the next year. I relied on my faith in God each day before I was Speaker, and I’ll continue to do so each day after. **Scripture is very clear: God is the one who raises those up in authority.** _**I believe that each one of us in Congress has a huge responsibility, to use the gifts that God has given us to serve the people of this great country, for one simple reason; they deserve it.**_ I’m determined to save our country from the powers which seek to destroy it, but I cannot do that alone.
---
| [ **DONATE NOW** ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGPnSAUhX_NdaeByxvUhYu25nXV5Uy6MwgXpRUwCJn47xvN62zP-cJ3uMrvm7PnAO13QFydOQARxDdALFl8qPf3X-msR_-7_vn2gctV4g9AzOdOX-TrkYa8ctuVtmNlhgcqbnVFA5d910vJOlatgyQ01M2czcyKzhikR9_aTktrkUneVW5AhoJzhigY532jzGy57JmarTaiY_Bgt6ixiSivLvylZJTbzkZHX23DmvN-3MOegM-DdEnUfLqQyFwE4HON5aB6iXs9q5w3WlIswdS2BHO1y2wnE8MU_URp8n9qT1M6pnsWwxbEU_lYQgYxvjFAmS5FcmEBMeZUCFCW7KcjlqQJxLjn9Io8GVc8iHH-n2jld-WWAGK8Rfe_GYpXnSlduM0GqzSY_dNtmztkCw-23DfQ0f8LAAD___LQjr0)
---
I’m humbly asking patriots to unite together in our common cause of protecting and preserving the Constitution for generations to come and reigniting the promise of America for every citizen of this great country. **[Right now, I’m focused on getting Republicans back to work on the promises we made to voters, but I also desperately need to boost my fundraising so we can not only maintain, but grow our conservative majority.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGPnSAUhX_NdaeByxvUhYu25nXV5Uy6MwgXpRUwCJn47xvN62zP-cJ3uMrvm7PnAO13QFydOQARxDdALFl8qPf3X-msR_-7_vn2gctV4g9AzOdOX-TrkYa8ctuVtmNlhgcqbnVFA5d910vJOlatgyQ01M2czcyKzhikR9_aTktrkUneVW5AhoJzhigY532jzGy57JmarTaiY_Bgt6ixiSivLvylZJTbzkZHX23DmvN-3MOegM-DdEnUfLqQyFwE4HON5aB6iXs9q5w3WlIswdS2BHO1y2wnE8MU_URp8n9qT1M6pnsWwxbEU_lYQgYxvjFAmS5FcmEBMeZUCFCW7KcjlqQJxLjn9Io8GVc8iHH-n2jld-WWAGK8Rfe_GYpXnSlduM0GqzSY_dNtmztkCw-23DfQ0f8LAAD___LQjr0) **
| [ **DONATE NOW** ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGPnSAUhX_NdaeByxvUhYu25nXV5Uy6MwgXpRUwCJn47xvN62zP-cJ3uMrvm7PnAO13QFydOQARxDdALFl8qPf3X-msR_-7_vn2gctV4g9AzOdOX-TrkYa8ctuVtmNlhgcqbnVFA5d910vJOlatgyQ01M2czcyKzhikR9_aTktrkUneVW5AhoJzhigY532jzGy57JmarTaiY_Bgt6ixiSivLvylZJTbzkZHX23DmvN-3MOegM-DdEnUfLqQyFwE4HON5aB6iXs9q5w3WlIswdS2BHO1y2wnE8MU_URp8n9qT1M6pnsWwxbEU_lYQgYxvjFAmS5FcmEBMeZUCFCW7KcjlqQJxLjn9Io8GVc8iHH-n2jld-WWAGK8Rfe_GYpXnSlduM0GqzSY_dNtmztkCw-23DfQ0f8LAAD___LQjr0)
---
There are dozens of highly competitive battleground seats that we must win in 2024, or Hakeem Jeffries will take the Speaker's Gavel and immediately go back to business as usual on January 4th, 2025. **Saving our country from the Radical Left is not a small task, and it will require an overwhelming effort from grassroots conservatives from every county in every state.** [**If you’re able, I’d be humbled to have your support.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEGPnSAUhX_NdaeByxvUhYu25nXV5Uy6MwgXpRUwCJn47xvN62zP-cJ3uMrvm7PnAO13QFydOQARxDdALFl8qPf3X-msR_-7_vn2gctV4g9AzOdOX-TrkYa8ctuVtmNlhgcqbnVFA5d910vJOlatgyQ01M2czcyKzhikR9_aTktrkUneVW5AhoJzhigY532jzGy57JmarTaiY_Bgt6ixiSivLvylZJTbzkZHX23DmvN-3MOegM-DdEnUfLqQyFwE4HON5aB6iXs9q5w3WlIswdS2BHO1y2wnE8MU_URp8n9qT1M6pnsWwxbEU_lYQgYxvjFAmS5FcmEBMeZUCFCW7KcjlqQJxLjn9Io8GVc8iHH-n2jld-WWAGK8Rfe_GYpXnSlduM0GqzSY_dNtmztkCw-23DfQ0f8LAAD___LQjr0) _In Liberty,_ Speaker Mike Johnson
| **Paid for by House GOP Battleground Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress, E-PAC, and NY Republican Federal Campaign Committee.** **[https://gopbattlegroundfund.com/](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8js1uhCAUhZ8GdmMuFwVdsGg7sasuZ9ItckFJ8SeKaXz7RtPM9pwv3zl2XFIMh2H6nSEOkTaGyOQbQ9yzfNrH42s9bvfx-_ZZPbE_S_xgiPlY_Iv8lxR-tDGdqb5zMiVaERz3RqimbpSCGvhggLSV0AVbhQYqjS4IVEELcKImqIlHg4BSCECUIERTWOqCUA3YLjiSNbASrqEirN7nIU4_fiUb01G4eeTJDDkv23WsZdj289LZnJPv13mfKOwTnRzDlq-Glt-YUtyUZiX0l9TN418AAAD__wVUU3c)**

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: please look here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Peter, sorry to bother you again, but it looks like you still haven’t taken my November 2023 Priorities Survey.
---
When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work for the next half of 2023, the initial response was overwhelming. I received responses from thousands of supporters across the nation, but I never saw yours come through.
**That’s why I've decided to reopen this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will _only_ remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight. **
**So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my November 2023 Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form:[http://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-november-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72695018/436097066/-940949664?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1240-su-nd&refcode=jtk1240-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGM1ODc4Zi1kMzc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dUySBmaVZuK0e6MpwO_YrUYy40V-nlU6Snt0YNOGR-w=&emci=55b1be7f-6d76-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&emdi=e0c5878f-d379-ee11-b004-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you.
Letitia James
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Wed, Nov 1, 2023
Subject: Can you share your thoughts by midnight?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/72695022/436097070/-1997846888?code=jtk1240-su-nd&refcode=jtk1240-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGM1ODc4Zi1kMzc5LWVlMTEtYjAwNC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dUySBmaVZuK0e6MpwO_YrUYy40V-nlU6Snt0YNOGR-w=)
---
Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. Throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
So when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed that – _no matter what_ – I would be a voice for the voiceless and speak for those who had been silenced for so long.
**I’m proud to say that I’ve kept that promise – and this Priorities Survey is a key part of keeping it to this day.**

Peter - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a06c59c522204121870b0d2d271ba99a&_e=uaBFrPNjAPdt-FfqWgubi-yA7TYqwBVKEC_KGDcpPiQbpqRcEaObSqKB6jrDcLvXmi4oykFG6Zfp4iKF1IC8JegyLzizrOpSt_3Agtex1lyQh_i1QXQsyuELb1TqrL1a0ejJAsdS5_XOFo8rnb0M_dD8t0LTCyCKIWZsAUhE5IwYdnscsnjeENAOmZ1WXx9IaNq6HkOIdziDCjclI4rlVuhTxG6J12_tTRzn8Koeb5Tk723r3DVvjLXPiHZ2LGsdBw67424KwbCcFJ9wwPlk_kSIFpT052-Z07W57LMu3dvNMKsIzbwV_gglN1rXwJbeXzy4kheE_wAgGkYGXVvahpOkL85zoBO0SZy0HJ0jjQpiFZieXsr8MrBAe-Wuzw21)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a06c59c522204121870b0d2d271ba99a&_e=uaBFrPNjAPdt-FfqWgubi-yA7TYqwBVKEC_KGDcpPiQbpqRcEaObSqKB6jrDcLvXmi4oykFG6Zfp4iKF1IC8JegyLzizrOpSt_3Agtex1lyQh_i1QXQsyuELb1TqrL1a0ejJAsdS5_XOFo8rnb0M_dD8t0LTCyCKIWZsAUhE5IwYdnscsnjeENAOmZ1WXx9IaNq6HkOIdziDCjclI4rlVuhTxG6J12_tTRzn8Koeb5TCU5u_xMlN2UtGrSeMiiejVfpGV3LEClZeYOYm5c0JlwAcDII9eS6GEHC1a1nOupukw16AiZV35huU3ZuC3EUZRVaUF0vjTlib9EWPtE-SR2DwDYupAdp8J3Uqb4_MzakcEWwcjd2pk10BrAxIxFC1)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a06c59c522204121870b0d2d271ba99a&_e=uaBFrPNjAPdt-FfqWgubi-yA7TYqwBVKEC_KGDcpPiQbpqRcEaObSqKB6jrDcLvXmi4oykFG6Zfp4iKF1IC8JegyLzizrOpSt_3Agtex1lyQh_i1QXQsyuELb1TqrL1a0ejJAsdS5_XOFo8rnb0M_dD8t0LTCyCKIWZsAUhE5IwYdnscsnjeENAOmZ1WXx9IaNq6HkOIdziDCjclI4rlVuhTxG6J12_tTRzn8Koeb5RnXa8_4tn2xrQl8cIpLyq_A1OwKDBOFGh1sOZFQTfll5z9TVbA_45iAQE_QwS_9BmiGP9ctlxbtWvEokQM2UQa2MWN0tpoHM0HSz3-LsLyvFDFXK7M4cLGjKf5NHm8kj7q1L4-wSnHWnp0G8-3wE1n)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| **_MIKE JOHNSON_**
* * *
Mike is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana.

[**WILL YOU STAND WITH MIKE?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a06c59c522204121870b0d2d271ba99a&_e=uaBFrPNjAPdt-FfqWgubi-yA7TYqwBVKEC_KGDcpPiQbpqRcEaObSqKB6jrDcLvXmi4oykFG6Zfp4iKF1IC8JegyLzizrOpSt_3Agtex1lyQh_i1QXQsyuELb1TqrL1a0ejJAsdS5_XOFo8rnb0M_dD8t0LTCyCKIWZsAUhE5IwYdnscsnjeENAOmZ1WXx9IaNq6HkOIdziDCjclI4rlVuhTxG6J12_tTRzn8Koeb5RISFj6ZGPeKAM_BJXr2_yeAU2sahyYYAOVdy_I9zeFyoPEoVzS2y9PZHIa6xQO1PWi-6Y1p4fjj3g2jEM_X0IYKtILoLXwT_a3_-Kn7t4WTPfdnw-RDxFkvQ3ym7CP_XMQLRYlTsYHMRJR46Xd4qo-)

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Why I’m endorsing Katie Porter for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Katie asks the tough questions that too many in Washington are afraid to ask.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=32488%2E3422442%2Edb2ygg)
Hey Derek, Robert Garcia here. I’m the former mayor of Long Beach and a current Congressman serving Long Beach and Southeast LA. This week, **I enthusiastically endorsed Katie Porter to be California’s next U.S. Senator.**
In this tough race, Katie is not taking any federal lobbyist _or_ corporate PAC money. [**More on why I chose to endorse her below, but first, can you give $5 to her people-powered campaign right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231102-2?refcode=EMAN1102_2_END_20231102_V1_F&refcode2=32488_3422442_db2ygg&akid=32488%2E3422442%2Edb2ygg)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231102-2?refcode=EMAN1102_2_END_20231102_V1_F&refcode2=32488_3422442_db2ygg&akid=32488%2E3422442%2Edb2ygg)
When I ran for the U.S. House in 2022, Katie was the very first Member of Congress to endorse my campaign. Her support was incredibly valuable, and now that we serve together, I’ve seen firsthand what a force of nature and true warrior she is for working people.
**Lots of politicians talk about making change, but Katie’s actually done it.** Before being elected, she took on the Big Banks and helped deliver financial relief for California families following the 2008 mortgage crisis. And in Congress, she’s passed real legislation to crack down on fossil fuel companies and lower prescription drug costs.
Katie asks the tough questions that too many in Washington are afraid to ask. She’s exactly who we need representing California in the U.S. Senate.
I can’t wait to continue working with her to address our affordability crisis, invest in housing, and combat climate change. [**There are just four months until the primary, and she urgently needs your support. We’d be so grateful if you could pitch in a few bucks today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231102-2?refcode=EMAN1102_2_END_20231102_V1_F&refcode2=32488_3422442_db2ygg&akid=32488%2E3422442%2Edb2ygg)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231102-2?refcode=EMAN1102_2_END_20231102_V1_F&refcode2=32488_3422442_db2ygg&akid=32488%2E3422442%2Edb2ygg)
Onward!
Robert Garcia

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN1102_2_END_20231102_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=32488_3422442_db2ygg&akid=32488%2E3422442%2Edb2ygg)**

clean_body: Katie asks the tough questions that too many in Washington are afraid to ask. Hey Derek, Robert Garcia here. I’m the former mayor of Long Beach and a current Congressman serving Long Beach and Southeast LA. This week, I enthusiastically endorsed Katie Porter to be California’s next U.S. Senator. In this tough race, Katie is not taking any federal lobbyist or corporate PAC money. When I ran for the U.S. House in 2022, Katie was the very first Member of Congress to endorse my campaign. Her support was incredibly valuable, and now that we serve together, I’ve seen firsthand what a force of nature and true warrior she is for working people. Lots of politicians talk about making change, but Katie’s actually done it. Before being elected, she took on the Big Banks and helped deliver financial relief for California families following the 2008 mortgage crisis. And in Congress, she’s passed real legislation to crack down on fossil fuel companies and lower prescription drug costs. Katie asks the tough questions that too many in Washington are afraid to ask. She’s exactly who we need representing California in the U.S. Senate. I can’t wait to continue working with her to address our affordability crisis, invest in housing, and combat climate change. Onward! Robert Garcia Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Friend,

I am so grateful for your support.

Each month, we face big fundraising deadlines and other hurdles that threaten to hinder the progress. But thanks to you, we met our latest match.

Our movement for women's rights, workers' rights, protection for immigrants and refugees, affordable healthcare, and LGBTQ+ rights, and empowering our communities gets stronger by the day, and your support is a big part of that.

As we get to work for the people this November and beyond, let's keep working together to win this race for all who have been left behind.

Today and always, I'm proud to be in this fight with you.

With gratitude,
Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Copy%20of%20Sepi%20high%20res%20headshot-min.jpg]

name: Hill Harper
subject: Can I be honest?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231102&t=1&akid=523%2E62735%2E_VcNoG)
Can I be honest, Peter? 👀
We’re gearing up to fight a tough battle in Michigan’s Senate race — against corporate special interests, D.C. insiders, AND the GOP. (National Republicans attacked me just days after we launched our campaign!)
**But with grassroots support, we can beat them and win this race.**
[**I’m asking if you’ll chip in your first donation today to power our campaign, which is all about bringing positive change to the people of Michigan and building a government that actually listens to our communities.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231102?amount=5&refcode=em20231102-523&refcode2=523_62735__VcNoG&akid=523%2E62735%2E_VcNoG)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231102?amount=5&refcode=em20231102-523&refcode2=523_62735__VcNoG&akid=523%2E62735%2E_VcNoG)**
We may not be the favored pick by the political elites...but I firmly believe that we will WIN THIS RACE!
I believe it because people are sick and tired of being ignored, and are ready to unite around our vision for a better Michigan — including guaranteeing access to health care, protecting our freedoms, and getting special interests out of politics.
But the establishment would love to see us fail — and they’ll even spend money on attack ads to ensure we fall short.
**That’s where you come in, Peter.**[**Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help us fend off attack ads, grow our grassroots movement, and win this important race?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231102?amount=5&refcode=em20231102-523&refcode2=523_62735__VcNoG&akid=523%2E62735%2E_VcNoG)

Thanks so much,
Hill

name: Gov. Gavin Newsom
subject: I wanted you to hear it from me first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
I am excited to announce my support for a visionary leader

[|
---](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/mVXc_8d9ti4eTyXrFbxnmQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnJrjZP0QeaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF0ZWVmYWhzaW1vbi5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmVB3DNEZdbv26hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR)
| | Hi there – it’s Gavin Newsom, and I wanted to reach out to you personally to tell you about why **I am endorsing Lateefah Simon**. But before I elaborate about Lateefah’s visionary leadership, I hope you’ll chip in to help fuel her team’s grassroots efforts. [It is so important that we stand with her in this race](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/mW0j_jXHew8yAhyuFyLxsw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnJrjZP0Q5aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsLWdnbmVuZG9yc2VtZW50VwNzcGNCCmVB3DNEZdbv26hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR). | | [Donate](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/mW0j_jXHew8yAhyuFyLxsw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnJrjZP0Q5aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsLWdnbmVuZG9yc2VtZW50VwNzcGNCCmVB3DNEZdbv26hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR)
---
The reason I hope you’ll donate – an important first step in standing with me and supporting Lateefah – is as simple as this: We need more voices like Lateefah’s fighting on behalf of California.
Lateefah is a visionary. But more than a visionary, she is a proven leader who effects the kind of change that makes her vision a reality.
I have come to know Lateefah as a true force of nature. From winning a MacArthur genius award to serving alongside me as my senior advisor on police reform – [and SO much more](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/6fY0wtUjFRKbUKvxAD1ADg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnJrjZP0Q_aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsLWdnbmVuZG9yc2VtZW50LWFib3V0VwNzcGNCCmVB3DNEZdbv26hSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR) – Lateefah’s list of accomplishments and awards is long and well-deserved. clean_body: I am excited to announce my support for a visionary leader | | Hi there – it’s Gavin Newsom, and I wanted to reach out to you personally to tell you about why I am endorsing Lateefah Simon. But before I elaborate about Lateefah’s visionary leadership, I hope you’ll chip in to help fuel her team’s grassroots efforts. . | | The reason I hope you’ll donate – an important first step in standing with me and supporting Lateefah – is as simple as this: We need more voices like Lateefah’s fighting on behalf of California. Lateefah is a visionary. But more than a visionary, she is a proven leader who effects the kind of change that makes her vision a reality. I have come to know Lateefah as a true force of nature. From winning a MacArthur genius award to serving alongside me as my senior advisor on police reform – – Lateefah’s list of accomplishments and awards is long and well-deserved. But what is most important here is how proud she’s going to make all of us in Congress. When Lateefah goes to Congress, she’s not just bringing the East Bay to Congress. She’s bringing all of California. . If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | ~~ ~~ ~~ ~ ~ ~~ I hope you will stand with me today and help send this phenomenal community leader to Congress. It means the world to me. With deep gratitude, Gavin Newsom | Paid for by Lateefah for Congress. Lateefah for Congress1714 Franklin St #100 - 438Oakland CA, 94612United States "Website"

body:
| | | Peter, the Washington Establishment doesn’t like me, and here’s why.... **1.** I called out Mitch McConnell for compromising our conservative values to please the Democrats and Chuck Schumer. **2.** I challenged him for Senate Republican Leader because conservatives deserve a leader that’s going to fight for them, not Washington’s establishment.
I didn’t come to Washington to make friends. This place is BROKEN, and I’m here to fix it.

If I have to call out members of my own party, then so be it.

**[Republicans need to start acting like real Republicans. Do you stand with me?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=d244f2c3cbfc41faab0f46ba04cb7e5a&_e=AtfdC37il8EMTxLO0P2ftfhXhPTFYXWm1HTPMDj0XV_1wAH5XUfF6mOqv3054wR5fGTOa6GUbLwQ58qttNBBTY8wGimWeXagABUQhjWwhuZIM8FexIJJF_L_ybuVnjJZlq6yEKnb_B7eYRnI2tS3GfoKdFF3mphB0wbbHwvgEV2cOXbStEde0HuYt813h1ZktqDP7j8o630rBBc63w_1P_tpEQdLT5pYYhsKuxxRFBsG9iDoCq_2V0j-Rii_WA4io2haHHPrN1J_XIHySC_oGHW8s6Y33PThiLGuxH8NrQU8Chp6m4sqUh2sXFN4-p8Y_Wgyk7IRnl0DYVpry9bN1xzEhNyyEZm8wGjINRNS9pUQTPWKS18mQc0mOGalnw2T_JmYHoBicn1Zbz4y25UZ0w%3D%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, the Washington Establishment doesn’t like me, and here’s why.... 1. I called out Mitch McConnell for compromising our conservative values to please the Democrats and Chuck Schumer. 2. I challenged him for Senate Republican Leader because conservatives deserve a leader that’s going to fight for them, not Washington’s establishment. I didn’t come to Washington to make friends. This place is BROKEN, and I’m here to fix it. If I have to call out members of my own party, then so be it. Challenging Mitch McConnell was hard, Peter. But I don’t regret it. But now I’m getting attacked by the Washington Establishment because I called them out. I’m running for re-election because our work is far from over. I’m changing the way Washington works and challenging Republicans to start acting like real Republicans, and I need your help.
